name: Jasmyn Jordan
subject: The Left wanted me to hate America
body:
Help students like me hear the truth... | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=2ace7682f1eb4b869a6dc034d83119e6&_t=nRdW0UPCdl8ahBvQ5RkTauh4p6epLjbj-TdG_aEV4MKU7YEHnZyQ_5Ge_7G4iVqmkFATfxTrodt5b3OAjt-TSg0_R08gdcuHy6TOMKS55qA%3D)_
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=2ace7682f1eb4b869a6dc034d83119e6&_e=HgJOmEzAORsnaQdA_byc_NDz_Xmwz7z6hi14Ha6ugiCmCImLitPuKDieFNai6rHiOMaxK-YUkQeBusldFEleMZpRMLftrL-vckphSLstU7vTjJArQlM_AKtiWQYXN0aXaI1J6KFVUocTEBf_bFiqXbnAj-8JHDdCSRy-w38H32eX85lE-MOOHXiF4JxF_x1S634m9PTw7k1C3VSx8WJeLSBhU6fjebo3i9BXzsek1cQmkIUNnoauvZRqX8GY2wCjW3sWBOtIQ6tvn6t_kVVLDnyP2lIIY4uX5kcE3isMvpZBfhQdI29JIQnU6ivQtaHQSIrhVRB3RpNjg2O7-WnDNp1xMsYDCpcsN6CPO3ClC8KOf8eWTwLpfLOXad_Atfpg)
Fellow Patriot,

I wanted to take a moment to share something that worries me about our society.

Too many black students despise America.

Too many black students despise white people.

And many people believe that all black students should think the same way.

My name is **Jasmyn Jordan** , and I'm a student at the University of Iowa. As a young black woman, I was told that I needed to "conform" to the identity that the Left created for me.

White liberals and radical African Americans wanted me to promote Critical Race Theory and speak out about my "oppression."

But my parents didn't raise me to be a victim. My dad is a hard-working, patriotic American truck driver who listens to conservative talk radio. Often, my parents reminded me that in America we can all have our own opinions thanks to freedom of speech.

At the University of Iowa, I chose to become a committed conservative student through Young America's Foundation (YAF), the nation's leading youth outreach organization. I decided more students at the University of Iowa need to be warned about Critical Race Theory and instead hear your conservative ideas!

_The backlash from the campus Left was almost immediate._

The campus Left attacked me, calling me a "token," a bigot, a Nazi, and even a white supremacist.

Even today, they don't like seeing that there is a black female conservative who is actively participating and leading in Young America's Foundation.

But my parents raised me to have courage, so **[I proudly began to share your ideas with my fellow students through YAF](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=2ace7682f1eb4b869a6dc034d83119e6&_e=HgJOmEzAORsnaQdA_byc_NDz_Xmwz7z6hi14Ha6ugiCmCImLitPuKDieFNai6rHiOMaxK-YUkQeBusldFEleMZpRMLftrL-vckphSLstU7vTjJArQlM_AKtiWQYXN0aXaI1J6KFVUocTEBf_bFiqXbnAj-8JHDdCSRy-w38H32eX85lE-MOOHXiF4JxF_x1S634m9PTw7k1C3VSx8WJeLedG4yxIsm0KErDuEYPfkYmIzRJ-g3ikSh-7o5KtTb3vuTpWTEHrhfKbJyWGnstkk-CsWC2MicPfyjwIyX7FckHGXyBDHRQ-b4B9u0qMPmZQVttkgKpvCuPbAco1woQIjZwVjzyo572zH9hYJyPCeoUIcbQ1oKDVMWDxcuSNjMJ8)**. My fellow conservative students and I took the lead to host YAF speakers on campus, including **Matt Walsh** , Lt. Col. **Allen West** , **Vince Everett Ellison** , award-winning swimmer **Paula Scanlan** , and others.

We were determined to share your conservative ideas with as many students as possible at the University of Iowa.

I even testified before the U.S. House Judiciary Committee about the personal attacks I faced for defending free speech on campus. And I have now been appointed as the new national chairwoman for Young Americans for Freedom to oversee the largest coast-to-coast network of young conservatives! [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=2ace7682f1eb4b869a6dc034d83119e6&_e=HgJOmEzAORsnaQdA_byc_NDz_Xmwz7z6hi14Ha6ugiCmCImLitPuKDieFNai6rHiOMaxK-YUkQeBusldFEleMZpRMLftrL-vckphSLstU7vTjJArQlM_AKtiWQYXN0aXaI1J6KFVUocTEBf_bFiqXbnAj-8JHDdCSRy-w38H32eX85lE-MOOHXiF4JxF_x1S634m9PTw7k1C3VSx8WJeLaQRu9IkSc1z_6D7g49Czz5t4khSsQeSDt_MPf1R4mAqvPHksASkwTbw6QtdGrj5L54KkBK0cpwsy6bOYSnKVF1glsVnMvZ9jTX4XYJLXhgVu70eFBjjLf5BGJiVJpBJY3b0KBhWvsEZnqQHsInX4XM_jshKJx4-yx2YjciHiCnW) More young people, especially young African Americans, need to hear that America is not "racist" and instead be inspired by your conservative values!

That's why each day I do everything I can to warn my fellow students of the dangers of Critical Race Theory and share your values with my peers at the University of Iowa.

And it's why I'm so passionate about Young America's Foundation-the most effective youth outreach organization recruiting the largest audiences of young people into the Conservative Movement.

Without YAF, none of my conservative activism would have been possible.

**But we can 't keep recruiting students at the University of Iowa or on college campuses nationwide without your help.** There are thousands of African-American students at the University of Iowa who need to hear the dangers and immorality of Critical Race Theory. You can help educate new, young audiences!

Specifically, we need 50 passionate conservatives to step forward before midnight with a gift of $50, so Young America's Foundation can inspire thousands more students on campuses nationwide with the truth about the values that make us great.

According to one poll, only 36% of young people ages 18 to 24 are proud of being American. But your gift right now will help change that. It changed it for me, and I know it will change it for students like me who only hear about how bad their country is instead of why they should be proud of it.

Here's where you can securely make your gift to Young America's Foundation to inspire and recruit young americans to save our country: [**https://secure.yaf.org/inspire-and-recruit-young-americans**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=2ace7682f1eb4b869a6dc034d83119e6&_e=HgJOmEzAORsnaQdA_byc_NDz_Xmwz7z6hi14Ha6ugiCmCImLitPuKDieFNai6rHiOMaxK-YUkQeBusldFEleMZpRMLftrL-vckphSLstU7vTjJArQlM_AKtiWQYXN0aXaI1J6KFVUocTEBf_bFiqXbnAj-8JHDdCSRy-w38H32eX85lE-MOOHXiF4JxF_x1S634m9PTw7k1C3VSx8WJeLQtb6ptnETzSbDzbFF2bzd5XRScKOHdb75Z0N72uhdZief6IUfXiE6xXm99q43dLj5ywTKl4uXxfZfUkJaBWZE2KY5fm_lWx57JyYkkL84MHdYTekkbmG_RIcB6gKljDFF0ej7Zwt0u6GcCcwcRu_DcQQMsvDIBK9WnqfmQY4-5G)

I'm so grateful you are standing with us to pass on your ideas to future generations. Together we will reach more young people with the values that make America exceptional.

Gratefully,

Jasmyn Jordan
**Chairwoman, Young Americans for Freedom**
**Chairwoman, University of Iowa YAF**
* * *

---
_**Young America 's Foundation**
11480 Commerce Park Drive Suite 600
Reston, VA 20191-1556

800.USA.1776_ [Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Young America's Foundation.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=2ace7682f1eb4b869a6dc034d83119e6&_t=nRdW0UPCdl8ahBvQ5RkTauh4p6epLjbj-TdG_aEV4MKU7YEHnZyQ_5Ge_7G4iVqmkFATfxTrodt5b3OAjt-TSvi0FWTh56-lCdTIsyPucbQAZG2aGNUr6zh0uqPgld1OUJG-S6nHdHWLRmdf-nBsWuZpBLm3s-hVSxWK8JFYfy8%3D)

[Unsubscribe from all communications](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=2ace7682f1eb4b869a6dc034d83119e6&_t=nRdW0UPCdl8ahBvQ5RkTauh4p6epLjbj-TdG_aEV4MKU7YEHnZyQ_5Ge_7G4iVqmkFATfxTrodt5b3OAjt-TSg0_R08gdcuHy6TOMKS55qA%3D).
---

Hi, this is Travis Brimm, the Executive Director of the Democratic Association of Secretaries of State (DASS). I’m emailing you today with an urgent update about our democracy, and the unprecedented danger it’s under this November. First, Donald Trump promised to be a 'dictator on day one.' Then, his campaign threatened to deploy ‘soldiers’ to intimidate voters at the polls. Now this week, Trump himself is threatening political violence if the 'election isn't fair.' **This isn’t just your run of the mill Trump rhetoric. It’s dangerous – and cannot be ignored. ** [**Here's one important action you can take to protect our democracy: chip in $3 to elect and defend the Democratic Secretaries of State who are overseeing our elections in critical 2024 battlegrounds.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84216610/470827812/-209663063?refcode=em-5.2.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmQzNmExYy1lMDA4LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M7nAS1vTRFjr57xmGudEEKvkGU1Pp7dQw-ZNk5p5CxM=) | | **[Donate $3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84216611/470827813/-209663063?refcode=em-5.2.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmQzNmExYy1lMDA4LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M7nAS1vTRFjr57xmGudEEKvkGU1Pp7dQw-ZNk5p5CxM=)**

Let me be clear: our best line of defense against GOP voter suppression and plots to decertify election results is having strong, pro-democracy Secretaries of State who will protect the will of the voters.
Trump's allies are working around the clock to appoint operatives in key roles for counting and certifying votes. And they would have succeeded in 2020 if it weren't for the integrity of our election officials.
Democrats need to stay vigilant, which means putting our resources where they can have the biggest impact:
[**Send in a donation of $3, or whatever you can, to defend our elections and stop Trump's allies from undermining our democracy.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84216613/470827814/-209663063?refcode=em-5.2.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYmQzNmExYy1lMDA4LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M7nAS1vTRFjr57xmGudEEKvkGU1Pp7dQw-ZNk5p5CxM=)

Trump's allies are working around the clock to appoint operatives in key roles for counting and certifying votes. And they would have succeeded in 2020 if it weren't for the integrity of our election officials. Democrats need to stay vigilant, which means putting our resources where they can have the biggest impact: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = ** Travis Brimm Executive Director Democratic Association of Secretaries of State (DASS) | Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State -- the only organization dedicated to electing and protecting Democratic Secretaries of States. Right now, Republicans are changing the rules and changing the players to try and change the outcomes of future elections. Democratic Secretaries of State are the last line of defense to protect our democracy and preserve the will of the voters._ Please consider a donation to fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda. | = = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . name: Pete Maysmith, LCV Victory Fund
subject: [2024 Plans Enclosed:] How the environmental movement wins in November:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LCV Victory Fund, www
body:
Our movement is set to be one of the most important players in this year's elections. |
---

** **
|
Peter -- you're an important part of our movement, so I want to make sure you hear from me directly about our plans to go BIG to elect champions for our environment and our democracy this November.

Bottom line: the New York Times recently highlighted that LCV Victory Fund will be running one of the most significant independent expenditure campaigns in the country to elect and protect pro-climate, pro-democracy candidates up and down the ballot.

_**Here 's how we'll do it:**_
* **We 're launching a second-to-none field program to educate, mobilize, and turn out environmental voters to vote by mail, vote early, or vote on Election Day in 2024.**

Our effectiveness stems from our tailored approach to voters. When engaged in a conversation, our highly trained organizers will connect with voters using a customizable script that allows canvassers to deliver a compelling persuasion or turnout message in real time while at the voter's door.

In 2018, independent researchers verified that LCV Victory Fund's field persuasion programs increased the margin of support for our endorsed candidates by seven percentage points on Election Day.
* **We 're saturating key voters with effective messaging that motivates them to support pro-climate, pro-democracy candidates.**

Since 2010, LCV Victory Fund has been and continues to be a trusted messenger to reach the critical pool of climate voters, or people who care deeply about environmental issues and the climate crisis.

To boost motivation, we will use tested, locally salient messaging to define candidates, keep our universe of voters engaged, and mobilize them to vote. We will layer our message delivery tactics to produce a surround-sound effect.
* **We 're launching hard-hitting broadcast and digital advertising in states and districts where our message can have the most impact.**

We will utilize digital, mail, radio, and television advertisements in states and districts where climate and environmental messaging will be best received and have the most impact among voters.

This broad reach will also garner attention from candidates and elected officials, showcasing the electoral influence of the environmental community. Through paid media, we will demonstrate that our movement shows up for leaders who champion strong pro-environment, pro-democracy policies.

This work is truly urgent. Narratives about candidates, the political landscape, and other messages that impact voter turnout are already forming. That's why we're investing our resources _early_ -- **_right now_ is when we can make the most impact in November.**

We're already making headlines -- here's what I recently told [_The New York Times:_](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/KybpT4Ey28B9/TVdFOGZPd0hWQ0twUkRvcmZFeEE1c0s2VmdUV1Vydi8waU1KZ2l4OGpVci9ueEhqY0FzZGNqczhRTzh6blo1VnVrYzA5NnRxR3QzWHV3dGpZZzBXVUJaWUUzc0Fza3ZUdm9WNmJhQWJlSkk9S0/)
_" It's hard to imagine higher stakes in these elections. We will be communicating with voters in the battleground states and in the key races about the stakes ... and extreme peril of having Donald Trump and his MAGA acolytes and big oil pleasers back in office for another four years."_ |
---
**[**READ MORE >>**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/yAyZM-2pWEFK/TVdFOGZPd0hWQ0twUkRvcmZFeEE1c0s2VmdUV1Vydi8waU1KZ2l4OGpVci9ueEhqY0FzZGNqczhRTzh6blo1VnVrYzA5NnRxR3QzWHV3dGpZZzBXVUJaWUUzc0Fza3ZUdm9WNmJhQWJlSkk9S0/)**

I'm grateful to have you in our movement. If you're as fired up as I am, [I hope you'll make a gift to help us elect pro-environment, pro-democracy candidates this November.](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/WabwQxw-~ecK/TVdFOGZPd0hWQ0twUkRvcmZFeEE1c0s2VmdUV1Vydi8waU1KZ2l4OGpVci9ueEhqY0FzZGNqczhRTzh6blo1VnVrYzA5NnRxR3QzWHV3dGpZZzBXVUJaWUUzc0Fza3ZUdm9WNmJhQWJlSkk9S0/c0o0SG95Rll2U1ptL1czZ0pnY2FPbVQvQ3haMG9PYlcxM01sNk5URDZFNFFtSGtQUHg1bG9EQXI1b0hoWWZGMTFzVG92N1BKTW5WbUxxV0pYaVdaL25GUWFQd3oyY3ZrMVVQTEp2NlVqL2c9S0)

Onward,

Pete Maysmith

clean_body: Our movement is set to be one of the most important players in this year's elections. | | Peter -- you're an important part of our movement, so I want to make sure you hear from me directly about our plans to go BIG to elect champions for our environment and our democracy this November. Bottom line: the New York Times recently highlighted that LCV Victory Fund will be running one of the most significant independent expenditure campaigns in the country to elect and protect pro-climate, pro-democracy candidates up and down the ballot. Here 's how we'll do it: We 're launching a second-to-none field program to educate, mobilize, and turn out environmental voters to vote by mail, vote early, or vote on Election Day in 2024. Our effectiveness stems from our tailored approach to voters. When engaged in a conversation, our highly trained organizers will connect with voters using a customizable script that allows canvassers to deliver a compelling persuasion or turnout message in real time while at the voter's door. In 2018, independent researchers verified that LCV Victory Fund's field persuasion programs increased the margin of support for our endorsed candidates by seven percentage points on Election Day. We 're saturating key voters with effective messaging that motivates them to support pro-climate, pro-democracy candidates. Since 2010, LCV Victory Fund has been and continues to be a trusted messenger to reach the critical pool of climate voters, or people who care deeply about environmental issues and the climate crisis. To boost motivation, we will use tested, locally salient messaging to define candidates, keep our universe of voters engaged, and mobilize them to vote. We will layer our message delivery tactics to produce a surround-sound effect. We 're launching hard-hitting broadcast and digital advertising in states and districts where our message can have the most impact. We will utilize digital, mail, radio, and television advertisements in states and districts where climate and environmental messaging will be best received and have the most impact among voters. This broad reach will also garner attention from candidates and elected officials, showcasing the electoral influence of the environmental community. Through paid media, we will demonstrate that our movement shows up for leaders who champion strong pro-environment, pro-democracy policies. This work is truly urgent. Narratives about candidates, the political landscape, and other messages that impact voter turnout are already forming. That's why we're investing our resources early -- right now is when we can make the most impact in November. We're already making headlines -- here's what I recently told " It's hard to imagine higher stakes in these elections. We will be communicating with voters in the battleground states and in the key races about the stakes ... and extreme peril of having Donald Trump and his MAGA acolytes and big oil pleasers back in office for another four years." | I'm grateful to have you in our movement. subject: ▶️: Trump Caused It.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC
body:

name: Team Lucas Kunce
subject: $10 helps us reach 50 undecided voters here in Missouri
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Your dollar stretches nearly five times further here than it will in other big states with flip opportunities this year, like Texas and Florida.
#
Peter — **did you know that when you chip in $10 toward our campaign to elect Lucas Kunce to the U.S. Senate, you’re helping us reach 50 undecided voters?**
In Texas and Florida, that same $10 would only reach 10 voters.
That’s right. Missouri has a smaller electorate and cheaper media markets than other big states with targeted flip opportunities this year, meaning your donation will have more of a direct impact on our race and voter outreach efforts — online, on TV, and on the ground — leading up to the election on November 5.
**[CHIP IN $10 →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/49470?refcode=em20240502-5422&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5422%2E614464%2EfQ_y7D)**
On top of that, multiple recent head-to-head polls show Lucas in a _statistical tie_ with Josh Hawley — and more than 10% of voters are still undecided.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/49470?refcode=em20240502-5422&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5422%2E614464%2EfQ_y7D)
**If we’re able to reach those undecided voters with Lucas’ election-winning message of taking back power for everyday people, we really can defeat Hawley, flip this Senate seat, and elect a real warrior for working people in Missouri.**
We’re counting on your help to make it happen, Peter. So we’re asking:
**[Will you rush $10 toward our grassroots campaign to elect Lucas Kunce right now? This is one of our best and only opportunities to flip a U.S. Senate seat in 2024, so supporting our campaign today could be your chance to make a real difference in this year’s election.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/49470?refcode=em20240502-5422&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=5422%2E614464%2EfQ_y7D)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/49471?refcode=em20240502-5422&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=5422%2E614464%2EfQ_y7D) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/49471?refcode=em20240502-5422&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=5422%2E614464%2EfQ_y7D) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/49471?refcode=em20240502-5422&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=5422%2E614464%2EfQ_y7D) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/49471?refcode=em20240502-5422&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=5422%2E614464%2EfQ_y7D) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/49471?refcode=em20240502-5422&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=5422%2E614464%2EfQ_y7D) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/49471?refcode=em20240502-5422&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=5422%2E614464%2EfQ_y7D) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/49470?refcode=em20240502-5422&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=5422%2E614464%2EfQ_y7D)
---
Thanks for all your help, Peter.
— Team Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20240502-5422-footer&t=11&refcode2=5422_614464_fQ_y7D&akid=5422%2E614464%2EfQ_y7D)**

name: Steve Garvey #6
subject: Smash it over the fence
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
With every day that goes by, you and I are getting more and more reminders why it’s so important we win this election. | | | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9ab2b04db1b941f3917a18454865910a&_e=WyI_0DgxM1XhpM_B1h6JWM1H8jr341e-Ba39x_kwRucUMRO2bXw_RJtzuiGtdmTHc1OoouDPuVz--yPmlRbFkkSXDGXlaKnVvgm0GfPP4D0mg0AhSFvzbAfxjjCIKDnK9HbUPRs3bEgAdqniOkNBXc2gruR9jA4H9ZEhkye65g3c6_LRLMFC_4m2NS4loOPKk1XWcknjAxA_4UqBqx3u8g-Z3SUEzLiLImAvnugiwE0j8VuWXumCnqQVfiG3pGtvFhDS8br-E4_ayYSsoX0TYm-cf0HStxE22KXUSSs2lmScTSi-rlk45ugK0FB2p8ltSX4DEzm3HvuJQLy8NclJVMY7A7ZgOhBxXwzjLg-f5qRaGiG7qJKexvBZBbYnT7CpE9HsLKxdenWxRCIYTQVHtndhZMriz7XY6ddh3_zPHqH4qU8pglXnRx24CedTOk1y2g-3tJKCkhl5BE4udtfkYae1XnILSUclYLRf6F5BzJbiBRZZLO2Oo20mwp6Eyp6T)
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9ab2b04db1b941f3917a18454865910a&_e=WyI_0DgxM1XhpM_B1h6JWM1H8jr341e-Ba39x_kwRucUMRO2bXw_RJtzuiGtdmTHc1OoouDPuVz--yPmlRbFkkSXDGXlaKnVvgm0GfPP4D0mg0AhSFvzbAfxjjCIKDnK9HbUPRs3bEgAdqniOkNBXc2gruR9jA4H9ZEhkye65g3c6_LRLMFC_4m2NS4loOPKk1XWcknjAxA_4UqBqx3u8g-Z3SUEzLiLImAvnugiwE0j8VuWXumCnqQVfiG3pGtvFhDS8br-E4_ayYSsoX0TYm-cf0HStxE22KXUSSs2lmScTSi-rlk45ugK0FB2p8ltSX4DEzm3HvuJQLy8NclJVMY7A7ZgOhBxXwzjLg-f5qTcQZ1zgGx3Fy0jG2MLzlcATzm6CDnFQbdAY75vmLySXadoRhNp8qJJidHlYtCxMo0hX7H2VN2hHOqY8bUZQeeE3qFM5mF6nR98bb8VlMNOlGWU6hflwnaedHRfA6rbavKh0omQX7_Qpuzj2tiKtcUW)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, I've played in lots of double-headers. And that's exactly what you and I have on our hands here. A one-on-one matchup with Adam Schiff on November 5th. **[**Can I count on your contribution of $6 to help defeat Adam Schiff today?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9ab2b04db1b941f3917a18454865910a&_e=WyI_0DgxM1XhpM_B1h6JWM1H8jr341e-Ba39x_kwRucUMRO2bXw_RJtzuiGtdmTHc1OoouDPuVz--yPmlRbFkkSXDGXlaKnVvgm0GfPP4D0mg0AhSFvzbAfxjjCIKDnK9HbUPRs3bEgAdqniOkNBXc2gruR9jA4H9ZEhkye65g3c6_LRLMFC_4m2NS4loOPKk1XWcknjAxA_4UqBqx3u8g-Z3SUEzLiLImAvnugiwE0j8VuWXumCnqQVfiG3pGtvFhDS8br-E4_ayYSsoX0TYm-cf0HStxE22KXUSSs2lmScTSi-rlk45ugK0FB2p8ltSX4DEzm3HvuJQLy8NclJVMY7A7ZgOhBxXwzjLg-f5qREQhxqlmB_TB81OaqTp5EmC_lJ_pElbFHYsGE3MbrJN1q3SeyhKKC5DH3CzLlZliFvrW9jzvSsyyLf0K75xkbHeXGJ0cWxOU2RyseDPg7XLE2ihZLUh3uETJgiqQuyJDUE0YloQe54L8ZNWq-4q41n)** You see, Adam Schiff's enablers in the corporate media are already spreading the lie that this race is over. They're saying you and I don't have a chance (just like they did when I entered the race back in October). They're saying that Adam Schiff notched a double victory by advancing to the General Election and drawing me as his opponent. In other words, they're ready, willing and able to cut California voters entirely out of the picture again. My response to Schiff's allies saying they’d rather face me: **_Be careful what you wish for._** I'd liken this to my playing days when a cocky opposing pitcher throws a 94mph fastball right over the plate. I'll tell you, the ball would look as big as a grapefruit before I'd smash it over the fence and touch all the bases on the way home. And look how far we've already made it. I'm in first place in the primary and gaining momentum headed towards the November election. Look, I'm not saying this will be easy. Quite the opposite. It's going to be a nonstop, 58-county fight between now and November 5th. **[That said, I must ask: will you rush a contribution to my senate campaign today?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9ab2b04db1b941f3917a18454865910a&_e=WyI_0DgxM1XhpM_B1h6JWM1H8jr341e-Ba39x_kwRucUMRO2bXw_RJtzuiGtdmTHc1OoouDPuVz--yPmlRbFkkSXDGXlaKnVvgm0GfPP4D0mg0AhSFvzbAfxjjCIKDnK9HbUPRs3bEgAdqniOkNBXc2gruR9jA4H9ZEhkye65g3c6_LRLMFC_4m2NS4loOPKk1XWcknjAxA_4UqBqx3u8g-Z3SUEzLiLImAvnugiwE0j8VuWXumCnqQVfiG3pGtvFhDS8br-E4_ayYSsoX0TYm-cf0HStxE22KXUSSs2lmScTSi-rlk45ugK0FB2p8ltSX4DEzm3HvuJQLy8NclJVMY7A7ZgOhBxXwzjLg-f5qSH3CfnGQFf3MlpXwJxgXF4_fIktLvjG0ooCOJf-iCR96P2gqMWz-u2WWbVIeKPvH1pVk8sBptgKNlXnITUyiQJFP7-TQow2arHPKf0oUOjrLeEQQ_BD906ofIX7GCRE58P9RCXhXkX6ydxkQ17CUY-) ** This is going to be an expensive fight. Hiring staff, recruiting and training volunteers, equipping them with the very best technology to identify our voter and secure their vote by November 5th. There’s no time to lose. In closing, I can't help but think how Adam Schiff and his team of high-priced DC consultants thought they were being savvy in trying to make sure I became their opponent in General Election. Reports are they even spent money running ads promoting me. But what they've really done is awaken a sleeping giant here. Remember, before it became a wasteland of crime, homelessness, and sky-high taxes, California was a land of dreamers, a land of opportunity. It was a place where a scrawny little kid could start as a bat boy for his heroes, work hard, win a World Series, and land on a Topps baseball card. California can be that place again. America can be that place again. And it starts with throwing out political liars and connivers like Adam Schiff and reclaiming our freedom roots. Time is the most important factor. Thank you!
---
| |
---
| | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9ab2b04db1b941f3917a18454865910a&_e=WyI_0DgxM1XhpM_B1h6JWM1H8jr341e-Ba39x_kwRucUMRO2bXw_RJtzuiGtdmTHc1OoouDPuVz--yPmlRbFkkSXDGXlaKnVvgm0GfPP4D0mg0AhSFvzbAfxjjCIKDnK9HbUPRs3bEgAdqniOkNBXc2gruR9jA4H9ZEhkye65g3c6_LRLMFC_4m2NS4loOPKk1XWcknjAxA_4UqBqx3u8g-Z3SUEzLiLImAvnugiwE0j8VuWXumCnqQVfiG3pGtvFhDS8br-E4_ayYSsoX0TYm-cf0HStxE22KXUSSs2lmScTSi-rlk45ugK0FB2p8ltSX4DEzm3HvuJQLy8NclJVMY7A7ZgOhBxXwzjLg-f5qQqEf47PFewLyBaCwZRNEOzOjDDOHtBlCquota9PbcBMaCU5DeRG5raORXU1QfI_e6-fAtDXPOXo5TiLrzAZJLPkjZVpmqbOYuyVyMIHjO2KOX7oAMqk7M_puqA5g7UuiZcocjaUmxU_nScuTUFBeSd)
---

clean_body: With every day that goes by, you and I are getting more and more reminders why it’s so important we win this election. | | | | | Fellow Conservative, I've played in lots of double-headers. And that's exactly what you and I have on our hands here. A one-on-one matchup with Adam Schiff on November 5th. You see, Adam Schiff's enablers in the corporate media are already spreading the lie that this race is over. They're saying you and I don't have a chance (just like they did when I entered the race back in October). They're saying that Adam Schiff notched a double victory by advancing to the General Election and drawing me as his opponent. In other words, they're ready, willing and able to cut California voters entirely out of the picture again. My response to Schiff's allies saying they’d rather face me: Be careful what you wish for. I'd liken this to my playing days when a cocky opposing pitcher throws a 94mph fastball right over the plate. I'll tell you, the ball would look as big as a grapefruit before I'd smash it over the fence and touch all the bases on the way home. And look how far we've already made it. I'm in first place in the primary and gaining momentum headed towards the November election. Look, I'm not saying this will be easy. Quite the opposite. It's going to be a nonstop, 58-county fight between now and November 5th. - This is going to be an expensive fight. Hiring staff, recruiting and training volunteers, equipping them with the very best technology to identify our voter and secure their vote by November 5th. There’s no time to lose. In closing, I can't help but think how Adam Schiff and his team of high-priced DC consultants thought they were being savvy in trying to make sure I became their opponent in General Election. Reports are they even spent money running ads promoting me. But what they've really done is awaken a sleeping giant here. Remember, before it became a wasteland of crime, homelessness, and sky-high taxes, California was a land of dreamers, a land of opportunity. It was a place where a scrawny little kid could start as a bat boy for his heroes, work hard, win a World Series, and land on a Topps baseball card. California can be that place again. America can be that place again. And it starts with throwing out political liars and connivers like Adam Schiff and reclaiming our freedom roots. Time is the most important factor. Thank you! | | | | Steve Garvey #6 | | | P.S. Adam Schiff had $35 million in the bank. Well, reports are now coming out that he spent upwards of $25 million in the primary and is down to $10 million in the bank. Make no mistake, while his cash advantage is greatly diminished, as I write these words, Adam Schiff, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer are quickly reloading. The ActBlue political machine has the capacity to pump millions into his race in the blink of an eye. You and I cannot give them any daylight. Please don’t delay. | | PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE PO Box 532389Los Angeles, CA 90053-2389 |

In this day and age, broadband internet connectivity isn’t just a luxury, it’s a necessity that so many people depend on.
Accessible broadband was an integral part of the American Rescue Plan, which lowered internet costs for families across the nation.
The Emergency Broadband Benefit provided free or discounted broadband internet access for low-income families, ensuring that kids could get an education and people could access the resources they needed as we emerged from the pandemic. We expanded connectivity access even further with the Affordable Connectivity Program (ACP), which gave over 20 million households access to affordable internet.
**[This was a good-faith, bipartisan effort, and now that Republicans hold the majority, they’ve allowed this funding to expire. Will you join Nikki by signing your name and standing up for expanding internet access to low-income families?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84218075/470850984/1686489349?refcode=AU_NJB_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20240502_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjFkMzc2OC1lNjA4LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6PAqvFnQ64wImudSB7Gj6rzeAKdwn3iq4gdQxG0nUKg=&emci=524afd6d-dd08-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=eb1d3768-e608-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=13891387)**

name: Dan Bishop
subject: Allow me to reintroduce myself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bishop for NC
body:
In case you don’t know this about me already

| [ ](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=40e5f622d385413bb5adc8d0050957e0&_e=8ZKx9moJiHxetFRMbyEjCYYIvVvqRU764K3gFVCqdzWGlqETgiWKs-nhIToDUqsjDXHov3nUnCAOpXwqxB9y6L7izo2ia2Du-24FaOJuBAoN3xORsUTpzOkvsVZ2Mr-VCx0uDFL0Is2j3hUGSlbAlwbvVn8X97bnjfAecWhYHng7ShqXKsNBoStrrZENkTHZIydQWBCcjk6U9B9TbyZ-l-8DvWpOUDCc0Z7aoNsemg5a3cWueggm6A98wKBUvNzdH0fK1OzSJNREQ1yAn1DNSWr8KG6fN1eMfmL-DsFxXgXWPEa5DZCSga_mh0nfP0-X8M2EqE4_WLnDNnXJM3jA5-Xgci8LrD5dH_nRqhNopv3ekQYlxl6wpJ9HVlPpl4AiA7Qx4Bs2altW7p9xA_s7HA%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American,

You may already know who I am from my time in Congress serving North Carolina’s 8th District. Or you may be coming across me for the first time. Either way, I’m glad to be reaching out to you, and I think this could be the beginning of a great relationship. My name is Dan Bishop, and I’m running for Attorney General for North Carolina with the intention of bringing Law and Order back to the Tar Heel State.

**[This email is a bit longer and I hope you’ll read through it. I’m going to ask you for a donation to my campaign at the end of this email, but let me explain why it’s so crucial you join my team first.](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=40e5f622d385413bb5adc8d0050957e0&_e=8ZKx9moJiHxetFRMbyEjCYYIvVvqRU764K3gFVCqdzWGlqETgiWKs-nhIToDUqsjDXHov3nUnCAOpXwqxB9y6L7izo2ia2Du-24FaOJuBAoN3xORsUTpzOkvsVZ2Mr-VCx0uDFL0Is2j3hUGSlbAlwbvVn8X97bnjfAecWhYHng7ShqXKsNBoStrrZENkTHZIydQWBCcjk6U9B9TbyZ-l6Sl5Kfy266AdETK3ayNh963eOZ_pjxdrQx42JDhQeE9fCelaHL1aC433EaN8_ulW73TfAf5Kftd1Yvecd8nXr-LZmUKmkYJHKBwspRqGSDef8uH5iTE4DpQcGGoRiqg1ulcuGCt1McHO0eHZgacD6CFGvaniDt2dxBnuHrGGe8-Hl-KupdIbWml_8oG67STPw%3D%3D)**

[](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=40e5f622d385413bb5adc8d0050957e0&_e=8ZKx9moJiHxetFRMbyEjCYYIvVvqRU764K3gFVCqdzWGlqETgiWKs-nhIToDUqsjDXHov3nUnCAOpXwqxB9y6L7izo2ia2Du-24FaOJuBAoN3xORsUTpzOkvsVZ2Mr-VCx0uDFL0Is2j3hUGSlbAlwbvVn8X97bnjfAecWhYHng7ShqXKsNBoStrrZENkTHZIydQWBCcjk6U9B9TbyZ-l6Sl5Kfy266AdETK3ayNh963eOZ_pjxdrQx42JDhQeE9i8GenVM5W_Bj2dvG2gfPT3EooB7nxSmZxzokL3OjHrRDvx7zu1nLDml2iBSY-XZwXByFamyYPLwHE5o6YupAWicCU7JYOD8WxXMv1-pPrvs5_EOIHGtLrAAhwFnGVEvzGEipnPY1fUESIbS3CaCJvw%3D%3D)
I was born and raised with my four siblings in North Carolina by my parents, Kaytee and Bud. They didn’t come from much, but they pushed me towards an education and instilled a hard work ethic. With a passion for law and justice, I earned my JD at UNC Chapel Hill. I then went on to marry my wife of 25 years (and going), Jo; we raised our son, Jack, who’s currently following in his dad’s footsteps as he’s working to attain his law degree.

As a lawyer, I’m very proud of my track record. I was a commercial litigator for nearly three decades, where I was voted 10 times to Business NC’s “Legal Elite” and was selected 7 times by “Super Lawyers.” I was tenacious as a litigator and handled complex cases. But, I finally felt that it was time to help a broader scope of North Carolinians and decided to run for Congress.

In Congress, I’ve been one of the toughest and most outspoken conservatives, challenging the radical left and holding my fellow Republicans accountable. As a member of the judiciary committee and the subcommittee on the weaponization of the federal government, I fought the Biden administration’s dangerous policies and exposed the federal government’s abuses against the Trump presidency.

Now, I’m running for Attorney General to defend the rule of law and protect North Carolina. I believe Democrats like Roy Cooper and Josh Stein have abused the state’s top law enforcement office by turning it into a stepping stone for higher office and a platform to spread liberal propaganda. I’m putting my foot down, demanding respect for the office of Attorney General, and bringing Law and Order back to our great state.

**All that to say, I have a track record of fighting the good fight. And I hope you’ll join my team. The good fight is not free; running a campaign gets expensive, having to reach voters across the state, taking care of campaign staffers with food and gas, and running ads on TV.** **[That’s why I’m humbly asking you for a donation of whatever you can afford.](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=40e5f622d385413bb5adc8d0050957e0&_e=8ZKx9moJiHxetFRMbyEjCYYIvVvqRU764K3gFVCqdzWGlqETgiWKs-nhIToDUqsjDXHov3nUnCAOpXwqxB9y6L7izo2ia2Du-24FaOJuBAoN3xORsUTpzOkvsVZ2Mr-VCx0uDFL0Is2j3hUGSlbAlwbvVn8X97bnjfAecWhYHng7ShqXKsNBoStrrZENkTHZIydQWBCcjk6U9B9TbyZ-l6Sl5Kfy266AdETK3ayNh963eOZ_pjxdrQx42JDhQeE9RzyAjhfMPRe9XAW1Wr4UhxTEUaXgFZpElXylnP_w7p0vyRg0RVS5Ftz8p07ZgkQ9-B5MZtG8FdWmTxH2EUld1OtKjmzC65aDsK-y5xQaZ66Go0wzaN2jtfHvCsmx-H1Y0iXM8lY-cydq0286iwemTw%3D%3D)**

If you’ve gotten this far, I want to personally thank you for reading this email. Maybe it means you’ve been a supporter for quite some time. clean_body: In case you don’t know this about me already | Fellow American, You may already know who I am from my time in Congress serving North Carolina’s 8th District. Or you may be coming across me for the first time. Either way, I’m glad to be reaching out to you, and I think this could be the beginning of a great relationship. My name is Dan Bishop, and I’m running for Attorney General for North Carolina with the intention of bringing Law and Order back to the Tar Heel State. I was born and raised with my four siblings in North Carolina by my parents, Kaytee and Bud. They didn’t come from much, but they pushed me towards an education and instilled a hard work ethic. With a passion for law and justice, I earned my JD at UNC Chapel Hill. I then went on to marry my wife of 25 years (and going), Jo; we raised our son, Jack, who’s currently following in his dad’s footsteps as he’s working to attain his law degree. As a lawyer, I’m very proud of my track record. I was a commercial litigator for nearly three decades, where I was voted 10 times to Business NC’s “Legal Elite” and was selected 7 times by “Super Lawyers.” I was tenacious as a litigator and handled complex cases. But, I finally felt that it was time to help a broader scope of North Carolinians and decided to run for Congress. In Congress, I’ve been one of the toughest and most outspoken conservatives, challenging the radical left and holding my fellow Republicans accountable. As a member of the judiciary committee and the subcommittee on the weaponization of the federal government, I fought the Biden administration’s dangerous policies and exposed the federal government’s abuses against the Trump presidency. Now, I’m running for Attorney General to defend the rule of law and protect North Carolina. I believe Democrats like Roy Cooper and Josh Stein have abused the state’s top law enforcement office by turning it into a stepping stone for higher office and a platform to spread liberal propaganda. I’m putting my foot down, demanding respect for the office of Attorney General, and bringing Law and Order back to our great state. All that to say, I have a track record of fighting the good fight. And I hope you’ll join my team. The good fight is not free; running a campaign gets expensive, having to reach voters across the state, taking care of campaign staffers with food and gas, and running ads on TV. If you’ve gotten this far, I want to personally thank you for reading this email. Maybe it means you’ve been a supporter for quite some time. Or maybe it means you’re intrigued by my story and also believe in Law and Order over Chaos and Disorder. Thank you, Dan Bishop | Paid for by Bishop for NC PO Box 1285 Waxhaw, NC 28173

Folks,

**_I have hope for my Liberal friends ...jellyfish have survived for more than 165 million years without a brain, so there is hope for a few of them._**

6/29: [Marinette County Niagra Lions Club Parade](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-mlytkdd-didthutlhu-tu/)**** **Dodge County**
Members of the Dodge County Republican Party were joined by Congressman Glenn Grothman, Eric Hovde, and more at their annual Lincoln Day Dinner! **Green County**
On Monday, April 22nd, Green County Republican's held an appreciation breakfast in New Glarus for their Election Inspector's to thank them for working to protect our elections and freedoms. Mike Hoffman, RPW Election Integrity Director and Samantha Laflin, RPW 2nd Congressional Regional Field Director, joined our breakfast to say thank you and keep up the good work. **Jackson County**
On April 22, Congressman Derrick Van Orden had the honor to reissue Mr. Neil Korn, a 102 year-old U.S. Army veteran five medals and decorations that he never received. We thank Mr. Korn for his service and commitment to our country. **Jefferson County**
The Republican Party of Jefferson County had a full house for Pints & Politics with Police Chief Kiederlen to hear about the challenges with illegal immigration in their community and policing at UW-Whitewater! **Kenosha County**
Kenosha County Republicans have been staying busy on the weekends. Whether is getting candidate signatures of building their float for the parade season, members of the Kenosha County Republican Party are making themselves present in their community. **Kewaunee County**
The Republican Party of Kewaunee County welcomed all three candidates running to replace Congressman Gallagher at their Lincoln & Reagan Day Luncheon. Choosing the GOP nominee for Congress will be integral to our success! **Manitowoc County**
The Republican Party of Manitowoc County held their annual Lincoln Day Dinner, which was a smashing success! Members of the party raised over $2000 and heard from various speakers. **Monroe County**
Congressman Derrick Van Orden joined members of the Republican Party of Monroe County at Den Bar & Grill to commemorate the old and new members of the Veteran's Coalition. **Monroe County**
The Republican Party of Monroe County has been interacting with their local candidates and representatives at their conservative breakfasts and candidate signing events! **Oconto County**
The Republican Party of Oconto County welcomed Tony Wied and Andre Jacque, both running for 8th District Congressional Sear, to their April 15, 2024 meeting. **Outagamie County**
The Republican Party of Outagamie County hosted an informative Meet & Greet session with Candidate for the 2nd State Senate, Eric Wimberger. **Portage County**
The Republican Party of Portage County hosted an incredible Lincoln Day Brunch, joined by Congressman Derrick Van Orden and countless others Wisconsin state representatives. **Rock & Walworth**
The Republican Parties of Rock and Walworth Counties hosted a sold-out Lincoln Day Dinner which featured fantastic speakers who presented an in depth look at America on the world stage. **Sauk County**
The Republican Party of Sauk County held their annual Lincoln day dinner over the weekend with local candidates and special guest Vicki McKenna. **St. Croix County**
The Republican Party of St. Croix County hosted a Poll Worker Appreciation Night at their Victory Headquarters. **Taylor County**
The Republican Party of Taylor County hosted an amazing Lincoln Day Dinner. Joined by multiple speakers, members of the party were able to learn about various topics regarding the future of the WisGOP. **Washington County**
The Republican Party of Washington County joined together to hear from candidates running for local office. **Waukesha County**
The Republican Party of Waukesha County continues to host fun events for their members. In the last two weeks, the party held a Flea Market and a Gun Show. [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-mlytkdd-didthutlhu-il/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-mlytkdd-didthutlhu-ir/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-mlytkdd-didthutlhu-iy/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-l-mlytkdd-didthutlhu-ij/) | [ Share ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-fb-mlytkdd-didthutlhu-ii/) | [ Tweet ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail20.com/t/y-tw-mlytkdd-didthutlhu-id/) | [ Forward ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.forwardtomyfriend.com/y-didthutlhu-931243C5-mlytkdd-l-ih)

Milwaukee is at the center of the action in this critical election year. Not only are we the nation's Ultimate Battleground State, but we're the host of the 2024 Republican National Convention. Not only that, but we absolutely need grassroots supporters like you in order to make this convention a smashing success! name: SCOTUS Approval Poll
subject: Two years after SCOTUS' decision was leaked
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
what's your opinion?
| | |
---
Friend,

Two years ago, what we feared would happen at the U.S. Supreme Court came true: The Court's decision in Dobbs v. Jackson was leaked, confirming that the conservative majority cemented by Donald Trump would overturn Roe v. Wade and end the federal guarantee of abortion rights.
In the two years that have followed, right-wing extremists have decimated reproductive freedom across the country. Nearly half of all states have some sort of abortion ban. One in 3 people of reproductive age cannot access abortion care. **Kids and youth are now coming of age with fewer freedoms than their parents had. **
We would never be in this position if it weren't for the five conservative U.S. Supreme Court justices that decided to overturn Roe v. Wade — ushering in an unprecedented level of attacks on reproductive health care. **But the fight is far from over, which is why we've launched a new poll for you to sound off on the U.S. Supreme Court. Will you please be one of the 4,750 responses we need before midnight? TELL US:**
**DO YOU APPROVE OF THE SUPREME COURT?**

name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: your area could let down all of Pennsylvania
body:
It turns out it’s your area that’s falling behind...
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

I have a correction to make . . .

The other day I sent you an email letting you know that Pennsylvania was falling behind in taking advantage of our **$200,000 Election Year Matching Challenge.**

While we have had a handful of generous pro-lifers from Pennsylvania step up, we still seem to be running short there!

So, I did a little more digging into our data.

**And as it turns out, it’s specifically your area that’s falling behind!**

Pennsylvania would be in great shape if your area comes through!

**[So, I was wondering if I could count on you to be one of the 13 we still need in your area to chip in with your most generous contribution to _Students for Life Action_](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-gliojl-duchtdja-y/)?**

Pro-Life Friend, I’m not trying to single YOU out in any way!

I’m just concerned because we’ve seen very little pro-life support coming from your area during this critical Matching Challenge.

And I know how you’ve been the one to help us in the past.

As you know, our **$200,000 Matching Challenge** means anything you can give will be instantly doubled!

Everything we raise will be a MASSIVE shot in the arm for all our critical 2024 Election Plans!

Don’t worry, I’m making sure to let everyone else in your area know that we need all your help right now.

**But if I may humbly request, please don’t wait for others to be one of the 13!**

**[So, could you please consider being one of the 13 we still need in your area to keep pace with our $200,000 Matching Challenge goal](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-gliojl-duchtdja-j/)?**

Whatever you can afford to give right now will be extremely helpful!

Thank you for everything you continue to do for Life, Pro-Life Friend.

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, _Students for Life Action_

Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Contributions or gifts to Students for Life Action are not tax deductible for IRS purposes; they do, however, avoid recognition of gain on appreciated assets. Students for Life Action's mailing address is 600 Princess Anne St #7667, Fredericksburg, VA 22401. Any donations raised above or short of the goal will be used in the next area of greatest need towards our mission, as determined by the organization.

[update preferences](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.updatemyprofile.com/j-gliojl-026154D2-duchtdja-t) | [unsubscribe](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-u-gliojl-duchtdja-i/)

---

name: Eric Hovde
subject: Did you see what Sen. Cotton said about my race?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hovde for Wisconsin
body:
I am grateful that Senator Tom Cotton has my back. Now I need to know if you have mine!

Peter,

I am grateful that **Senator Tom Cotton** has my back in one of the most consequential Senate races in the country.

[**Now I need to know. Peter,

If we’re going to make America strong again, then Republicans _**must**_ take back the U.S. Senate this year. **And we have a strong slate of candidates who can win in November.**

That includes veterans Tim Sheehy (Montana), Dave McCormick (Pennsylvania), and Mike Rogers (Michigan).

It includes successful business leader Eric Hovde, and tough conservative Kari Lake in Arizona.

Liberals should be terrified, and they are. **Just a few days ago, Rachel Maddow went on a 15 minute, unhinged rant attacking all five of these candidates.**

**It’s going to get worse. The Marxist Left and their allies are going to say, spend, and do whatever it takes to stop these Republicans from flipping these five Senate seats.**

body:
This could TOTALLY derail his re-election scheme
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=21357%2E4449941%2E1PyQLK)
---
**This is Trump’s worst nightmare:** **IF** we can fund our ads about the dangers of the Electoral College, we can convince states around the country to adopt the popular vote!

**BUT IF** we can’t, the Electoral College could hand Trump another DISASTROUS presidency in November. _**NO!!**_

[**We’re practically begging: We need you to chip in $7 now to help fund our Abolish the Electoral College ads and support our work »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/42824?t=7&akid=21357%2E4449941%2E1PyQLK) | [$6,400 GOAL: Chip in $7 now »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/42824?t=8&akid=21357%2E4449941%2E1PyQLK)
---
* * *
**FACT:** In 2016, Donald Trump won the Presidency despite losing the popular vote – _this flies in the face of basic rules of Democracy!_

**FACT:** In 2020, Donald Trump LOST – the popular vote AND the Electoral College – and set his sights on overturning the election results.

**FACT:** Donald Trump is trying to coast into the presidency AGAIN using the Electoral College – **he could become president AGAIN without ever winning the popular vote!**

[**Trump has NEVER won the popular vote. Without the Electoral College, his re-election scheme will be TOTALLY derailed. Chip in $7 to help fund our ads to abolish the Electoral College and support our work before midnight tomorrow »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/42824?t=9&akid=21357%2E4449941%2E1PyQLK)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

– Team FFR

body:
As May begins, we want to make sure that our top supporters have the newest information on the state of our race

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84218596/470866936/-1747597063?nd&amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2024.05.02_b1_ts_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWM3YTQ3Ni1mZDA4LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=unBBLzats87lhbBSnTc8-EyV-nKPlYwvqUcxsYGAWMM=) Peter, as May begins, we want to make sure that our top supporters––just like you––have the most up to date information on our campaign here in OH-13. Right now, we are about six months away from election night. That may seem like a long time, but let’s break that down. In just six months we need to:
→ Distribute yard signs to every corner of the district
→ Hire a team of organizers to knock on as many doors as possible to get out the vote
→ Put our ads on the air to get our message out to every last voter
→ Be prepared to respond to every attack the other side throws our way
That’s a lot to accomplish in six months––but with your support, we know we can do it.
Peter, we believe in the power of this grassroots team. [**That's why we are asking you for $5.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84218599/470866939/-1747597063?&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2024.05.02_b1_ts_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWM3YTQ3Ni1mZDA4LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=unBBLzats87lhbBSnTc8-EyV-nKPlYwvqUcxsYGAWMM=) **With your $5 donation – combined with $5, $13, and $20 dollar donations from thousands of others who believe in Northeast Ohio – we can accomplish everything listed above and build the campaign infrastructure we need to win in November.**
**We know what this team is capable of because we have seen it before. **[**So Peter, can we count you to help get Emilia re-elected so she can keep delivering results for the people of Northeast Ohio?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84218600/470866940/-1747597063?&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2024.05.02_b1_ts_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWM3YTQ3Ni1mZDA4LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=unBBLzats87lhbBSnTc8-EyV-nKPlYwvqUcxsYGAWMM=)
[**DONATE NOW**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84218601/470866941/-1747597063?amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2024.05.02_b1_ts_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OWM3YTQ3Ni1mZDA4LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=unBBLzats87lhbBSnTc8-EyV-nKPlYwvqUcxsYGAWMM=)
---
Thank you for being a part of this team.
_Team Sykes_

**A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country._Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results._ **

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zo8jmj48ccnk4h2god2d9nc3gbc437lm05m8foog_rp22sh2s8i6ep31cth69pb2c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zf3i1lq6qfkfiu3dg694g4pni6n2mhpbm1u3k82g_rp22sh2s8i6ep31cth69pb2c5h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3n6v88d5mrcn55s68k3bam6s1esnu0l2pp2nfqo_rp22sh2s8i6ep31cth69pb2c5h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze7mh3nf60du2ssv291da0il6u1e02944fupd1go_rp22sh2s8i6ep31cth69pb2c5h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

Most Americans know very little about America’s founding.

In today’s public schools, instead of learning about our Founding Fathers and the U.S. Constitution's principles, they are brainwashed with transgender ideology.

At The Heritage Foundation, we’re dedicated to creating conservative policy solutions that will defend and sustain our republic. But if our country is to survive, the American people must know our founding principles and the history that brought it about.

**That’s why my team at The Heritage Foundation is also committed to teaching the public about American history and our Founding Fathers.**

We published our _Founders' Almanac_ for this exact purpose.

This informative book contains biographical essays about our Founding Fathers like George Washington, Benjamin Franklin, and John Adams along with insightful analysis of primary sources like the Declaration of Independence, the United States Constitution, and Washington's Farewell Address.

**To help further your knowledge of American history, I’d like to offer you a free digital copy of Heritage’s _Founders' Almanac_.**

**You can download your free copy using the secure link below.

[https://secured.heritage.org/get-your-free-founders-almanac-ebook/](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MTI0LTFjYTBkMTY5ZjY3MTQ4N2Y5NTk1ZjVjZGJjNGRhZTg4IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3NlY3VyZWQuaGVyaXRhZ2Uub3JnL2dldC15b3VyLWZyZWUtZm91bmRlcnMtYWxtYW5hYy1lYm9vay8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWZvdW5kZXJzYWxtYW5hYyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9aW1hZ2VfQUVfRkZPNDkwMzYifQ/K7QnYcKUTxiPFW5QIO78DQ)**

Please use this guide to increase your knowledge of American history and stand up for our founding principles.

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq24h2rk4p6mcdu7m7j9h5do7i4a4b3rts9p79ho_rp22sh2s8i6ep31ctj64oj6cdh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpktef6cl2dpf7cdiggtllgqm3qn3gsh1pa4600o_rp22sh2s8i6ep31ctj64oj6cdh2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqa7joduebfa7vc7t34koped6rfsmkmu1l4468jo_rp22sh2s8i6ep31ctj64oj6cdh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze9hb0pau8oi5ppl4sgfhjr3g7kh5aeh33fr2sv8_rp22sh2s8i6ep31ctj64oj6cdh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

American Action News
---

name: Hillsdale College via Trump News HQ
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zurh1vuel9pv7u0d1gao7eiru07lram6kprhhsk0_rp22sh2s8i6ep31ctj62o36cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ze9glntjuup2u0osg1lnmlseakgqcbqa4a6ilo30_rp22sh2s8i6ep31ctj62o36cph2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlneof7a4iuo3m31inhgpr1jprq4prohcot735jo_rp22sh2s8i6ep31ctj62o36cph2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z03gifho1b36ml8elembpctvm36l0inusco4vqng_rp22sh2s8i6ep31ctj62o36cph2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Trump Train News
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! name: Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
subject: Help us get 10,000 responses to these questions!
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | [ ](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
Fellow American,

It’s nearly election season. We hear promises from both sides of the aisle and commitments made to causes the American people rarely agree on.

Surprisingly, however, 7 in 10 Americans agree on this one thing:

**Across our nation, unborn babies should be protected by at least the point when they can feel pain. The latest science proves that unborn babies can feel pain by as early as 15 weeks.**

72% of voters agree on this issue but the American people are still being bombarded with lies and misinformation from Big Abortion and its allies. These "pro-choice" organizations are committed to using misleading information to manipulate women and destroy innocent children for their own gain in this billion-dollar industry.

In their own materials, Planned Parenthood states abortion is “one of the safest medical procedures performed in the United States” and “abortion has over a 99 percent safety record.”

But how can this be true when a child’s life is snatched from its mother’s womb because it’s purposefully put to death? Who is telling the American people the truth here?

_**What do you think about this?**_

[My team and I would love to know your opinion about abortion in America.](http://trk.secureandprosper.-jvfw) We want to know your answers to questions like these:

Do you believe life begins at conception?

Do you believe abortion is harmful to women?

Do you believe that unborn babies have a right to life?

We want to hear what the American people think and invite you to take our [**Abortion in America Survey**](http://trk.secureandprosper.) so we know where you stand.

Take the survey today and let us know if the majority of Americans are being lied to by a deadly industry. Help us find the truth by taking the survey today at the link below. We really want to get 10,000 responses from people just like you!

[https://action.sbaprolife.org/abortion-in-america](http://trk.secureandprosper.)

For _LIFE,
_ Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, SBA Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr.
PO Box 803
Arlington, VA, 22206
Secure & Prosper PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178 If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.secureandprosper.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM4ODM3MTYzNCIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MTI0LWRlNGRjZTMxNTc2YTRkNzI4OTdiN2ExZGI4NDIxMTA1IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/7jZ6CsVtCJaZEHPCHmzZ7Q) to unsubscribe.

Then he voted to increase it to 85% in 1994...

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Broadcast
subject: Your thoughts on education in America
body:
The sad truth is, many distinguished colleges began with beautiful missions

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/pRBTkkpCSwWXyKllWgkVew~~/AARclAA~~~) Dear Fellow American,
You probably don’t know, but Hillsdale College settled a legal battle to honor a donor’s wishes when his alma mater failed to abide by their agreement.
You see, this generous donor left money to his alma mater to teach free-market economics and asked Hillsdale to make sure his wishes were honored.
Well, I won’t bore you with the details of the case, but let’s say we had differing interpretations of free-market economics.
The sad truth is, many distinguished colleges began with beautiful missions, many founded along the same lines as Hillsdale. Maybe your alma mater is one of them. But it’s a sad fact that too many of them have departed from their founding missions and are pursuing...something else.
Is it any wonder that, on many college campuses free speech is under threat, as conservative speakers or faculty are harassed or even assaulted!
That’s why I want to hear from you today. What do you think about higher education today? Is your alma mater, or are other schools in your state staying true to their original mission?
And are they doing enough to provide their students with a proper understanding of American history and government—including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution?

## Are you concerned that political correctness negatively influences what young Americans are learning?
[Yes](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/pRBTkkpCSwWXyKllWgkVew~~/AARclAA~~~) [No](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/pRBTkkpCSwWXyKllWgkVew~~/AARclAA~~~) [Not Sure/Undecided](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/pRBTkkpCSwWXyKllWgkVew~~/AARclAA~~~)
[We want your opinion, so please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your thoughts on education today.»](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/pRBTkkpCSwWXyKllWgkVew~~/AARclAA~~~)
Hillsdale College stands firm, rooted in its original mission, and faithful to the intent of its founders. And in response to the trends I mentioned, we have to do even more to **reach** and **teach** millions on behalf of liberty. So, we need your input, to make our work more effective.
That’s why I hope you will please take our brief higher education survey using this secure link:
[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/higher-education-survey/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/pRBTkkpCSwWXyKllWgkVew~~/AARclAA~~~)
As you may know, we refuse to accept ONE PENNY of government money—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. We do this precisely to preserve our founding mission. This uncompromising stand frees us from burdensome and corrupting regulations that other colleges must accept (maybe even your alma mater!)
But you should know that this independence comes at a cost, and we must rely on the support of our friends like you to do our work.
So after completing your survey, please consider making a generous tax-deductible gift to help us **reach** and **teach** millions more citizens nationwide.
I hope I’m not too presumptuous in saying this...but perhaps you can even spare a few dollars that you were going to give to your alma mater.
Thank you again for your faithful partnership with us and your unwavering support of liberty and education.
Warm regards,

Bill Gray
Class of 2001
Vice President
National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College |

| Conservative Broadcast
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/oER4Mxymg8s-IdSH-ncJ8w~~/AARclAA~/RgRoFz5gP0RwaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQuY29uc2VydmF0aXZlYnJvYWRjYXN0LmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1Db25zZXJ2YXRpdmUtQnJvYWRjYXN0LU9mZmVycyZlPWRwd2lsbGlzNjclMjU0MGdtYWlsLmNvbVcDc3BjQgpmM5CkNGbRjmIJUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/g2ZkqImU7k6bDNWyZDw8hA~~/AARclAA~/RgRoFz5gP0QuaHR0cHM6Ly9jb25zZXJ2YXRpdmVicm9hZGNhc3QuY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgpmM5CkNGbRjmIJUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

I hope I’m not too presumptuous in saying this...but perhaps you can even spare a few dollars that you were going to give to your alma mater. Thank you again for your faithful partnership with us and your unwavering support of liberty and education. Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College | | Conservative Broadcast PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 ~~ | ~~_

name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: Your thoughts on education in America
body:
The sad truth is, many distinguished colleges began with beautiful missions

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/RA9JXuY94futXn5kfHINhA~~/AARclAA~~) Dear Fellow American,
You probably don’t know, but Hillsdale College settled a legal battle to honor a donor’s wishes when his alma mater failed to abide by their agreement.
You see, this generous donor left money to his alma mater to teach free-market economics and asked Hillsdale to make sure his wishes were honored.
Well, I won’t bore you with the details of the case, but let’s say we had differing interpretations of free-market economics.
The sad truth is, many distinguished colleges began with beautiful missions, many founded along the same lines as Hillsdale. Maybe your alma mater is one of them. But it’s a sad fact that too many of them have departed from their founding missions and are pursuing...something else.
Is it any wonder that, on many college campuses free speech is under threat, as conservative speakers or faculty are harassed or even assaulted!
That’s why I want to hear from you today. What do you think about higher education today? Is your alma mater, or are other schools in your state staying true to their original mission?
And are they doing enough to provide their students with a proper understanding of American history and government—including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution?

## Are you concerned that political correctness negatively influences what young Americans are learning?
[Yes](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/RA9JXuY94futXn5kfHINhA~~/AARclAA~~) [No](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/RA9JXuY94futXn5kfHINhA~~/AARclAA~~) [Not Sure/Undecided](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/RA9JXuY94futXn5kfHINhA~~/AARclAA~~)
[We want your opinion, so please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your thoughts on education today.»](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/RA9JXuY94futXn5kfHINhA~~/AARclAA~~)
Hillsdale College stands firm, rooted in its original mission, and faithful to the intent of its founders. And in response to the trends I mentioned, we have to do even more to **reach** and **teach** millions on behalf of liberty. So, we need your input, to make our work more effective.
That’s why I hope you will please take our brief higher education survey using this secure link:
[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/higher-education-survey/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/RA9JXuY94futXn5kfHINhA~~/AARclAA~~)
As you may know, we refuse to accept ONE PENNY of government money—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. We do this precisely to preserve our founding mission. This uncompromising stand frees us from burdensome and corrupting regulations that other colleges must accept (maybe even your alma mater!)
But you should know that this independence comes at a cost, and we must rely on the support of our friends like you to do our work.
So after completing your survey, please consider making a generous tax-deductible gift to help us **reach** and **teach** millions more citizens nationwide.
I hope I’m not too presumptuous in saying this...but perhaps you can even spare a few dollars that you were going to give to your alma mater.
Thank you again for your faithful partnership with us and your unwavering support of liberty and education.
Warm regards,

Bill Gray
Class of 2001
Vice President
National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College |

| Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/uilxEmkshcCB4Drn0lem8Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRoFz5gP0RpaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQucmVzdG9yZS1vdXItbmF0aW9uLmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1SZXN0b3JlLU91ci1OYXRpb24tT2ZmZXJzJmU9ZHB3aWxsaXM2NyUyNTQwZ21haWwuY29tVwNzcGNCCmYznKQ0ZsDbHhRSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/9rc9CAx1mYPwjPShZIrwNg~~/AARclAA~/RgRoFz5gP0QraHR0cHM6Ly9yZXN0b3JlLW91ci1uYXRpb24uY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgpmM5ykNGbA2x4UUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

**Good Morning**! On this date in 1979, Conservative Party leader Margaret Thatcher was elected England's prime minister, the first woman to take that role and the first female prime minister in Europe. ([See Video](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsjz1vwyAQQH8NbLHwHf4aGCpV3tK1owXcYVPhEDnYbv59lc5Z35Oe9L6v09XGFG_zl13ZlJAn60s8eGoueAE9aUkmMAOjZFN3te5waDXIxfSOgV3nHZIHUhac41CzDl4RgGcZDSjQqlGo-qbFvmJLFAJ1YbDghzAIrZhiyVv1k-OtLBzSMx-8VT6vMpmllPtD4IeAUcB4nmf1zHvZHb_8i9jiF4HjIfAzk-v3X5yHqZebofsZU4qPthNazauN6T9Z3v39BQAA__83GlLg)) Over cups of coffee Thursday, _The Flyover_ staff discussed the upcoming Kentucky Derby.
