## Over 2,000 Arrests in Campus Protests
More than 2,000 anti-Israel protesters have been arrested across the U.S. the past two weeks as campus demonstration have grown more violent. [See protest update here.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxszzFvtSAUgOFfA5s3eEDRgeFb3O63djQUDnoaFCKn3vTfN-3c-U3e5Hl7rk9Pmc7tvz_QcSqrD0w3rkOnOzCrkdElREAt0fW2N1bPowG5O2P0MCnVBzVGmCfoVQjG2qSDGRO-J0kOFBg1KK2mYdTTA32MKUWbZg9hTrMwCiNxuR4fhU7eMeWvcuP1COWQ2e3MtQn9T8AiYPH1xFf7SQKWTDcKWELJGTfs6lUYG7eu-oyN6cTus0bP2OTlYn1RztRGK4zaDk_5989_Yb8DAAD__4wFV2U) At UCLA, police in riot gear moved in [early Thursday morning](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDGP4yAQhX8N7rDIgEMoKK5xl2uvtCYwJHPCxgISa__9yltv-97T06fv3325I2fenn9xJd9TWTB0_tAySS3BLGaIPhEB6YH8xV6M1e5qYHh5bV2IJqJ17hbhATY-poeaUBOqiJAG9qDAqElpdZuu-jYSxphStMkhBJecMIoi91LH_4W3_qKUv8qH6hjKOmT_6n1vQv8RMAuYj-MYK7071Xb2Z1JqjgLmdxMwB8ycSt0Y5V4yB5IpY--0yb0WuWOm1nlj3GTAdZfvkFFirdT6OejUzmN5Aks1SQUC5qH6uB-cM7erFUY9V-T8w9Z_E_UdAAD__5BkbHk) to take down an encampment after groups of students began fighting. The police removed barricades and dismantled the encampment. President Biden also used Thursday to make [his first remarks](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLuO6yAUAL_G7ojg8DIFxW3S5bZbWjwOzlkRYxmUaPfrV9l6y9E0o_m4rbdAlfbtf3igH6WtIQ164qqZZKBWNWdfEAHljF5Yoax0RsF894vgiqcUnYvCigggswVuQXNrpIh8Jg8cFNdc8kUbuVww5FxKtsUFSK64SXHMNNp5-Wy0jzuW-tWeeF5Se8zV38c4-iT_TXCd4BqOHV_9rd5wDkoVJ7hGyrizThX3hCy1WnFDdpxtYB-dHa1SQraF78ConwEry7pI7sBY4bRIMiZwZomL1SI5GYOZT5-PF9VK3dhJ8e0RqP4mjb_-_AQAAP__mjNlrw) about the student protests. He rejected calls by protestors to alter his approach to Israel and said dissent should never lead to disorder. Several Columbia professors [have condemned that school's actions](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxszzFvtSAUgOFfA5s3eEDRgeFb3O63djQUDnoaFCKn3vTfN-3c-U3e5Hl7rk9Pmc7tvz_QcSqrD0w3rkOnOzCrkdElREAt0fW2N1bPowG5O2P0MCnVBzVGmCfoVQjG2qSDGRO-J0kOFBg1KK2mYdTTA32MKUWbZg9hTrMwCiNxuR4fhU7eMeWvcuP1COWQ2e3MtQn9T8AiYPH1xFf7SQKWTDcKWELJGTfs6lUYG7eu-oyN6cTus0bP2OTlYn1RztRGK4zaDk_5989_Yb8DAAD__4wFV2U) against students and called for the university's president to resign. Student protestors have also filed lawsuits claiming they were wrongly disciplined.
## The Derby Readies Its 150th Race
The Kentucky Derby will celebrate its [150th anniversary Saturday](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFvgzAUhH-N2Yzg2UAYGBJVbOnSoSNy7OfwGoOReQnl31dk7nan05103_d1uBoKNN8_zYQd-zgYy_TCoZJKgh505jqPCKgy7Mqm1I1qaw3Z2DUlOqfrVtWuMsrbCksLrgaDpbpBaTPqoABdVIUqTlWtTjka57x3jW8N2Na3QhfoiGPKfyLNPKIPe3xhym2cstCNzMsq1FlAL6Dfti2f1vnIBPQ4y-cqoF-XmPgQkUdMAnoeUd4N4yoNy8OQjTNZ-cCZn_axS4fptsuNQpDRe7JkQthlXHCWk9ml5vFdw1-LaWEBvUnyfC6j2h4XofpoyQn1cTmI4bZ-oUl2zFLnlmOS1roRurhPhsL7Bf-H9C8AAP__SLd7PA) when 20 horses make the storied "run for the roses." The race, described as "the most exciting two minutes in sports," is scheduled for 6:57 p.m. ET at Churchill Downs, and Florida Derby winner Fierceness is the current favorite with 5-2 odds. [You can see the lineup and odds here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FuhDAQBb_G7kC-9YKhcJGG7tKmRAbvHs4ZfMLOIf4-InW6Jz1pRvN1H-8uxLA9Pt1KtnAa3VzCm8am0hXgiNJbJgLSkuzN3NDovkWQi20cI3ZGGTbtjdE1rTLUMUyKEJVhGSwoQNUorbqm1V1Nzntmb7h3MPfcC1TkQ0l7_Z3CVhbieKY37fWcVhntUsorC_0hYBAwHMdRz1Pe6MjXL2C4poDhSVv5mZ9n5WmfzmpJe6ZcXWoBg9ytfx0hxpBbI1A9VhfiH7_8F_sbAAD__1joVd4). Churchill Downs officials expect to serve 20,000 desserts, 10,000 pounds of brisket, and 24,000 bottles of Old Forester Mint Julep Bourbon Cocktail. [Taste of Home has a list](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsz71u7CAQQOGngc4WBsxPQXEbd3vblBYLw3qy2KzsyVp--yip0x_p6Pu4zbeIFbfH_7hCoNLmmAjfMI-d6qSeNc-hAEhQHMJgB22VN1ryJVjvQHsDeYijN4NxJWYYnPXZJufcnWOQQmoxCiXcaJTrIeZcSrbFR5l88UwLyEht7z8bbrRAqVd7w96ntvIaFqLXwdQ_Jicmp_M8e4oHQStLW-GnYXJKrVZIhG1jcnrCRl_peXUZ9vvV7ZDwBQeTE99Dfp1YKx7GMi0ea8T6e6G_yN8BAAD__wWHWaw) of traditional Derby recipes for viewers at home.
## List: The Richest Person in Each State
All but three U.S. states have [at least one billionaire resident](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L1uwyAUR_GnwRsRBvw1eOjiLV07WsT8CbfCJoLbuHn7qp07n-Xo93Fdr44SHfd3t2PmkFe3MT2xdtJIbVfb-DkAGqbB3A6tHczUW93E2RkfbLCddsA4tVb3XWix3UZlbKcwNjRrpa3qlFFj15vxAud9CH4Ik9PbFCZhFTxxLpfPTAdHhPTKT5TLlvcmzZH5UYV5E3oReuGISCn9NqGXmHccOKvQy4Hvyq6sOzy59aQCoRfbm3FQWp4xS6qSI-QJlzgSKssHSs2HpEO-8leRlR1DhlxuqLIgwVVUeeCUiSoLvTRl9o-TUqLaD8Kq--7o76Th_8h-AgAA__9Y5HBY), and the combined wealth of these 54 billionaires adds up to $1.6 trillion, according to a new Forbes list. Some states had their billionaires leave, as Amazon's Jeff Bezos did by relocating to Florida from Washington. Others saw new billionaires take the top spot in the state, like Louisiana "Raising Cane's" owner Todd Graves, who took the richest titles from sports owner Gayle Benson. The three states without a billionaire are Alaska, Delaware, West Virginia. You can see who [the richest person is in your state here.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2O5CAQhJ8GZ1i4Af8EDk46kc2lF1oYmoEVY0bQGmvefuXdDTepoD6VqlT_b9vNppyO-z_7wJVC2ayj9MJNc8lBbarza0AElB2uwzSoSS6jgi6uSi2jkzKoffej3rWYZzFPyyjkrJya9i6tIEAJLaSY9SjnHq33IfgpLBbcEhamBPpEpfYfJR0UMeR3eWHtXXl0eY1Ez8bkHwaGgTnPsw-l7tguzMC0RNgYmG_zRJspEtoLXb0MjNCXAANDEXlNLmIj_sTaysHTwfGF9c0bWUL-E2HStMjkXzkNu9Mw6kHprq7-eaacUxsnpsT9YVP-2ki_HfYZAAD___-uaWc)

Mitch McConnell and Joni Ernst, protested a potential proposal by the White House to accept Palestinian refugees from Gaza, calling the move a national security risk. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO4yAQQL8Gd0R4wHYoKK5xl2uvtCYw2HNHwAKSU_5-tSttt_XT05Pen9t2Q06c99_4INdj2dB3ftE2SS3BbGYILhIB6YHcuIxm0XY2MBzubuyMATFQJHMNavbahLCM-u5HQA0DO1Bg1KS0uk6zvl4IQ4gxLNEieButMIoC91IvfwvnflBM7_KievHlMSR39H42oX8JWAWs_aCDU_pkAtazJPZvASvnTjVj55IxCVjNrK2arNzLKRtl7KU2eWKi1jkzZlkpPneiJr8l2cg_K_e3rNz-CViH6sL5n1PiNi_CqP2B_NUd-k-DPgIAAP__O1dqnw)) ➤ **President Biden** called Japan "xenophobic" at a fundraiser Wednesday, saying the long-time U.S. ally, along with China and Russia, have weaker economies due to a lack of immigration. clean_body: All but three U.S. states have at least one billionaire resident, and the combined wealth of these 54 billionaires adds up to $1.6 trillion, according to a new Forbes list. | | | | | | FRIDAY, MAY 3, 2024 ---|--- Good Morning! On this date in 1979, Conservative Party leader Margaret Thatcher was elected England's prime minister, the first woman to take that role and the first female prime minister in Europe. () Over cups of coffee Thursday, The Flyover staff discussed the upcoming Kentucky Derby. While the 2024 horses have some impressive names--we see you Track Phantom -- they can't compete with the past's Mucho Macho Man , Sinister Minister , or the ever-popular War Admiral. What's your favorite? If you haven't subscribed to The Flyover yet, you can do that here . We're taking off today with our sponsor Is your financial privacy under siege? . | Over 2,000 Arrests in Campus Protests More than 2,000 anti-Israel protesters have been arrested across the U.S. the past two weeks as campus demonstration have grown more violent. At UCLA, police in riot gear moved in to take down an encampment after groups of students began fighting. The police removed barricades and dismantled the encampment. President Biden also used Thursday to make about the student protests. He rejected calls by protestors to alter his approach to Israel and said dissent should never lead to disorder. Several Columbia professors against students and called for the university's president to resign. Student protestors have also filed lawsuits claiming they were wrongly disciplined. The Derby Readies Its 150th Race The Kentucky Derby will celebrate its when 20 horses make the storied "run for the roses." The race, described as "the most exciting two minutes in sports," is scheduled for 6:57 p.m. ET at Churchill Downs, and Florida Derby winner Fierceness is the current favorite with 5-2 odds. . Churchill Downs officials expect to serve 20,000 desserts, 10,000 pounds of brisket, and 24,000 bottles of Old Forester Mint Julep Bourbon Cocktail. of traditional Derby recipes for viewers at home. List: The Richest Person in Each State All but three U.S. states have , and the combined wealth of these 54 billionaires adds up to $1.6 trillion, according to a new Forbes list. Some states had their billionaires leave, as Amazon's Jeff Bezos did by relocating to Florida from Washington. Others saw new billionaires take the top spot in the state, like Louisiana "Raising Cane's" owner Todd Graves, who took the richest titles from sports owner Gayle Benson. The three states without a billionaire are Alaska, Delaware, West Virginia. subject: Sign: Demand the Supreme Court REJECT Trump's "total immunity" claim
body:

# [Tell the Supreme Court to reject Trump’s claim of “total immunity” for crimes](https://default.salsalabs.org/T37924c94-ba8f-4085-bdd6-2f3b8201b12b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T58b7c833-2652-452e-9210-199e592e5fd5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Donald Trump is insisting that presidents have "total immunity" for crimes committed while in office. His legal team has even said that a president could order the assassination of a political opponent, and still not be charged. [**The Supreme Court needs to reject this argument. Forcefully and immediately.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8121022b-829e-4832-a135-1d96f9ea674f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) The absurdity of the claim is blindingly obvious, as is the danger if the Supreme Court accepted it. We need to demand they do the right thing. [**Add your name: Tell the Supreme Court to reject Trump's claim of "total immunity" for crimes >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T76f604f6-0f0b-491c-9174-3b92ca392d11/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

I wish I was reaching out to you with better news

name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: Your thoughts on education in America
body:
The sad truth is, many distinguished colleges began with beautiful missions

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bd59071f460142a4aacf0548863a6aa0&_e=s_KaJv18yAbeajenfJxb8HzsFFgpt5cwuzsQBJrU9zoBvZEFtWSoF1ItRI9f5WgKpH6cH0IbVwV6N9adpJ377y4DgZCT8TqeV7Zresrr-4YC9We8EBduCD5p_RhmRSd_V3jRW1oG3Zp7-CKX2L0X1UAsJHpvw4uuDQRL-kQx-LTTMOb-evjA0o1E5oqZQpuHmrviAU7HJkbWldeRvfDExGaI2N_7m2U5BldAyZ9olPZ7R63opyfVFxYdpfj3X-DiG2Q8q0wv_xcyoGnV0H5K1SJYyb67tQ2NPDGOfIeqNOzNFMtV7gr9JDnJ_Q9lUinPtu3bzsK6ufpIruW0hYkjwemkl4ZQG7FeW2D8Xl40RXs7eCwBEQATzerXqVGy3M6A10qSS_aZKJFkpjD8XCgz7LAokQZdse3zmhYKoTfUSfg%3D) Dear Fellow American,
You probably don't know, but Hillsdale College settled a legal battle to honor a donor's wishes when his alma mater failed to abide by their agreement.
You see, this generous donor left money to his alma mater to teach free-market economics and asked Hillsdale to make sure his wishes were honored.
Well, I won't bore you with the details of the case, but let's say we had differing interpretations of free-market economics.
The sad truth is, many distinguished colleges began with beautiful missions, many founded along the same lines as Hillsdale. Maybe your alma mater is one of them. But it's a sad fact that too many of them have departed from their founding missions and are pursuing...something else.
Is it any wonder that, on many college campuses free speech is under threat, as conservative speakers or faculty are harassed or even assaulted!
That's why I want to hear from you today. What do you think about higher education today? Is your alma mater, or are other schools in your state staying true to their original mission?
And are they doing enough to provide their students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution?

## Are you concerned that political correctness negatively influences what young Americans are learning?
[Yes](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bd59071f460142a4aacf0548863a6aa0&_e=s_KaJv18yAbeajenfJxb8HzsFFgpt5cwuzsQBJrU9zoBvZEFtWSoF1ItRI9f5WgKpH6cH0IbVwV6N9adpJ377y4DgZCT8TqeV7Zresrr-4YC9We8EBduCD5p_RhmRSd_V3jRW1oG3Zp7-CKX2L0X1UAsJHpvw4uuDQRL-kQx-LTTMOb-evjA0o1E5oqZQpuHmrviAU7HJkbWldeRvfDExGaI2N_7m2U5BldAyZ9olPZ7R63opyfVFxYdpfj3X-Di1l3tSfsBiO8jZiMZX5pf1ijnJRi1JgMTi2XMYGgEC6C2RDpjR5kEd1GPXBS2a0yIEHJTKsmvhEip9Gd6DPnuI9DlzA_FiTnn85KJk_porFwV8p_pKpUeLulkDV-mROs-Z4YMKERdM0xaN-6kT88S0Z2eO3qkd15NtOKstio-tUQ%3D) [No](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bd59071f460142a4aacf0548863a6aa0&_e=s_KaJv18yAbeajenfJxb8HzsFFgpt5cwuzsQBJrU9zoBvZEFtWSoF1ItRI9f5WgKpH6cH0IbVwV6N9adpJ377y4DgZCT8TqeV7Zresrr-4YC9We8EBduCD5p_RhmRSd_V3jRW1oG3Zp7-CKX2L0X1UAsJHpvw4uuDQRL-kQx-LTTMOb-evjA0o1E5oqZQpuHmrviAU7HJkbWldeRvfDExGaI2N_7m2U5BldAyZ9olPZ7R63opyfVFxYdpfj3X-DiQsjmedig7jN-08_PsiglVBquZiFD6BYNYyN5TeJJkOhMMCEUjM3qA_4w8-8c7n0_VFNiCrIFAhVDgW42HBnKTq3KX1D1EaCc7fa4_T2RnMjT6RdGBPFK_fTB54ilOcLu1CJvVf6CfQAHhcEHE6JP9Aivvdk8gYAhCnvjwuEREXo%3D) [Not Sure/Undecided](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bd59071f460142a4aacf0548863a6aa0&_e=s_KaJv18yAbeajenfJxb8HzsFFgpt5cwuzsQBJrU9zoBvZEFtWSoF1ItRI9f5WgKpH6cH0IbVwV6N9adpJ377y4DgZCT8TqeV7Zresrr-4YC9We8EBduCD5p_RhmRSd_V3jRW1oG3Zp7-CKX2L0X1UAsJHpvw4uuDQRL-kQx-LTTMOb-evjA0o1E5oqZQpuHmrviAU7HJkbWldeRvfDExGaI2N_7m2U5BldAyZ9olPZ7R63opyfVFxYdpfj3X-DiVhI0h5g6VBIHTUUymPDZ6ObQwfj0R7sIjYdVkhiR_P5Y_ISc_WJZrEfQKQipsuyYW3nCAMAmqrolrQgR8SZSwLPC5hkGyFhwl1f2apEBCWtn4EECnsBGTWQqhThbgXT8oROt2zJ5kMkp9kMWQjDO-7v0RQs7l4B8MnmXuY9wrh0%3D) [We want your opinion, so please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your thoughts on education today.»](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bd59071f460142a4aacf0548863a6aa0&_e=s_KaJv18yAbeajenfJxb8HzsFFgpt5cwuzsQBJrU9zoBvZEFtWSoF1ItRI9f5WgKpH6cH0IbVwV6N9adpJ377y4DgZCT8TqeV7Zresrr-4YC9We8EBduCD5p_RhmRSd_V3jRW1oG3Zp7-CKX2L0X1UAsJHpvw4uuDQRL-kQx-LTTMOb-evjA0o1E5oqZQpuHmrviAU7HJkbWldeRvfDExGaI2N_7m2U5BldAyZ9olPZ7R63opyfVFxYdpfj3X-Di1I5T4jKt1tSKVlZ8nA7eChzRjSwWWXhBMxxIiEsFFqYY6DUz600XrX-FnLJ1u2QyOOze-IPL2lhRz2_TuZjWXDSbvBEBjsYtoyfhi22Z1wrfF-Hr_PiiIE5AZGR0VfUfqVCS4VBsgsP0u_lD3VCZK96FMGePC2YK3zGgi8k6Y8c%3D)
Hillsdale College stands firm, rooted in its original mission, and faithful to the intent of its founders. And in response to the trends I mentioned, we have to do even more to **reach** and **teach** millions on behalf of liberty. So, we need your input, to make our work more effective.
That's why I hope you will please take our brief higher education survey using this secure link:
[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/higher-education-survey/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bd59071f460142a4aacf0548863a6aa0&_e=s_KaJv18yAbeajenfJxb8HzsFFgpt5cwuzsQBJrU9zoBvZEFtWSoF1ItRI9f5WgKpH6cH0IbVwV6N9adpJ377y4DgZCT8TqeV7Zresrr-4YC9We8EBduCD5p_RhmRSd_V3jRW1oG3Zp7-CKX2L0X1UAsJHpvw4uuDQRL-kQx-LTTMOb-evjA0o1E5oqZQpuHmrviAU7HJkbWldeRvfDExGaI2N_7m2U5BldAyZ9olPZ7R63opyfVFxYdpfj3X-DiSZ4MPMq47LwClIXJckpwcMMO4YHnaO-0z-x3Soe8kQGpetGgtmudC7BeJUilsl4mG6UoR12Q1tscmvbWDaPGWZfDmhRB7Gq-imwoWJ9yb0CFoMyYliHJOUX_qygUN2EnWngfgrWlAZkbt3em3ftvths3LEgcht7vV2SVd2_YIw4%3D)
As you may know, we refuse to accept ONE PENNY of government money--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. We do this precisely to preserve our founding mission. This uncompromising stand frees us from burdensome and corrupting regulations that other colleges must accept (maybe even your alma mater!)
But you should know that this independence comes at a cost, and we must rely on the support of our friends like you to do our work.
So after completing your survey, please consider making a generous tax-deductible gift to help us **reach** and **teach** millions more citizens nationwide.
I hope I'm not too presumptuous in saying this...but perhaps you can even spare a few dollars that you were going to give to your alma mater.
Thank you again for your faithful partnership with us and your unwavering support of liberty and education.
Warm regards,

Bill Gray
Class of 2001
Vice President
National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College

| Defend the Constitution

name: Hillsdale College via Full Mage News
subject: Your thoughts on education in America
body:
The sad truth is, many distinguished colleges began with beautiful missions

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d8de8758d04e4a6c9e5e30e7c403329b&_e=3yxg2o_KcmbOwRUN5dAav6KXIzxN9U3oyGVXHzcv3Fr8lR7ykU3pxjs_N9RXszpNsnbENSiwjHBCiT_wg8n6lA_LzcNg0njavj1xsoeKF_pZzQc-8LDTpBC87HrFhoDZPaxnaSfoFgHzJ5mgRu5QfpK5UiT2j5TivanEh2WvYa-iMuKJn1tNq36n3SNkh6rvxyFqYk_ARMHzTd-Qmgy0KX-Fb8_ECT2jNNq9Nc1zi4ntcCz3KJAe0AI-EZai3miJyvB6ujP05q-XWvOcBYIGt5H64I55Tncp8W9p21tLPhqzvLU0K31Ob00ITluZi04ChXA52r1HCGtr6WKLczbhQmbcKNRHDyN9OLT_9scrF07GLx9gFeBUUBDjUWr_pGPFrYI0V17y4UUfY2MTXMXvUGeeV7oLOCQBFN_TmKWStSQ%3D) Dear Fellow American,
You probably don't know, but Hillsdale College settled a legal battle to honor a donor's wishes when his alma mater failed to abide by their agreement.
You see, this generous donor left money to his alma mater to teach free-market economics and asked Hillsdale to make sure his wishes were honored.
Well, I won't bore you with the details of the case, but let's say we had differing interpretations of free-market economics.
The sad truth is, many distinguished colleges began with beautiful missions, many founded along the same lines as Hillsdale. Maybe your alma mater is one of them. But it's a sad fact that too many of them have departed from their founding missions and are pursuing...something else.
Is it any wonder that, on many college campuses free speech is under threat, as conservative speakers or faculty are harassed or even assaulted!
That's why I want to hear from you today. What do you think about higher education today? Is your alma mater, or are other schools in your state staying true to their original mission?
And are they doing enough to provide their students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution?

## Are you concerned that political correctness negatively influences what young Americans are learning?
[Yes](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d8de8758d04e4a6c9e5e30e7c403329b&_e=3yxg2o_KcmbOwRUN5dAav6KXIzxN9U3oyGVXHzcv3Fr8lR7ykU3pxjs_N9RXszpNsnbENSiwjHBCiT_wg8n6lA_LzcNg0njavj1xsoeKF_pZzQc-8LDTpBC87HrFhoDZPaxnaSfoFgHzJ5mgRu5QfpK5UiT2j5TivanEh2WvYa-iMuKJn1tNq36n3SNkh6rvxyFqYk_ARMHzTd-Qmgy0KX-Fb8_ECT2jNNq9Nc1zi4ntcCz3KJAe0AI-EZai3miJb8MptysFxhJ8pwtOzd5vL1uC5TyE3F0x7vVaapUDm8hUI2TP33iC3EHiITfzehDjPkZ1-BtS4uCuStylTk0MyZhwm26K6AXoyAp6AT5G8mug5txFZFexdsRtFM3x0_7LVICf4BvfPP1VODUdPaXpEuDlcjf5RvqxZlXvA16dN1k%3D) [No](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d8de8758d04e4a6c9e5e30e7c403329b&_e=3yxg2o_KcmbOwRUN5dAav6KXIzxN9U3oyGVXHzcv3Fr8lR7ykU3pxjs_N9RXszpNsnbENSiwjHBCiT_wg8n6lA_LzcNg0njavj1xsoeKF_pZzQc-8LDTpBC87HrFhoDZPaxnaSfoFgHzJ5mgRu5QfpK5UiT2j5TivanEh2WvYa-iMuKJn1tNq36n3SNkh6rvxyFqYk_ARMHzTd-Qmgy0KX-Fb8_ECT2jNNq9Nc1zi4ntcCz3KJAe0AI-EZai3miJlkD-ISCzzEpH9Yu-aymJyp3BMiLmqYKXpHIU6hRdq2iv0UxrwObUb1T679mXESRt4qY2ozP8VHnMJBOfXVr8fAQ_lrn9unx2t_fqDo4PRSpe1Pg_Xze1u6V7XO1_ED9RCIZkce8Nz3ZxQvz7C20uwzTEdkVwwjeAAkmXLmaMsuo%3D) [Not Sure/Undecided](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d8de8758d04e4a6c9e5e30e7c403329b&_e=3yxg2o_KcmbOwRUN5dAav6KXIzxN9U3oyGVXHzcv3Fr8lR7ykU3pxjs_N9RXszpNsnbENSiwjHBCiT_wg8n6lA_LzcNg0njavj1xsoeKF_pZzQc-8LDTpBC87HrFhoDZPaxnaSfoFgHzJ5mgRu5QfpK5UiT2j5TivanEh2WvYa-iMuKJn1tNq36n3SNkh6rvxyFqYk_ARMHzTd-Qmgy0KX-Fb8_ECT2jNNq9Nc1zi4ntcCz3KJAe0AI-EZai3miJKGcgTuFF5OKNspkb98evbQzljiSowoVxNS-82S1VL4Fo_7MkIT-5A6othn-C_u6xIzU3a2x6kk-hvgNRRP_MTB9L6UgBGfd3kdgr_3LA82IU2Z9H91rjHFWxOZft0JJleeUNp1hTloEaZabplE9N4ajCGa6VUVDk7bLkrYuBKu4%3D) [We want your opinion, so please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your thoughts on education today.»](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d8de8758d04e4a6c9e5e30e7c403329b&_e=3yxg2o_KcmbOwRUN5dAav6KXIzxN9U3oyGVXHzcv3Fr8lR7ykU3pxjs_N9RXszpNsnbENSiwjHBCiT_wg8n6lA_LzcNg0njavj1xsoeKF_pZzQc-8LDTpBC87HrFhoDZPaxnaSfoFgHzJ5mgRu5QfpK5UiT2j5TivanEh2WvYa-iMuKJn1tNq36n3SNkh6rvxyFqYk_ARMHzTd-Qmgy0KX-Fb8_ECT2jNNq9Nc1zi4ntcCz3KJAe0AI-EZai3miJjceG8lL72dsWhcVd-L3UkwvgO20CYBLNfslgobdNhw9y_ztfcRo7Q-m2x70Qj-vY-1ooRwN4ECsPN80G2AB_lFsEj1_MCS2Q7gFazCH_kf90SQy_e68WIa-sBMP32QhlO54RNNciuyhcCnIf58MT_Tso3J618-H9oJWdqRpbg0A%3D)
Hillsdale College stands firm, rooted in its original mission, and faithful to the intent of its founders. And in response to the trends I mentioned, we have to do even more to **reach** and **teach** millions on behalf of liberty. So, we need your input, to make our work more effective.
That's why I hope you will please take our brief higher education survey using this secure link:
[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/higher-education-survey/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d8de8758d04e4a6c9e5e30e7c403329b&_e=3yxg2o_KcmbOwRUN5dAav6KXIzxN9U3oyGVXHzcv3Fr8lR7ykU3pxjs_N9RXszpNsnbENSiwjHBCiT_wg8n6lA_LzcNg0njavj1xsoeKF_pZzQc-8LDTpBC87HrFhoDZPaxnaSfoFgHzJ5mgRu5QfpK5UiT2j5TivanEh2WvYa-iMuKJn1tNq36n3SNkh6rvxyFqYk_ARMHzTd-Qmgy0KX-Fb8_ECT2jNNq9Nc1zi4ntcCz3KJAe0AI-EZai3miJs1GsA1TQfSmpZqCtQpCsPXHCdmZtwkShn-1XGhxpSzAi_VWdycWeWkzt9oPjxWKOcdEltTcz72E7Rl2cl__8GGvAvczP-3dwBpFB2jvB4uLuDPYMXTeW2MjPn7PlszpsCwOpOtof11uNPxXQafwQbSRDGPJqFVbJisMXPgk50rs%3D)
As you may know, we refuse to accept ONE PENNY of government money--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. We do this precisely to preserve our founding mission. This uncompromising stand frees us from burdensome and corrupting regulations that other colleges must accept (maybe even your alma mater!)
But you should know that this independence comes at a cost, and we must rely on the support of our friends like you to do our work.
So after completing your survey, please consider making a generous tax-deductible gift to help us **reach** and **teach** millions more citizens nationwide.
I hope I'm not too presumptuous in saying this...but perhaps you can even spare a few dollars that you were going to give to your alma mater.
Thank you again for your faithful partnership with us and your unwavering support of liberty and education.
Warm regards,

Bill Gray
Class of 2001
Vice President
National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College

| Full Mag News

subject: What do you think about higher education today?
body:
The sad truth is, many distinguished colleges began with beautiful missions

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d144be41f5024ec0b590b2476b6b300a&_e=_G81qjAKQnLj2dSjv5YztVus1b-OwLCE1ww5Kx9VL0gGmuDVouxxt62KuAMjBvmMu0pCLbTpKkzeWdDr6t1meQmOkUfPPiaUOSbe0Mp-w47LBgZCV3ivjyAmVSSXc50VLLuy5jf5cxfkhGQf6QTGdx3PrliUekFDnY7A_6S75n3RRQ99-2_Bq_WrbscOp15jALxvujRYblQIlTV3oE5BGzXtt1XDC_EvF9RMDT2eFjJxR_QK16Q6fybgsD9vP6kUV4Y2eke__QVbeeIkjPnfgyvbHJ6ZjKUkmpLSw7rijAkmFXSJ3CcQJpKPJASyJazdDL3GORe5LooW5zo3xC2b0V4qvdPhXjJgnGd75_w272CDJuHb8Br4hd3NkcyGRrTxqeA7h1bwtXCPBfhihabmj8SgzuWddBi5yTqR3SvL5hs%3D) Dear Fellow American,
You probably don't know, but Hillsdale College settled a legal battle to honor a donor's wishes when his alma mater failed to abide by their agreement.
You see, this generous donor left money to his alma mater to teach free-market economics and asked Hillsdale to make sure his wishes were honored.
Well, I won't bore you with the details of the case, but let's say we had differing interpretations of free-market economics.
The sad truth is, many distinguished colleges began with beautiful missions, many founded along the same lines as Hillsdale. Maybe your alma mater is one of them. But it's a sad fact that too many of them have departed from their founding missions and are pursuing...something else.
Is it any wonder that, on many college campuses free speech is under threat, as conservative speakers or faculty are harassed or even assaulted!
That's why I want to hear from you today. What do you think about higher education today? Is your alma mater, or are other schools in your state staying true to their original mission?
And are they doing enough to provide their students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution?

## Are you concerned that political correctness negatively influences what young Americans are learning?

[No](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=08fda802167b4695ae3b24bd200b8c50&_e=RVw7crH-pv5eXzfhQO4KptcbuxAfASdB136UOsuaZT8qTuXFYj_OnhEUGHw1aaRPtTf_bcaG2cp2EYiRUz7oO-BFTZ7xYdTN0zBLroPDItJxIZZ9vo5TCVrCWXXpZ4Pv63_oLpkOR7jagHn-VaPgpWnXMFU_bKT_yu0Azm1rqghqkUp4L2qbWZPsxHY5LTpcI_efCD2GxNidhvN2LFbqKNuXp7wHfys1A17rwf-0iaE_rQ7VnFMQGSm0-o9O-aUMxdoBZdYEjbxWzzOBEJHvZWWbVH6nGhmozvfptr6fj7fcVaqmPaMnPd7KXpAI_PZtTHdabGibRNFrkNMr0ITaqfgM_yt5NBc3GNa0uAxIXzH7J-CaAWYRjgt94iSrj-kh_Q4b9Ac1nVdvYJugtpLojLw7E9PZBmsKQgAJrKgkEbk%3D) [Not Sure/Undecided](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=08fda802167b4695ae3b24bd200b8c50&_e=RVw7crH-pv5eXzfhQO4KptcbuxAfASdB136UOsuaZT8qTuXFYj_OnhEUGHw1aaRPtTf_bcaG2cp2EYiRUz7oO-BFTZ7xYdTN0zBLroPDItJxIZZ9vo5TCVrCWXXpZ4Pv63_oLpkOR7jagHn-VaPgpWnXMFU_bKT_yu0Azm1rqghqkUp4L2qbWZPsxHY5LTpcI_efCD2GxNidhvN2LFbqKNuXp7wHfys1A17rwf-0iaE_rQ7VnFMQGSm0-o9O-aUMflOJlkAhHYqGoaywQeLPrLjdkAdzfCXMjyezDarLD9VNXCCpJlsi7ehwx-eYHWpVktVpCxq_9IYoAQK76jdfOZkmr4QKoPh69GKUd3rikVJ5Ah7dVAP-3JTS6ID4HQeucyaXu9QaqUptYBfer_KLYxEBkpuxs15UR_BIuLeuxrc%3D) [We want your opinion, so please take a few minutes to complete this survey and let us know your thoughts on education today.»](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=08fda802167b4695ae3b24bd200b8c50&_e=RVw7crH-pv5eXzfhQO4KptcbuxAfASdB136UOsuaZT8qTuXFYj_OnhEUGHw1aaRPtTf_bcaG2cp2EYiRUz7oO-BFTZ7xYdTN0zBLroPDItJxIZZ9vo5TCVrCWXXpZ4Pv63_oLpkOR7jagHn-VaPgpWnXMFU_bKT_yu0Azm1rqghqkUp4L2qbWZPsxHY5LTpcI_efCD2GxNidhvN2LFbqKNuXp7wHfys1A17rwf-0iaE_rQ7VnFMQGSm0-o9O-aUMVVlWPVyYdmilVo7TJH-WIrty1pOzhh6omPGgQZd5qJVr9u5vGkzM7PJwP5GrpRS3MsBQW9XaBFbgq59ksuX93uMrbv9YQGuy_FBI73RCJJdufQAdTwx_etXtkW6QjvhJN5oyRk68aAbvn5-OMEC3kgX1cUcXtEc6pAenheWFYEQ%3D)
Hillsdale College stands firm, rooted in its original mission, and faithful to the intent of its founders. And in response to the trends I mentioned, we have to do even more to **reach** and **teach** millions on behalf of liberty. So, we need your input, to make our work more effective.
That's why I hope you will please take our brief higher education survey using this secure link:
[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/higher-education-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=08fda802167b4695ae3b24bd200b8c50&_e=RVw7crH-pv5eXzfhQO4KptcbuxAfASdB136UOsuaZT8qTuXFYj_OnhEUGHw1aaRPtTf_bcaG2cp2EYiRUz7oO-BFTZ7xYdTN0zBLroPDItJxIZZ9vo5TCVrCWXXpZ4Pv63_oLpkOR7jagHn-VaPgpWnXMFU_bKT_yu0Azm1rqghqkUp4L2qbWZPsxHY5LTpcI_efCD2GxNidhvN2LFbqKNuXp7wHfys1A17rwf-0iaE_rQ7VnFMQGSm0-o9O-aUM00y757q4LVQMSGY6P4WiCEiwU6ZL-VwQgD-rgEgFYlt_nPWOQyIY-wpfIEXgaOMqHT94kxS34VN4ZRiZp9_TSQgbyGmU-4SxPayPseiZobDXA5Ozo8aVG-bHBJPY8i84IX4a2G9l6tmykLmXbopHZQIuY_VLj2UAu9BVl0WDJWs%3D)
As you may know, we refuse to accept ONE PENNY of government money--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. We do this precisely to preserve our founding mission. This uncompromising stand frees us from burdensome and corrupting regulations that other colleges must accept (maybe even your alma mater!)
But you should know that this independence comes at a cost, and we must rely on the support of our friends like you to do our work.
So after completing your survey, please consider making a generous tax-deductible gift to help us **reach** and **teach** millions more citizens nationwide.
I hope I'm not too presumptuous in saying this...but perhaps you can even spare a few dollars that you were going to give to your alma mater.
Thank you again for your faithful partnership with us and your unwavering support of liberty and education.
Warm regards,

Bill Gray
Class of 2001
Vice President
National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College

| Conservative Liberty Wire

clean_body: The sad truth is, many distinguished colleges began with beautiful missions This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, You probably don't know, but Hillsdale College settled a legal battle to honor a donor's wishes when his alma mater failed to abide by their agreement. You see, this generous donor left money to his alma mater to teach free-market economics and asked Hillsdale to make sure his wishes were honored. Well, I won't bore you with the details of the case, but let's say we had differing interpretations of free-market economics. The sad truth is, many distinguished colleges began with beautiful missions, many founded along the same lines as Hillsdale. Maybe your alma mater is one of them. But it's a sad fact that too many of them have departed from their founding missions and are pursuing...something else. Is it any wonder that, on many college campuses free speech is under threat, as conservative speakers or faculty are harassed or even assaulted! That's why I want to hear from you today. What do you think about higher education today? Is your alma mater, or are other schools in your state staying true to their original mission? And are they doing enough to provide their students with a proper understanding of American history and government--including an understanding of the purposes and principles of the Constitution? Are you concerned that political correctness negatively influences what young Americans are learning? Hillsdale College stands firm, rooted in its original mission, and faithful to the intent of its founders. And in response to the trends I mentioned, we have to do even more to reach and teach millions on behalf of liberty. So, we need your input, to make our work more effective. That's why I hope you will please take our brief higher education survey using this secure link: As you may know, we refuse to accept ONE PENNY of government money--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. We do this precisely to preserve our founding mission. This uncompromising stand frees us from burdensome and corrupting regulations that other colleges must accept (maybe even your alma mater!) But you should know that this independence comes at a cost, and we must rely on the support of our friends like you to do our work. So after completing your survey, please consider making a generous tax-deductible gift to help us reach and teach millions more citizens nationwide. I hope I'm not too presumptuous in saying this...but perhaps you can even spare a few dollars that you were going to give to your alma mater. Thank you again for your faithful partnership with us and your unwavering support of liberty and education. Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College | Conservative Liberty Wire PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

body:

| |

| | | | | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsbmt7p79vuf8otni5m59j6ac62o83somtpnjoi0_rp22sh2s8i6ep31ctgm1ob0sdh2bs)
---
Friend, this is Kelly Johnson. Ever since my husband's election as Speaker of the House, the relentless onslaught from the radical Left media has portrayed him as the villain in their narrative, aiming to undermine his leadership. I know you don't believe a word that the media says, but I want you to know the TRUTH about Speaker Mike Johnson.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhp5gq3vrnbb1uco09a9gvghr6av3n490047ife8_rp22sh2s8i6ep31ctgm1ob0sdh2bs)
---
_**[**My husband is the hardest-working man I know. **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbetvjt5s8kilis2kv5nullfda6id4j4134kc64g_rp22sh2s8i6ep31ctgm1ob0sdh2bs)**_ Day in and day out, I get to watch him work TIRELESSLY to advance the conservative values that we all share. Mike's profound dedication to our country and its fundamental principles is nothing short of honorable, as he never gives up fighting to preserve them. _**[But he's just one man... And believe me, we're not billionaires who can afford to bankroll an entire nationwide operation like the left has.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z44grcdmtiov790blfgi5di525jjdc0b4addij58_rp22sh2s8i6ep31ctgm1ob0sdh2bs)**_ November is so important this year, but so is May. We have a crucial fundraising deadline approaching and to make it to November we have to be able to meet our goals for May first. To secure a Republican majority, we have to meet (and hopefully exceed) this deadline. **[I am reaching out to you, Friend, for your support. Anything you can give will be greatly appreciated.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zde8kge3rp5j16l7ct1gd4gh97bmdbh1cv87od18_rp22sh2s8i6ep31ctgm1ob0sdh2bs)** **[**Will you join Team Johnson today and help us ensure a Republican majority?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhq0mpm8ctisus3imbn6bt1mirm47n3hujt28ft0_rp22sh2s8i6ep31ctgm1ob0sdh2bs)**

I was proud to serve in the U.S. Army for more than 20 years.

During that time, I deployed to more than 32 countries, including Israel and hostile fire zones in Bosnia, Afghanistan, and Iraq.

[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8c30722d3644710666a6b3c4b83ff292/45443/c294dd41b87f57223947229f28c3afba/344dff9b008b74b6c3d6b838967d376c/45443)

When I was stationed at Camp Rudder in Florida, I was the executive officer for the “swamp phase” of Ranger School.

I trained Army Rangers how to navigate a swamp, literally.

**So, if there’s anyone who knows how to deal with a Swamp in this race, it’s me.**

name: Add Your Name | Left Action
subject: “​​A serious ethical and campaign finance scandal in the making” re: Ted Cruz
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Add your name: Investigate and punish Ted Cruz for campaign finance violations >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tee5201dc-2fef-4a53-be43-06db7af91bfd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdac4aa48-fce4-4a93-9d37-87981cfdbcd1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | [Recent investigations](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tae74e9f5-a00c-4c93-a774-b4e29a111441/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) show that Texas Sen. Ted Cruz has been involved in some shady business dealings regarding his podcast and how he receives compensation. MSNBC host Chris Hayes called Cruz's actions "a serious ethical and campaign finance scandal in the making." It appears Cruz has been directing funds totaling over $630,000 to Truth and Courage PAC, a group dedicated to his reelection campaign, from iHeartMedia, the company that distributes his podcast. There are rules about outside employment for members of Congress, so Cruz is attempting to skirt those rules with this arrangement – but it raises real ethical concerns, and could be a campaign finance violation, since there is a $5,000 limit on how much an officeholder is permitted to solicit for a super PAC. This is unacceptable. Ted Cruz needs to be investigated for campaign finance violations, and if he's found guilty, he must be held accountable and punished. clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | show that Texas Sen. Ted Cruz has been involved in some shady business dealings regarding his podcast and how he receives compensation. MSNBC host Chris Hayes called Cruz's actions "a serious ethical and campaign finance scandal in the making." It appears Cruz has been directing funds totaling over $630,000 to Truth and Courage PAC, a group dedicated to his reelection campaign, from iHeartMedia, the company that distributes his podcast. There are rules about outside employment for members of Congress, so Cruz is attempting to skirt those rules with this arrangement – but it raises real ethical concerns, and could be a campaign finance violation, since there is a $5,000 limit on how much an officeholder is permitted to solicit for a super PAC. This is unacceptable. Ted Cruz needs to be investigated for campaign finance violations, and if he's found guilty, he must be held accountable and punished. | | | | | | | Thank you, Left Action | | | | | | Other things you can do: Follow us on and * Follow Us | | | ---|---|--- | LeftAction Washington, District of Columbia info@leftaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | or

name: Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
subject: I Invite You To Join Our Coalition
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Labels do not define my mission. You do!

|
---
| | | | [**Labels do not define my mission. You do!**](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=classic_liberal_5_3_24_r_nd1&n=1)

|

[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=classic_liberal_5_3_24_r_nd1&n=2)
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=classic_liberal_5_3_24_r_nd1&n=3)
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=classic_liberal_5_3_24_r_nd1&n=4)
---
|
---
Dear Peter,
In a world quick to label and divide, I stand before you not just as another candidate, but as a voice for authentic change.
Many wonder if I fit on the Right or the Left politically—some call me a conservative, others a liberal.
Let me be clear: _labels do not define my mission_.
You do!
I am a “classic liberal” in the sense that I believe in the values of JFK and my father RFK. Those were the days when Democrats championed free speech, peace, civil liberties, and (though it may surprise you) a strong border.
Before I unravel what all that means, I want to ask for your much needed contribution to help us seize the momentum. [Your donation will directly fund our ballot access efforts and legal challenges, and ensure my vision for America is heard in every state.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=classic_liberal_5_3_24_r_nd1&n=5)

[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=240&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=classic_liberal_5_3_24_r_nd1&n=9)
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=classic_liberal_5_3_24_r_nd1&n=10)
---
First, Restoring Liberty: My presidency will dismantle the surveillance state that both parties have supported, restoring and protecting constitutional freedoms eroded under the guise of national security.
Second, End the Chronic Disease Epidemic: The CDC admits 60% of Americans suffer from chronic diseases like diabetes, heart disease, Alzheimers, and cancer. I will redirect federal resources toward finding out the causes and enacting the solutions to this terrible crisis that affects nearly every American family.
Third, Supporting the Underserved: My administration will prioritize reversing the marginalization of the 'little guy,' ensuring inclusivity and support for those often overlooked by government policies.
Fourth, Managing Immigration: Advocating for strong borders to protect American labor from being undermined by unregulated, cheap workforce influx, ensuring fair wages and conditions for all workers.
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=classic_liberal_5_3_24_r_nd1&n=11)
---
Fifth, Committing to Peace: Unlike my competitors, I will cease America’s involvement in costly foreign conflicts that have drained our resources and compromised our national values. No more regime change wars!
Sixth, Nurturing the Future: I will focus on policies that enhance the health and economic opportunities for young Americans, making it easier for them to own homes and live prosperously.
Seventh, Protecting the Environment: True to the traditional values of environmentalism, my presidency will focus on conserving our natural resources, eliminating pollutants, and safeguarding our ecosystems.
Eighth, Strengthening Democracy: Understanding that a healthy democracy relies on a robust middle class, I will end the corporate capture of our regulatory agencies that drains America of our resources for the enrichment of a few and the impoverishment of the many.
Finally, Ensuring Fairness: Addressing economic polarization, I will advocate for higher wages, support stronger labor protections, reduce housing costs, and enhance social safety nets to ensure that all Americans can thrive.
Call me a Kennedy Democrat, call me independent or conservative — whatever you want. _These are the things I believe in and that’s where I stand._
If you resonate with my vision for our country then I invite you to stand with me. I invite you to be part of the reweaving of America. I invite you to join our coalition of liberals, conservatives, and independents, committed to taking this country back not just for the left or right, but for the American people.
| [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=50&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=classic_liberal_5_3_24_r_nd1&n=12)
---

---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=100&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=classic_liberal_5_3_24_r_nd1&n=14)
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=240&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=classic_liberal_5_3_24_r_nd1&n=15)
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=classic_liberal_5_3_24_r_nd1&n=16)
---
I have about six months left to make sure Americans know what I believe and that there is a third option come Election Day. **As an independent candidate, I’ve alienated all the largest corporate donors – _so I’m relying on small contributions from people like you._**
[As we enter a critical phase of our campaign, your support is more important than ever.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=classic_liberal_5_3_24_r_nd1&n=17)
Thank you for your unwavering dedication to my campaign.

Sincerely,
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.

subject: Monthly Newsletter: April
body:
It was an honor for me to join Progress Texas for the inaugural episode of their monthly podcast series, where we delved into the ongoing fight fo... | | | | | |
---
[](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=de2a640ed3&e=a2a46ff12c)
# Monthly Newsletter

|
---
| | | | | | | | | April
---
| 05.01.2024
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | |
[About Me](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=7229d91b67&e=a2a46ff12c)
|
[Donate](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=1d096a2d3e&e=a2a46ff12c)
|
[Social Media](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=08918c5876&e=a2a46ff12c)
**CLICK THE IMAGES BELOW TO LEARN MORE ABOUT EVENTS**
| | | | | | | | |
## Women’s Summit
_(Austin, Texas)_
I joined a group of dedicated female candidates at the Texas AFL-CIO Women’s Summit and had the invaluable opportunity to connect with many resilient Texas labor union women.
---
| [](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=45bb4ee654&e=a2a46ff12c)
---
| | | | | | | | |
# Meet and Greet
_(Cypress, Texas)_
I had the pleasure of meeting with supporters from Cypress. In 2022, the incredible support from Harris County propelled me to victory in that TX8 portion of the county, and it's truly heartening to see that they're enthusiastic about continuing this momentum into 2024.
---
[](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=a228c27ecb&e=a2a46ff12c)
|
## Pre-Convention Caucus Meeting
_(Virtual)_
I am honored to have attended the virtual CD8 pre-convention caucus meeting. It was a privilege to speak and share my enthusiasm for the upcoming election cycle alongside dedicated delegates committed to shaping our future.
---
[](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=0b445c1289&e=a2a46ff12c)
| | | | | | | | |
## Podcast Guest
_(Texas)_
It was an honor to join Progress Texas for the inaugural episode of their monthly podcast series, where we delved into the ongoing fight for **reproductive freedom**. I was proud to kick off this important dialogue and look forward to continuing the conversation in our community.

---
| [](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=3b0cbd4f20&e=a2a46ff12c)
---
|
---
**Legislative Update**
In April 2024, Congress saw a flurry of legislative activity addressing diverse national concerns. Notably, the Superior National Forest Restoration Act, aimed at reissuing canceled mining leases, narrowly passed with a vote of 219-203, with 14 Present/Not voting, garnering support from Representative Luttrell. Conversely, the Trust the Science Act, which sought to remove the Gray Wolf from the endangered species list, faced a tight vote of 209-205, with 15 Present/Not voting, but ultimately secured Luttrell's affirmative vote. The Protecting Access for Hunters and Anglers Act, prohibiting the regulation of lead use in hunting or fishing on federal land or water, gained traction with a vote of 214-201, with 14 Present/Not voting, receiving Luttrell's support.Measures like the Student Veteran Restoration Act (408-6, with 10 Present/Not voting), the Veteran Fraud Reimbursement Act (413-0, with 15 Present/Not voting), and the Veteran Economic Opportunity & Transition Administration Act (403-10, with 15 Present/Not voting), received resounding approval, including from Representative Luttrell. However, contentious debates emerged around bills such as the Privacy Enhancing Tech Research Act (354-36, with 38 Present/Not voting) and the Fire Weather Development Act (341-48, with 49 Present/Not voting).In addressing international affairs, the Israel Security Supplemental Act (366-58, with 7 Present/Not voting), the Ukraine Security Supplemental Act (311-112, with 8 Present/Not voting), and the Indo-Pacific Security Supplemental Act (385-34, with 12 Present/Not voting) are notable. Additionally, the Abandoned Wells Remediation Research Act (333-75, with 20 Present/Not voting).
|
---
|
---
[](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=7464942128&e=a2a46ff12c)
Thank you so much for your continuous support.\- Laura Jones for Congress TX-8
|
---
| | | | [](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=7a4c788f6d&e=a2a46ff12c)| [](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=91c8f128f6&e=a2a46ff12c)| [](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=617af93686&e=a2a46ff12c)| [](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=5fe745853c&e=a2a46ff12c)| [](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=dda34215cb&e=a2a46ff12c)| [](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=edb9696f56&e=a2a46ff12c)
---|---|---|---|---|---
|
---

You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

Our mailing address is:
Laura Jones for Congress PO Box 742 Coldspring, TX 77331-0742 USA

Want to change how you receive these emails?You can [update your preferences](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/profile?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=869a96a314&e=a2a46ff12c&c=e5349bb7ae) or [unsubscribe](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=869a96a314&t=b&e=a2a46ff12c&c=e5349bb7ae)

you that calling Maryland’s Senate race a dead heat would be a massive
understatement.

Despite Angela’s self-funding opponent spending over $47 million on his
campaign – Angela is the candidate with ALL of the momentum in this race.

A new poll has Angela Alsobrooks within striking distance of her opponent,
and is showing that her ads and on-the-ground efforts are quickly closing
the gap.

That’s why Angela and her campaign team are hitting the pavement and
pushing her campaign into overdrive for the final weeks before her May
14th primary.

| Peter, Why are we bankrolling institutions like Columbia and Harvard while they turn a blind eye to pro-Hamas protests ringing out on their campuses?
It's a slap in the face to every American.
And to add insult to injury, our country is almost $36 trillion in debt, our borders are wide open, and our law enforcement is dangerously underfunded.
[That's why I'm urging you to join me in this fight to put the American people FIRST and stand up to Antisemitism.](https://sxw89cgbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xWU2HZGeuSq6ogHE_Exn0jA3VH9ybflyo8wmNzUPaOZc15gFFALir05EwzsfWGqMPLCo_GP-M5ifu2fEst8NURKB0-33cDDWUqt5ruJ-NZ64zgFRk6za8_gm27QblmOW_TR0dmEOzDb-dpgzvrUOhYw5YkHl_Ysg9ciNOyJLIqp_DQsUV8TNa5o-jvfv5xocf5q5CB-6AtUY_NXDTN5DUN6XajRroTy6qCM1EHGtcfFfR-NpbpINZDCnMLuisqNS4lWB9IoGVuwq8YRpmwvr36vsQwyGpTu3Cz46hB5eRgQgs1pskiIAqMANgmNKI7AXxBBC4-zW2L_S7yOrGaIw4w==&c=3H2tJHYo8QeRSEo6M8FHfgZKzJS9o5zbTECKWE62bIYiVh876pUE-Q==&ch=D8Du93n5gZemObCPo8hX63TLJFSp5NnJV1vuZialK4cnsbDhMA6ccA==)

| A note from Russell...
The people of New Hampshire are ready for a change in our representation in Congress, whether it's rising energy costs, the broken southern border, or a lack of support for our men and women in law enforcement. New Hampshire families know that our current leadership in Washington is failing us and have forgotten the 'Live Free or Die' values that we all pride ourselves on in New Hampshire. We need a fresh voice who has the business and elected experience to change the status quo. United, we can defeat Chris Pappas and bring real change to Washington.
Thank you.
-Russell

clean_body: Why are we giving money to Columbia and Harvard? | | | | == | Peter, Why are we bankrolling institutions like Columbia and Harvard while they turn a blind eye to pro-Hamas protests ringing out on their campuses? It's a slap in the face to every American. And to add insult to injury, our country is almost $36 trillion in debt, our borders are wide open, and our law enforcement is dangerously underfunded. == | | == | It's time for Congress to REVOKE any and all funding from entities that aren't an absolute necessity to our nation's most urgent needs. We need to start funding our problems at home, beginning with securing our borders. == | | == | Live Free Or Die, Russell Prescott | == | Follow Russell on Social Media: | == == == | == | A note from Russell... The people of New Hampshire are ready for a change in our representation in Congress, whether it's rising energy costs, the broken southern border, or a lack of support for our men and women in law enforcement. New Hampshire families know that our current leadership in Washington is failing us and have forgotten the 'Live Free or Die' values that we all pride ourselves on in New Hampshire. We need a fresh voice who has the business and elected experience to change the status quo. United, we can defeat Chris Pappas and bring real change to Washington. Thank you. -Russell Peter \- Forward this message to 5 FRIENDS AND FAMILY MEMBERS and help us raise awareness for our mission to achieve a better future for New Hampshire. name: Lucy McBath
subject: Big news: I’m running in GA-06
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
I won’t let the GOP keep me from returning to Congress in 2024
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0bf3ec3d-e4f2-45e9-9e10-6882d475bc39/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6b341da5-3145-45da-9749-a02e5b8b76cc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Peter****, in case you haven’t heard the news: I’m running for re-election to Congress in a brand new district – GA-06.** Back in December, Georgia Republicans blatantly gerrymandered our Congressional districts in a partisan attempt to remove me from Congress. _When it became clear that these new Congressional maps were here to stay, I knew I had to fight to continue the work that I started when I was first elected in a red-to-blue district in 2018._** ** **My primary election is right around the corner on May 21, and now I only have a few more weeks to get my message out to thousands of voters who don’t know my name and my story.[Will you rush a split donation between Blue Amp Action and myself to give me the resources I need to run a successful campaign?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf3e503a0-9ae8-4257-8caf-851d679cec7a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfa331595-5eab-466b-90f8-9d40811db437/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| I need your support to spend resources communicating across this district, sharing my story and the important work I’m doing on behalf of Georgians. I’ll need mailers, canvassing, advertisements and more. **We must raise enough money in the next couple weeks to run a well-funded and thorough campaign – and since the GOP pulled this nonsense with just a few months before the primary, we’re making up for lost time.** _I’m counting on grassroots support to ensure I have what I need to reach all the new voters in this district who have never heard my name before._ [**Please rush a split contribution with Blue Amp Action ASAP to help me hit my targets. The success of this campaign will be determined by strong fundraising in the next couple weeks.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T62b8114b-f33d-4975-bc2d-e19a6808eda0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [CHIP IN](https://default.salsalabs.org/T22aafe20-e1a1-4b90-b73c-4300064ee280/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | | Let's do this, Lucy McBath
---
|

| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

A major section of the U.S.-Canada border recorded its largest number of weekly migrant arrests, highlighting the growing immigration crisis taking place beyond the country’s border with Mexico. Agents deployed along the Border Patrol‘s Swanton Sector apprehended 220 illegal immigrants last week, Chief Patrol Agent Robert Garcia announced.

Dem Gov Signs Bill Repealing Near-Total Abortion Ban

Democratic Gov. Katie Hobbs of Arizona signed a bill Thursday
repealing a law adopted in 1864 that made performing an abortion a
felony offense, according to the Associated Press. Republicans joined
Democrats in both state houses to pass the bill after the state
Supreme Court ruled in April that the law should be allowed to go into
effect.

name: Jon Hamm
subject: Josh Hawley abandoned my home state
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84227339/470885625/106945853?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3778-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmMxNTE3YS00ZTA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zQf8_PrYJM44xPDYSkmvfp8EXvo1Utpqas3nrliQt7s=)
Hi there, it’s Jon Hamm.

I’m a born-and-raised Missourian who watched with horror when Josh Hawley raised his fist at insurrectionists outside the U.S. Capitol on January 6th, then ran out the back door when they stormed the building later that day.

I’ve seen communities across my home state torn apart because of cowardly politicians like him — and I’m not willing to sit on the sidelines in this election.
**[So before I ask you to split a donation of $5 or whatever you can today between my friend Lucas Kunce’s campaign and Jacky Rosen to replace Josh Hawley, please let me tell you why:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84227341/470885629/106945853?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3778-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmMxNTE3YS00ZTA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zQf8_PrYJM44xPDYSkmvfp8EXvo1Utpqas3nrliQt7s=)**
| | [CHIP IN NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84227342/470885630/106945853?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3778-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmMxNTE3YS00ZTA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zQf8_PrYJM44xPDYSkmvfp8EXvo1Utpqas3nrliQt7s=)
---
Most of my family is from a town in Missouri called Ste. Genevieve, about 60 miles south of St. Louis. I’ve watched their community go downhill for years.

While corrupt politicians shipped jobs overseas and voted to give handouts to Wall Street and their corporate allies, everyday people just trying to survive in the place they call home ran out of money and opportunities.
**Our leaders abandoned them — and Josh Hawley is the perfect example.**

Instead of fighting for what would make the communities in my home state stronger, Josh Hawley has been busy engaging in the out-of-touch culture wars that only divide us — all so he can get more and more power for himself.
That’s what we saw on January 6th, 2021. Hawley raised his fist at rioters outside the Capitol because he thought it would make him look strong. But when sh*t got real, he ran out the back door like a coward — away from the same people he was claiming to support just hours earlier.

What’s even more ridiculous? Since that day, Hawley has desperately tried to convince all of us that he’s the authority on what it means to be a man in this country. He even published a whole book about it earlier this year:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84227343/470885631/106945853?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3778-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmMxNTE3YS00ZTA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zQf8_PrYJM44xPDYSkmvfp8EXvo1Utpqas3nrliQt7s=)
Well... when I think about manhood, I think about courage. And that’s not something you can write a book about.

Missouri is the Show Me State. Courage is something you have to show us.
**That’s why I’m supporting Lucas Kunce for Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat.** As a born-and-raised Missourian who joined the Marines to serve the community that took care of him growing up, Lucas has already shown us that he knows the true meaning of courage.

Lucas knows courage is about standing up to the powerful and working to rebuild our state. And he knows real leaders fight to empower everyday people and secure our future for generations to come — not for their own power or profit.
So friend, if you want to be told about manhood, some guy wrote a book about it. **[But if you want someone to show you real courage, please join me in supporting Lucas Kunce for U.S. Senate by splitting a donation of $5 between his campaign and Jacky Rosen's today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84227344/470885632/106945853?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk3778-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YmMxNTE3YS00ZTA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zQf8_PrYJM44xPDYSkmvfp8EXvo1Utpqas3nrliQt7s=)**

clean_body: | | | = Hi there, it’s Jon Hamm. I’m a born-and-raised Missourian who watched with horror when Josh Hawley raised his fist at insurrectionists outside the U.S. Capitol on January 6th, then ran out the back door when they stormed the building later that day. I’ve seen communities across my home state torn apart because of cowardly politicians like him — and I’m not willing to sit on the sidelines in this election. = | | = Most of my family is from a town in Missouri called Ste. Genevieve, about 60 miles south of St. Louis. I’ve watched their community go downhill for years. While corrupt politicians shipped jobs overseas and voted to give handouts to Wall Street and their corporate allies, everyday people just trying to survive in the place they call home ran out of money and opportunities. Our leaders abandoned them — and Josh Hawley is the perfect example. Instead of fighting for what would make the communities in my home state stronger, Josh Hawley has been busy engaging in the out-of-touch culture wars that only divide us — all so he can get more and more power for himself. That’s what we saw on January 6th, 2021. Hawley raised his fist at rioters outside the Capitol because he thought it would make him look strong. But when sht got real, he ran out the back door like a coward — away from the same people he was claiming to support just hours earlier. What’s even more ridiculous? Since that day, Hawley has desperately tried to convince all of us that he’s the authority on what it means to be a man in this country. He even published a whole book about it earlier this year: = Well... when I think about manhood, I think about courage. And that’s not something you can write a book about. Missouri is the Show Me State. Courage is something you have to show us. That’s why I’m supporting Lucas Kunce for Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat. As a born-and-raised Missourian who joined the Marines to serve the community that took care of him growing up, Lucas has already shown us that he knows the true meaning of courage. Lucas knows courage is about standing up to the powerful and working to rebuild our state. And he knows real leaders fight to empower everyday people and secure our future for generations to come — not for their own power or profit. So friend, if you want to be told about manhood, some guy wrote a book about it. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation split between Lucas Kunce and Jacky Rosen will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Lucas worked hard over the last year to put Missouri’s Senate race on the map. He’s building a truly grassroots campaign to defeat Hawley and take back power for everyday working Missourians — just like my friends and family in Ste. Genevieve. It has never been more important to elect a warrior for working people like Lucas Kunce to the U.S. Senate. =** | | = Thanks for standing with me, Jon Hamm | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Jill Stein for President
subject: Thank you for joining Jill Stein 2024!
body:
Hi Peter --

Thank you for taking your first step in joining Jill Stein 2024 on our historic mission for People, Planet, and Peace!

Can we count on you to take the next step by making a donation to support Jill today <https://jillsteinforpresident.nationbuilder.com/donate>? As a grassroots campaign that doesn’t accept money from billionaires, corporate lobbyists, or Super PACs, we depend 100% on people like you to power our campaign.

Another crucial action is to volunteer <https://jillsteinforpresident.nationbuilder.com/volunteer> to help build our movement. There are many different ways to make a difference as a volunteer!

Last but not least, please multiply your impact by posting and commenting online about Jill and asking friends, family, and neighbors to support our campaign with you. We are deeply grateful for your support and look forward to building a historic movement together.

In gratitude and solidarity,

The Jill Stein 2024 team

----
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To stop receiving updates on this page: http://www.jillstein2024.com/forms/page_unsubscribes/36?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333
Jill Stein for President - MA 01731, United States

Created with NationBuilder - https://nationbuilder.com/

Democratic Gov. Katie Hobbs of Arizona signed a bill Thursday
repealing a law adopted in 1864 that made performing an abortion a
felony offense, according to the Associated Press. Republicans joined
Democrats in both state houses to pass the bill after the state
Supreme Court ruled in April that the law should be allowed to go into
effect.

name: David
subject: This Week's Congressional Review: Key Votes and Discussions
body:
The Antisemitism Awareness Act passed the floor, with a total of 320 YEAS and 91 NAYS. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/davidkimforca/this-weeks-congressional-review-key-votes-and-discussions?e=fee98d637f)
---
| |
---
| | | **Dear Friends,

Welcome to this week's edition of "The People's Congress," where I provide insights into the recent activities in Congress. As your prospective representative for California's 34th Congressional District, my goal is to foster transparency and drive meaningful change that aligns with our community's values.**
---
| **This Week in Congress:**

This past week, Congress was in session for a busy legislative session. The House voted from Monday to Wednesday, adjusting the schedule to honor the late Representative Donald Payne Jr. (D-NJ) whose funeral took place on Thursday.
---
|
---
| | _**Reflections on Key Legislation:**_
---
| _**Antisemitism on College Campuses:**_

The Antisemitism Awareness Act passed the floor, with a total of 320 YEAS and 91 NAYS. The bill in question was messaged as legislation that would stem the tide of antisemitism. However, in reality this bill was nothing more than a thinly veiled attempt to stifle free speech and make any rhetoric against Israel legally defined as antisemitic/hate speech.

**Instead of defending every American’s First Amendment rights, Jimmy Gomez decided to not vote, as to avoid upsetting AIPAC and the donors aligned with the pro-Israel lobby.** Effective legislation should strike a balance, ensuring robust protections against antisemitism and hate speech, while respecting the foundational values of open dialogue and intellectual freedom public and private spaces, like our educational institutions but legislation like the one passed this week, does the very opposite, and criminalizes anyone who speaks out against the government of Israel as being anti-Semitic. It’s clear that AIPAC and Israeli interests have bought our Congressmembers.

_**Immigration and Public Safety:**_

A resolution was passed this week criticizing the current administration's immigration policies, alleging that they have led to a public safety crisis. While ensuring public safety is undoubtedly crucial, I believe our approach to immigration must be rooted in humanity and effectiveness, and not fear. According to my platform on human-centered immigration, we should embrace policies that uphold the dignity of all individuals and foster a welcoming environment, rather than invoking fear and division. Our strength as a community and a nation lies in our ability to implement compassionate and practical immigration solutions.

_**Energy and Environmental Policy:**_

The House voted on the Alaska’s Right to Produce Act, aimed at reinstating oil and gas leases in the Arctic National Wildlife Refuge, as well as the Superior National Forest Restoration Act, which removes previous restrictions on mineral exploration in Minnesota. While I recognize the economic considerations driving these actions, I firmly believe that our policies must focus on combating climate change and protecting our environment, rather than boosting the profits of oil companies and major polluters. Our future depends on sustainable and environmentally responsible decision-making.

_**Wildlife Conservation and Hunting Regulations:**_

Legislation such as the Protecting Access for Hunters and Anglers Act and the Trust the Science Act, which removes gray wolves from the endangered species list, were also on the floor. I support sensible wildlife management that respects both conservation goals and the rights of our community members who hunt and fish responsibly.
---
|
---
| | _**Additional Legislative Updates:**_
---
|
* The 21st Century Peace through Strength Act was signed into law and included language that would effectively ban TikTok in the United States, if the company is not sold within the next 9 months. I do not support this ban.

This legislation was incredibly rushed, and lacked the nuance necessary to tackle the very real data-privacy concerns of the 21st century. Like Representative Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, I believe we must prioritize comprehensive data privacy legislation that addresses the root issue of data harvesting by all companies, not just TikTok. We need a balanced approach that protects both our national security and the civil liberties of all Americans. This bill falls short of doing that.

* Discussions on the FY25 budget are underway. I am committed to advocating for a budget that supports healthcare, education, and economic opportunities for working class Americans and low-income families.

---
|
---
| | _**Recap of Key Congressional Hearings:**_
---
|
* The House Natural Resources Committee held a hearing titled “Examining the Influence Of Extreme Environmental Activist Groups in the Department of the Interior.”

* The House Appropriations Committee conducted a hearing on the Fiscal Year 2025 budget request for the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency.

* The House Judiciary Committee hosted a hearing on the alleged weaponization of the federal government.

---
|
---
| As we look forward to continuing our dialogue on these issues, I am dedicated to representing your views and interests on Capitol Hill. Let's work together to create a more equitable and just society.

Thank you for your continued support and engagement. Your active participation is crucial as we strive to make informed decisions that reflect our collective values and aspirations.

Warm regards,

David Kim
Your Candidate for Congress, CA-34
---
|
---
| | | | | | | [](https://davidkimforca.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c05fe848bb5af5e7b9d690b2f&id=8cbbb661e0&e=fee98d637f)
