name: Mariela Roca
subject: It's Time to Vote!
body:
| | | | | |
---
[](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=a106a51083&e=0a12281e0e)
# Early Voting Starts Today! 🗳️
[](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=de5ef4c345&e=0a12281e0e)
Maryland 6th Congressional District voters, it’s time to make your voices heard! Early voting for the Republican primary election begins TODAY, May 2nd, and runs through May 9th, from 7 AM to 8 PM. Make sure to secure your vote for Mariela Roca today!
Find your polling location here! ⬇️
[CLICK HERE TO FIND YOUR POLLING LOCATION](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=78f1f8823a&e=0a12281e0e)
# We need Volunteers!
[](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=6e32fab2d7&e=0a12281e0e)
Hey there, Team Roca supporters! Are you pumped to be part of something big and flip MD-06 for Republicans this November? We’re gearing up for Election Day on May 14th and we need your awesome energy to help out!

Want to join us in spreading the word by putting up yard signs and handing out literature? Sign up below and let’s flip this seat together!
Can’t wait to have you on the team! ⬇️
[CLICK HERE TO VOLUNTEER!](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=68d3f68ad8&e=0a12281e0e)
# Fundraising
I know that many of you have already helped our campaign out so much, and many of you have not been able to contribute monetarily due the the economically challenging times we are all facing. I truly believe the future of our district and country is at stake, and I KNOW we can win this nomination with your help through this last push. I have skin in the game as I have also contributed some of my personal funds for this effort. And I really hate to ask you for monetary help, but I need your help now more than ever.
Every dollar you contribute will bring us one step closer to ensuring a Republican victory in November for Maryland 6th, one of the most crucial races in the country that can decide our House Majority!
Please click on the link below to make your secure contribution TODAY:
[**https://secure.winred.com/roca-for-congress/donate**](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=a82405a470&e=0a12281e0e)
The future of our Republican majority in the House of Representatives hangs in the balance. We cannot afford to lose sight of the importance of securing seats like Maryland's 6th Congressional District if we want to keep a Republican majority in the House of Representatives. 🇺🇸
[](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=7d87bcb802&e=0a12281e0e)
Sincerely,
[](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=bb4a9557bc&e=0a12281e0e)
Mariela RocaRepublican Candidate for Congress MD-06U.S. Air Force Veteran
|
---
# More about Mariela Roca
[](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=ede58c8b5c&e=0a12281e0e)
My name is Mariela Roca. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for Congress here in Maryland’s 6th Congressional District.
[**Once you’ve finished reading this, please consider making a contribution to help boost my campaign’s momentum and WIN BACK Maryland’s 6th Congressional District!**](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=fc6000c6d4&e=0a12281e0e)
[](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=2b8ca99e90&e=0a12281e0e)
I’m running for Congress because I was raised by a single mom in Puerto Rico who always showed me how hard work and determination is what makes us all live the American dream. I learned english when I was 5 years old, and from that young age always felt so proud to be an American.
[](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=3223f6ced9&e=0a12281e0e)
I’m running for Congress as a military veteran. I began my journey of service to our nation in 2005 when I joined the U.S. Air Force at the age of 20. During my military service I had the honor of serving my county abroad in the Global War on Terror, serving within the Task Force Medical and the Bagram Theater Internment Facility (BTIF) in Bagram, Afghanistan, during Operation Enduring Freedom in 2007. I know what sacrifice looks like - and this is why I love my country so much.
[](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=a1108b5291&e=0a12281e0e)
I’m running for my kids, your kids, and your grandkids. Everything that I do in my life is to make the best possible future for my daughter and my son and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has offered me my entire life.
[](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=d098442f31&e=0a12281e0e)
[**I’M RUNNING FOR CONGRESS BECAUSE WE HAVE A COUNTRY TO SAVE!**](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=c9218de614&e=0a12281e0e)
Even during our most challenging moments, we are fortunate to call America our home. But it's clear that under the Biden administration, we face significant challenges, our prospects are dwindling, we are weak on the world stage, our economy is failing, and American families are being left behind every single day.
[**I’m running for Congress because America can do better with leaders that will always fight for America first. No matter what.**](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=68ad335b98&e=0a12281e0e)
**As a military veteran** , I intimately understand the profound significance of service and the willingness to make the ultimate sacrifice for my country. My time in the military taught me the unwavering commitment to duty, honor, and the defense of freedom. It's a bond that transcends words; a deep-seated connection with the men and women I served alongside, many of whom paid the ultimate price. I've witnessed the selflessness, courage, and dedication that define the character of those who choose to protect their nation.
**As a medical logistician** , my mission was to ensure that our dedicated warfighters had the essential tools and supplies required to save lives on the frontlines. I understood the critical nature of my role in providing our troops with the medical resources and equipment they needed to deliver immediate care in challenging and high-stress situations. I am now prepared to take the knowledge, commitment, and understanding I gained in that role with me to Congress, where I will tirelessly advocate for policies that will support our country, military and American families first. Above anything.
**As a** **mother** , I understand firsthand the deep commitment and love that comes with the responsibility of providing for one's family. In the countless roles we take on as parents - caregiver, protector, educator, and provider - we become intimately acquainted with the challenges and triumphs of family life. We witness the struggles that many families face, whether it's making ends meet, securing access to quality education, or ensuring our children have the healthcare they need. It's in these moments that we are inspired to take action, to advocate for better opportunities, and to fight for a brighter future for our families.
I know how to make our community, district, and America strong and proud because i’ve done it before.
[**And i’ll do it again as your next Congresswoman.**](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=bf3bdd3634&e=0a12281e0e)
As your next Congresswoman for Maryland’s 6th Congressional District I will always fight for policies that will revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington’s out of control spending, champion school choice & parental rights, and save America’s future.
But, in order to do this, I need your support today so I can spread this message to everyone across our district and country.
[**Will you chip in today to help me win this fight for our nation’s future?**](https://rocaforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=51570106eec2b2b74efc93ea8&id=31d72a78b3&e=0a12281e0e)

clean_body: | | | | | | Early Voting Starts Today! 🗳️ Maryland 6th Congressional District voters, it’s time to make your voices heard! Early voting for the Republican primary election begins TODAY, May 2nd, and runs through May 9th, from 7 AM to 8 PM. Make sure to secure your vote for Mariela Roca today! Find your polling location here! ⬇️ We need Volunteers! Hey there, Team Roca supporters! Are you pumped to be part of something big and flip MD-06 for Republicans this November? We’re gearing up for Election Day on May 14th and we need your awesome energy to help out! Want to join us in spreading the word by putting up yard signs and handing out literature? Sign up below and let’s flip this seat together! Can’t wait to have you on the team! ⬇️ Fundraising I know that many of you have already helped our campaign out so much, and many of you have not been able to contribute monetarily due the the economically challenging times we are all facing. I truly believe the future of our district and country is at stake, and I KNOW we can win this nomination with your help through this last push. I have skin in the game as I have also contributed some of my personal funds for this effort. And I really hate to ask you for monetary help, but I need your help now more than ever. Every dollar you contribute will bring us one step closer to ensuring a Republican victory in November for Maryland 6th, one of the most crucial races in the country that can decide our House Majority! Please click on the link below to make your secure contribution TODAY: The future of our Republican majority in the House of Representatives hangs in the balance. We cannot afford to lose sight of the importance of securing seats like Maryland's 6th Congressional District if we want to keep a Republican majority in the House of Representatives. 🇺🇸 Sincerely, Mariela RocaRepublican Candidate for Congress MD-06U.S. Air Force Veteran | More about Mariela Roca My name is Mariela Roca. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for Congress here in Maryland’s 6th Congressional District. I’m running for Congress because I was raised by a single mom in Puerto Rico who always showed me how hard work and determination is what makes us all live the American dream. I learned english when I was 5 years old, and from that young age always felt so proud to be an American. I’m running for Congress as a military veteran. I began my journey of service to our nation in 2005 when I joined the U.S. Air Force at the age of 20. During my military service I had the honor of serving my county abroad in the Global War on Terror, serving within the Task Force Medical and the Bagram Theater Internment Facility (BTIF) in Bagram, Afghanistan, during Operation Enduring Freedom in 2007. I know what sacrifice looks like - and this is why I love my country so much. I’m running for my kids, your kids, and your grandkids. Everything that I do in my life is to make the best possible future for my daughter and my son and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has offered me my entire life. Even during our most challenging moments, we are fortunate to call America our home. But it's clear that under the Biden administration, we face significant challenges, our prospects are dwindling, we are weak on the world stage, our economy is failing, and American families are being left behind every single day. As a military veteran , I intimately understand the profound significance of service and the willingness to make the ultimate sacrifice for my country. My time in the military taught me the unwavering commitment to duty, honor, and the defense of freedom. It's a bond that transcends words; a deep-seated connection with the men and women I served alongside, many of whom paid the ultimate price. I've witnessed the selflessness, courage, and dedication that define the character of those who choose to protect their nation. As a medical logistician , my mission was to ensure that our dedicated warfighters had the essential tools and supplies required to save lives on the frontlines. I understood the critical nature of my role in providing our troops with the medical resources and equipment they needed to deliver immediate care in challenging and high-stress situations. I am now prepared to take the knowledge, commitment, and understanding I gained in that role with me to Congress, where I will tirelessly advocate for policies that will support our country, military and American families first. Above anything. As a mother , I understand firsthand the deep commitment and love that comes with the responsibility of providing for one's family. In the countless roles we take on as parents - caregiver, protector, educator, and provider - we become intimately acquainted with the challenges and triumphs of family life. We witness the struggles that many families face, whether it's making ends meet, securing access to quality education, or ensuring our children have the healthcare they need. It's in these moments that we are inspired to take action, to advocate for better opportunities, and to fight for a brighter future for our families. I know how to make our community, district, and America strong and proud because i’ve done it before. As your next Congresswoman for Maryland’s 6th Congressional District I will always fight for policies that will revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington’s out of control spending, champion school choice & parental rights, and save America’s future. But, in order to do this, I need your support today so I can spread this message to everyone across our district and country. Together we WILL flip Maryland’s 6th Congressional District for Republicans and make America strong and proud again. Sincerely, Mariela RocaRepublican Candidate for CongressMaryland’s 6th District | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | Copyright (C) 2024 Roca for Congress. All rights reserved.

Peter, I’m working tirelessly to protect our Post Office.
I’ve heard from constituents all across the country about their outrageous mail delays.
I’ve grilled Trump’s Postmaster General Dejoy in front of my committee, [**_twice_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84234354/470903159/-1054865935?source=20240503_em_pet_b1_raja_30_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTY1NTY3NS01NTA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wWXMNTWZo6xUmevQOYM8Mpvc19ErNr3mtC63a1kVsPo=&emci=fca409ca-2307-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=4a655675-5509-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=21346897).
Now, I won’t stop until we oust DeJoy and ensure mail-in ballots are delivered on time.
**[_I need a resounding 7,000 signatures on my emergency petition demanding Trump’s Postmaster General DeJoy be fired to SAVE the USPS. Truly, Peter, your signature could make a HUGE difference in this election. Can I count on you in this fight before midnight? >>_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84234355/470903160/-1054865935?source=20240503_em_pet_b1_raja_30_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTY1NTY3NS01NTA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wWXMNTWZo6xUmevQOYM8Mpvc19ErNr3mtC63a1kVsPo=&emci=fca409ca-2307-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=4a655675-5509-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=21346897)**
Thank you,
Raja

I am sickened at the antisemitic events unfolding across the country.

Having been born under a tyrannical regime, I know the warning signs. And I promise you, what’s happening at universities is just the beginning.

**Never in America did I think Jewish students and staff would be prevented from accessing their jobs and education, but a professor at Columbia was DENIED entry to the school while staff deactivated his access card.**

_And he’s just one of many who have been told they are not allowed on campus because they are Jewish._

**We need to put our feet down and make it clear that there is NO room for antisemitic terrorist-lovers in America - but Democrats like Tim Kaine are turning a blind eye.**

For our Jewish friends, never again is NOW, and I won’t stand by idly.

**[If I’m elected to the U.S. Senate, I will make sure we shut down these antisemitic terrorist-loving rioters once and for all. Will you stand with me? ](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=0fe74b812e8f4176b72d916ae12c3c8c&_e=d7Q5Or6mquZ56HCAe6SGKWgodk-BFc5uS3sdhsTvOZY706kIMpCoGk4-yebuIJQqQN_ziLl-GVyS24B_Xd5_xubBAVWQGJAM8K005cgkHJUbIRbbIOYqs805wpHfG8lhou7qME6iY0fYys9uXFmezdZtTcRNGQRcuDDtoNbYLkPolVWqFxQUA2g3mPCFqLPd3pcT77VmmaHM_wB6bHIPy21z56RPu4b5ZQjKvICLmxhEozXgx8fOuU91aOq8MDPZmAPynE63lW8HiEliwZwmjHP23XsZOAEe1c46QE26b8-emFHERtEMnpLLzz0IjysB0DjawmKvcMDLDywnQtgvRi8MYClSg5WNCSqtGL8cBtozrqbTejkGzzqh5wx4j8J4)**

Friend,
America has been **DESTROYED.**
The DEEP STATE has attacked me.
Patriots like you have been caught in the CROSSFIRE of Biden’s Rampage.
I’ve been **IMPEACHED.**
I’ve been **INDICTED.**
I’ve been **RAIDED.**
I’ve been **ARRESTED.**
But I want REAL AMERICANS to hear me loud and clear: **I WILL NEVER SURRENDER!**
| [**STAND WITH TRUMP**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zka0hrp324v7kv6ah4j3dflor5da2466tr37mbo8_rp22sh2s8i6ep31ctim9oj1c9h2bs)
---
Friend, PLEASE LISTEN UP!
I do this for you. I do this for your kids, your grandkids and the future of EVERY American.
We won’t have a nation anymore if we don’t _**STOP JOE BIDEN RIGHT NOW.**_
This is the final battle, **THE FIGHT TO SAVE AMERICA!**
| [**STAND WITH TRUMP**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znlqu2s8el8jp35vmij7mmecsshr22pbqj3pc6g0_rp22sh2s8i6ep31ctim9oj1c9h2bs)
---
TOMORROW IS TOO LATE!
Right here, right now you can help me peacefully TAKE BACK THE WHITE HOUSE.
I have always loved you. That’s why I take every single punch to the face and get right back up.
[**Before the end of the day, I’m asking you to chip in and make the FINAL ONE MILLION PATRIOT PUSH to STAND WITH TRUMP >**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9t0lmp7ago5hi2a4j7n0cfqvf13fv3ulf8sdjm8_rp22sh2s8i6ep31ctim9oj1c9h2bs)

name: GIFFORDS PAC
subject: We don’t have to live this way
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Tens of thousands of lives are tragically lost to gun violence each year in our nation.
#

People are dying every day in America from gun violence.
We all see the headlines on both the local and national news. But there are so many terrible stories we don’t hear about—domestic violence, community violence, suicides. Tens of thousands of lives are tragically lost to gun violence each year in our nation.
It doesn’t have to be this way.
We don’t have to live in a country where we fear for our lives in what should be safe spaces in our communities—our grocery stores, our schools, our places of worship, our movie theaters, our neighborhoods, even our homes.
[**We won’t rest until a future without gun violence is a reality in our country. Will you please contribute $3 to GIFFORDS PAC today to help us keep moving forward in this important fight?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may24.vNbcqy&refcode=em240503-1-30&t=1&akid=8038%2E3935704%2EO4BnDK)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may24.vNbcqy&refcode=em240503-1-30&t=2&akid=8038%2E3935704%2EO4BnDK)**
We understand that some days, overcoming our nation’s gun violence epidemic may seem like an uphill battle.
But we need you to know that a better future is possible.
There is no one solution to solve the complex gun violence crisis in our nation. The status quo is not working— _inaction is not working_ —but we can change our course. We’ve taken important steps forward, but it’s not enough yet to stem the tide. That's why we have to keep working to enact a variety of laws—including popular measures like universal background checks.
[**So please. Contribute $3 to help us keep up the fight to keep our communities safe from gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may24.vNbcqy&refcode=em240503-1-30&t=3&akid=8038%2E3935704%2EO4BnDK)

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: I don’t mean to alarm you, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:

**[NUMBER OF AMERICANS IDENTIFYING AS "REPUBLICAN" HITS LOWEST POINT IN A DECADE](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6tnc6klfutpn9hfpfoidajjtg625uotuigl8nh0_rp22sh2s8i6ep31ctim9oj6cth2bs)**

name: Ruben Gallego for Senate
subject: Kari Lake offers nothing but division.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
There is nothing in her message but anger, conspiracy and a pursuit of power along with the will to do and say anything to obtain it.
#

Kari Lake offers nothing to the people of Arizona and to the country as a whole but division, lies, and unending loyalty to Donald Trump. **There is nothing in her message but anger, conspiracy and a pursuit of power along with the will to do and say anything to obtain it.**
Ruben Gallego is running to **protect our democracy** , Arizonan's **fundamental rights** , and to **give the working people the same shot at making it as he had** as a young man.
That's why we're reaching out to you today, Peter. [**Will you make a contribution to Ruben Gallego's Senate campaign to defend our democracy and defeat Kari Lake this fall?**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-may24.hD4hyN&refcode=em240503-1-160&t=1&akid=2290%2E734936%2EcVs9NY)

name: Don Davis
subject: Update from the Campaign Manager
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Don Davis for NC
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/94275/images/DAV-Logo_2.png]
Hi, it’s Bridget - Congressman Don Davis’ campaign manager.
He has been delivering for North Carolina’s First Congressional District, and as his campaign manager, I’ve gotten to know Don pretty well.
He works tirelessly, one thing has become clear about Don : His unwavering love and passion for eastern North Carolina.
His deep roots, knowledge, and his determination to fight makes him a great Congressman for the people of eastern North Carolina, but he needs your help to get there.
Donate – whatever you can! – to re-elect Don Davis and to keep this seat [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-web] .
From working in the tobacco fields to paying for school clothes to serving in the Air Force for eight years, Don is no stranger to pushing up his sleeves to get the job done.
He’s also no stranger to the fact that many are left behind in eastern North Carolina, living paycheck to paycheck as he grew up with his grandma while his mother earned her college degree.
That’s why serving the community – as the youngest mayor of Snow Hill at age 29 and in the state Senate – has become Don’s calling. He’s deeply aware of our community hardships and has a “won’t back down” attitude that we need to represent us in Washington, D.C.
Chip in to help Don Davis, he’s fighting tooth and nail for eastern North Carolina and our values in Washington, D.C. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-web]
Thank you,
Bridget
Paid for by Don Davis for NC
Don Davis for NC
P.O. Box 511
Snow Hill, NC 28580
United States

subject: Allow me to introduce myself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bishop for NC
body:
In case you don't know this about me already

| [ ](http://links.freedomeagle.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f7e09c3ed67d4421b222ea021bf18730&_e=3HhWFZB43mklIHHgF6lFKSwWClijLKoxK9BxASGmZV9mcK3VJ5jBwfmwb9h4sWCLYlMBgfqmY7iG7r0Gsas9pkBd6b8emeM-pXHHuxY-vzA6ZZdC-UyiZCnDwVteva2oDSyes5GDaibcNENNoSb-t2radzRop0MyU40hypbAPNuy7bJgrZPA52S3yGW7Y79lv_vy25mqyxM4P0EcJGfurkrf3QfzY9_V-Wt1T6_g32Yr7hXfls4F2VsQO9Kkp8SH0NUsrKRXqMHEiSBliIf-71-l3rVnx1LTO-JX7Hjzvgl_WZaZYzZbr9zA4AMrFze_WhF2bPlb1_vunZrIn0l9fp3EwtY68w2wKbpOwxzB3WCpX-B2KWXs3VioE9UpEVVaGyFMneDd7yaGdFgwq5X3mA%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American,

You may already know who I am from my time in Congress serving North Carolina's 8th District. Or you may be coming across me for the first time. Either way, I'm glad to be reaching out to you, and I think this could be the beginning of a great relationship. My name is Dan Bishop, and I'm running for Attorney General for North Carolina with the intention of bringing Law and Order back to the Tar Heel State.

**[This email is a bit longer and I hope you'll read through it. I'm going to ask you for a donation to my campaign at the end of this email, but let me explain why it's so crucial you join my team first.](http://links.freedomeagle.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f7e09c3ed67d4421b222ea021bf18730&_e=3HhWFZB43mklIHHgF6lFKSwWClijLKoxK9BxASGmZV9mcK3VJ5jBwfmwb9h4sWCLYlMBgfqmY7iG7r0Gsas9pkBd6b8emeM-pXHHuxY-vzA6ZZdC-UyiZCnDwVteva2oDSyes5GDaibcNENNoSb-t2radzRop0MyU40hypbAPNuy7bJgrZPA52S3yGW7Y79lv_vy25mqyxM4P0EcJGfuruIi3zCBLO38BraL2-c5H4vSDibqA0Kbf2F16d4gUiUsrqRGk1H0OQHBoXKgtAkZyvw0ObESp31Iel5wRPN4iPP6rECfCqH_WfW3Tn_UsJh-hLhkaqofA7pB9T84HGsGVcQHQrrK9B1k7ZsndOjEwdHIK2QcA8pahIp9zzVVaDkdx-6Jv7rbkTfMjDuOvnd55w%3D%3D)**

[](http://links.freedomeagle.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f7e09c3ed67d4421b222ea021bf18730&_e=3HhWFZB43mklIHHgF6lFKSwWClijLKoxK9BxASGmZV9mcK3VJ5jBwfmwb9h4sWCLYlMBgfqmY7iG7r0Gsas9pkBd6b8emeM-pXHHuxY-vzA6ZZdC-UyiZCnDwVteva2oDSyes5GDaibcNENNoSb-t2radzRop0MyU40hypbAPNuy7bJgrZPA52S3yGW7Y79lv_vy25mqyxM4P0EcJGfuruIi3zCBLO38BraL2-c5H4vSDibqA0Kbf2F16d4gUiUs0RG2e4kX5t91IE5BWu123Kqs7G3I8GIb6XHCTNzVJ7Gzwb4t5by-c6r_lNEiTEepJjpcoU21dH-XwMlSo_sLdT2rlcKCAhqWtZ_DtiACFlW2ZlaAa2D5HvW_SPZtW_0sqlvhWW3opf_p2sn4PqBkaA%3D%3D)
I was born and raised with my four siblings in North Carolina by my parents, Kaytee and Bud. They didn't come from much, but they pushed me towards an education and instilled a hard work ethic. With a passion for law and justice, I earned my JD at UNC Chapel Hill. I then went on to marry my wife of 25 years (and going), Jo; we raised our son, Jack, who's currently following in his dad's footsteps as he's working to attain his law degree.

As a lawyer, I'm very proud of my track record. I was a commercial litigator for nearly three decades, where I was voted 10 times to Business NC's "Legal Elite" and was selected 7 times by "Super Lawyers." I was tenacious as a litigator and handled complex cases. But, I finally felt that it was time to help a broader scope of North Carolinians and decided to run for Congress.

In Congress, I've been one of the toughest and most outspoken conservatives, challenging the radical left and holding my fellow Republicans accountable. As a member of the judiciary committee and the subcommittee on the weaponization of the federal government, I fought the Biden administration's dangerous policies and exposed the federal government's abuses against the Trump presidency.

Now, I'm running for Attorney General to defend the rule of law and protect North Carolina. I believe Democrats like Roy Cooper and Josh Stein have abused the state's top law enforcement office by turning it into a stepping stone for higher office and a platform to spread liberal propaganda. I'm putting my foot down, demanding respect for the office of Attorney General, and bringing Law and Order back to our great state.

**All that to say, I have a track record of fighting the good fight. And I hope you 'll join my team. The good fight is not free; running a campaign gets expensive, having to reach voters across the state, taking care of campaign staffers with food and gas, and running ads on TV.** **[That's why I'm humbly asking you for a donation of whatever you can afford.](http://links.freedomeagle.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f7e09c3ed67d4421b222ea021bf18730&_e=3HhWFZB43mklIHHgF6lFKSwWClijLKoxK9BxASGmZV9mcK3VJ5jBwfmwb9h4sWCLYlMBgfqmY7iG7r0Gsas9pkBd6b8emeM-pXHHuxY-vzA6ZZdC-UyiZCnDwVteva2oDSyes5GDaibcNENNoSb-t2radzRop0MyU40hypbAPNuy7bJgrZPA52S3yGW7Y79lv_vy25mqyxM4P0EcJGfuruIi3zCBLO38BraL2-c5H4vSDibqA0Kbf2F16d4gUiUsNobESi8i5e1qI5x0xrN3a4Wb1tqbbw4YlwkAirO7s2UrhyvIPaNx0D06eIFeaVNbQfSITMEsIq-iT_-TEXTNBE2o-CAn_BXikpDwW4Zma2pyHLcxC0j2M0xpFIy1zH69G3340RltVA9kSR4GEOX9TQ%3D%3D)**

If you've gotten this far, I want to personally thank you for reading this email. Maybe it means you've been a supporter for quite some time. Or maybe it means you're intrigued by my story and also believe in Law and Order over Chaos and Disorder. **[Either way, can you send my campaign just $1 or more to help me out?](http://links.freedomeagle.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f7e09c3ed67d4421b222ea021bf18730&_e=3HhWFZB43mklIHHgF6lFKSwWClijLKoxK9BxASGmZV9mcK3VJ5jBwfmwb9h4sWCLYlMBgfqmY7iG7r0Gsas9pkBd6b8emeM-pXHHuxY-vzA6ZZdC-UyiZCnDwVteva2oDSyes5GDaibcNENNoSb-t2radzRop0MyU40hypbAPNuy7bJgrZPA52S3yGW7Y79lv_vy25mqyxM4P0EcJGfuruIi3zCBLO38BraL2-c5H4vSDibqA0Kbf2F16d4gUiUsdr-F25PflDHFTmWKmx3Xsuy0IOootFU1mf7-UvOTfLdqpunGnsHuXVKKrxKVxC95IvB96KUAXjxAUlLep1pEXQIpG6sf7zZJHdjOL1yiquBXbePRGFD1eK0Mk5RmqyElZ68BmWqULKyUUiBfskBAKw%3D%3D)**

Thank you,

[](http://links.freedomeagle.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f7e09c3ed67d4421b222ea021bf18730&_e=3HhWFZB43mklIHHgF6lFKSwWClijLKoxK9BxASGmZV9mcK3VJ5jBwfmwb9h4sWCLYlMBgfqmY7iG7r0Gsas9pkBd6b8emeM-pXHHuxY-vzA6ZZdC-UyiZCnDwVteva2oDSyes5GDaibcNENNoSb-t2radzRop0MyU40hypbAPNuy7bJgrZPA52S3yGW7Y79lv_vy25mqyxM4P0EcJGfuruIi3zCBLO38BraL2-c5H4vSDibqA0Kbf2F16d4gUiUs4GSk-eStaOk4QDWbxj7oMmP8Dm9c2cN_2F0C0sygbtd9vtnxBQWB-W8a_N3eHlobAYOQpGR01bR3ij6DESOKci648fHk67KSK59V2OFgzWAAlsX1hoKmcOZfyUy8_9cAcsdZNHb6CCNKtCD4cfb79g%3D%3D)
Dan Bishop
| [ **DONATE TODAY** ](http://links.freedomeagle.co/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f7e09c3ed67d4421b222ea021bf18730&_e=3HhWFZB43mklIHHgF6lFKSwWClijLKoxK9BxASGmZV9mcK3VJ5jBwfmwb9h4sWCLYlMBgfqmY7iG7r0Gsas9pkBd6b8emeM-pXHHuxY-vzA6ZZdC-UyiZCnDwVteva2oDSyes5GDaibcNENNoSb-t2radzRop0MyU40hypbAPNuy7bJgrZPA52S3yGW7Y79lv_vy25mqyxM4P0EcJGfuruIi3zCBLO38BraL2-c5H4vSDibqA0Kbf2F16d4gUiUsn0BbSM1zEsoQ0BoqZaw6vu0wYdIX_HAdNfVXYCXgtx0AYyxatHlYS-N4gNyiSdEvHdF1BPULB5kH7BGG48Gfj4tQilHKs8Oqzk8qsUnJ0gzjXXvQc1m8PcwHxVDCye3PbjyMC-cF51GcocFf3YaB6w%3D%3D)

Paid for by Bishop for NC
---

PO Box 1285
Waxhaw, NC 28173

This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Don't want to receive our emails anymore? [Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomeagle.co/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_s=f7e09c3ed67d4421b222ea021bf18730&_t=8Df_418eKWg_G-e-VJcvtwv6b3y4G1ZW8pwM9NhVcp93LSoOMouUxGWIWpbLu_elzhV7ShF_VKecVg3kVhN6YREs13GSokeeiN2JMlnB9hk%3D)

# **A Message from the Chairwoman**
---
| | ** _Finishing Primary Season Strong 💪_**
---
Friends, We are almost there! **Tuesday,** **May 7th** is Primary election day!! To all those who have already cast their votes through early or absentee voting -- thank you!! Your unwavering commitment ensures that we pave the way for Republicans to be elected and provide leadership for our communities, our state, and our country, which allow our families the best opportunity to live the American dream. If you have not yet voted, please make sure you take the time on or before May 7th. We also need your help!! It’s important that we ask our friends, family, and fellow Republicans to get out to the polls, or better yet, take them with you when you go to vote. It is imperative that Republicans show up and VOTE to elect our leaders of tomorrow. This is your opportunity, go vote! While Tuesday is an important benchmark in this election year, this is only the next chapter of a long journey. We have many days of work and campaigning ahead of us to ensure we win back the White House and the U.S. Senate, while retaining Republican supermajorities in the Statehouse and a Republican Governor. Our effort and commitment will help us to achieve Republican victories at every level come November! If you are unsure about your voting location you can check your voter portal at [**indianavoters.in.gov.**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/e4ab209ed4769bb83947229f28c3afba/8c3e0ed56a8e7615c3d6b838967d376c/40313) Thank you for your continued support and for all that you do.
---
---
Chairwoman Anne F. Hathaway
---
| |
# **Governor Eric Holcomb's Week in Review**
---
| |
# _📈🚀Gov. Holcomb Announces $2 Billion Google Data Center in Fort Wayne_
---
---
---
| | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/e4ab209ed4769bb83947229f28c3afba/2cd5e465a2b05417c3d6b838967d376c/40313)**Governor Eric Holcomb** [announced](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/e4ab209ed4769bb83947229f28c3afba/6fd0e8b1d0d8574bc3d6b838967d376c/40313) a $2 billion investment from Google to build a new data Center in northeast Indiana, in Fort Wayne. **What he’s saying** : “Indiana has made it a strategic priority to cultivate the economy of the future and we’re already seeing the impact of our work thanks to the partnership of companies like Google,” said Gov. Holcomb. “Not only is Google choosing Indiana to power its global AI and cloud infrastructure, but we’re thrilled to see the company already investing heavily in the northeast Indiana community. These initiatives will help skill up our Hoosier workforce, preparing residents for the jobs of the future. And, at the same time bringing clean energy resources to the region propelling continued growth in industrial sustainability.” \- **Gov. Holcomb** said in [press release](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/e4ab209ed4769bb83947229f28c3afba/0844c1c6000ade8dc3d6b838967d376c/40313).** **What else he's doing: Gov. Holcomb **[planted](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/e4ab209ed4769bb83947229f28c3afba/2957f7db6eaa2083c3d6b838967d376c/40313) a ceremonial millionth tree last Friday, April 26th. Making good on a promise in his 2020 State of the State Address, in which **Gov. Holcomb** directed the Indiana DNR to plant one million trees across Indiana over the next five years. **What he’s saying** : “With one million more trees now dotting Indiana’s landscape, we can preserve this love for our great outdoors for future generations of Hoosiers and continue Indiana’s important legacy of conservation.” - **Gov Holcomb** said in a [press release.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/e4ab209ed4769bb83947229f28c3afba/5a3d219120189df5c3d6b838967d376c/40313)
* To stay up-to-date, follow **Gov. Holcomb** on [Facebook](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/e4ab209ed4769bb83947229f28c3afba/2af07c04d19c61c6c3d6b838967d376c/40313) or [Twitter](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/e4ab209ed4769bb83947229f28c3afba/d8a6d1843250d512c3d6b838967d376c/40313).

# **_Indiana State Treasurer Daniel Elliott Announced Indiana's Purchase of Another $5 million in Israeli Bonds 🇺🇸 🇮🇱_**
---
---
Indiana State Treasurer Daniel Elliott announced the purchase of another $5 million in Israeli Bonds, bringing Indiana’s total investment in the U.S. ally to $110 million. Israel is a long time, strong ally of the United States, and Indiana is proud to not only show them our support, but to also see the great returns on investment for our state. Treasurer Elliott has doubled down on previous investments in Israeli bonds, throwing his support behind our ally despite the current attempts to set up encampments on college campuses, including Indiana University. We at the Indiana Republican Party applaud Treasurer Elliott. “While there may be a few loud individuals on college campuses and other places that want us to abandon Israel, I believe now is the time to refocus and recommit to our most important ally,” Elliott said. “We don’t need to boycott and divest, but engage and invest.” The Indianapolis Jewish Community Relations Council (JCRC), the public affairs, interfaith, and intergroup relations arm of the organized Jewish community, released a statement in support of Treasurer Elliott. “Thank you to Treasurer Elliott for his leadership,” says Jamie Ratner Rich, JCRC’s President. “Investing in Israel bonds sends a loud and clear signal that Indiana stands with and supports Israel.” To read more about this investment, click [HERE](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/e4ab209ed4769bb83947229f28c3afba/8c9c045dea190942c3d6b838967d376c/40313).
---
|
---
# A Massive Week for the Future of the Hoosier Economy Statewide! 👏
---
As a reminder, while these numbers are big and flashy, what's important is the meaning behind them. These numbers mean more jobs, higher wages, and more economic opportunities in every area of the state. **Combined, last week saw the commitment of $14.4 billion in new investments and 1,500+ high-wage new jobs on their way to Indiana.** These new investments are bringing new jobs and higher wages to local economies across Indiana. These statewide investments highlight the strength of the Hoosier economy in all 92 counties, reaching from the far southwest end, all the way up to the northeast side of the state. Here's a rundown of the investments we saw just last week! _1) Toyota _
* **$1.4 billion** committed to their existing facility in the southwest end of our state in Princeton, IN.
* **340 new jobs** created by 2035 (Toyota already employs 7,500 people in southwest Indiana).
* The company’s investment will provide new plant infrastructure, including a new battery pack assembly line at the facility, to support production of an all-new battery electric SUV.
* **Toyota’s Princeton facility has been part of the community for nearly 30 years and has invested a total of over $8 billion since arriving.**
* This is Toyota’s 3rd major expansion of their Princeton facility in 4 years.
* Toyota isn’t just investing in their own facilities; they’re investing in the community. Toyota has supported multiple projects, including the new Toyota Indiana YMCA in Princeton and The District housing complex in Princeton, to provide access to health and wellness, community support and housing for all residents while helping employers like Toyota and its many suppliers attract even more talent to the region.

_2) Google_
* **$2 billion** committed to a new data center in the northeast side of our state in Fort Wayne, IN, powering the company’s AI innovations and growing Google Cloud business.
* **200 new jobs,** including facilities, data center technicians and support services, security, and grounds keeping.
* The Google Skilled Trades and Readiness (STAR) program, in partnership with Ivy Tech Community College, will help increase the entry-level pipeline in the skilled trades. These pre-employment programs offer paid training and networking opportunities to help participants move directly into employment on local construction projects.

_3) Amazon Web Services_
* **$11 billion** committed to build a data center campus in north central Indiana.
* **1,000 + new jobs.**
* **THE LARGEST COMMITTED CAPITAL INVESTMENT IN INDIANA HISTORY.**
* The new data centers will contain computer servers, data storage drives, networking equipment, and other forms of technology infrastructure used to power cloud computing capabilities, and generative artificial intelligence (AI) technologies.

**These commitments are a combined $14.4 billion in new investments and 1,500+ new high-wage jobs.** Indiana is not just bringing in new jobs and stimulating local communities, but we are bringing in jobs of the future so that we can see these economic gains for generations.

Toyota has supported multiple projects, including the new Toyota Indiana YMCA in Princeton and The District housing complex in Princeton, to provide access to health and wellness, community support and housing for all residents while helping employers like Toyota and its many suppliers attract even more talent to the region. 2) Google $2 billion committed to a new data center in the northeast side of our state in Fort Wayne, IN, powering the company’s AI innovations and growing Google Cloud business. 200 new jobs, including facilities, data center technicians and support services, security, and grounds keeping. The Google Skilled Trades and Readiness (STAR) program, in partnership with Ivy Tech Community College, will help increase the entry-level pipeline in the skilled trades. These pre-employment programs offer paid training and networking opportunities to help participants move directly into employment on local construction projects. 3) Amazon Web Services $11 billion committed to build a data center campus in north central Indiana. 1,000 + new jobs. THE LARGEST COMMITTED CAPITAL INVESTMENT IN INDIANA HISTORY. The new data centers will contain computer servers, data storage drives, networking equipment, and other forms of technology infrastructure used to power cloud computing capabilities, and generative artificial intelligence (AI) technologies. These commitments are a combined $14.4 billion in new investments and 1,500+ new high-wage jobs. Indiana is not just bringing in new jobs and stimulating local communities, but we are bringing in jobs of the future so that we can see these economic gains for generations. | 2024 Republican National Convention Volunteer Opportunities 🤝 There are exciting volunteer opportunities available at the national convention.The MKE 2024 Host Committee is looking for volunteers to help guests at the 2024 Republican National Convention. Click to access volunteer information. It is rare that the Republican National Convention is so close to Indiana, that you shouldn't let this opportunity pass by if you are interested. The Convention may not return until 2032 at the earliest! If you are a motivated Hoosier, get involved and ! | 📱 News You Can Use Governor Eric Holcomb with the Indianapolis Motor Speedway in preparation for May in Indiana. Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch Angola high school band who made another appearance in the state finals competition. Secretary Diego Morales with Industry and Trade ambassadors from the Czech Republic. Attorney General Todd Rokita at the National Day of Prayer event in the Statehouse. Treasurer Daniel Elliott an additional $5 million dollar purchase of Israeli bonds. Comptroller Elise Nieshalla a statement supporting the purchase of Israeli investment. Senator Mike Braun at NATCA's annual Washington meeting. Senator Todd Young with Indiana Rural Broadband Association this week. Congressman Rudy Yakym students from St. Vincent de Paul Catholic School around the nations capital. Congressman Jim Banks an Op-Ed on IU's faculty and President. Congressman Jim Baird Americans across the country for National Day of Prayer. Congresswoman Victoria Spartz the Fiscal Hero Award from the Committee for a Responsible Federal Budget. Congressman Greg Pence Mario Andretti in a press conference about his teams rejection from the F1 Grid. Congressman Larry Bucshon in a U.S. House Commerce and Energy Subcommittee hearing. Congresswoman Erin Houchin Lanesville High School girls basketball team on winning the state championship. | Upcoming Events Across the State May 4: May 4: June 10: June 14: June 15: Events past these dates are available on our website and will be added to the newsletter as we approach them. mailto:greid@indiana.gop?subject=Information%20for%20Upcoming%20GOP%20Event | | Thanks for reading, Friend!** | | | | | PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE. name: John James
subject: “You ain’t black!”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for Michigan
body:
| | | __**“If you have a problem figuring out whether you’re voting for me or Trump, then you ain’t black.”**__ I remember when Joe Biden said this like it was yesterday, and those words still make my skin crawl. **I want to make myself clear, this statement is not just a political gaffe. This is exactly what Biden thinks. It's condescending; it's pure us versus them rhetoric.** As a black Republican, I’m used to white liberals trying to put me in a box and tell me who I am. **But I will NEVER tolerate a corrupt elitist like Joe Biden telling me what it means to be black. ** My name is John James. I’m an America First Army veteran, a businessman, a husband, and a father. I will be casting my vote for Donald Trump in November, and, despite what Joe Biden wants to tell you, _**_I’m still black_.**_ **Now, the Democrats are on a mission to silence me, and I need your help to fight back. ** **[**Can you pitch in now to help me defend one of the most important House seats in the nation and hold onto our Republican majority?**](http://links.jjforcongress.com/u/click?_t=f784024d18db4d2d88c26e9627b85cc7&_m=da03f19fa3d34a4683028bd0868b26b1&_e=3oyp1BHeyhpPyB0mzuI4n3p8VW69uIAGCa3SfGolHIrysKM41FojIl9susvGhAyKS-1HHSuK0aCiaG2HCagzjdKYgjLS3ulcfAv-e47YOY7VMy6p3xnbWbJFO0JEumpkIDGuo4Qzltz1uZHZyasP5XNvssEX_Vsz3nEWLcnhLkNz8gfq6aINSeliaH7JRuwGwx14rFP3bGjToxVt9SlqP1tepIYoSbmX2qSWIXte9-qY5P321SMEhr8iEKx1qsjtVUgMdxcmKLdl-mTgGDfSxwCLi5jhrfLy__we4iHwJzTw2An7SeteajPAs_q1KolLGvLfqHBUh40KggxofKHgUYX0w2F25PNzyWygeMUnTao%3D)**

Friend, here’s the truth: the Democrats are the party of prejudice. They think black people need government assistance to get anywhere in life. They want to divide our country and turn Americans against each other based on the color of our skin. The truth is that black Americans across our nation are waking up to the Democrats’ failures. I sat down with Senator Tim Scott, Rep. Burgess Owens, and Rep. Wesley Hunt to discuss Joe Biden’s comments and what it means to be a black Republican.** ** Watch a clip from our conversation**[HERE.](http://links.jjforcongress.com/u/click?_t=f784024d18db4d2d88c26e9627b85cc7&_m=da03f19fa3d34a4683028bd0868b26b1&_e=3oyp1BHeyhpPyB0mzuI4n3p8VW69uIAGCa3SfGolHIrysKM41FojIl9susvGhAyKS-1HHSuK0aCiaG2HCagzjdKYgjLS3ulcfAv-e47YOY7VMy6p3xnbWbJFO0JEumpkIDGuo4Qzltz1uZHZyasP5XNvssEX_Vsz3nEWLcnhLkNz8gfq6aINSeliaH7JRuwGM3qQgs4EwAxKo389TOrYi0-jdMwObR27JQIMnTecOBleuQDF3QLPmqlJkNOnHWt9AGYOdq9JZlO3PsN9wF2c3DBTAW8-1X07pHlXh4Xuo4s90j3YyScYQ3DICAKCG2Hd1RSbt0vqCbjMTGWx1LeyjKqb9X2VO3q6FOIsZ_jQfEs%3D) **** ** Our black Republican coalition is growing stronger every day, and we can’t afford a setback ahead of such a critical election. That’s why I’m reaching out. **[I’m on a mission to defeat Joe Biden the Democrats, but I can’t do it alone. Can you pitch in now?](http://links.jjforcongress.com/u/click?_t=f784024d18db4d2d88c26e9627b85cc7&_m=da03f19fa3d34a4683028bd0868b26b1&_e=3oyp1BHeyhpPyB0mzuI4n3p8VW69uIAGCa3SfGolHIrysKM41FojIl9susvGhAyKS-1HHSuK0aCiaG2HCagzjdKYgjLS3ulcfAv-e47YOY7VMy6p3xnbWbJFO0JEumpkIDGuo4Qzltz1uZHZyasP5XNvssEX_Vsz3nEWLcnhLkNz8gfq6aINSeliaH7JRuwG0YfH2B2Ek4rSm99UDFRIVltLcxPfRHzU0VQkfouVY0aOtZ1mrd501D0Fe-0LnuIzqZrTx0o_cA9P8fxz8jyxHi4QPzPQqVHynczXfDDrKJSdyJwzus0suFgJpR82wuS2bigeSW_orG_WunqiwioSz1Jdnd8Ou2dVhwMcAw0Ai4w%3D)**

That means everything we do right now could have an impact in tipping the scales. So we’re asking for your support today. By endorsing Democrats at every level of government and committing to voting for progress this fall, you’ll help us make key progress in electing leaders who will defend our fundamental rights and protect our democracy. We can’t do this work without you. Together, we can make a difference. Thank you for your support, The Democrats Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, **. If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, territories, and D.C., . Contributions to the Democratic National Committee will be spent on activities and programs as the Democratic National Committee determines within its sole discretion and will not be earmarked for any particular candidate or purpose. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, ** , and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Center for Reproductive Rights
subject: Anti-Abortion Extremists are at it again in Texas
body:
Traveling for abortion is legal, and we’re not afraid | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84239855/470917154/2141984067?sourceid=1149556&utm_campaign=24emfr052407aaa&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=abortionbans&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjI3ZjdkNi01YjA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EjHLrhFlTx_u4yL-B5sYtfapmVCDkYuzp9HcyxWN7mo=&emci=a047a4d0-5b09-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=0f27f7d6-5b09-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=954237) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84239856/470917155/2141984067?sourceid=1149556&utm_campaign=24emfr052407aaa&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=abortionbans&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjI3ZjdkNi01YjA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EjHLrhFlTx_u4yL-B5sYtfapmVCDkYuzp9HcyxWN7mo=&emci=a047a4d0-5b09-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=0f27f7d6-5b09-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=954237)
---|---
| Peter,

[**We're back in Texas fighting anti-abortion extremists, and I need to know you're with us.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84239857/470917156/2141984067?sourceid=1149556&utm_campaign=24emfr052407aaa&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=abortionbans&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjI3ZjdkNi01YjA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EjHLrhFlTx_u4yL-B5sYtfapmVCDkYuzp9HcyxWN7mo=&emci=a047a4d0-5b09-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=0f27f7d6-5b09-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=954237)

A woman who allegedly fled Texas to get abortion care out of state is being threatened with legal action by her ex-boyfriend. His intent is to use Texas's vigilante abortion ban and its wrongful death statute to file a lawsuit against her—and others who he believes helped her. [**The Center is defending her and the other people being targeted.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84239858/470917157/2141984067?sourceid=1149556&utm_campaign=24emfr052407aaa&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=abortionbans&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjI3ZjdkNi01YjA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EjHLrhFlTx_u4yL-B5sYtfapmVCDkYuzp9HcyxWN7mo=&emci=a047a4d0-5b09-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=0f27f7d6-5b09-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=954237)

The anti-abortion movement doesn't just want to stop abortions from happening in states with bans, they want to force pregnancies for everyone, period. This time they're trying to use several Texas laws, including its vigilante abortion law, to prevent Texans from seeking the reproductive care they need _in other states._

**We want to be crystal clear: the law can't stop people from leaving Texas for treatment.** And the anti-abortion lawyers in this case know that too... they know because they helped write the Texas abortion ban. | [**FIGHT BACK**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84239859/470917158/2141984067?sourceid=1149556&utm_campaign=24emfr052407aaa&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=abortionbans&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjI3ZjdkNi01YjA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EjHLrhFlTx_u4yL-B5sYtfapmVCDkYuzp9HcyxWN7mo=&emci=a047a4d0-5b09-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=0f27f7d6-5b09-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=954237 "FIGHT BACK")
---
This strategy is about creating fear—and we're seeing it play out in Tennessee, Idaho, and many other states—attempts to scare people who travel for abortion care. But we're not afraid and we're not backing down.

[**With your support we're ready to take on this—and any other challenge—that comes our way.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84239860/470917159/2141984067?sourceid=1149556&utm_campaign=24emfr052407aaa&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=abortionbans&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjI3ZjdkNi01YjA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EjHLrhFlTx_u4yL-B5sYtfapmVCDkYuzp9HcyxWN7mo=&emci=a047a4d0-5b09-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=0f27f7d6-5b09-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=954237)

Onward,

Center for Reproductive Rights

name: Cynthia Brown
subject: Greetings from NYC, friends
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF DR
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/Untitled%20design.png]
Friends.
I want to tell you about a candidate I discovered in Michigan who has given me newfound hope about moving our nation forward.
I got to know Bob Lorinser [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cynthiabrown] from his emails about why he wanted to get elected to Congress and what he planned to do if that happened, just like the one you're reading right now.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cynthiabrown [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cynthiabrown]
Can you help me help Bob get elected? Like my contribution did, your generosity goes a long way.
MATCH MY $20.24 CONTRIBUTION [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cynthiabrown]
Friends,
I receive many emails from people running for office. You may, too. They all look the same. Candidates never mention what they want to do for us or what their mission is. They just ask for money.
Not Bob. That first email I read from him differed significantly from all the others. Rather than just ranting about Trump, he spoke passionately about the issues we all care about — preserving Social Security and Medicare, supporting the labor unions, and supporting the people who actually do the work to keep America running.
Bob spoke about fair wages for auto workers, teachers, healthcare workers, cops, and firefighters. Unlike many other politicians, he seems completely sincere when he says he wants to go to Washington to make a better life for all of us — hardworking, everyday people trying hard to survive.
I live in New York City, but after hearing about how much he loves Northern Michigan and the UP and the amazing things he wants to do to make it even better, I'm considering moving to his district. I'd love to cast a ballot for Bob!
Bob is also a proponent of campaign finance reform. He relies solely on grassroots fundraising from supporters like us. Because he doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs, dark money, or ultra-wealthy donors looking for political influence, his right-wing opponent outspent him.
So, this morning, just like I did the first time I read his email, I'm asking you to contribute if you can.
Bob will make a genuine difference, and your contribution, no matter how small [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cynthiabrown] , can make a difference in his campaign.
Thank you for considering.
Cynthia Brown
Fmr. Publisher, American Police Beat
Author, 'Brave Hearts'
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cynthiabrown]
Or, send a check to
Friends of Dr. Bob
PO Box 936
Marquette, MI 49855
United States
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/dbsignature.png]
ABOUT CYNTHIA
For 25 years, Cynthia Brown was the publisher of American Police Beat, America's largest and most respected law enforcement magazine. She is the author of 'Brave Hearts: Extraordinary Stories of Pride, Pain, and Courage'.
Brown founded the Police Union Leadership Seminar at Harvard Law School and has received the National Law Enforcement Officers Memorial Fund's "Distinguished Service Award." This award has also been bestowed upon three former presidents, including then-Senator Joe Biden.

name: Lanon Baccam
subject: Getting to the Gate
body:
www.lanonbaccam.com [www.lanonbaccam.com]
Peter, this team is prepared for the race.

The Kentucky Derby is this weekend and it takes years of training with only the best horses making it into the starting gate. I’ve dedicated my life to giving back from serving eight years in the Iowa Army National Guard to ten years in the U.S. Department of Agriculture - I’m ready now to be your next representative for Iowa’s 3rd District.

We've got a powerful campaign on our hands that continues to grow. More and more people are discovering, as we already know, that Iowa's Third district is key to taking back the House this year. And with nearly six months left of the campaign, every deadline and goal counts to ensure we can win big in November.

Thank you, Peter, for being a part of this team. Together, we can champion a vision of America centered on our communities. If you stand with me, please consider making a donation today to support our efforts to bring about positive change.

— Lanon Baccam
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbia-03-email-May2024-fr-May?refcode=E8297-20240503-EOMThanks-footer-Other&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbia-03-email-May2024-fr-May?refcode=E8297-20240503-EOMThanks-footer-Other&amount=25]
Lanon Baccam is a veteran, a lifelong Iowan, and now, he's running to restore principled, effective leadership in Washington. The 2022 election in Iowa’s Third was decided by less than seven-tenths of a percent - that's why CNN's Anderson Cooper has called this race a toss-up. Right now, we have a real opportunity to flip this district from red to blue — but we need your help to finish this fight and take back the House in 2024.
DONATE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lbia-03-email-May2024-fr-May?refcode=E8297-20240503-EOMThanks-footer-Other&amount=25]
Lanon's campaign to flip Iowa's Third Congressional District and take back the House is fueled by grassroots supporters like you, Peter. name: Cynthia Brown
subject: Greetings from NYC, friends
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF DR
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/Untitled%20design.png]
Friends.
I want to tell you about a candidate I discovered in Michigan who has given me newfound hope about moving our nation forward.
I got to know Bob Lorinser [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cynthiabrown] from his emails about why he wanted to get elected to Congress and what he planned to do if that happened, just like the one you're reading right now.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cynthiabrown [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cynthiabrown]
Can you help me help Bob get elected? Like my contribution did, your generosity goes a long way.
MATCH MY $20.24 CONTRIBUTION [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cynthiabrown]
Friends,
I receive many emails from people running for office. You may, too. They all look the same. Candidates never mention what they want to do for us or what their mission is. They just ask for money.
Not Bob. That first email I read from him differed significantly from all the others. Rather than just ranting about Trump, he spoke passionately about the issues we all care about — preserving Social Security and Medicare, supporting the labor unions, and supporting the people who actually do the work to keep America running.
Bob spoke about fair wages for auto workers, teachers, healthcare workers, cops, and firefighters. Unlike many other politicians, he seems completely sincere when he says he wants to go to Washington to make a better life for all of us — hardworking, everyday people trying hard to survive.
I live in New York City, but after hearing about how much he loves Northern Michigan and the UP and the amazing things he wants to do to make it even better, I'm considering moving to his district. I'd love to cast a ballot for Bob!
Bob is also a proponent of campaign finance reform. He relies solely on grassroots fundraising from supporters like us. Because he doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs, dark money, or ultra-wealthy donors looking for political influence, his right-wing opponent outspent him.
So, this morning, just like I did the first time I read his email, I'm asking you to contribute if you can.
Bob will make a genuine difference, and your contribution, no matter how small [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cynthiabrown] , can make a difference in his campaign.
Thank you for considering.
Cynthia Brown
Fmr. Publisher, American Police Beat
Author, 'Brave Hearts'
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cynthiabrown]
Or, send a check to
Friends of Dr. Bob
PO Box 936
Marquette, MI 49855
United States
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/dbsignature.png]
ABOUT CYNTHIA
For 25 years, Cynthia Brown was the publisher of American Police Beat, America's largest and most respected law enforcement magazine. She is the author of 'Brave Hearts: Extraordinary Stories of Pride, Pain, and Courage'.
Brown founded the Police Union Leadership Seminar at Harvard Law School and has received the National Law Enforcement Officers Memorial Fund's "Distinguished Service Award." This award has also been bestowed upon three former presidents, including then-Senator Joe Biden.

I don’t want radical right wingers like my opponent to ever have a say in healthcare decisions of my daughters or anybody else. Republican extremists like my opponent support abortion bans and are threatening to put women and doctors in prison – they treat women like it’s the Stone Age.

_This is dangerous and a threat to freedom._

I believe you should have the right to make your own decisions about your pregnancy and health care, and I'll vote in Congress to protect those rights.

That’s why defending this seat is so important. We have to beat these extremists in November and, once again, make _Roe v. Wade_ the law of the land.
[**So if you’re with me, please make a contribution to my campaign and help me protect and restore reproductive rights →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84242782/470925356/270139708?refcode=email_050324_abortion&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNDk5MjUxMy01ZTA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vtESQjOZruP7frT1lQ384FQBXSrq0C5fKXTE74d7US4=)

#
Peter – I’m reaching out to say thank you.
There are lots of ways to get involved this election cycle – whether it’s volunteering, signing petitions, or pitching in with grassroots donations.
Every single one of these actions helps me fight for you in the Senate – I can’t thank you enough for your continued support.
I believe in the work we are doing together to defend our 51-49 Democratic Senate majority. I’m sure you do, too – it’s clear from your response to messages like this one.
That’s important because we’re facing an uphill battle with an avalanche of Republican outside spending heading Democrats’ way.
The next six months are going to be critical for building our momentum so we can prepare for the tough fights ahead. It sure as heck won’t be easy, but knowing that I have you by my side makes all the difference.
Thank you,
\- Dick

Folks, you stepped up to help us reach our end-of-month goal. Thank you a million times over. We knew from the jump that this goal wouldn't be easy to reach, but this team made it look easy. And it's not for nothing, either: **Democrats need to win here in FL-23 if we want to take back the House majority.** It's just the truth. And with stakes this high, we can't afford to slow down. I'm asking you to help our campaign continue to ride this wave of momentum into May. name: Jon Tester
subject: National Republicans will spend just about anything to defeat me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC
body:
| | | | [ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/senator-tester?refcode=humbled)
---
| | | |
---
| | Hey, folks. I’m humbled by this team and the support our campaign has received. Thanks to you, TV ads are up and running across Montana to share my story and what I’m fighting for. But unfortunately, we’re not the only ones picking up the pace. Mitch McConnell has me set in his sights, and I know national Republicans will spend just about anything to try and beat me. Just last month, a super PAC flooded the airwaves in Montana to support one of my potential opponents.
**They’re spending so much money to try and turn me into someone I’m not because they know they can’t beat who I am.** But we’re not taking anything for granted. Here’s what I know about my team—we won’t be outworked, but we might be outspent. **If we continue to have the resources to reach and turn out Montana voters, we’ll win this election. It’s that simple—and I’m asking you to help:**
[**_Will you split a contribution any amount right now between No Dem Left Behind and my campaign to help us build the strongest team we can? This is a battleground race, and every dollar makes a difference._**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/senator-tester?refcode=humbled)
---
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

body:
We’re flying out one lucky supporter (and their guest) for a beach day in Rehoboth! After you soak up the sun, you’ll get to meet up with Jill and me for an ice cream cone. | | |

Jill and I have fond memories of taking our kids and grandkids to Rehoboth Beach in Delaware. There’s just no better way to spend a hot summer day than with your toes in the sand, looking out at the ocean.

clean_body: We’re flying out one lucky supporter (and their guest) for a beach day in Rehoboth! After you soak up the sun, you’ll get to meet up with Jill and me for an ice cream cone. | | | Peter, today I am so excited to share my campaign’s latest contest. We’re flying out one lucky supporter (and their guest) for a beach day in Rehoboth! After you soak up the sun, you’ll get to meet up with Jill and me for an ice cream cone. 😎 🏖️ ☀️ 🍦 Flights and hotel stay are on us. All you need to do is donate for your chance to win. So don’t wait! | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Jill and I have fond memories of taking our kids and grandkids to Rehoboth Beach in Delaware. There’s just no better way to spend a hot summer day than with your toes in the sand, looking out at the ocean. That’s why we wanted to extend that experience to a lucky supporter like you! When you’re done with your beach day, you’ll get the chance to cool off and enjoy some ice cream with Jill and me. So, what do you say? We would love to meet you. Just chip in $25 or any amount below to get your name in the running: Can’t wait to see you there! Joe Joe Biden President of the United States

| | Peter,

Remember when we made waves in the 2021 runoffs? Over** _70,000 rides_** were provided to Georgia voters, boosting Black turnout to _record-breaking levels_ to help elect Warnock and flip the Senate!

Now, we’re gearing up to do it all over again and we need your help. This time around we’re not just aiming high — we’re aiming higher than ever before. We’re talking about mobilizing Black voters on a scale that’ll** _make history._**

Why? subject: May is Women’s Health Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christina Bohannan for Congress
body:
Christina is committed to fighting for women's bodily autonomy and ensuring access to comprehensive reproductive healthcare, but she can't do it alone.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84244201/470929498/180180251?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTc5OThlYS01ZjA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qz0k6F5LAPNXCL5BmHGGwuF4x7dwA7tvNOipj6LxDVo=)
Peter,

May is Women's Health Month, a time to celebrate and advocate for the health and well-being of women everywhere. But as we reflect on the progress we've made, we must also recognize the ongoing threats to women's reproductive rights across the country.

**Let's be clear: Abortion is healthcare, and reproductive rights are human rights.** Yet, Republicans continue their relentless efforts to restrict women's bodily autonomy, leaving millions of women without access to essential healthcare services.

In Arizona, some on the right are finally realizing the political repercussions of enforcing outdated abortion laws from 1864. **But many Republican politicians still haven’t learned this lesson:**
* In Florida, a law that bans abortions just _six weeks_ after fertilization, **before many women even know that they are pregnant.**
* The Supreme Court is currently hearing a case that could determine whether **states could block emergency healthcare** – including abortion services – for pregnant people.
* **And here in Iowa, our state government is pushing forward with an extreme, six-week abortion ban that would threaten the health and rights of women across our state.**

Make no mistake: Mariannette Miller-Meeks has helped pave the way for this anti-choice extremism, championing radical "Life at Conception" bills at both the state and federal levels.

Christina is committed to fighting for women's bodily autonomy and ensuring access to comprehensive reproductive healthcare, **but she can't do it alone.****[Will you chip in $10 today to help her defeat Miller-Meeks, flip IA-01, and take back the House majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84244202/470929499/182211867?refcode=em24_240503_whm_fnd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240503_whm_fnd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&refcode2=197998ea-5f09-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTc5OThlYS01ZjA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qz0k6F5LAPNXCL5BmHGGwuF4x7dwA7tvNOipj6LxDVo=)**

name: Colin Allred
subject: We've come a long way in a year
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| _Tammy Baldwin here — I wanted to make sure you saw this message from Colin Allred. Colin is running to defeat Ted Cruz and win in Texas, and today marks exactly one year since he launched his campaign, so I hope you'll read this update and[chip in, if you can.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-allred.3G-TY7&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240503_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=2534%2E35263%2EHYCis9)_ [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-allred.3G-TY7&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240503_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2534%2E35263%2EHYCis9) WOW, Peter! Today marks exactly one year since we launched this campaign to defeat Ted Cruz, and I couldn't be more thrilled with how far we've come. **How it started:** Immediately after we launched this campaign, election experts from _FiveThirtyEight_ to _Roll Call_ UPGRADED our chances of beating Ted Cruz and officially ranked Texas a "battleground." **How it's going:** After early polls showed us 5 points down, hundreds of thousands of grassroots supporters like you chipped in to help me travel all over Texas to meet voters and spread our message. **Thanks to you, we have officially pulled EVEN with Ted Cruz in the polls.** **What's next?** Ted Cruz is terrified of our grassroots movement because we're closer than ever to defeating him. But this race is a long way from over, and he's calling all his millionaire mega donors and special interest allies to try and squash our momentum. We can't let up for even a second. **That's why, to celebrate the one year anniversary of our campaign, my team and I set an ambitious goal to raise $300,000 by midnight.[Can I count on your split donation between my campaign and Tammy Baldwin to help us get there, Peter? name: Colin Allred
subject: How it started vs. how it's going
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| Today marks exactly one year since we launched this campaign to defeat Ted Cruz.
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=may2024_abs_em_allred.wcYfFV&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20240503_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=3&akid=6377%2E5257348%2E3Iffbi)
WOW, Derek!
Today marks exactly one year since we launched this campaign to defeat Ted Cruz, and I couldn't be more thrilled with how far we've come.
**How it started:** Immediately after we launched this campaign, election experts from _FiveThirtyEight_ to _Roll Call_ UPGRADED our chances of beating Ted Cruz and officially ranked Texas a "battleground."
**How it's going:** After early polls showed us 5 points down, hundreds of thousands of grassroots supporters like you chipped in to help me travel all over Texas to meet voters and spread our message. **Thanks to you, we have officially pulled EVEN with Ted Cruz in the polls.**
**What's next?** Ted Cruz is terrified of our grassroots movement because we're closer than ever to defeating him. But this race is a long way from over, and he's calling all his millionaire mega donors and special interest allies to try and squash our momentum. We can't let up for even a second.
**That's why, to celebrate the one year anniversary of our campaign, my team and I set an ambitious goal to raise $300,000 by midnight.** **[Can I count on your split donation between my campaign and Adam Schiff to help us get there, Derek? name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: Better Dead than Red
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nicole for New York
body:
Here's why:

|
---
Have you ever heard of the phrase _" Better Dead than Red"?_

Well that's how I feel when I see radical leftists espousing communist ideology- **I 'd do anything to not be subjected to communism. **

My parents both felt the impact of communist and socialist leadership hard. My mother was born and raised in Cuba and was forced to flee. When Fidel Castro, one of the worst leaders of the 20th century came to power in 1959, she came to America with her family in search of the **American Dream.** My father's story was similar- leaving everything behind to pursue the **Land of Opportunity.** My father left failing socialism in Greece in the 1960s in pursuit of a capitalist democracy.

My parents fled communism and socialism, and certainly didn't need it to follow them to the United States. But more and more now, **we see Democrat leaders spew the same language dictators of the past used to brainwash the general public.**

My parents came here with nothing. They built up their small business from the ground up & then I, their daughter, became a member of the U.S. Congress. Now this once lauded notion - the American Dream - is severely under fire.

I will always defend our country and everything it stands for. **[I'm asking you now, will you join me in supporting American values?](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=0c31d5c1c26b4ac6b14546a2fc9ea36d&_e=CMXGMNOJoeTBltdv1vxM9EIWloR2QfJN_lumDkphsNM7sZz66h5-Oezoy2ktB5uGSZ1-SEiL4MamtOers89V-ZAieamFtVyxOIyelm7BjSn204-F2R2C62wvXdRzniEb6pHUNhyHFkfL1V4TmEu7lcTeZwWS4maQryfremDY4iqmtNMQ7-vtyHL4EqUba_ysHjOqLr55FpCKiK7ysxcUipnCX1jDtJpGaH4m6rK8pD9FsW4xBU_B6RRsTA69DuVDMeyT5uReqokBMvX2LcjxU7WmwmjjpZeyyi3T0CR3ZDHhUhsI09VX89tcFxT5aWckTko0oQFpUa4HGbRYSKCWvg%3D%3D)** | [ **SUPPORT FREEDOM** ](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=0c31d5c1c26b4ac6b14546a2fc9ea36d&_e=CMXGMNOJoeTBltdv1vxM9EIWloR2QfJN_lumDkphsNM7sZz66h5-Oezoy2ktB5uGSZ1-SEiL4MamtOers89V-ZAieamFtVyxOIyelm7BjSn204-F2R2C62wvXdRzniEb6pHUNhyHFkfL1V4TmEu7lcTeZwWS4maQryfremDY4iqmtNMQ7-vtyHL4EqUba_ysVLMHj-sk9LlD9T6O0OmgKuDo2KOGDi39notxbMFCm6PcB059CeLBUHNEDWuq6eqCcoY-9PWXCDKNR4gg8P_IQWx3PooAsZQ-yMdlwDY97a9ilRdIPi0u2GSDBBmC5gq-A8R2ZDoRaVnIDXdxUGfBpA%3D%3D)

---
[ **SUPPORT NICOLE MALLIOTAKIS** ](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=0c31d5c1c26b4ac6b14546a2fc9ea36d&_e=CMXGMNOJoeTBltdv1vxM9EIWloR2QfJN_lumDkphsNM7sZz66h5-Oezoy2ktB5uGSZ1-SEiL4MamtOers89V-ZAieamFtVyxOIyelm7BjSn204-F2R2C62wvXdRzniEbRppAkQQ5e-6L43n5BF1W7270xG8SOErsx6PvOtSBviO0ez3gr1LgdKg9CkIY5c2ritIVGxVst66sXFIjMmNz7Ur1q3kkp7Jk9Tb7EIHPouPtuKj5D1R4_e4gPSZONNXJP5Oth06Eca7nPIBa_04DNVdFmnCIKuSHScrfis79RbXiVb15cbot7tDktq80EIl2xSFEjA5bnu1vSD6StJlCkg%3D%3D)

My entire life has been spent fighting for American ideals. I have witnessed the importance of Freedom through my parents' sacrifice, and I will always be grateful for their choice to pursue the American Dream. **[I hope I can count on you to join me in upholding these very same values. For the sake of our communities and generations to come, please join me.](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=0c31d5c1c26b4ac6b14546a2fc9ea36d&_e=CMXGMNOJoeTBltdv1vxM9EIWloR2QfJN_lumDkphsNM7sZz66h5-Oezoy2ktB5uGSZ1-SEiL4MamtOers89V-ZAieamFtVyxOIyelm7BjSn204-F2R2C62wvXdRzniEb6pHUNhyHFkfL1V4TmEu7lcTeZwWS4maQryfremDY4iqmtNMQ7-vtyHL4EqUba_ysshFSdJFcZRHhAlRdUXeqY7j2MbjKU6CiscWZa1l55qg6eiibJ1E1Dnh63UOI-k07q4CC1uW-NRE47fTPyXcT07rX9N7AvRQS3YScdqyZDbqLw5-UKLg2UKMs7WPbQKnavTXA6kLKCBYQOWxUJ-PSzg%3D%3D)**

Thank you, patriot.

Nicole Malliotakis
