name: Kean MacLelland
subject: Your Kean for Congress Weekly Update 5-3-2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kean for Congress Inc _Copyright © 2024 Kean for Congress_
body:
Launching 2024 Newsletter!| | |
---
[](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=a6483f424373468ca0a2c0499ffea481&_e=TEe6-3TRD5bMF7y7H-0W8Hv-8djDYY8f1p5A5yzPTTLTVlfQdNwRjy1uVT_pawezjxKvtWWm31LE-fAslwP0v7lw1326iIrbRS-mKfnXafP1IFnxouPA47N1qCmPkXnypoyZoLZdv2Nia_ihKswFeVEFxLSWiDUankqzO3e6_BfrY2Dv_ggAiMmMeyXg-xXp)
---
| | Friend,
---
| | Welcome to the first edition of the 2024 Weekly Kean for Congress newsletter update. We're excited to bring you the latest news and developments from the campaign trail as we work to re-elect Congressman Tom Kean, Jr. and hold New Jersey's 7th Congressional District! As you know, this year’s election has never been more important - we must keep the Republican majority in the House, __**HOLD**__ NJ-07, and send Republicans to the Senate and the White House.
We are just over one month away until the Primary Election, and are almost within 180 days of the General Election. As a team, we must work together to make every day count! We are looking forward to sending you these short updates each week. Your partnership and support of Kean for Congress is greatly appreciated!
---
| | **Field Update**
---
| |
---
---
|
---
---
| | Since the conclusion of the convention season, our campaign has been hard at work. We've made significant progress in our phone banking and door knocking efforts, engaging with voters across the district to share Tom's messages of effective leadership and common-sense values. We have launched and held regular phone banks in Hunterdon, Union, and Somerset Counties in partnership with county and local candidates, and have begun strong door-to-door efforts ahead of the June 4th primary - resulting in tens of thousands of voter contacts already. We couldn't do it without our dedicated team of volunteers! **Want to get involved? Join us at some of our upcoming weekly events!**
---
| | [**Sign Up to Volunteer!**](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=a6483f424373468ca0a2c0499ffea481&_e=TEe6-3TRD5bMF7y7H-0W8PpRqxeK6oeyEBQvYcqgcO1DYRx97iseFxkAgHuXhmRugq8op4iqVZtJsncF1J0_63XGVsv4JpzmzNg78qLLYXp9raUuV7fyPNabZm7ZLhCYKID4rxg1DoNfK0YHzLMtcKpP1riOmPTL5zWGyXBBsyY2_7EVSy7VlFom6i1MhGTHa8M46SZCqxd61QUdPmmNW5d_uI-rcT64oxS8uBW5x60%3D)
---
| | **Volunteer of the Week:****_Jerry Caviston_ **
---
| |
---
| | Jerry is an intern with the Kean for Congress campaign. He serves as the Student Government Association President and the Alpha Psi Omega, Theater Honor Society President at Centenary University. This past week, Jerry was our top caller, with over 1,205 phone calls made to voters across NJ07! We are lucky to have Jerry on our team.
---
| | **Tom In The News**
---
| | [New Jersey Globe |**Kean leads delegation to Ukraine after House passes aid package**](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=a6483f424373468ca0a2c0499ffea481&_e=TEe6-3TRD5bMF7y7H-0W8B-2ASQgSDQFUE01I1ShIppof7CzucaCCktNcSBW9xQJf0abfomy-S_azro5uvIGjm5BLkatAF4iG5Y-Wmq-y0vQnOr-T8O-bopopEpiu7G0KNbKiApNQLbxbpNeRXuweADRHhviY2PcuuZcpmQX1vmfq4jm78zEsMvgn-AxiU31RL4XZlNqux0F_ul0uEgdrgBo7Yo3y2S-avfDTsbrAIDvvjB6hwuggoP3oC1smAzqIzYbwPG2_FKS2YqRWXdVyzeTXP6mymcn5eL2nrD22MU%3D)
[Westfield Leader | **Kean’s Support of Israel is Commendable**](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=a6483f424373468ca0a2c0499ffea481&_e=TEe6-3TRD5bMF7y7H-0W8OFxAKsEV86e2rEZMbHcy1a6Oif_b-6rA0y5WouwQvBGu5LYQlfCWt8MW0msv9EXIOh_l55qudUu8Xry2uAcpGt0d3z_39OcXlLl4qRMnzYrSheznlGNEe26murJVBCsA1pEpt9Vb3GHCSlAMWQa_WdyhyyXFpZErNsyS-5ZE8qA2mPgn7D8AMkbvDD4Lk14TytKCC23L-QkzbnoAuuBQLsAclgr2L59At9G7u_o23pNSVAxUpiLZkyRWULBum65Sg%3D%3D)
[WRNJ | **House adopts resolution condemning Iran’s drone, missile attack on Israel**](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=a6483f424373468ca0a2c0499ffea481&_e=TEe6-3TRD5bMF7y7H-0W8Kdro-F0ThJRhXfU4rHOX5tXNnPOfA2Y6wTmVtACPkRqkdO-QWTXNHDWWM49Ls8v8jp2lb5ilqJVzi_rKrUJYyjTIsnqO_CM_EvMqqLpINqJuxt6QIj6t6NMJ8X-VNbZwA_TOgyxeQNCLjgVsEBKhZk-MP8x61X4-wJfgJpL6O0vDoGZz_eTCdlxF4D63yU1RqEEKOWjjYqZIJrcHkkupArW6UpckXq3H3Caq58zdhDY-WN9pxfCEbkP6p963EC1PFXF_W0AEwQAmB9hpCtiYAc%3D)

---
| | **Voting Resources and Upcoming Dates**
---
Vote-by-Mail ballots have begun to hit mailboxes across NJ07 for the primary election. Don't wait! Return your ballot today, and get your vote in early for Tom Kean, Jr.! Ballots must be postmarked no later than June 4th to be counted. You can return your ballot one of three ways:
1. By mail using USPS
2. Placing your ballot in a secure dropbox
3. Returning it in person to your county board of elections

For information on voting by mail, visit: **[linktr.ee/KeanforCongress](https://link.tomkean.com/u/click?_t=9b7a451def6d4254858fc869cf07cd48&_m=a6483f424373468ca0a2c0499ffea481&_e=TEe6-3TRD5bMF7y7H-0W8MoTtVfo0wrOrgo3Qi3dtIYMbh0mlTL7kGA8Qvj544cdpCaTd8IDTYHjC11juLyL5DefNhKE__yZY9mBOJ2G_Tv9eg7pCw-WdbVUdcCMaGX7lYAogpr-NXCQKswGaMnCGOHEF4BMuu4LP8F1HuTMP6R8NjLl-uiGPUWG3Nqw1IRQg0-XNbxxBIwwFn5DR8O_KQ%3D%3D)**

As you know, this year’s election has never been more important - we must keep the Republican majority in the House, HOLD NJ-07, and send Republicans to the Senate and the White House. We are just over one month away until the Primary Election, and are almost within 180 days of the General Election. As a team, we must work together to make every day count! We are looking forward to sending you these short updates each week. Your partnership and support of Kean for Congress is greatly appreciated! | | Field Update | | | | | Since the conclusion of the convention season, our campaign has been hard at work. We've made significant progress in our phone banking and door knocking efforts, engaging with voters across the district to share Tom's messages of effective leadership and common-sense values. We have launched and held regular phone banks in Hunterdon, Union, and Somerset Counties in partnership with county and local candidates, and have begun strong door-to-door efforts ahead of the June 4th primary - resulting in tens of thousands of voter contacts already. We couldn't do it without our dedicated team of volunteers! Want to get involved? Join us at some of our upcoming weekly events! | | | | Volunteer of the Week:Jerry Caviston | | | | Jerry is an intern with the Kean for Congress campaign. name: Illinois Review
subject: ALERT: Democrats Pass Bill to Protect Themselves in Springfield
body:
With over 50 house and senate offices running unopposed, the Democrat supermajority passes a bill to prevent GOP officials from naming challengers.

view in browser (https://mailchi.mp/b8f1a3a04756/exclusive-donald-trump-jr-draws-large-crowds-receives-lifetime-membership-10322004?e=1cb5fdae9e) | update preferences (https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=1a5a561027&e=1cb5fdae9e&c=7936e0e46f) | unsubscribe (https://illinoisreview.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=811d47b3c0783e80274d515f7&id=1a5a561027&t=b&e=1cb5fdae9e&c=7936e0e46f)

Dear Peter,

We thought you may be interested to receive this BREAKING NEWS from Illinois Review (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7936e0e46f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .

Supermajority Passes Election Bill that Protects Democratic Incumbents as IL GOP Leaders Fail to Identify 50 Candidates to Run in November (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/05/supermajority-passes-election-bill-that-protects-democratic-incumbents-as-il-gop-leaders-fail-to-identify-50-candidates-to-run-in-november.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7936e0e46f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2024/05/supermajority-passes-election-bill-that-protects-democratic-incumbents-as-il-gop-leaders-fail-to-identify-50-candidates-to-run-in-november.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=7936e0e46f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Gov. JB Pritzker, flanked by Senate President Don Harmon, left, and House Speaker Emanuel “Chris” Welch, announce they’ve reached agreement on a budget and tax relief package that lawmakers are expected to vote on April 7, 2022. (Capitol News Illinois photo by Peter Hancock)

By Illinois Review

On Thursday, Illinois House and Senate Democrats – who maintain supermajority control in Springfield, passed a bill in less than 24 hours that protects incumbents – giving Democrats a significant advantage going into the November election as Republicans continue to feel the pain as the party in the superminority.

The bill, which was rushed through the Democratic-led legislature in record time and without any consultation with the party in the superminority, prohibits local party organizations from appointing a candidate to the ballot if they failed to identify a candidate to run in that primary.

For years, Republicans have struggled to recruit candidates to run in primary elections – and this new bill – which Gov. JB Pritzker is expected to sign, eliminates any backup plans that local party officials may have had to get names on the ballot – even if they are appointed.

clean_body: With over 50 house and senate offices running unopposed, the Democrat supermajority passes a bill to prevent GOP officials from naming challengers. view in browser () | update preferences () | unsubscribe () This IR e-Blast Powered By: Dear Peter, We thought you may be interested to receive this BREAKING NEWS from Illinois Review () . Supermajority Passes Election Bill that Protects Democratic Incumbents as IL GOP Leaders Fail to Identify 50 Candidates to Run in November () Gov. JB Pritzker, flanked by Senate President Don Harmon, left, and House Speaker Emanuel “Chris” Welch, announce they’ve reached agreement on a budget and tax relief package that lawmakers are expected to vote on April 7, 2022. (Capitol News Illinois photo by Peter Hancock) By Illinois Review On Thursday, Illinois House and Senate Democrats – who maintain supermajority control in Springfield, passed a bill in less than 24 hours that protects incumbents – giving Democrats a significant advantage going into the November election as Republicans continue to feel the pain as the party in the superminority. The bill, which was rushed through the Democratic-led legislature in record time and without any consultation with the party in the superminority, prohibits local party organizations from appointing a candidate to the ballot if they failed to identify a candidate to run in that primary. For years, Republicans have struggled to recruit candidates to run in primary elections – and this new bill – which Gov. JB Pritzker is expected to sign, eliminates any backup plans that local party officials may have had to get names on the ballot – even if they are appointed. CLICK TO READ FULL ARTICLE () Copyright © 2023 IR Media Corp., all rights reserved. Can I explain something, folks?
I grew up in a twenty-four-by-thirty-six foot house. I lost three fingers on my left hand in a meat grinding accident when I was a kid. I am and always will be a farmer, like my folks and like my grandparents.
**In fact, I’m very proud to be the U.S. Senate’s only working dirt farmer.**
Every spring, I spend a lot of weeks working the stubble, getting equipment ready for planting, and out in the field seeding. Come summer, I am out there harvesting. I maintain my own heavy equipment and deliver my grain in a truck that’s a bit bigger than what any of my colleagues drive.
I buy grease by the case and seeds by the ton. I butcher my own beef. My wife, Sharla, and I work the farm hand-in-hand.
The task of scheduling my work in the Senate around the inflexible timing of farm responsibilities drives my staff crazy—but they know my farm work is non-negotiable. It keeps me, quite literally, grounded.
**And rather than spend my days hobnobbing with special interests, I rely on hard-working folks like you to power everything we do.**
**[That’s why I’m personally asking you to join my reelection team and split $10 between my campaign and Adam Frisch's today to help us defend Montana’s Senate seat and win in Colorado. Anything you can give makes a difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84246631/470935716/417329036?refcode=em20240503am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=82ba12fa-6109-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmJhMTJmYS02MTA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kQN0-Sit15yzM9MKdK2pfeSD0PkLpMEXeOOiHpJjimk=)**

name: JD Vance
subject: We missed it, by a lot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by JD Vance For Senate Inc
body:
Are you really on my team? My finance team just called and informed me we missed our last fundraising deadline by - well, to put it bluntly - a LOT.

|
---
**Hey friend. **

Listen, I have one simple question for you.

**Are you really on my team?**

My finance team just called and informed me we missed our last fundraising deadline by - well, to put it bluntly - **a LOT.**

**You can 't blame me for wanting to check on you and confirm your support for conservative values, small government, secure borders, and safe streets.**

In this day and age, who knows what crazy scheme the Dems and Biden could dream up? We must ensure we're prepared for their attacks come election year, and the preparation starts NOW.

Friend, missing deadlines - especially quarterly ones - doesn't just make me look bad - it makes our movement look bad. Which is just more ammunition for the Left to outspend us, outraise us, and **BEAT** us in elections.

**[Please consider chipping in any amount here to meet my upcoming mid-month goal and support conservative voices like my own. ](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=c36d6c4c30c5436d841f580faf4b2f44&_e=2iGBYKlspILdm-sSdDFW0yIEJ2w2FpdadiK-uK9-v5NcMzm7E9Zk1OBgAfBecAlGeCOpDAceC_CXPHzXkDG5PSX20QkGUrD-juzM1rSvuOmH7h-CmYzlt0Qvjj_bXPUpudYZbJsslI0smmliNW2VW4i4-JohgxPeaU0uym0ZOWjdbV0W2WyHR0GA13xlamB4kLqLIupiFk-hvjTvOUdbLvVFQbx3quupfzgNm30gFlar6URUdn7Di3T_VPNBYQGdsJzwZ0aGu1cjRiY6TUrCC3MI3tCojDb54FjIFFRPqtrhNTrR-ieUBkZawU7XpadJrQQY5nT8deJktfCN8-1t7qx0h6BrMgJSyi8DHRwtMbk2wSw1dX0y_6mhpCC3ex-LojW51JTneOsaxcycCQNjO23ke1R2Cb6GkHlKRmVfKtDbzsoSwi3WbRT2l-WWX5vA1lQMTdF8aJtC4XeY3R7I75umWoNmstEj21bxfIzfZxbIA4E8hrPBlpQuRjCnW4hHoU13lxLGcdAWO0FQBPOpRVbiYaWmxFMVSRE3qUaj_rHrmF2178EqxWsFp0_rhaRn)**

name: Harry Dunn
subject: I don't want to take too much of your time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Team, Harry Dunn here.
I don't want to take too much of your time, so I'll make this quick:
I looked insurrectionists like Trump in the eye on January 6th and fought for our democracy.
I couldn't have been any closer to the chaos of that day while I put my life on the line during the violence and destruction that Trump encouraged.
So trust and believe when I tell you: I'm the best candidate to combat their extremism, because I've done it before.
But right now, I'm not where I need to be on my $100,000 weekly goal. I really need to pick up the pace to get there before midnight, especially now that we're less than 1 month from Election Day. Will you help me and Seth Moulton hit this goal? Anything you can spare is appreciated! [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Harry
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]

name: Kyle (Governing Group)
subject: We Made It Through Convention-Thanks to You!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOVERNING GROUP PAC
body:
Thanks to your generous volunteer time and donations, we are well positioned for strong victories in the June primary! | | | | | [](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=45b96ff53a&e=6484bb6dd5)
---
Friends,
Convention season has just wrapped up and **all 12 of our endorsed candidates will be moving on to the primaries!** It was an intense yet fruitful convention, made possible by the enthusiastic involvement of delegates and the hard work of our candidates and their teams.
Together, they have not only secured their places on the ballot but also gained invaluable insights that will propel them forward. But we are just getting started. [Will you chip in to ensure that our candidates can win their upcoming primaries?](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=6131da22d7&e=6484bb6dd5)
A special mention goes to Governing Group candidate Amanda Bollinger, who truly embodied our values by working tirelessly to secure a decisive victory over state school board member Natalie Cline. This outcome not only demonstrates Amanda's commitment but also underscores how vital your contributions are in advancing civility and good governance. [Every donation helps us move closer to a more respectful and effective political landscape.](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=ad7e162170&e=6484bb6dd5)
Now, as we pivot towards the primaries, your continued support is more crucial than ever. Please consider making a donation to help propel our candidates forward. Your contribution, no matter the size, ensures that the hard work at the convention translates into success at the polls.
[DONATE NOW](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=c841fa5706&e=6484bb6dd5)
Thank you for your unwavering support. Together, we are building the foundation for meaningful change!
KyleK
|

name: Call for a Ceasefire via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: Bernie - "Mr. President, maybe it is time to not simply worry about the violence we are seeing on American college campuses, but to focus on the unprecedented violence we are seeing in Gaza."
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis, as law
enforcement descended on college campuses to arrest students peacefully
protesting America’s complicity in Netanyahu’s atrocities in Gaza, Bernie
had a message for President Biden on the floor of the U.S. Senate:

“Mr. President, maybe it is time to not simply worry about the violence we
are seeing on American college campuses, but to focus on the unprecedented
violence we are seeing in Gaza.”

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17020?t=1011&akid=5911%2E5885482%2E4xEM14 ][IMG]

As Netanyahu promises to invade Rafah with the bombs and billions in
funding President Biden just sent Israel, Biden has a lot to say about
student protestors — but not much to say about his complicity in the
murder of 34,000 Palestinians.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17019?source=email-20240503&t=1012&akid=5911%2E5885482%2E4xEM14 ]Add your name: Time for Peace is running out. President Biden MUST
broker an immediate, permanent Ceasefire now! Diplomacy is the only way to
stop more atrocities in Gaza.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17019?source=email-20240503&t=1013&akid=5911%2E5885482%2E4xEM14 ]ADD YOUR NAME

Bernie kept going. "I suggest to CNN and maybe some of my colleagues here,
maybe take your cameras, just for a moment, off of Columbia and UCLA.
Maybe go to Gaza, and take your camera and show us the emaciated children
who are dying of malnutrition because of Netanyahu's policies."

Bernie also noted on the floor of the Senate that some members of Congress
have been using the phrase “pro-Palestinian” to suggest that those who
support dignity and Peace for people in Gaza actually support terrorism.
It’s a gross, racist sentiment from some of the leaders of this country,
and it’s the kind of disgusting rhetoric that fuels U.S. complicity in the
bombing of civilians in Gaza.

We are seeing the consequences of a government that refused to take the
side of Peace, morality, and protecting the Palestinian people. Our
government must now make the decision to end what it has allowed to
continue.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/17019?source=email-20240503&t=1014&akid=5911%2E5885482%2E4xEM14 ]Add your name: The U.S. must broker a Ceasefire and end its complicity
in the atrocities against the Palestinian people.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=5911%2E5885482%2E4xEM14 ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=5911%2E5885482%2E4xEM14 ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=5911%2E5885482%2E4xEM14 ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=5911%2E5885482%2E4xEM14 ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=5911%2E5885482%2E4xEM14 ]Website |

body:
I am super excited to share with you the release of a new project I have been working on. 2 years ago, I did a 32 part series over the Book of Revela
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9955226.4499.1.6e7463d5d6391fb083bf99c3ffe79f71) |
---
I am super excited to share with you the release of a _new project_ I have been working on. 2 years ago, I did a _32 part series_ over the **Book of Revelation**. Since then, the Lord has shown me so much about **Revelation** that I did not know when I first taught the series and a TON has changed in our world since then. _Therefore_ , I sensed led to redo the series over the **Book of Revelation** with the new insights. This new teaching series will take each chapter of **Revelation** and break it down _verse-by-verse_. _"Blessed is the one who reads aloud the words of this prophecy, and blessed are those who hear it and take to heart what is written in it, because the time is near"_ **\- Revelation1:3** I know this teaching will bless you. I have also included the teaching notes for you to follow along. Watch Revelation 1 here: [https://youtu.be/VfS_4Aii2hE](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9955226.4500.1.22a1290eeb3efa6488b9ce77d911e136) **Upcoming Events At Sheridan:** -Sat, May 4 @10am - **Classic Car Show**

-Mon, May 20 @6:30pm - **General Michael Flynn**

-Fri, June 28 @6:30pm - **Tim Tebow**

-Fri, July 26 @6:30pm - **Riley Gaines**

-Thur, Oct 24 @6:30pm - **Pete Hegseth** RSVP at:[ https://www.sheridan.church/events](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9955226.4501.1.5231a0280150eca4b5f25c43ee94e224) Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer

We have been blessed to host: [Lara Trump](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9955226.4506.1.8dbceca1c591ebf7e18864e65927d015), **Perry Stone** , [Rabbi Jonathan Cahn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9955226.4507.1.e7092d1168c9bdeee102e1de790c0a5b), **Rodney Howard-Browne** , [Darry Strawberry](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9955226.4508.1.fe6f58f678d9ed735016a088817b10f3), [Mayor Rudy Giuliani](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9955226.4509.1.29d5f95ef0ee008894af0c16da34f307), [Roger Stone](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9955226.4510.1.95a3aeb8ea31f2e8efb43731ab8ec174), **David Barton** and others in the past. I am excited to announce that [Riley Gaines](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9955226.4511.1.f1887880ef973c27b6145104a17fb91c) will be joining us on Friday, July 26 to address one of the most crucial battles we have right now that centers upon _gender_. Other Upcoming Speakers: -**General Michael Flynn** : Monday, May 20
-**Tim Tebow** : Friday, June 28 RSVP - [www.sheridan.church/events](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9955226.4512.1.5b61015f168550e1392155e540f7125a) Thank you,

## General Flynn Wants To Meet YOU!
---
America's General, [Michael Flynn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9955226.4522.1.9740303dd2515512e66b59bf907e0c20), is doing a **Nation-Wide Tour** for his new movie! [General Flynn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9955226.4523.1.27a1f6334deebbb758b506cef884fa3b) wants to invite you to join him in a city that is close to you. At the end of each showing, there will be a live Q&A w/[General Flynn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9955226.4524.1.ee9ed221f859da9e0484b6a8e51236f3). View the locations of the [Flynn Tour](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9955226.4525.1.67c572928b5b340b06a5217d3cc2dedc): [www.flynnmovie.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9955226.4526.1.fb283b0e056715f8380c920ab31c7e59) General Flynn will be coming to [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9955226.4527.1.243492b72ab6a65f08cbc87eb884540c) Tulsa for the premier of the [NEW Flynn Movie](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9955226.4528.1.62c4c2144e1298f7392b2969bdd2a762)! **Date** : Monday, May 20, 2024
**Meet & Greet**: 5:00pm
**Show Time** : 6:30pm
**Location** : 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK **Ticket Link** : [https://www.flynnmovie.com/ref/Tulsa/](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9955226.4529.1.40948166a44e2553014a6dacb06743a6) Follow the [Link](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9955226.4530.1.676c818e0ff76d63716734ad09841464) above, click "Get Tickets" and select the Tulsa Show Time. There will be a **LIVE Q &A** with [General Flynn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9955226.4531.1.9447ee31f09cc243cbb6e74299e21aaa) after the movie. If you live outside the Tulsa area, there are many other cities that [General Flynn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9955226.4532.1.837dd52397bc455f71f71273ed659c13) is visiting that you can view here: [www.flynnmovie.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=9955226.4533.1.a60b594042d68061eeda533d15effb38)

name: Senator John Kennedy
subject: This isn’t something I wanted to tell you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
You've already done so much.

| [](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=2d4248d64a1046f2a8db34a802ddeb88&_e=CP3iyzFuQAOFTSwahojuSsCggoUm-durZS36HNEekEbGmw5ioc2aLDv86otzhrci1hIfUaqArSo7Y04RncBi3yBggeovEqyQACvhET6FPgZvxtajiqz2y_Ae7_6nFNAw5_4szjoc53Du9Ip3VTCFz2mypn1qPED97aNu69C9SXEEBphHSaKON0BPsANYcHQse2TITyL3XgCV2UeBZxb5V7X0u7Y0rJjaI3RafoB6e6RWs51cpfCXze0loxrNhuyu1R7_CMU4S1uVUk_9mJglQe_6_IMxMYQcCSECMKHqrS_N1S90cQpKc82cugaAKkb2-4D8ERwPGX-zN0pOIVyvfRevfj9iJr9YgLYZ1n1woa9UwnBOmcN2n5V5JAPjLZp4aoIJi2qewnhT_QaJlgLksg%3D%3D)
---

Folks,

I'm a little embarrassed. You know my parents always taught me to be grateful, not ask for too much, and thank those who were nice enough to give me a gift. So, before I get to the bad news, let me just say that your strong support in 2023 made me happier than a penguin in an ice chest.

**Your donations gave me the resources to fight the Left 's agenda, and your kind words gave me the support to keep fighting.** I couldn't do it without you. That's why I hate to have to ask for your support so soon again, right after you did everything you could to help me in 2023, but there's just too much on the line not to ask.

I missed my April fundraising goal, and my Radical Left opponents noticed. They've not only taken notice, but they're taking action. They've called in the big guns to pour sickening amounts of money into their campaigns to try and beat Republicans in 2024 and push their Socialist Agenda. This can't happen.
**I NEED YOUR HELP. I 'M HUMBLY ASKING.**
The only way we're going to save America, Take Back the Senate, and stop the Left's Liberal Agenda is by standing together. We've got to start May off right, and I'm hoping you can help me do just that by rushing what you can below.

clean_body: You've already done so much. | Folks, I'm a little embarrassed. You know my parents always taught me to be grateful, not ask for too much, and thank those who were nice enough to give me a gift. So, before I get to the bad news, let me just say that your strong support in 2023 made me happier than a penguin in an ice chest. Your donations gave me the resources to fight the Left 's agenda, and your kind words gave me the support to keep fighting. I couldn't do it without you. That's why I hate to have to ask for your support so soon again, right after you did everything you could to help me in 2023, but there's just too much on the line not to ask. I missed my April fundraising goal, and my Radical Left opponents noticed. They've not only taken notice, but they're taking action. They've called in the big guns to pour sickening amounts of money into their campaigns to try and beat Republicans in 2024 and push their Socialist Agenda. This can't happen. I NEED YOUR HELP. I 'M HUMBLY ASKING. The only way we're going to save America, Take Back the Senate, and stop the Left's Liberal Agenda is by standing together. We've got to start May off right, and I'm hoping you can help me do just that by rushing what you can below. | I appreciate your understanding, and I hope you'll help me catch up. Thank you, Senator John Kennedy Paid for by John Kennedy for Us John Kennedy for Us P.O. Box 80418 Baton Rouge, LA 70808 If you would like to send donation by mail,

name: Conservative Intel
subject: Free eBook from Victor Davis Hanson: Dueling Populisms
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsPJ2U0iNt

Dear Friend, Populism is nothing new to world history. While it
can be easy to think about American politics as being divided
between the Left and the Right, the reality is much
different.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osPJ2U0iNt

Dear
Friend,
Populism
is nothing new to world history. While it can be easy to think
about American politics as being divided between the Left and the
Right, the reality is much different. What we've really been
seeing is two sets of populist backlash against both the Democrat
and Republican establishment.

And
believe it or not, these tensions actually trace their roots back
to Roman times.

That's
why I'm sending you this email today.

I want to
make sure you get a free copy of one of our popular eBooks:
Dueling Populisms by Victor Davis Hanson.

Hanson is
a Hoover Senior Fellow and world-renowned historian, and I think
you'll get a lot out of his insights. Inside this important
eBook, you'll learn more about:

What
we can expect from a political climate ruled by movements that
rebel against both the establishment-and each other.
The
important parallels between these ancient movements and their
modern counterparts in both progressive and conservative
populism.
What
lies ahead for America as we revive these ancient tensions in our
culture.

You can
get your free copy of Dueling Populisms using this secure link:
https://resources.hoover.org/dueling-populisms-signup/.

And
please feel free to share this with your family and friends. It's
important that we recall the voices of experience and apply them
to contemporary conflicts and challenges.

You can
use this link to get access to your free eBook right now.

Thanks,
Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.

subject: Did you miss Sen. Cotton’s email?

body:
I am grateful that Senator Tom Cotton has my back. Now I need to know if you have mine!

Fellow Conservative,

I am grateful that **Senator Tom Cotton** has my back in one of the most consequential Senate races in the country.

[**Now I need to know. Do you have my back?**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=331a3b44912647298be1652e0a03cc91&_e=oqL9jmlqIxIbR_S1px_TXM2_kHl07VQTRMkG3K0oufSeINiIu2pbmpvo3QHtsZob6mQgntQoeBIIFOKZSp5TlatKGXDVwvYMzlaTUB2fdTq9VY3SZYxa_Vea3kUbRzg2ghptIi5ZhUx2RLPv_r4EGj-9jeoVjf2oKm1Apq_NR11Jp833a9j8N4_vqKFX0xAXsUGs7qie1RcimB5qMNegHA7nyU1Kg7RfuzulBgPLwEaC4F3-1-b7ovBPc0G11dOcMSgg-d29li1O4g398pVMdIVB2uEVDn8IJmZTuERJHRsZfUKqk2TeHW1KWBDRt5XmEXtgJgV4vWRajk1tn11uiidvUqB3fAZsOp82k8ZMv3Tur_dM3Yj9fKV4adVpOHD-Xk9vgLdj1yM8fPP6xrIwqoMtYQhRFlq20ab-O_kkoRw%3D)

Eric Hovde
Republican for U.S. Senate

* * *

**FROM:** Tom Cotton
**SENT:** Thursday, May 2, 2024
**TO:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**SUBJECT:** Liberals are afraid

---
| [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=331a3b44912647298be1652e0a03cc91&_e=oqL9jmlqIxIbR_S1px_TXM2_kHl07VQTRMkG3K0oufSeINiIu2pbmpvo3QHtsZob6mQgntQoeBIIFOKZSp5TlatKGXDVwvYMzlaTUB2fdTq9VY3SZYxa_Vea3kUbRzg2ghptIi5ZhUx2RLPv_r4EGj-9jeoVjf2oKm1Apq_NR11Jp833a9j8N4_vqKFX0xAXsUGs7qie1RcimB5qMNegHA7nyU1Kg7RfuzulBgPLwEaC4F3-1-b7ovBPc0G11dOcMSgg-d29li1O4g398pVMdN3iQ50ZIKaOHlWllRPWEDsqOJfeT63kT_5R55lfGJoemlOJ0LBo91bLA9Gqk4Z5l0CsGLFNj8FtR0fv8y0SKBc9omrZbDHiZM7p7tm3ngLg_1OcBeBu5IJUCPjE8sYMpIJlf67An7PXSd6c3VtemY8%3D)

---

Fellow Conservative,

If we’re going to make America strong again, then Republicans _**must**_ take back the U.S. Senate this year. **And we have a strong slate of candidates who can win in November.**

That includes veterans Tim Sheehy (Montana), Dave McCormick (Pennsylvania), and Mike Rogers (Michigan).

It includes successful business leader Eric Hovde, and tough conservative Kari Lake in Arizona.

Liberals should be terrified, and they are. **Just a few days ago, Rachel Maddow went on a 15 minute, unhinged rant attacking all five of these candidates.**

**It’s going to get worse. The Marxist Left and their allies are going to say, spend, and do whatever it takes to stop these Republicans from flipping these five Senate seats.**

| Combating gender transition surgery on minors continues to be a top priority for me in Congress. I've passed legislation that removes funding from children's hospitals that perform this dangerous surgery on minors, and have been strongly outspoken against the ideology on the Energy and Commerce Committee, which has jurisdiction over the healthcare industry and healthcare agencies in the executive branch like the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS). So when Biden's HHS Secretary came before the Energy and Commerce Committee recently, I pressed him on this very topic. You can watch our full exchange in the video above.
Here's the bottom line: Biden's Secretary of Health & Human Services refuses to admit that his department is pushing pseudoscience disguised as healthcare. But healthcare is not 1) affirming a child's temporary ideations about their gender, 2) putting that child on puberty blockers, then hormones, and ultimately surgery. Most Americans and normal people would say that giving a 12-year-old girl a double mastectomy is not ok. If you're going to support transitioning children (which is NUTS), with permanent physiological changes -you better have VERY HIGH-QUALITY evidence. But the Left has no good evidence.
It's all Left-Wing ideology that has infected our medical institutions, including major medical associations and the U.S. Department of Health & Human Services. Dr. Hillary Cass, a former president of the Royal College of Pediatrics and one of the U.K.'s most highly respected pediatricians, was appointed by the National Health Service in England to head an independent review. The final review came out recently, and it pretty much torches the so-called "gender-affirming" approach that the United States has taken and which Biden's HHS promotes.
To quote the review: "The evidence [for puberty blockers, cross sex hormones, and surgery] is weak and clinicians have told us they are unable to determine with any certainty which children and young people will go on to have [gender dysphoria]." -The Cass Review
The key finding from the Cass Review is that, of the more than 100 studies examining the role of puberty blockers and hormone treatment for gender transition, only two were of passable quality. Our peer countries are yelling at the United States to stop mutilating children. And I asked the Secretary a very basic question: whether he would listen. His answer: we rely on medical associations and the best evidence available. He's a mouthpiece for the Radical Left. Gender ideology belongs in the ash heap of history, and that's exactly why I will continue to push my legislation to defund children's hospitals that push this pseudoscience.

| Joe Biden has neither the will nor the competence to make a clear, articulate case to the American people about why it is in our interest to support Ukraine in their war against Russia. He has not given a major address on the war since it started, and has never outlined explicitly why hard American interests are supported by making sure Russia does not march across Ukraine unopposed. Frankly, I don't think Joe Biden is capable of making the case - he is too weak, untrusted, and has absolutely zero ability to communicate - but he nevertheless deserves great credit for his failure to answer this question for the American people: why does the war in Ukraine matter to us?
As I explain in detail in the National Review op-ed which you can read above, our entire way of life depends on a stable and secure world. We take global stability after World War II and the Cold War for granted more than we think. It wasn't too long ago that dictators were emboldened to invade other countries because they had the might, will, and interest to do so. After WWII and the Cold War, when America took a leadership role in preventing that sort of chaos, that largely ceased. We don't want to go back to that chaotic past, especially now.
Like it or not, our way of life here in America depends on a stable world abroad. We are the leaders of an interconnected, global economy - when shocks to the system occur in Europe (especially a country like Ukraine that is a leading producer of sought-after commodities like grain and critical minerals) we feel it here at home. And if the United States steps back from preventing the sort of chaos that disrupts the global economy and order? Then China will step in to take the lead as they are already trying to do, and that is the last thing we want.
I explain more of this in great detail - about why Americans should care about the conflict in Ukraine - in the op-ed and also debunk some myths about the funding package we passed recently. I encourage you to read it in full at the link above.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | == | Peter – Dan Crenshaw here. I continue to sound the alarm against the radical transgender ideology that is infecting our medical institutions, particularly the ideology that is pushing for irreversible gender surgery on minors. I also published two op-eds recently on key topics - combating Chinese fentanyl that is killing Americans and the reason why it is in America's interest to support Ukraine in their war against Russia. As always, donations from committed patriots like you across the country fuel my campaign and I am grateful for your support. As we get closer and closer to the upcoming election, I am turning my full attention to helping Republicans win up and down the ballot - especially in Congress, where we are going to need to fight hard to hold on to our majority in the House. If you are able to donate even a small amount to my campaign, I would greatly appreciate it. Every dollar you send my campaign will be put to immediate use to grow our conservative movement and make sure Republicans are successful electorally this fall. | | | == | Now, here's your brief. | | | | | | | | PRESIDENT BIDEN'S HHS SECRETARY ON CHILD GENDER SURGERIES | | | | == | Combating gender transition surgery on minors continues to be a top priority for me in Congress. I've passed legislation that removes funding from children's hospitals that perform this dangerous surgery on minors, and have been strongly outspoken against the ideology on the Energy and Commerce Committee, which has jurisdiction over the healthcare industry and healthcare agencies in the executive branch like the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS). So when Biden's HHS Secretary came before the Energy and Commerce Committee recently, I pressed him on this very topic. You can watch our full exchange in the video above. Here's the bottom line: Biden's Secretary of Health & Human Services refuses to admit that his department is pushing pseudoscience disguised as healthcare. But healthcare is not 1) affirming a child's temporary ideations about their gender, 2) putting that child on puberty blockers, then hormones, and ultimately surgery. Most Americans and normal people would say that giving a 12-year-old girl a double mastectomy is not ok. If you're going to support transitioning children (which is NUTS), with permanent physiological changes -you better have VERY HIGH-QUALITY evidence. But the Left has no good evidence. It's all Left-Wing ideology that has infected our medical institutions, including major medical associations and the U.S. Department of Health & Human Services. Dr. Hillary Cass, a former president of the Royal College of Pediatrics and one of the U.K.'s most highly respected pediatricians, was appointed by the National Health Service in England to head an independent review. The final review came out recently, and it pretty much torches the so-called "gender-affirming" approach that the United States has taken and which Biden's HHS promotes. To quote the review: "The evidence [for puberty blockers, cross sex hormones, and surgery] is weak and clinicians have told us they are unable to determine with any certainty which children and young people will go on to have [gender dysphoria]." -The Cass Review The key finding from the Cass Review is that, of the more than 100 studies examining the role of puberty blockers and hormone treatment for gender transition, only two were of passable quality. Our peer countries are yelling at the United States to stop mutilating children. And I asked the Secretary a very basic question: whether he would listen. His answer: we rely on medical associations and the best evidence available. He's a mouthpiece for the Radical Left. Gender ideology belongs in the ash heap of history, and that's exactly why I will continue to push my legislation to defund children's hospitals that push this pseudoscience. | | | | | | | | WE NEED MORE TOOLS TO COMBAT FENTANYL FROM CHINA | | == | | | It is common knowledge that China is intimately involved in the fentanyl crisis here in America. The precursors - or basic chemicals - used to manufacture chemicals flow from China to the Mexican drug cartels who then traffick this poison into the United States, killing tens of thousands of Americans every single year. We must put the cartels and Chinese suppliers of fentanyl precursors on notice that we are coming after you. Thanks to my amendment to add narco-traffickers as allowable targets under FISA being signed into law, they can no longer hide. My amendment would simply expand our intelligence collection capabilities to target international drug trafficking networks involved in fentanyl production, distribution and financing. The amendment also equips law enforcement with enhanced tools to disrupt criminal operations at their source, going after the foreign narco-traffickers that are poisoning Americans with deadly fentanyl. The Chinese Communist Party will never seriously act to stop fentanyl flowing to the cartels and into our country, no matter how much they promise otherwise. The United States must take all action necessary to stop the drug traffickers who are perpetuating the fentanyl crisis, and my amendment that was signed into law will do just that. You can read more in my Fox News op-ed in the link above. | | | | | | | | THE CASE PRESIDENT BIDEN FAILED TO MAKE ON UKRAINE | == | == | Joe Biden has neither the will nor the competence to make a clear, articulate case to the American people about why it is in our interest to support Ukraine in their war against Russia. He has not given a major address on the war since it started, and has never outlined explicitly why hard American interests are supported by making sure Russia does not march across Ukraine unopposed. Frankly, I don't think Joe Biden is capable of making the case - he is too weak, untrusted, and has absolutely zero ability to communicate - but he nevertheless deserves great credit for his failure to answer this question for the American people: why does the war in Ukraine matter to us? As I explain in detail in the National Review op-ed which you can read above, our entire way of life depends on a stable and secure world. We take global stability after World War II and the Cold War for granted more than we think. It wasn't too long ago that dictators were emboldened to invade other countries because they had the might, will, and interest to do so. After WWII and the Cold War, when America took a leadership role in preventing that sort of chaos, that largely ceased. We don't want to go back to that chaotic past, especially now. Like it or not, our way of life here in America depends on a stable world abroad. We are the leaders of an interconnected, global economy - when shocks to the system occur in Europe (especially a country like Ukraine that is a leading producer of sought-after commodities like grain and critical minerals) we feel it here at home. And if the United States steps back from preventing the sort of chaos that disrupts the global economy and order? Then China will step in to take the lead as they are already trying to do, and that is the last thing we want. I explain more of this in great detail - about why Americans should care about the conflict in Ukraine - in the op-ed and also debunk some myths about the funding package we passed recently. I encourage you to read it in full at the link above. | | | | | | | | == | ENDEX - my new campaign merch store - is launching very soon. And we're going to sell campaign merch you would actually want to buy! Our first product is the perfect concealed carry option that combines tactical effectiveness with style and comfort. The ENDEX Concealed Carry Pants feature the removable Holster system, giving you a concealed carry holster flawlessly integrated with stylish everyday wear pants. Made from performance stretch twill that moves with you, and featuring moisture-wicking and water-resistant properties, these pants are crafted for the ultimate in everyday use, from the golf course to the gun range. The patented Holster belt features 5 holster positions for compact pistols, 6 magazine holsters, and it can be reversed easily for left-handed shooters. Proudly made in the USA and designed by a US Navy SEAL, these are the ultimate everyday carry pants for every patriot. | | | == | | | | | | | | ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | | | | | | NEWS | == == == | That's it for this week's campaign brief. # ["Dissent should not lead to disorder"](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=144277182&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQ0Mjc3MTgyLCJpYXQiOjE3MTQ3NTMyNTAsImV4cCI6MTcxNzM0NTI1MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4MzQ0OSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.P78cP6i3pnbFBFMP9DUkwPuI5YZTx2JKp-9BMfrZgTM)
### The words written on Biden's 2024 tombstone.
| May 3
---|---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=144277182&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQ0Mjc3MTgyLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTcxNDc1MzI1MCwiZXhwIjoxNzE3MzQ1MjUwLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjgzNDQ5Iiwic3ViIjoicmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.WUVvfTWW7aIdI1YtWsl22A_k_kITEnhDtwrKRaXtROo&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=144277182&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQ0Mjc3MTgyLCJpYXQiOjE3MTQ3NTMyNTAsImV4cCI6MTcxNzM0NTI1MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4MzQ0OSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.P78cP6i3pnbFBFMP9DUkwPuI5YZTx2JKp-9BMfrZgTM&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=144277182&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQ0Mjc3MTgyLCJpYXQiOjE3MTQ3NTMyNTAsImV4cCI6MTcxNzM0NTI1MCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4MzQ0OSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.P78cP6i3pnbFBFMP9DUkwPuI5YZTx2JKp-9BMfrZgTM)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvcmViZWthaGpvbmVzL3AvZGlzc2VudC1zaG91bGQtbm90LWxlYWQtdG8tZGlzb3JkZXI_.TeBadPDk4Dqhe0tkw2Lc-7TStj5BDSLfSUYndVhrY3o?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/rebekahjones/p/dissent-should-not-lead-to-disorder?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store)
---
Just after midnight on May 1, a violent pro-Israel mob attacked UCLA students while they slept on campus, shouting "second [Nakba](https://substack.com/redirect/647de6b2-7e47-46ee-bcd1-85ddf803f649?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" as they beat students and threw fireworks into the protest group, according to the [LA Times ](https://substack.com/redirect/99f11069-e44c-4b0a-af9d-13526a5019f0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)and [video posted online](https://substack.com/redirect/621ec630-ded0-431f-a104-752356c2cad5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Police did not intervene for two hours.
Later that day, Republicans' along with Florida Democrat J[ared Moskowitz, put forward a bill to redefine antisemitism to include any criticism of Israel or Judaism](https://substack.com/redirect/c932c90e-9c00-45da-b1ba-e1198b1c5353?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as a hate crime. HR 6080 passed the United States House 320-91. Free speech advocates and organizations, including the ACLU, [quickly condemned HR 6080](https://substack.com/redirect/3e49a976-b30b-4d67-9983-a7e5f5133f98?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), but both the Senate and the President have shown support for its final passage.
On Thursday, May 2, a UCLA student was hospitalized after being shot by LAPD [at point-blank range with rubber bullets during a police raid of the student group.](https://substack.com/redirect/90a4d631-77f4-47aa-9c0c-3c4fb2c59e01?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) LAPD then [lied about "no serious injuries" resulting from their assault on UCLA](https://substack.com/redirect/d4c132cd-1969-41a3-811f-dab535bab04d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) students.
Hours after the raid, with the nation looking for leadership as college students were being attacked, often violently and with police brutality, President Biden finally spoke.
And may have damaged his re-election campaign beyond repair with a single line: "Dissent should never lead to disorder."
Sound familiar?...

WOW, friend!
Today marks exactly one year since we launched this campaign to defeat Ted Cruz, and I couldn't be more thrilled with how far we've come.
**How it started:** Immediately after we launched this campaign, election experts from FiveThirtyEight to Roll Call UPGRADED our chances of beating Ted Cruz and officially ranked Texas a "battleground."
**How it's going:** After early polls showed us 5 points down, hundreds of thousands of grassroots supporters like you chipped in to help me travel all over Texas to meet voters and spread our message. **Thanks to you, we pulled EVEN with Ted Cruz in the polls.**
**What's next?** Ted Cruz is terrified of our grassroots movement because we're closer than ever to defeating him. But this race is a long way from over, and he's calling all his extremist mega donors and special interest allies to try and squash our momentum. We can't let up for even a second.

clean_body: A lot can happen in a year | | | = WOW, friend! Today marks exactly one year since we launched this campaign to defeat Ted Cruz, and I couldn't be more thrilled with how far we've come. How it started: Immediately after we launched this campaign, election experts from FiveThirtyEight to Roll Call UPGRADED our chances of beating Ted Cruz and officially ranked Texas a "battleground." How it's going: After early polls showed us 5 points down, hundreds of thousands of grassroots supporters like you chipped in to help me travel all over Texas to meet voters and spread our message. Thanks to you, we pulled EVEN with Ted Cruz in the polls. What's next? Ted Cruz is terrified of our grassroots movement because we're closer than ever to defeating him. But this race is a long way from over, and he's calling all his extremist mega donors and special interest allies to try and squash our momentum. We can't let up for even a second. That's why, to celebrate the one year anniversary of our campaign, my team and I set an ambitious goal to raise $300,000 by midnight.= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Colin Allred and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = I never could've made it this far without you. Thanks for being on my team, friend. Colin | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

Peter,__ Many times, principled conservatives go to Washington with the intent of doing good work and representing the ideas of liberty and the Constitution. **But when all is said and done, very few**** _actually_****put our God-given rights above political parties and Swamp interests. **
I’m proud to say that I ALWAYS fight for what I believe is right, even when it’s not politically expedient or convenient.
I’m willing to say what needs to be said, to draw a line in the sand when push comes to shove – and I’m happy to say that my friend, Mike Lee, does exactly the same thing.

clean_body: We can’t continue down this path, Peter, especially when so-called “conservatives”... | | | Please see a note from our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe, please visit this Peter, Many times, principled conservatives go to Washington with the intent of doing good work and representing the ideas of liberty and the Constitution. But when all is said and done, very few actuallyput our God-given rights above political parties and Swamp interests. I’m proud to say that I ALWAYS fight for what I believe is right, even when it’s not politically expedient or convenient. I’m willing to say what needs to be said, to draw a line in the sand when push comes to shove – and I’m happy to say that my friend, Mike Lee, does exactly the same thing. | | Peter, when “conservatives” and Democrats pushed for FISA spying without warrants, Mike and I sounded the alarm bell! We constantly warned grassroots conservatives and libertarians like you about the dangers of allowing Big Government to trample on our 4th Amendment rights... because once Big Government bureaucrats take your rights, they NEVER give them back. And when it came time to pass billions and billions of dollars in aid to Ukraine, so-called “conservatives” once again stood with Democrats to send YOUR hard-earned tax dollars overseas. Peter, there’s NOTHING fiscally conservative about borrowing money from China to send to Ukraine while adding $1.5 TRILLION to our national debt every three months! Mike and I drew the line in the sand and said we need to focus on OUR borders before we focus on Ukraine’s borders. We said we need to tackle our national debt and cut spending, NOT add to it. Here’s what’s crazy, Peter. The ink isn’t even dry on the latest $61 billion Ukraine aid package, and Swamp creatures are always working on a “security agreement” (AKA a bloated Big Government spending bill) that will fund Ukraine for the next 10 YEARS!** Peter, Mike and I are fighting every single day to SAVE our Constitutionally-protected rights and rein in wasteful spending. name: Wes Moore
subject: Thank you, friend.
body:
Friend, it’s Wes.

I want to start by saying thank you.

Thank you to this team for all the support you have given us and for contributing what you could to help us reach our fundraising goals.

Thanks to your grassroots support, we can show that we have what it takes to achieve big things for Marylanders.
This movement is for all of us — for all of us to dream about a better future for our children and create a better present now. We’re taking those dreams, and turning them into reality by making Maryland the best state in the country.

We’re leading the way, and I have no doubt that this will be Maryland’s decade.

As we plan ahead, we want to start May on a strong note. Will you make a contribution of $5 or more right now so we can start the month with strong fundraising numbers? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20240503-1?refcode=em20240503]

I am so grateful for your support.

Elevate,
Wes

---

body:
I’m running to restore a woman’s right to make her own reproductive health choices.

[|
---](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/5fx1XEuLqn32wp5QSCfPAQ~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRoF5aqP0QhaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubW9yc2Vmb3Jjb25ncmVzcy5jb20vVwNzcGNCCmYzwxE1ZsgCUgVSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAt)
| | Peter, **Yesterday marked two years since we collectively realized the Supreme Court would overturn _Roe v. Wade_ and roll back nearly 50 years of reproductive freedom for women across the country.** **On May 2, 2022** _Politico_ published a leaked draft majority opinion, authored by Justice Samuel Alito, of the _Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health Organization_ decision by the U.S. Supreme Court. In a 6-3 decision, the Supreme Court officially rejected women’s reproductive freedom on June 24, 2022. In the years that followed, some states, like California, shored up reproductive rights by enshrining this fundamental health care right into our constitution. However, 26 other states passed abortion bans. The impact has been heart-wrenching. A ten year old girl in Ohio had to travel across state lines to terminate the pregnancy from her rapist; a mother in Texas was court-ordered to carry a terminal and high-risk pregnancy; a woman in Ohio was jailed for having a miscarriage at home. **These highly traumatic cases and their cruelty are getting national attention.** But there are thousands of cases that are unseen. Cases where women aren’t getting the basic health care they need, are suffering emotional and physical damage and for some inexplicable reason, politicians are weighing in on how and when they should have a baby. The 26 states that passed abortion bans and restrictions have a _3 times higher_ rate of maternal mortality and a 30% increase in infant mortality compared to states that have protected reproductive rights. In 2022, Kiley promised Californians that the Dobbs decision was a “States Rights” issue and he wouldn’t jeopardize the constitutionally protected health care of California women. But months into his term in Congress, he voted for a national abortion ban. Since then he’s been supporting the “Life at Conception Act” – **a law that would not only ban abortion at any time, but would also _functionally ban IVF and criminalize miscarriages._** Kiley is perfectly willing to overwrite the constitutional protections and freedoms of California women. [**And that’s why I’m running for California’s 3rd Congressional District, Peter.**](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/4cd772hmW2v2ffCkk92YyA~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRoF5aqP0TXaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL0pNQ0EtMDMtRW1haWwtTWF5MjAyNC1GUi1NYXk_cmVmY29kZT1FODI5NC0yMDI0MDUwMi1Qb2xpdGljb0xlYWtBbm5pdmVyc2FyeSZyZWZjb2RlTm1yb0JtaWQ9MjA1MTg0NTIzJnJlZmNvZGU9RTgyOTQtMjAyNDA1MDItUG9saXRpY29MZWFrQW5uaXZlcnNhcnktU0wtQWJvcnRpb25SZXByb1JpZ2h0cyZhbW91bnQ9MjVXA3NwY0IKZjPDETVmyAJSBVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAC0~) | | [DONATE](http://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/Z4qMNaspZGUegNYoL_f33w~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRoF5aqP0ThaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL0pNQ0EtMDMtRW1haWwtTWF5MjAyNC1GUi1NYXk_cmVmY29kZT1FODI5NC0yMDI0MDUwMi1Qb2xpdGljb0xlYWtBbm5pdmVyc2FyeSZyZWZjb2RlTm1yb0JtaWQ9MjA1MTg0NTIzJnJlZmNvZGU9RTgyOTQtMjAyNDA1MDItUG9saXRpY29MZWFrQW5uaXZlcnNhcnktU0ItQWJvcnRpb25SZXByb1JpZ2h0cyZhbW91bnQ9MjUmYW1vdW50PTI1VwNzcGNCCmYzwxE1ZsgCUgVSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAt)

Since then he’s been supporting the “Life at Conception Act” – a law that would not only ban abortion at any time, but would also functionally ban IVF and criminalize miscarriages. Kiley is perfectly willing to overwrite the constitutional protections and freedoms of California women. ~ | | I’m running to restore a woman’s right to make her own reproductive health choices. And I’ll ensure that Kevin Kiley doesn’t have a seat at your dining table when making your own health care decisions. Peter, I need your help to send Kiley packing in November and to restore reproductive freedom nationwide.~ | ~ ~ ~ ~ Together, we can safeguard the future of women and girls. Join me, Jessica | | | ~~ ---|---|--- Email is one of the most important ways we communicate with our supporters, but if you'd like, you can opt to get just the most important~! | Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress. Jessica Morse for Congress1079 Sunrise AveSuite B 275Roseville, CA 95661United States "Website"

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: This is the news we’ve been waiting for, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
Abortion is going on the ballot in Missouri this year.
#
There’s huge news coming out of Missouri this morning, Peter.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/49478?refcode=em20240503-5430&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5430%2E614464%2Elh4ZD_)

**This is a game changer for our U.S. Senate race here in Missouri.** Just as we’ve seen in states across the country, voters turn out in droves to protect their freedom.

In Missouri, we’re all too familiar with Big Brother politicians trying to control us. That’s why people in this state have banded together to take back power at the ballot box — raising the minimum wage, legalizing weed, expanding Medicaid, and repealing an anti-union 'Right-to-Work' law, all by huge margins since 2018.
Now in Josh Hawley’s first election since leading the charge to overturn Roe — which made Missouri the first state in the nation to enact an extreme no-exception abortion ban — he’s going to see what voters think about Big Brother politicians. **And if recent election wins for abortion rights in red states like Kansas, Kentucky, and Ohio have proven anything, it’s that Josh Hawley should be afraid.**
This year, we’ll have a chance to end Missouri’s extreme abortion ban and hold Josh Hawley accountable for making it happen. But we need your help to get it done.
**[So Peter, will you help us keep up this momentum by rushing a donation of any amount — even just $3 — to my grassroots campaign today? name: Sheldon Whitehouse
subject: I want you to be the first to hear the news
body:
I hope you’ll consider supporting my campaign
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta272b65c-329f-4ff5-a7ac-62e2660d97e7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| | | Peter, Standing up for Rhode Islanders, to protect our beautiful state and everyone who lives here, is the reason I got into public service. Fighting for the Ocean State in the Senate is an honor, and I work hard to deliver results for Rhode Islanders and Americans every single day. **That’s why today I’m excited to share with you that I’m officially running for re-election in Rhode Island for the United States Senate.** [**Will you split a $25 donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action to help me win and defend our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3e3f779c-14be-4bbb-ae8e-d2ad393701b3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I’ve worked tirelessly to make health care affordable and accessible, lower the cost of prescription drugs, take on corporate greed, bring the climate fight right to the big oil companies, shine a light on corruption at the Supreme Court, protect access to abortion, and stand up for American democracy. That’s a lot, but I’m proud of it; as Nancy Pelosi said: “Persistent. Relentless.” But this year, democracy itself is on the ballot. And as the chief antagonist of the dark money groups trying to bend democracy to their will, I need your help to win this thing. If you send me back to the Senate this year, I won’t stop fighting to make our government and economy work for all Americans. I’ll tackle climate change before it’s too late. I’ll defend democracy and freedom here at home and abroad. I’ll fight to put a real check on corporate power. And I’ll make sure the highest earners finally start paying their fair share. [**So I’m personally asking, Peter, will you split $25 between me and Blue Amp Action to help me reach my re-election launch fundraising goal, win in Rhode Island, and keep the Senate blue?** ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf12a31ee-dcd8-47ae-a2da-814070672865/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for all of your support. I could not do this without it. – Sheldon Whitehouse
---
| | | | [DONATE](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb03a8ef9-4b17-40c5-be89-53e7258e97b2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/yyz_90do_whitehouse_24050316?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5e55bf19-2897-4403-b4f8-e019853f9401/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=2d162518-b5f7-41c0-9007-d6f837732140&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=2d162518-b5f7-41c0-9007-d6f837732140&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: VoteVets.org
subject: Increased importance
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
According to a Time Magazine interview with Donald Trump, he said whether or not there is political violence after November, "depends on the fairness of an election."
#
Derek,
The reason we ask for donations is because VoteVets is the most effective outside spending organization on the Democratic side.
We reach moderates, independents, and even Republicans in ways other groups can't. And we can do it in the places we need to win in order to keep Trump out of the White House.
We're the ones who will help Joe Biden keep the margins close in red parts of Wisconsin, Michigan, Pennsylvania, and Arizona — so he can win those states.
Today, we're asking with increasing importance.
According to a Time Magazine interview with Donald Trump, he said whether or not there is political violence after November, "depends on the fairness of an election."
The truth is, we must not only defeat Trump but we must beat him decisively. He is not a man who cares about this democracy. He will tear this country to pieces to advance his personal interests.
VoteVets has an absolutely essential role in making sure we beat Trump. Essential.
And we are powered by donations from people like you who care enough about the outcome to make a difference. But that means we have to ask:
[**Please use this link to power our campaign to defeat Donald Trump with a well-timed $5 donation today. We all have a role to play in protecting our democracy and we hope you see this as a way you can make a difference.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-may24.RUuZX0&refcode=em240503-1-30&t=1&akid=25088%2E3013755%2EKc5lBt)**

name: Kari Lake
subject: FWD: Shocked when I heard the news!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kari Lake for Senate
body:
See Attached

|
---
| Is everything ok?

If you've already responded and our emails crossed in cyberspace - then I'm sorry for any confusion.

**However, my team informed me that only the next 27 donors will have their contribution matched.**

_This is a big deal_.

So, I'm going to ask you just one more time: **[Will you make an emergency $25 donation ASAP?](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=d39957764b2f4101ace02a52010c31cc&_e=fcSLRUbjnDSe46zSPZoXrq__EL2ajcKzl1UU1M8YvARMS8rUeNF6XaMPvjW5zYa-g0D36YMfE3ujN3CP941lr5tkKr8FufmW7ZpL4H7QRDq-f9JEtfTcLCGYI744Q_K7da4dhUllaiJR-uhdaZjO27ge9x1_TcvqwAQE1XFa9u5YB_NOoO63S396Eiqtusr_Zm5KsQHuGKiZq_VmTYwIurv5hwKTKU4Wj43GG65VlHr8OvPaPofAz5GZwNON_wJOXO8kCwgg07Kqz1FHHNgaaajjyj-FMoXtjmLsctmKxUPwTyA7u51lr1RMREd1TfQKdmnRHEXBezPtR0Cc6lR0iDFo-AZEUm9uV06DaI8BuMhUAEejj1ATi3F_cnrqM0pjYp8akA0GIghdrVA5PJORgQ%3D%3D)**

Through the special link in this email, it'll be a DOUBLE impact!

God bless,

\- Kari

Sent from my iPhone

Kari Lake wrote:
---

FEC decision completely changed the landscape of American politics -- it opened the door for billionaires, corporations, and special interests to spend unlimited, untraceable money to influence our elections. Fellow Conservative,

If we’re going to make America strong again, then Republicans _**must**_ take back the U.S. Senate this year. **And we have a strong slate of candidates who can win in November.**

That includes veterans Tim Sheehy (Montana), Dave McCormick (Pennsylvania), and Mike Rogers (Michigan).

It includes successful business leader Eric Hovde, and tough conservative Kari Lake in Arizona.

Liberals should be terrified, and they are. **Just a few days ago, Rachel Maddow went on a 15 minute, unhinged rant attacking all five of these candidates.**

**It’s going to get worse. The Marxist Left and their allies are going to say, spend, and do whatever it takes to stop these Republicans from flipping these five Senate seats.**

[**That’s why I’m coming to you for help. Will you split a donation between our campaigns now? Every dollar will help us flip these five Senate seats.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=71b40925ac044e4ab72c17a8dac2c0f7&_e=KrBkmrgjdX12Vb5JocTwkaBR90FSoHJCPkka2JBuSV4F2IMYjIYWf57qOaczkBUblDmVJiq1ym_f_W2ktnu-B_T2LbXrbFDQCS6Y-0404ZNg1xczjrMa8oIyFNfpxb-kk9PoDX0IdgU_G_uGkBmPbE-ahlc82hwdqemDom8xQm8HAIh8DuC8Pf1J6gfJN0IXo334F2z9PEBFR8-ezwzxqHNI2Lsxln1YS6MtcnHAPuC1AR9Mwly82yFddRelibBFPwBTO6FV8hQZCE8pFHFu437ZBAzGTZgmoA9NH4cAhTKSRQIMjZl5yNeGvJZn9MxRVjj1oFV78WH-eYsZ8WAUXTfcxluRZV5X44Hqo7nHC2XK0gEW9evwxZDlKAH2ZgRaDSMnJSRqWmvZ3QeuS9fS-SMAkY0TYMd1SLCKGnoQVhs%3D)

One of the biggest reasons the **red wave** never arrived in 2022 is because Republicans weren’t able to match the Democrats’ small dollar fundraising advantage.

That meant that our candidates didn’t always have the means to reach voters with the truth, and to set the record straight about these lies and unhinged rants.

I refuse to let it happen this time, because if we don’t win in November, we’re done.

| **MEET ERIC**

Eric's a fourth-generation Wisconsinite, born and raised in the Madison area. He's a serial entrepreneur. He founded and managed his first business in his twenties and then went on to start and build many others.

clean_body: I am grateful that Senator Tom Cotton has my back. Now I need to know if you have mine! Fellow Conservative, I am grateful that Senator Tom Cotton has my back in one of the most consequential Senate races in the country. Sincerely, Eric Hovde Republican for U.S. Senate FROM: Tom Cotton SENT: Thursday, May 2, 2024 TO: dpwillis67@gmail.com SUBJECT: Liberals are afraid | Fellow Conservative, If we’re going to make America strong again, then Republicans must take back the U.S. Senate this year. And we have a strong slate of candidates who can win in November. That includes veterans Tim Sheehy (Montana), Dave McCormick (Pennsylvania), and Mike Rogers (Michigan). It includes successful business leader Eric Hovde, and tough conservative Kari Lake in Arizona. Liberals should be terrified, and they are. Just a few days ago, Rachel Maddow went on a 15 minute, unhinged rant attacking all five of these candidates. It’s going to get worse. The Marxist Left and their allies are going to say, spend, and do whatever it takes to stop these Republicans from flipping these five Senate seats. | One of the biggest reasons the red wave never arrived in 2022 is because Republicans weren’t able to match the Democrats’ small dollar fundraising advantage. That meant that our candidates didn’t always have the means to reach voters with the truth, and to set the record straight about these lies and unhinged rants. I refuse to let it happen this time, because if we don’t win in November, we’re done. In Service, Tom Cotton | MEET ERIC Eric's a fourth-generation Wisconsinite, born and raised in the Madison area. He's a serial entrepreneur. He founded and managed his first business in his twenties and then went on to start and build many others. When he is not running his businesses, he is focused on his family and his philanthropic endeavors. He and his brother Steve operate 10 Hovde Homes around the world that provide shelter, supportive services and love to vulnerable children. Join the Conversation:** | Paid for by Hovde for Wisconsin

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Trump said he’ll let states prosecute abortion patients
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Since the federal right to safe, legal abortion was eliminated by the
far-right Supreme Court’s decision to overturn Roe v. Wade in 2022, the
negative impacts have only worsened across the country.

This week, Florida’s six-week abortion ban went into effect, severely
limiting abortion access across most of the southern states. Just look at
this map from The New York Times showing the distance to a clinic that
offers abortions after 6 weeks in 2021 compared to today:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240503.ze_R0F&refcode=em20240503-34617&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1001&akid=34617%2E1203867%2EDdacof ]Graphic that shows miles to nearest clinic offering abortions after 6
weeks in 2021 versus May 2024 across the southern United States.

Source: Abortion Access Front / The New York Times

It gets worse: if Donald Trump is elected president again, he said it’s up
to the states to decide whether or not to prosecute people who get
abortions.

Our right to bodily autonomy and reproductive freedom continues to be
eroded by Republicans, which is why we can’t afford to lose a single
progressive incumbent from Congress this year.

Justice Democrats candidates like Cori Bush and Jamaal Bowman are being
challenged by so-called Democrats bankrolled by AIPAC’s super PACs, which
are funded by anti-abortion, pro-Trump megadonors.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240503.ze_R0F&refcode=em20240503-34617&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1002&akid=34617%2E1203867%2EDdacof ]We can’t let abortion rights champions like Cori and Jamaal lose their
seats in this summer’s primary elections. If you can, support Justice
Democrats with a grassroots contribution today to fuel our fight to
re-elect them →

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240503.ze_R0F&refcode=em20240503-34617&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1021&akid=34617%2E1203867%2EDdacof ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240503-34617-footer&t=1022&refcode2=34617_1203867_Ddacof&akid=34617%2E1203867%2EDdacof
