Just look at this map from The New York Times showing the distance to a clinic that offers abortions after 6 weeks in 2021 compared to today: [ ]Graphic that shows miles to nearest clinic offering abortions after 6 weeks in 2021 versus May 2024 across the southern United States. Source: Abortion Access Front / The New York Times It gets worse: if Donald Trump is elected president again, he said it’s up to the states to decide whether or not to prosecute people who get abortions. Our right to bodily autonomy and reproductive freedom continues to be eroded by Republicans, which is why we can’t afford to lose a single progressive incumbent from Congress this year. Justice Democrats candidates like Cori Bush and Jamaal Bowman are being challenged by so-called Democrats bankrolled by AIPAC’s super PACs, which are funded by anti-abortion, pro-Trump megadonors. [ ]We can’t let abortion rights champions like Cori and Jamaal lose their seats in this summer’s primary elections. If you can, support Justice Democrats with a grassroots contribution today to fuel our fight to re-elect them → [ ]Contribute $5 In solidarity, Justice Democrats Contribute to Justice Democrats:

name: Senator John N. Kennedy
subject: Can you handle the truth? I think you can.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This might be a tough pill to swallow, but I'd rather drink weed killer than sugarcoat the truth.

| |

---
| | | Today, I want to talk to you about the truth.

The unadorned, unvarnished truth.

The truth is important.

_Without the truth, we cannot order society.
Without the truth, we cannot survive as human beings.
Without the truth, we cannot thrive as human beings. _

_**[Can you handle the truth? I think you can.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=213a338f110f48c59d1b66ee7846e8b3&_e=W6wKHLD_K36ebfxs2J4wtQnmxNcxI5A5WdsdNH9_xSEiQyOhCS29f0P_qfZ1Oq0TCVGSsG0rfZIxiQtVKjyeejHe6CT3Sc3qjr7M7RU-P7yZjLzx7SFCPK-5_ShyToxw6nPwHGZLJ5nv0IarFK2a4KmxPRNjKfwHeg1mbZ7zC2_BOPWFFfaxXnKHu4DurIJaffZhr404emtwKNqfZNOXDrez7A4fX5Up1IBIUHR2wQQqp2ctvP_RTEpq9K92NrfO2jrH_oof18Il_jr3QTS3BQUZ-jrn8kNQ1c66Y1lZI1rnXQ59Fz9qtKilZZyhitf6RU4MUK8VM4L5LRw270QabJlR3FybINDiakqNftdsKM_NAwOfVOuMET_dNAh-PCItrH8KUFBb3c12NelAyHE2pNxWgaXv-x7znDJkOqsfWMuPYpyvFGoMtSH8Ta3ojhoUFS032yzve2LBL1i7xkvBHU_nko6j15s5Tlzyep_-huY%3D "Can you handle the truth? I think you can.")**_

The truth is, I think it's important to speak your mind. So I do. Now, that makes some people mad, but I try not to worry too much about what anyone thinks of me.

This might be a tough pill to swallow, but I'd rather drink weed killer than sugarcoat the truth.

**So here 's the truth:** The Democrats are doing EVERYTHING in their power to destroy our country. Whether it's leaving our borders wide open for terrorists and illicit drugs to flow through, attacking parental rights, or outrageous government spending, they will do whatever it takes to undermine the foundations of America. It all goes back to the SPECTACULARLY awful job Joe Biden has done with America.

**Here 's the solution:** We must DEFEAT the Democrats at _**every level**_ of government. This will be the only way we can stop the Democrats' woke agenda and put America back on the path to prosperity.

**Here 's how we'll WIN: **This all starts with YOU, Friend. I am working alongside Majority Leader Scalise to personally ask you to put your money where your mouth is and help House Republicans beat the Democrats. They were outraised last quarter by $7M, so we cannot afford for a single patriot to sideline themselves.

_**[Can I personally ask you to make a secure online contribution to this fight for the truth? I am only asking for $12 right here, right now.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=213a338f110f48c59d1b66ee7846e8b3&_e=W6wKHLD_K36ebfxs2J4wtQnmxNcxI5A5WdsdNH9_xSEiQyOhCS29f0P_qfZ1Oq0TCVGSsG0rfZIxiQtVKjyeejHe6CT3Sc3qjr7M7RU-P7yZjLzx7SFCPK-5_ShyToxwc2frBgoJTpp4x1XE8hMDSj4XARZWESweuP4220gXygbCN1kFIhE4CCKEtO6pioaFv8PgfcWvkm57hICa95vNWfRoRsBKCAyFYAwAGlfeztxWHjJh19kGdgIjA1Wc9iKNghi5NESYoC_wtbQ3kYytWIsevoWhvjLLSz0k0-_enBtRO823MLrnF6ebAEpuTkHFgfgpxKwIWW3-EBCeX5w1gp8RF9AoHJZXs9ZnseU8tr4UD8WVw2202AzI_AlnIflrbbG1UCEcZzhPubXfqwgWUBQc_j3qomBoYz5bfYBFdiUAx_pv9bp8nlZvWDMJ9ZcwKJqMwWZz2uOhqIcU_NXU_TVosnUpeJxIPrCdOGd4viM%3D "Can I personally ask you to make a secure online contribution to this fight for the truth? The truth is important. Without the truth, we cannot order society. Without the truth, we cannot survive as human beings. Without the truth, we cannot thrive as human beings. "Can you handle the truth? I think you can." The truth is, I think it's important to speak your mind. So I do. Now, that makes some people mad, but I try not to worry too much about what anyone thinks of me. This might be a tough pill to swallow, but I'd rather drink weed killer than sugarcoat the truth. So here 's the truth: The Democrats are doing EVERYTHING in their power to destroy our country. Whether it's leaving our borders wide open for terrorists and illicit drugs to flow through, attacking parental rights, or outrageous government spending, they will do whatever it takes to undermine the foundations of America. It all goes back to the SPECTACULARLY awful job Joe Biden has done with America. Here 's the solution: We must DEFEAT the Democrats at every level of government. This will be the only way we can stop the Democrats' woke agenda and put America back on the path to prosperity. Here 's how we'll WIN: This all starts with YOU, Friend. I am working alongside Majority Leader Scalise to personally ask you to put your money where your mouth is and help House Republicans beat the Democrats. Hey team,
First, I want to say thank you.
Thanks to the resounding response from our grassroots supporters, we were able to hit our end-of-month goal for April and then some! I’m not exaggerating when I say **your support means everything in this fight for our future.**
But enough about asking for money. **I want to hear directly from you!**
I love grabbing coffee with young voters and hearing from them about what a brighter future can look like.

name: The Team at No Dem Left Behind
subject: Thank you, your support has been the lifeblood of this work.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC
body:
Winning the rural vote is going to be more critical than ever in 2024.
---
| | | |
---
| | | |
---
| |
## This is to thank you for your support!
---
In recent years, we have witnessed the growing importance of rural voters in shaping the political landscape.
---
---
Now, more than ever, it is clear that the key to breaking Trump's stronghold lies in turning rural areas blue. Our mission is to ensure that the voices of rural Americans are not only heard but amplified in the upcoming election. Your support is critical in achieving this goal. By investing in rural Democrats, we can create a powerful force that challenges the status quo and revitalizes the Democratic base. Here's why your contribution matters:
* **Key Swing States:** Rural voters make up a significant portion of the electorate, and their influence cannot be understated. Arizona, Florida, Georgia, Michigan, North Carolina, and Pennsylvania all contain critical rural constituents who we need to vote blue in 2024.
* **Diversifying Representation:** Empowering rural Democrats means promoting diversity in our political leadership. By breaking through in traditionally red territories, we can reimagine the Democratic party as the party of the rural voter.
* **Rural Issues:** Democratic issues such as reproductive rights, preserving our environment, and fair wages for blue collar workers are rural issues! We want to amplify Democratic voices in rural districts.
* **Strategic Impact:** Your high-dollar contribution will directly fund grassroots campaigns, outreach efforts, and community initiatives in rural areas. This targeted approach will maximize our impact and increase the chances of success in key battlegrounds.

Now is the time to act. We have a unique opportunity in 2024 to reshape the political landscape and create a more united and equitable future. Your support will be a driving force behind this movement. [**Please consider making a generous donation to No Dem Left Behind today. Together, we can turn the tide, break Trump's stronghold, and pave the way for a brighter future for all Americans.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ndlbwinningruralamerica?refcode=high)
---
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Doug White
subject: Yakima City Council's Tomfoolery: The Story of Spencer and Leslie Hatton
body:
Too many voices are dismissed by election cycle politics, especially in Central Washington.
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/fdOy-P_w5/c?w=jKjtcYgNxopGRaEIFv7eL5VBG6065EkzMbW-B-pRn9k.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucnVyYWxhbWVyaWNhbnN1bml0ZWQub3JnL3NvL2ZkT3ktUF93NT9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjI3N2U3ZjRhLTAwZTMtNDhmYy1iYjk3LTY1NGIzZmEzNzRhOCJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| |
# In This Newsletter

1. Why I Am Not Running
2. Voices Unheard: Empowering Change with Rural Americans United
3. The work must be done by us
4. Celebrating Heroes: Candidates Making a Difference in Central and Eastern Washington
5. Presidential Immunity: A Supreme or Kangaroo Court? Watch the Video
6. Yakima City Council's Tomfoolery: The Story of Spencer and Leslie Hatton In the next newsletter: Optimism With Rural Voter Registration Data, Dominick Bonny and Christian Patriotism, Federal Funding Floods Central and Eastern Washington, H2a visa workers unionize and more!

---
| | |
---
| | 1\. Why I Am Not Running
---
| | In LD14, we have Chelsea Dimas and Raul Martinez running for Representative, Maria Beltran for Senate. In LD4, Miguel Valencia is running for Senate, Natasha Hill in LD3 for Representative, and Maria Keethler for Senate in LD17. Additionally, Terri Niles is running for Representative in LD17, while several candidates are running for the CD5 House and Maria Perez for the CD3 House. These races all have special circumstances, whether it's due to redistricting, open seats, or incumbent factors, making them particularly impactful. While there are many local races of importance, these State and Federal races carry significant visibility, especially for Central and Eastern Washington. It's a simple truth that Democrats need victories more than just candidates. Over the next few newsletters, I'll delve into the facts behind this statement. While it's my opinion, it's grounded in both heuristic and empirical research, which supports the efforts of Rural Americans United for change. Campaigns are centered around candidates and consume vast resources. But if there's no political infrastructure to absorb the lessons learned after the campaign — including trained resources, media connections, donor connections, and constituent information — much of the excitement and hope built up during the campaign is lost. This loss is evident in the data; Democrats often lose in Central and Eastern Washington, resulting in ever fewer votes and donations, and a rightward shift in the region. Every Democrat running for office is a hero, improving life for all of us. However, the future success of the Democratic party will be measured less by how many candidates run, and more by how many win. While Central and Eastern Washington may soon demonstrate its presence by the number of candidates it puts forward, for now, ensuring that a few candidates win is paramount.
---
| | |
---
| | 2\. Voices Unheard: Empowering Change with Rural Americans United
---
| | Rural Americans United is focusing on the unheard voices. Our pro-Democratic values messaging campaign has delivered over twenty million radio impressions since last October, but we aim to do even better. Too many voices are dismissed by election cycle politics, especially in Central Washington. This includes Latinx, Indigenous, youth, and increasingly disenfranchised white communities that make up the working class. How do we know we are overlooked? National polls may state that youth favor Biden, but our voting records show our youth voting 3:1 in favor of Trump so we know they didn’t ask us. When national polls show a strong Latinx turnout for Dems, but our Latinx population's voter turnout remains troublingly low, we know they did not ask us. When the national polls fail to reflect Indigenous persons, we know they did not ask us. We will continue our pro-Democratic values messaging, but going forward, we will employ a proven methodology that utilizes media, which provides us ways to measure responses and better target the unheard populations; many dialogs with many different approaches. Using tools such as social media and direct communication technology to understand what these disenfranchised, low voter turnout populations care about. If we truly care about our communities, we need to understand them better. Relying on opinion, supposition, hubris, or other people’s polling does not demonstrate the respect these people deserve. This is a first-of-its-kind effort in Central and Eastern Washington. Rural Americans United is reaching out to interested partners to bring together local organizations, data analysts, communication, and production specialists to create a super team. We are well underway. The information we expect to gather will be eye-opening and hopefully shine light on the many unanswered questions as to why engaging these low voter turnout populations remains a challenge. This work won’t be done by outside parties because they do not see the value in our communities as we do.
---
| | |
---
| | 3\. The work must be done by us, and it takes money. We need your support. Please invest in your, in our future
---
| | [](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/fdOy-P_w5/c?w=1Ch8NRXtGuZLHWZBSqd47iwRbhKvsHnr8oxn8mc3O48.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL25ld3NsZXR0ZXItYXByaWwtMjAyNCIsInIiOiIzOWY4OGU2OS1mMGNlLTRlZDktODk0YS1mYTU5Y2M3NDEwMjkiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyNzdlN2Y0YS0wMGUzLTQ4ZmMtYmI5Ny02NTRiM2ZhMzc0YTgifQ)
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | |
---

---
| |
---
|
---

|
---
| | |
---
| | 5\. Presidential Immunity: A Supreme or Kangaroo Court? Watch the Video
---
| | Arguably the most important court case in our nation's history is unfolding. The Supreme Court's duty is to interpret and adapt our Constitution to the modern era. But this time, it feels different. It's as if they're standing alongside our forefathers, crafting the Constitution anew, albeit two hundred years later. Yet, the impact remains just as profound. Their decision will shape whether we continue as a government of, by, and for the people or veer towards autocracy. Watch the video of the Supreme Court hearing. Warning: what you'll hear is deeply troubling.
---
| | [](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/fdOy-P_w5/c?w=k10L0ARNz-jMp88aA5BUQi5gpZACr8Op5kgGGhRWHUU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucnVyYWxhbWVyaWNhbnN1bml0ZWQub3JnL3NvL2ZkT3ktUF93NT9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsInIiOiI0ZGY2YTlmOS1mYTdkLTRiMzQtODE0OS03NjQ5ZTM1NDhiOGQiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyNzdlN2Y0YS0wMGUzLTQ4ZmMtYmI5Ny02NTRiM2ZhMzc0YTgifQ)
---
| | |
---
| | 6\. Yakima City Council's Tomfoolery: The Story of Spencer and Leslie Hatton
---
| | A letter to the Yakima City Council regarding the council's sandbagging of the petition drive (see previous blogs). Reprinted with permission from Spencer and Leslie Hatton. "Yakima City Council moved the goalposts when it realized Yakima voters raised enough petition signatures to block ordinances eliminating or demoting 5 citizen advisory committees. In Yakima, we have the right to stop misguided city ordinances and send them to a popular vote by filing petitions with a certain number of voter signatures. After the County Auditor certified the number of voter signatures needed was 804, more than 1,200 petition signatures were filed to block City Council from eliminating the Sustainable Yakima & Community Integration Committees and degrading the Bicycle/Pedestrian Committee, Tree Board, and Historic Preservation Committees. Another option the City Council could take immediately is to repeal the ordinances, thereby restoring the committees to their previous official city status. One week after sufficient petition signatures were filed, City Council hatched a plan to retroactively raise the signature threshold from 804 to 1,258. How did they do that? The City asked the County Auditor to add the number of city residents who voted only in the Yakima School Board and the West Valley School Board races, but did not vote in the city council elections for Districts 1, 3, 5, and 7. The Auditor’s Office noted in writing to the City of Yakima that the city was only billed for conducting an election in those four districts, and not for the elections for the Yakima School Board and West Valley School Board elections. Those school boards paid separately for their own elections. Furthermore, in a phone call to the Washington Secretary of State, officials there noted that school district elections “have nothing to do with” city government elections because school districts are independent legal entities with separate taxing authority from city government, even though there may be some geographic overlap between the school district boundaries and the city boundaries. Within two days after this plan was exposed, voters collected an additional 179 signatures, as allowed under state law, to now have over 1,400 petition signatures. City Council responded by directing City Manager Zabell to publicly reject additional voter signatures and set the goalposts high enough to disenfranchise more than 1,400 Yakima voters. Please do the right thing. If not, it will likely be necessary to file a lawsuit to stop these City Hall misguided actions."
---

If we truly care about our communities, we need to understand them better. Relying on opinion, supposition, hubris, or other people’s polling does not demonstrate the respect these people deserve. This is a first-of-its-kind effort in Central and Eastern Washington. Rural Americans United is reaching out to interested partners to bring together local organizations, data analysts, communication, and production specialists to create a super team. We are well underway. The information we expect to gather will be eye-opening and hopefully shine light on the many unanswered questions as to why engaging these low voter turnout populations remains a challenge. This work won’t be done by outside parties because they do not see the value in our communities as we do. | | | | | 3\. The work must be done by us, and it takes money. We need your support. Please invest in your, in our future | | | | | | | | | | | | 4\. Celebrating Heroes: Candidates Making a Difference in Central and Eastern Washington | | | | | Top: Terri Niles LD17 Rep, Miguel Valencia LD4 SenateBottom: Maria Keethler LD17 Senate, Natasha Hill LD3 Rep, Raul Martinez LD14 Rep | | | | | | | | | 5\. Presidential Immunity: A Supreme or Kangaroo Court? Watch the Video | | Arguably the most important court case in our nation's history is unfolding. The Supreme Court's duty is to interpret and adapt our Constitution to the modern era. But this time, it feels different. It's as if they're standing alongside our forefathers, crafting the Constitution anew, albeit two hundred years later. Yet, the impact remains just as profound. Their decision will shape whether we continue as a government of, by, and for the people or veer towards autocracy. Watch the video of the Supreme Court hearing. Warning: what you'll hear is deeply troubling. | | | | | | | 6\. Yakima City Council's Tomfoolery: The Story of Spencer and Leslie Hatton | | A letter to the Yakima City Council regarding the council's sandbagging of the petition drive (see previous blogs). Reprinted with permission from Spencer and Leslie Hatton. "Yakima City Council moved the goalposts when it realized Yakima voters raised enough petition signatures to block ordinances eliminating or demoting 5 citizen advisory committees. In Yakima, we have the right to stop misguided city ordinances and send them to a popular vote by filing petitions with a certain number of voter signatures. After the County Auditor certified the number of voter signatures needed was 804, more than 1,200 petition signatures were filed to block City Council from eliminating the Sustainable Yakima & Community Integration Committees and degrading the Bicycle/Pedestrian Committee, Tree Board, and Historic Preservation Committees. Another option the City Council could take immediately is to repeal the ordinances, thereby restoring the committees to their previous official city status. One week after sufficient petition signatures were filed, City Council hatched a plan to retroactively raise the signature threshold from 804 to 1,258. How did they do that? The City asked the County Auditor to add the number of city residents who voted only in the Yakima School Board and the West Valley School Board races, but did not vote in the city council elections for Districts 1, 3, 5, and 7. The Auditor’s Office noted in writing to the City of Yakima that the city was only billed for conducting an election in those four districts, and not for the elections for the Yakima School Board and West Valley School Board elections. Those school boards paid separately for their own elections. Furthermore, in a phone call to the Washington Secretary of State, officials there noted that school district elections “have nothing to do with” city government elections because school districts are independent legal entities with separate taxing authority from city government, even though there may be some geographic overlap between the school district boundaries and the city boundaries. Within two days after this plan was exposed, voters collected an additional 179 signatures, as allowed under state law, to now have over 1,400 petition signatures. City Council responded by directing City Manager Zabell to publicly reject additional voter signatures and set the goalposts high enough to disenfranchise more than 1,400 Yakima voters. Please do the right thing. If not, it will likely be necessary to file a lawsuit to stop these City Hall misguided actions." | | | | | | | | | | | | Share on social | | | | This email was sent from .

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: re: my MSNBC interview
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
Friend,

Did you see my interview on MSNBC with Lawrence O'Donnell last night about the GOP’s ongoing efforts to take away our reproductive rights?
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84261125/470973631/1514755465?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3776-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTAxZmEzMi03NDA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e8w3Z510x8H00JYL85huu6Bgl0AzmR9aeQNSQIO9f5c=)
Let me be clear: **Extreme Republican politicians are not just trying to limit access to abortion – they’re trying to control women’s bodies and force them to make choices that may not be right for them.**
And now, dangerous anti-abortion laws across the country have shown why the fight to defend my seat in Nevada and protect our Senate majority is more critical than ever – **because if the GOP flips Nevada red, they’ll retake Senate control and push for a nationwide abortion ban.**
We simply cannot let that happen, friend. But now that _The Cook Political Report_ has downgraded my must-win race to a “Toss Up,” I need your urgent grassroots support to keep up the fight to defend Nevada and the Senate.
**With the future of reproductive rights on the line, please:_[Will you give $5 or more right now to help us protect the Senate for Democrats and restore reproductive freedom for all?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84261127/470973636/1514755465?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk3776-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTAxZmEzMi03NDA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e8w3Z510x8H00JYL85huu6Bgl0AzmR9aeQNSQIO9f5c=)_**
Thank you, friend. This battle for our rights isn't going to be easy, but I know we’ll succeed as long as we stand together.

– Jacky Rosen

Your Response {Pending}

| Fellow American,

name: Chuck Morse
subject: Thank You for an Incredible Night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Chuck Morse, Dan Norris Treasurer
body:
Over 450 Granite Staters came out to support #TeamMorse
| | | |
---
| | | [](https://link.email.chuckmorsefornh.) | [](https://link.email.chuckmorsefornh.) | [](https://link.email.chuckmorsefornh.)
---|---|---
| | Derek,
I wanted to extend my heartfelt gratitude to everyone who joined us in making yesterday's fundraiser an extraordinary success. With over 450 supporters in attendance, including numerous small business owners, legislators, grassroots activists, and individuals deeply invested in the future of our state, your overwhelming support means the world to me.
A special thank you goes out to the dedicated volunteers who generously offered their time to ensure the smooth execution of the event. And to my cherished family, particularly my wife Susan and daughter Emma, your unwavering support fuels my determination every step of the way.
This event marks just the beginning of what promises to be an unforgettable campaign journey. Together, we will forge a path to victory for New Hampshire this fall.
In Liberty, Chuck Morse
---
| |
---
|
---
| | **_Supporters from every corner of New Hampshire came to show their support for our campaign! Stay tuned for more highlights. _**
---
| |
---
|
---
| | [DONATE](https://link.email.chuckmorsefornh.)
---
| Our campaign's success**hinges on the generous contributions of supporters like you**. If you weren't able to make a donation last night or are considering a secondary contribution, please pitch in to ensure we have the resources necessary to elect a proven conservative as our next Governor! **Every contribution, no matter the size, makes a significant difference.** Thank you for your continued support.
---
| | |
---
| | **Our campaign thrives on the dedication of volunteers like you.** If you weren't able to sign up to volunteer last night or are considering joining our team, **please consider lending your time and expertise** to help us elect a proven conservative as our next Governor! Your efforts, big or small, are invaluable in driving our mission forward. Thank you for your willingness to make a difference.
---
| [VOLUNTEER ](https://link.email.chuckmorsefornh.)
---

P.O. Box 106, North Salem,
NH 03073

body:
Seth is in Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. I just wanted to reach out and thank you for the support you showed our campaign through April. I know there’s a lot going on right now and sometimes it’s hard to stay focused on campaigns and politics – but together we can fight to protect workers, families, and our fundamental rights

Thanks for standing with me in this effort. I am so appreciative of your support every step of the way on our road to taking back the House.

Thank you,
Seth

name: Carmen Goers
subject: May the 4th Be With You: Support Carmen Goers Today!
body:
Join the Team

| | | | | | | |
---
| | | |
---
| | | **May the 4th Be With You: **
**Support Carmen Goers Today!**
---

Dear Peter,
Tomorrow, as fans across the galaxy celebrate Star Wars Day, we're reminded of the enduring themes of hope, courage, and the fight against adversity that resonate deeply in our own community. This May the 4th, let’s channel the spirit of these galactic battles into real-world action right here in Washington’s 8th l district.
My campaign is a force for good, committed to protecting our communities, enhancing our education system, and ensuring that justice and democracy prevail across our district. Like the heroes of our favorite saga, we know that success requires the support and unity of all who share this vision.
---
| | | |
---
| Join us in this epic campaign by contributing today. Whether it's $25, $50, or $100, your donation will empower us to continue our fight for a brighter, more prosperous future for every resident of our district.

---

| | | Let’s make this Star Wars Day memorable by exhibiting the courage and determination we admire in our favorite characters. Support my campaign—our hope for positive change and progress.

Thank you for standing with us, and May the Fourth be with you!

With gratitude,

Team Carmen Goers

Thank you, Peter.

Your support of my campaign by helping me reach my end of month fundraising goal means everything to me. No matter the donation size, every dollar makes all the difference in advancing our mission to unseat Jeff Van Drew and ending the MAGA stronghold on South Jersey.

But our work is not over yet. With Donald Trump coming here in just a few days to hang out with his buddy Van Drew and their supporters, my team isn’t slowing down for a single second in our push to defeat the MAGA team.

We have our sights laser focused on the primary election. There’s just over a month until the big day, so there’s no time to waste. My team and I are going into overdrive to reach out to as many voters as possible to share my message that South Jersey deserves to be represented by someone committed to serving their needs in Congress. We’re traveling all over the district knocking on doors, making calls, sending texts, and listening to your questions and concerns about the future of NJ-02.

None of this is possible without your support, Peter. Let’s keep this momentum going and finish strong on June 4th!

Thank you again,
Joe Salerno

P.S. If you’re ready to kick Van Drew and his extremism out of South Jersey, click here to contribute today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jsfc-fr-em-may24]

name: Alan Dershowitz
subject: The Sun picks 'right' over 'popular'
body:
In over sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

# FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Peter, In over sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

**In today's media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong.** Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

**The New York Sun is different.** It's a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.

Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun's deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don't agree with everything that can be found in the Sun's pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I've been impressed by the Sun's growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

**The Sun's success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth.** But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don't wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---

clean_body: In over sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right. For a limited time, join for just 1¢. | | | | FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ | | Dear Peter, In over sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right. In today's media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong. Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts. The New York Sun is different. It's a paper that places principle over politics and people over party. Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point. When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments. The Sun's deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate. It will be no secret to you that I don't agree with everything that can be found in the Sun's pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism. I've been impressed by the Sun's growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join. The Sun's success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth. But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today. Every person matters in this effort. Don't wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now. | | | | | Alan Dershowitz Columnist for The New York Sun | | | | | Alan Dershowitz Columnist for The New York Sun | | |

As a Ranking Member and later Chair of the House Appropriations Committee, I helped guide hundreds of millions of dollars back into New York’s infrastructure, securing the funds to rebuild the Tappan Zee Bridge and collaborating with George to clean up the Long Island Sound.
**I can confidently say that George Latimer shares my commitment to investing in New York’s infrastructure and ensuring that our state and its people have the resources they need to thrive.** George is a third-generation New York native who has devoted his career to championing progressive values, protecting our reproductive freedom, combatting climate change, and creating jobs for working families.
[Now, he’s running for Congress in NY-16 to take his service to this community to the next level. Can George and I count on you to support his campaign with a donation before his weekly fundraising deadline tonight at midnight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84263764/470980326/-1975878812?source=SBD_GL_EM_FR_NTLNDRS_050324_1_1_Endorsement&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQwMzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWM0ZGY1YWUtNzcwOS1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jrmnIvn6HhfTmqADxBpPWrP-RcQjOnWHh0C0SZzXymw=)

For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality.

clean_body: It’s Nita Lowey, former Congresswoman representing NY-17 and friend of George Latimer. George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by running to represent New York's 16th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Hi, Peter. It’s Nita Lowey, former Congresswoman representing NY-17 and friend of George Latimer. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = As a Ranking Member and later Chair of the House Appropriations Committee, I helped guide hundreds of millions of dollars back into New York’s infrastructure, securing the funds to rebuild the Tappan Zee Bridge and collaborating with George to clean up the Long Island Sound. I can confidently say that George Latimer shares my commitment to investing in New York’s infrastructure and ensuring that our state and its people have the resources they need to thrive. George is a third-generation New York native who has devoted his career to championing progressive values, protecting our reproductive freedom, combatting climate change, and creating jobs for working families. = = Thank you for standing with the people of NY-16, Nita Lowey * | | ---|--- = For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality. | = = Paid for by George Latimer for Congress George Latimer for Congress PO Box 789 White Plains, NY 10602 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: You can also =.

clean_body: I need you to donate $5 before the weekend. | I have a favor to ask: Is there any way you could make a small donation to our campaign today, Peter? = I know our team sends these emails a lot. That’s because I don’t take a cent of corporate PAC money — unlike my opponent. But it means I have to ask more of my supporters, more often. Marsha Blackburn is accountable to her special-interest donors. When I’m in the Senate, I’ll be accountable to you. Peter, I know that asking you to invest in our campaign means asking you to put your trust in me. I NEVER take that for granted. = | = = Thanks so much, Gloria Johnson = | = Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. Send donations via check to: Gloria for Tennessee 73 White Bridge Rd #103-353 Nashville, TN 37205

name: Sarah Longwell
subject: STOP and listen to this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Accountability PAC Inc
body:
Janet lives in in Georgia and refuses to vote for Trump again. Watch her blast him for his awful character. Warning: She doesn’t hold back.
|
---
Friend,

Our 2024 project—Republican Voters Against Trump—is all about spotlighting the people who voted for Donald Trump in the past but will no longer support him. So I wanted to take the chance to introduce you to [Janet](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VVPQrr8v1NpBW4DNh0y8zX511W2H1VMy5dF-hfN3rtP6P3m2ndW6N1vHY6lZ3lkW2yn3Gp2L1SPlW4kmZrq8GwZDRN8l5CWQmhXQ6W2jTd9W1KbbdzW1w85zx1b1b4nW8P83Sn52dWnCV5Ygzk5plQ7hW7pfGsl833JC-W8HX_sn2Zd840VlQG-C6rmsZCW4YsXNN5jjyFRW1Mp-Wl5xF8xxW83jn_N2MBD7lW3bGFzH4w_4P5W5VzdZl6Wk85-W2PWD5C3WfYjFW4WZ2Tc34f9KWW12XnRY6dSch2W924N0t2XQYhpW6H7Yb54__yQbW6WMD7W3YqZzsW48PvjL4Mj0H5f8-FG4d04). **Warning: She doesn’t hold back.**
---
[ ](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VVPQrr8v1NpBW4DNh0y8zX511W2H1VMy5dF-hfN3rtP6v3m2ndW69sMD-6lZ3pjVljZzD4TKYJGV8GKQv6j4flwW2xM0NT8HG5rDW6Wxb-P5pyxWtW6QWgQG63jJ-4VVHkCb99jBfFW8gyL8G8FX251W5zr6Vf3jk2V7W8my2hX5xhhgSW2VGDLx1wvkYwV1Bs4d3d15jTW57GK4821PZYXN6pQWVtJdCkCW7MlKXK10kpQ2W4p-LNp1bDwtFW2pp-W56wPLM8W473-ct5XcdLQW5C_9HC4j0N-ZW78gGc6607Nl6W47-MVg4XDyB3f7Gm2kb04)
---
Janet lives in a rural town in Georgia, voted for Trump, and refuses to do it again. [Watch her blast Trump for his terrible character.](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VVPQrr8v1NpBW4DNh0y8zX511W2H1VMy5dF-hfN3rtP6P3m2ndW6N1vHY6lZ3m6V2ZY742QZLl8W5FgSzH2W8DSzW8bmxmS1JwQX4N5l6g77DX1RzW4TQM4j3KVTy2W7fFS9M3FXYzxW469r8b3ZGbtdW2RLJLr7Gc-nFVcMf_m6MZLcHW64JCmS3KWn4yW1js2qd4Dw89tW8TL0B-7jfld8W1TJ_yR8JrsNzVdWYyc5JzYDkW5GZG5p5-TXJ4V40dt95wT7vTW6YF_Lf2MgsDVW2ZScsV4nbb4tN10KpVW-19tSW3-Cnn-6Xth8BW1JN43X6yg1rsW3f3yb78bbzwff1MQM2d04)

People like Janet are going to save our democracy. By sharing her story (and strong emotions) she is taking a courageous step in defeating Donald Trump in November.
We’re looking for more brave Republicans like Janet willing to take a stand against Trump. If that sounds like you, I encourage you to [share your story](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VVPQrr8v1NpBW4DNh0y8zX511W2H1VMy5dF-hfN3rtP6P3m2ndW6N1vHY6lZ3pHN5jShk6x2cjKW6-bBSW6j1GZjW40ptTz8Xs4ncMGRKXpR-NB_W51Lptn1G435KV5ks-L1JMbGqW2t82zM8yQ6TCW14G1SN5ftNFDW4z7FgN7TDyG3W2vp6jw4sfffQW83S5QP2XB7PGW3mCN536rJYZPN1qhzNHnWmLdTbN2N6yDLQnW9jYB5t8T0gktW5r01--3cx9JlW6G59sY81N8jMW8WvY5f7gpxT6W6hhtm55P3YRBW2SbCB64SCtdTW5Fkr3w4kh447W2PtVRw2FnVkXf9lQY4s04).
If that **doesn’t** sound like you, but you’d still like to help out, please consider supporting our campaign. We amplify these messages by putting them on TV and digital platforms, targeting persuadable voters in key swing states.

clean_body: Janet lives in in Georgia and refuses to vote for Trump again. Watch her blast him for his awful character. Warning: She doesn’t hold back. | Friend, Our 2024 project—Republican Voters Against Trump—is all about spotlighting the people who voted for Donald Trump in the past but will no longer support him. So I wanted to take the chance to introduce you to . Warning: She doesn’t hold back. Janet lives in a rural town in Georgia, voted for Trump, and refuses to do it again. People like Janet are going to save our democracy. By sharing her story (and strong emotions) she is taking a courageous step in defeating Donald Trump in November. We’re looking for more brave Republicans like Janet willing to take a stand against Trump. If that sounds like you, I encourage you to . If that doesn’t sound like you, but you’d still like to help out, please consider supporting our campaign. We amplify these messages by putting them on TV and digital platforms, targeting persuadable voters in key swing states. Sarah Longwell | | Republican Accountability, 1100 Vermont Ave. NW, Tenth Floor, Washington, DC 20005 Paid for by the Republican Accountability PAC Inc. body:
This fight isn’t over.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84265751/470983348/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNmZWZhMzE4LTc5MDktZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mCISz0pDmvOymQZw2lTuXnpEac6LvrNkcQo2voQP9V8=&emci=0c4a4486-5909-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=cfefa318-7909-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=8431045)

Trump-appointed federal judges just struck down Louisiana’s new, more representative congressional map — a radical decision that threatens to undermine voting rights and representation for Black communities. But this fight isn’t over. Louisiana voters will be appealing this decision to the Supreme Court. And we will double down on our efforts to ensure fair maps in Louisiana and across the country comply with the Voting Rights Act — and give every voter a voice. [**This ruling would undo a major victory for our movement, so we need to fight back — and fair maps champions like you make that possible. Can we count on you to rush a donation to the NDRC right away?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84265753/470983349/2035465197?refcode=don_ndrc_trddnrs_email_RR_email_20240503-NDRC-Red-LARR2_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20240503-NDRC-Red-LARR2_&utm_campaign=RR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNmZWZhMzE4LTc5MDktZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mCISz0pDmvOymQZw2lTuXnpEac6LvrNkcQo2voQP9V8=) | A.G. Holder put it best in his statement, saying, _“The ideological nature of the decision could not be more clear...Since the Voting Rights Act was enacted, anti-democracy forces have sought to minimize its effectiveness. The fight for equal representation is both historic and ongoing. Yesterday’s decision harkens back to a dark time in our nation’s history.**Undaunted, we will continue the fight for fairness and equality.** ”_
---
Our work inherently comes with setbacks. This one hurts, but we can’t let it stop us from building our movement for fair maps. We’re ready to fight back — and we need you with us.

clean_body: This fight isn’t over. | Trump-appointed federal judges just struck down Louisiana’s new, more representative congressional map — a radical decision that threatens to undermine voting rights and representation for Black communities. But this fight isn’t over. Louisiana voters will be appealing this decision to the Supreme Court. And we will double down on our efforts to ensure fair maps in Louisiana and across the country comply with the Voting Rights Act — and give every voter a voice. = | A.G. Holder put it best in his statement, saying, “The ideological nature of the decision could not be more clear...Since the Voting Rights Act was enacted, anti-democracy forces have sought to minimize its effectiveness. The fight for equal representation is both historic and ongoing. Yesterday’s decision harkens back to a dark time in our nation’s history.Undaunted, we will continue the fight for fairness and equality. ” Our work inherently comes with setbacks. This one hurts, but we can’t let it stop us from building our movement for fair maps. We’re ready to fight back — and we need you with us. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thank you, NDRC HQ = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 1015 18th Street NW, Suite 1000 Washington, DC 20036 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

Hi, friend, it’s Kirsten Gillibrand. I’m reaching out to personally ask that you support my friend, Debbie Mucarsel-Powell — our Democratic candidate for Senate in Florida. Will you let me explain?
Debbie’s battleground race is critical, _especially_ in a time when our bodily autonomy and right to privacy are being threatened on all sides. **Across the country, states are pushing increasingly extreme measures that strip away reproductive rights, target birth control access, attack in vitro fertilization****treatments, and so much more.** And Florida’s Supreme Court recently issued a ruling that allowed an extreme, and dangerous, six-week abortion ban to take effect just days ago.
GOP extremists will stop at nothing to undermine our reproductive rights, and their next scheme is passing a nationwide ban. That’s why keeping our Senate blue is more important now than ever before, friend — and Debbie's race could be our only chance to do it. **[So please, will you chip in $5 right now to help Debbie flip Florida blue, save our Senate majority, and fight for reproductive freedom? Debbie's opponent, Rick Scott, has publicly, and proudly, stated that he will vote for a nationwide ban on abortions if reelected. **That’s why we _need_ to elect Debbie this fall: so we can keep our Democratic majority and defend our reproductive rights. This is the only way we can stop a national ban and codify Roe v. Wade.**
As one of her earliest supporters in this critical race, take it from me: Debbie has what it takes to win. She's already flipped a battleground seat blue to become the first South American immigrant ever elected to Congress. name: John Yob
subject: Virgin Islands Republicans Are Back, Stronger Than Ever
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party in the Virgin Islands
body:
I'm your new chairman. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/6e948ffb2610/re-hey-10312601?e=d30db4cde8)
---
| |
---
| | Fellow Republican,

Earlier today, I was elected by the State Committee to fill the vacancy for chairman of the Republican Party in the Virgin Islands.

I didn’t anticipate running for chairman this cycle because I felt I was better suited for the position of national committeeman, both in terms of my life and my best role for the party.

However, circumstances changed when Gordon Ackley announced he was stepping down and an overwhelming number of Republicans, both Republican voters and State Committee members, asked me to step forward and fill the vacancy. I'm deeply honored by their confidence.

As chairman, I will be our strongest advocate at the upcoming Republican National Convention in Milwaukee. I’m also 100 percent committed to electing Republicans here in the Virgin Islands.

It’s safe to say I know how to win elections. I made a pretty good career of it and have elected several governors, senators, congressmen, and have run presidential campaigns and national conventions in the past. [**Join the Dollar-a-Day Club by donating just $1 every day**](https://protonmail.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=609d3f3398&e=d30db4cde8)
Some of you may know that I’m currently the largest employer on St. John and in Frederiksted on St. Croix, and have plans to roughly double in size in the next two years. I’m proud of my efforts to create jobs in the Virgin Islands since I moved here a decade ago.

**You have my complete and total commitment that the party under my chairmanship will be one, unified Republican Party –– a party squarely focused on its mission of elevating the voice of the Virgin Islands nationally and electing Republicans locally.**

I will personally invest and raise the resources to implement the necessary tactics to help our candidates be successful, hire local staff, and ultimately win elections in November.

There are several aspirants in both districts for senator, the Board of Elections, delegate to Congress and constitutional convention delegate.

If you have any interest in running, please reply to this email as the filing deadline is fast approaching.There are still viable opportunities for Republicans to run and win this cycle.

**To kick-off the party’s efforts this campaign season, I’m personally inviting you to attend one of two upcoming events: May 14 from 6 to 8 pm in Great Cruz Bay, St. John or May 22 from 6 to 8 pm on St. Croix at The Fred Hotel in Frederiksted.**

The events, which are in honor of the late Republican Senator Holland Redfield, will be a great opportunity to meet fellow Republicans and meet some of the Republican candidates.

I hope to see you at one of the events.

Thanks for your continued support of our party.

Chairman John Yob
---
| | **_Paid for by the Republican Party in the Virgin Islands.
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
www.republicanpartyinthevirginislands.com_**

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://protonmail.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=4a1e7eb3fa&e=d30db4cde8&c=be9c50501c) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://protonmail.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=4a1e7eb3fa&t=b&e=d30db4cde8&c=be9c50501c).

[](https://login.mailchimp.com/signup/email-referral/?aid=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698)
---

# URGENT MESSAGE FROM
# AMANDA CHASE
---
| Dear Friends & Supporters,
Today it was reported that some candidates running for positions on the State Central Committee, who really support unconstitutional Ranked Choice Voting, are now running with the position stating that they do not support Ranked Choice Voting.
Well, actions speak louder than words. Their vote against a resolution supporting a ban on RCV in Virginia speaks louder than any current position of support.
Ranked Choice Voting is against the U.S. Constitution which guarantees one person, one vote. Anyone supporting Rank Choice Voting does not support our U.S. Constitution.
The American republic bedrock foundation is equal protection under the law, as stated in the 5th and 14th Amendments to our U. S. Constitution. Introducing a class system of "rights" in this case our voting system is an anathema to our laws and our revolution. What happened to one person, one vote?
Secondly, this adds opaqueness to an already convoluted voting system. Therefore, more points of failure and greater opportunity for corruption.
Finally, it disenfranchises the voter by forcing them to vote for candidates they do not want. We do not want a neo-feudal class system in any walks of our lives, including our voting.
On September 9, 2023 the State Central Committee actually voted on whether we should ban Ranked Choice Voting in Virginia. The minutes of that meeting are below, along with how certain members of the State Central Committee voted. Please only support candidate who support the U.S. Constitution and vote against Rank Choice Voting. Here are the original minutes and the vote.
Any member of the SCC who voted in the affirmative, you want to support. They supported the resolution against Ranked Choice Voting. Those voting in the affirmative voting against the resolution and against the U.S. Constitution. These individuals need to be voted out.

I'm going to support candidates who have a history of supporting President Trump.

name: Mike Rogers
subject: Biden’s refugee plan is dangerous.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rogers for Senate
body:
Will you join me in opposing Biden’s plan to resettle unvetted refugees in the American heartland?

| | | **We don't want you to leave! But we understand if you don't want to receive these emails anymore. Click[](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_m=43f13026114a4095a4615b66511e9618&_e=d51sm0tUSAQfxl-irrFkXDGEYr5Pviu0mJS4iANmDeWs5Yr8mpeQ7NnrQ4jnBmILwNja1JloyiceClsvq7AZSZQjxBuFf-FzAYVOJPapA6Lfn76W8LZHbDi4i-URi55BUqHM3dnJhWF5TA28PtalUYPfJEMxjhUFj4D1n3qsi1ug9BWQfuOR3IC-XjLT8A2eteIi7fsW14omS8ksG3ZxkjO4ujQfYqCKKGKZLD1LKqMFNaNraM0vngzah4hHJ4Zd)[HERE](http://links.rogersforsenate.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=b90de78796ce4ce596523293a2b8ff82&_s=43f13026114a4095a4615b66511e9618&_t=WHss2CLL-OK-l9pCLGUWfKiLC1LBzlf_AOZHhsI1piUBq4kpPRYrF78CTNKzxhhA3qbr8_8ykgctGbmiWhB2NcXv8E2neu2KM-n4_Hzep-8%3D) to unsubscribe.**

name: Team Crouch
subject: 🗳️ Countdown to the Primary!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Suzanne Crouch
body:
View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/crouchforindiana/ppp2gaxknr-12693811?e=8f9fef7158)

** Early in-person voting is now open for the May Primary!
------------------------------------------------------------

Early in-person voting opened for the May Primary on Tuesday, April 9!

All registered Indiana voters (https://indianavoters.in.gov/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=e0f55806dc-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_04_15_02_29_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bc92a6a86e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) are eligible to vote early. Contact your county clerk’s office to find out where and when you can cast your ballot early (https://indianavoters.in.gov/CountyContact/Index?utm_source=indianavoters&utm_medium=.in.gov&utm_campaign&utm_content=ap_n4gserjumn&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=e0f55806dc-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_04_15_02_29_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bc92a6a86e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) .
Find your voting location (https://indiana.votinginfotool.org/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=e0f55806dc-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_04_15_02_29_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bc92a6a86e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Who's on the ballot + other election information (https://indianavoters.in.gov/?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=e0f55806dc-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_04_15_02_29_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bc92a6a86e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

** VOLUNTEER CALLOUT: Join Team Crouch at the polls!
------------------------------------------------------------

We're gearing up for May 7, and we need your help! Join Team Crouch on Election Day by volunteering your time to support our campaign efforts. Whether you join us at the polls or assist in distributing yard signs, your involvement will make a significant impact.
Work the Polls with Team Crouch (https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSd9Z6yLZ7jQ6tr9Ii8N4YhK5Ny80U2CwXfGwmg3CtbDhHrFRw/viewform?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=e0f55806dc-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_04_15_02_29_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bc92a6a86e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
Distribute Signs on Election Day (https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdKMgQORmL8woOQN4gGy6S9BB1LHIGy95MUaBHXnfPGbekVBA/viewform?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=e0f55806dc-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_04_15_02_29_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bc92a6a86e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

============================================================
** Twitter (https://twitter.com/Suzanne_Crouch?utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=8899c4b390-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_04_06_03_57&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8899c4b390-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=7fb5924f2d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_04_15_02_29_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bc92a6a86e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D&utm_source=Suzanne+Crouch+for+Indiana&utm_campaign=e0f55806dc-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2024_04_15_02_29_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-bc92a6a86e-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Thank you for being a vital part of this campaign.
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR BY
MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
We're proving that you can win a race the right way—by standing up for the people and refusing to be beholden to special interests.
Exciting news, team:

Thanks to your generosity, **we hit our fundraising goal for April!** This achievement wouldn't have been possible without your dedication and belief in our vision for NY-17.

What makes this accomplishment even more meaningful is that we're doing it all without taking a single dime from corporate PACs. **We're proving that you can win a race the right way—by standing up for the people and refusing to be beholden to special interests.**

The road to November won't be easy, but together, we're showing folks across the country that it's possible to run a successful campaign rooted in integrity and grassroots support.

Once again, thank you for being a vital part of this campaign. Your continued support means the world to me, and I'm honored to have you by my side as we work to build a brighter future for all.

With gratitude,

Mondaire

| Mondaire Jones is running for Congress to finish the work he started last term. He's ready to fight to lower costs for residents of the Hudson Valley, defend our democracy, raise wages, and protect reproductive rights for all. And he's doing it without a penny from corporate PACs. [**Donate today to build our grassroots movement and send Mondaire Jones back to Congress and back to clean_body: We're proving that you can win a race the right way—by standing up for the people and refusing to be beholden to special interests. Exciting news, team: Thanks to your generosity, we hit our fundraising goal for April! This achievement wouldn't have been possible without your dedication and belief in our vision for NY-17. What makes this accomplishment even more meaningful is that we're doing it all without taking a single dime from corporate PACs. We're proving that you can win a race the right way—by standing up for the people and refusing to be beholden to special interests. The road to November won't be easy, but together, we're showing folks across the country that it's possible to run a successful campaign rooted in integrity and grassroots support. Once again, thank you for being a vital part of this campaign. Your continued support means the world to me, and I'm honored to have you by my side as we work to build a brighter future for all. name: Team Bell
subject: Here’s what is on the chopping block for reproductive rights now:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
The attacks on reproductive healthcare are ongoing. Since the Trump-appointed Supreme Court overturned a woman’s right to bodily autonomy after striking down _Roe v. Wade_ , extreme legislators nationwide are fighting tooth and nail to impose their dangerous, anti-choice agendas.

_**Here’s some of what we’re dealing with right now:**_
* **Florida's 6-Week Abortion Ban:** Earlier this week, Governor Ron DeSantis implemented a new law in Florida banning abortions after six weeks of pregnancy.
* **Idaho Emergency Room Abortion Case:** SCOTUS is currently hearing arguments about whether emergency room doctors in Idaho should be allowed to perform abortions in cases of fatal medical emergencies to protect the life of the mother.
* **Access to Mifepristone at Risk:** The Supreme Court will soon rule on whether access to Mifepristone, a life-saving medication used in 60% of all abortions, will be safeguarded. This issue arose after the "Alliance Defending Freedom" challenged FDA regulations on the pill, citing an outdated 19th-century law.

But let’s set the record straight on something: **Decisions about reproductive health should be left to individuals and their doctors, not dictated by a loud minority of extremists.** In Congress, Wesley will ALWAYS vote alongside the majority of Americans, including most St. Louisans, who know that reproductive care IS healthcare, and will proudly fight to restore the protections of _Roe._

We’re counting on this grassroots team to help Wesley cross the finish line this November and restore our pro-choice majority in the House. name: Chrissy
subject: All the (Chrissy) news fit to print
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
body:
Chrissy Houlahan for U.S. Congress

https://www.chrissyhoulahanforcongress.com/

A note from Chrissy

They say the spring is in like a lion and out like a lamb. But looking at my schedule, I'd have to say it leaned a little heavily on the lion side.

>From fighting to improve the quality of life for military service members and their families and fighting for critical aid for Ukraine to winning the PA-06 primary (thank you!), I'm so excited to share some of what I've been up to the past few weeks!

https://houlahan.house.gov/connect/

Aid for Ukraine

Last month, I delivered a speech on the House floor regarding Speaker Johnson's failure to bring forward a vote on Ukraine aid, despite the fact that the bill would likely resoundingly pass. The speaker finally allowed a vote on this critical aid package, and as I expected, the bill passed with wide bipartisan support. I'm proud to stand with our Ukrainian allies as they fend off Russia's aggression and their considerably larger forces. We cannot let Europe fall to the chaos of war again, and in the interest of democracy more broadly and our own national security specifically, the U.S. has a responsibility to join our allies in helping. This package will help Ukraine resupply (they are literally running our of bullets) and reduce the chance that Vladimir Putin will attack a NATO ally.

https://houlahan.house.gov/news/documentsingle.aspx?DocumentID=3770

Improving the quality of life for our service members

Growing up in a military family and as a veteran of the Air Force myself, I understand the problems that our service members today face: high living costs, limited access to child care, long wait times for medical care, and much more. That's why I was eager and honored to be selected to co-lead the bipartisan Quality of Life Panel within the House Armed Services Committee. After ten months of research and hearings, we just published a report that, once passed into law, will significantly address these problems. The recommendations include pay increases, housing allowances, and eliminating referral requirements for some medical specialists. It's simply the right thing to do, but solving some of these challenges should lead to increased recruitment, longer service contracts, and improved health and wellness for our service members and their families.

Meet my new campaign manager!

It's my please to introduce you to Jenn, my brand-new campaign manager! I worked with Jenn this winter as she superbly ran the process of collecting signatures for petitions to get me on this month's primary ballot. She was reliable, organized, and an absolute pleasure to work with.

Jenn has worked on campaigns in our district since 2018, and she's just what we need on Team Chrissy. I hope you'll join me in giving her a warm welcome!

https://houlahan.house.gov/news/documentsingle.aspx?DocumentID=3965

Are you voting by mail this fall?

If you're planning on voting by mail in the general election, here are a few friendly reminders:

- October 21 is the last day to register to vote
- October 29 is the last day to apply for a mail-in or civilian absentee ballot
- Your mail-in or absentee ballot must be received by 8:00 P.M. on November 5

As we head full speed into the general election, I'm so excited to see what we can accomplish together next.

There's work to be done,

Chrissy

Chrissy is proud to be your voice in Congress and is committed to fighting for the values that matter in our community. But a divided Congress means there will be challenged ahead. We must all work together to have any chance of creating a better future that works for everyone.

So we're counting on the support of people like you to keep Chrissy's momentum going throughout the year. Con we count on you to join is and donate whatever you can spare right now? Thank you for your support and for believing in our vision for a better future.

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/houlahan-digital?refcode=jtk977-ot-text&amounts=5,25,50,100,250

--------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/5A7dcVDqPECR0EWykGJMlQ2?unsubscribedata=%2F4yugajteVrDN52JcuEF5K6%2BAianMYoHmfAv285a1H9T5ZJ0P%2B3%2BJ29WYVXswOLzkyleJBQ%2FqqlsQbgiSV%2BucBt5iqz2BnWV1Hp6V7mIFAi8G187EfsPv9o3IUeiyuSrXufN1p3gHUNSMH4easzbeJUDO1NJdJ66rUoPy3OVSBfaZFh3%2BwEN%2FJ9xKhOy%2FFFTr4w9gSwrIXh%2B3Uzkq15cVuZYMp0S2P1DFsXQ1zh4q%2FSYqUZOKKUcCiHfyeA6DaSl0F0wWui2pBxgaGIm63i8c%2BjBrNZkRJiOohrogOzYMgppCTzavoWhZWgfUz74HmlxJ09jZO1l96n6FoKyxJN0pLLDOfez7FOkhFyukDC69NCsx1VLrw4OotWGh%2F1cLHCl4i7KHCtyn8Ah7uti2ZLT7pg9AlJMWO8T4ebG9HzAC6%2BE%2B91oZH587VGYOoZDIuIq

Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
P.O. Box 222
Devon, PA 19333
United States

Emails are a crucial way for us to stay in touch with our top supporters; however, we understand if you need a break from political emails right now. If you'd like to pause emails for the next few weeks, you can click here: https://secure.ngpvan.com/umOwNNYDOkWBBmk0KPHJaw2

Chrissy is a former Captain in the United States Air Force. Use of her military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or Department of the Air Force.

subject: Every minute your file is incomplete, the Left is taking advantage

She just spent an entire 15-minute segment LIVE on air viciously smearing and attacking every single one of our America First Senate candidates in 2024’s key battleground states.
_The truth is, Maddow and the Left are terrified after the latest polling shows all of these races are stuck in a**[DEAD HEAT](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=95f7ab4655664bb19f7b1de97b437198&_e=e9uYgeF_54DIs2p0xc_bKTBI8NcaYUxXlkuEvr0bjD0jrLuadzQVGRGaOkEEd_XgLeNYdz_iAiaga0hFu5y-1Y_le4edw7TtbyD3ndDXaIPLRmAvU2mOEEP-biM_zhAq22ih8KYzyMNP6DRmDW4w1hhpezFgK00S9Ba-M23h20x7YnXZoUTk6miLBPtglfwS9TdzPlaVZZFCKLO0cET5H13wyZ8M_bwNQbkBI2SQU2dh51r8XAtyF3cn8Vzlb1o6PPt9K1CXIHlPc6fEBb5mgigyT9ZKM73JmG0CAHoe_CN6vshPDxL1DXjkycNK__ivpdLLQkrVNGm-2kN967YG-L0w8sckcZm17bsmooMNrwmNAI7wnpZ6pM29Xod5nqcBVQqmqTDerXa23T1zGsUafnho0qosty8z7ReGH-XtQHVokVA_hKkeGw-0D6h6DhvlX9oqdpohtufvPEFZcz2bh7hrv7ZEQEH80m6IBsoOUpi_UCkR4ktnV8pNArbjr_7q1cDrd59zq6XwYnvlGM8PYQ%3D%3D)** – and Republicans only need **[**ONE SEAT**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=95f7ab4655664bb19f7b1de97b437198&_e=e9uYgeF_54DIs2p0xc_bKTBI8NcaYUxXlkuEvr0bjD0jrLuadzQVGRGaOkEEd_XgLeNYdz_iAiaga0hFu5y-1Y_le4edw7TtbyD3ndDXaIPLRmAvU2mOEEP-biM_zhAq22ih8KYzyMNP6DRmDW4w1hhpezFgK00S9Ba-M23h20x7YnXZoUTk6miLBPtglfwS9TdzPlaVZZFCKLO0cET5H13wyZ8M_bwNQbkBI2SQU2dh51r8XAtyF3cn8Vzlb1o6PPt9K1CXIHlPc6fEBb5mgigyT9ZKM73JmG0CAHoe_CN6vshPDxL1DXjkycNK__ivpdLLQkrVNGm-2kN967YG-L0w8sckcZm17bsmooMNrwmNAI7wnpZ6pM29Xod5nqcBVT3eHueKrPSjpSZ41nIUA70O5hq99AnkAHq2m0G8Adw4Tcoawhpp56WDLO0AcaoWX-Qei14UK5MyXY42wpG_yyAvijbAiuer1JJXz6who6hrysPe_VOAr_gOJ0d-yeQ9j5qwBSMnGeevPxbWYmCU_A%3D%3D)** to deliver a America First Senate Majority this year._

\*\*Meet Bernie Moreno:\*\*

( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=6418548.2764.1.56162599e5bbf67d8ac349e7357472e5 ) Bernie Moreno fights for the American Dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

# FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Dear Peter, In over sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism — mostly the latter — and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

**In today's media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong.** Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

**The New York Sun is different.** It's a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.

Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun's deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don't agree with everything that can be found in the Sun's pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I've been impressed by the Sun's growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

**The Sun's success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth.** But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don't wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---

| Hi Friend, today we wanted to ask you for $7 for TX-31.
[Yes, just $7.](https://ckzq96gbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00194KTTJ1RX_XlISh8P-csiVZhwfXAKOzjOMANqBbROaHSweuhhvAyoH-WpSK4-uFYtTSq_dqU2NU5XeyWRHWo5JR_QAi_H_ysi9tmeL7E8ZSejNdcuDtR4hLcexhAmDRsdqksuYYhGmkbdhJ2Q79Gv1wK0vHr2XCv8fU3YsADVgu80o1zainjYB1mv6qvL7N62AuSV8uYSBh84Al1dt_INA==&c=_0grhesDsSCxnjyduLYI14yN3ZNe82O4bKvlmadSTIUtN7TQ3FCU_w==&ch=3hrWmnOrszFeQ7DPBuVssH4pxh6Let1PMZOcTMuHCnJ6IB5nboAEnA==)
This is what $7 can do, Friend:
💲7 gets us the materials we need on the ground to fuel this grassroots campaign -- and with our runoff election in just 25 days, it's never been more important to get our message out.
💲7 helps us fight for Texas's veterans, and working families, and retirees too.
💲7 powers us to take on one of Trump's closest allies in Congress.

**Folks, on Earth Day I was able to hike the lands where we’re fighting to establish the Chuckwalla National Monument. Do you support protecting our public lands?**

I introduced this legislation to protect our desert lands, improve air quality, expand access to recreational outdoor areas, and help reconnect our local communities with our beautiful public lands. **Public lands that we have a duty to preserve, protect, and honor for generations to come.**

I am particularly proud of the collaboration and leadership of the robust coalition of local tribal leaders, conservationist groups, community organizations, and youth leaders. **They have built the necessary momentum and agreements to ensure this project’s success.**

**Chuckwalla National Monument is important for the communities I represent, our state, and our nation, which is why I’m urging President Biden to designate this critical public land as a national monument, for our people, our environment, and the critical desert habitats. Together we will make history for the Coachella Valley and CA-25.**

Thank you for your support,

Raul
