| | ****Biden’s Risky Gaza Game 🚨****
---
---
| | The Biden administration’s reckless approach to national security is nothing new, but we may have hit rock bottom as senior officials explore options to [resettle certain Palestinians](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=de33f9eb31c048b098f8452a7f01acf0&_e=SBSezHeIKJd0G7_NbbiN_dBe1snQkYaeT4MO1It3bJl4ydpTQoXucY5JU7atkqDXjwe7__AWnKbYGKFmjJgRusaUjpPNkEPy7tj0QwxEKR9M4rTV5L6lMcDqRFmv0gypjdmfFgVh3udJqCGrryIIKu9gjsE0B2m35gCPBTruDTWBelSiv0MeKyb136X6gVK_J0s2jGmaFe3A-Wpdi6ctf2sD2Hk1l4k_k9n73zScdVtrvtnRtifOq7BIuL-eVTB1M3VAWBEplzBSk6Mm3vCE5g%3D%3D) from Gaza right here in America. What could possibly go wrong? For starters, we don’t have a spotless track record when it comes to thoroughly vetting the folks we so freely let into our country. Let’s do a quick review of the facts:
* In 2023 alone, Border Patrol agents encountered [169](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=de33f9eb31c048b098f8452a7f01acf0&_e=SBSezHeIKJd0G7_NbbiN_ZhrAAmrW4uyA8-2Glawc09uNmmwEfjBpBdTj5taX1wdSyVzQLCZGd3l4ZJMEnoPEwkZVTjFxENm870gfcYRGi1Kkql7rkrnAZ633S-DHe7Nvi2BNsyDY5AhYvjJaMR39vDfu9ZNhUCVO-YixyHO4LBUSBQSCbnpmY7kf3kP_hjeVBeG0F2igYSZVwpk0HyGdp_h3M9LyGe7rAz9ZPedp0j8YopoD6aXPvyHkv3JjFySQ4Usf3_gTtVG-HVGLsDekuiH7PgEKYZsNuMSKCW6-dHYI9i7o1-NAxu9wvFgzAl5ZVREMM1h5r0uCHG51QpL_g%3D%3D) people from the terror watch list at our southern border.
* Dozens of illegal immigrants with ["serious criminal histories"](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=de33f9eb31c048b098f8452a7f01acf0&_e=SBSezHeIKJd0G7_NbbiN_X2co-Gh77O5xeKUyRQyzCWqIpzg-C9qFsPAKdnG-7X3B0Z1eoX4yRutA7rH3_4LL4z778KIlOHTTnmUyPt5a3EQgd6ZeJHeXZvqJLoPEBjMn3g71FAZW2LKkyi8S5059T8lQg1qVnOafD673CEuMojZq_1_a6CiaerZEconDVTS-uRDuf0UqJwW6ryHG_dwHK6dxSifPy4VZlbT_MhZQ8p48GEKxqN-nNFHH-f4j3z3-Slo2H9KgHAJPl6yykHRGbJQC7hJOZYxTVqCNq5qiEB8fE8hKutNXhwPZrs0lIkr) are attempting to cross into the U.S. each day.
* FBI Director Christopher Wray recently [warned](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=de33f9eb31c048b098f8452a7f01acf0&_e=SBSezHeIKJd0G7_NbbiN_UT_o7rz0JyOm8pDpVUM5t9n6U63kOSbgb2FtSVRi9IFy4hDZ6gcPTOHdu482QPaBybtaEIk98UZFY2HzQpdWHjzmfNlRwJ5Cs-ShGF6MK1ZwF7aieH8f14SjEAcWir_JcusWsfUM02EubPxk0z0Al6KQ_OxsBwOwB5GkBM3XJRgIFp-CYtyjThYHJoBd0ee0w7gPZxsJqpE9fl5y5y8bn30XdbEVbAxz3zQnU4C2DYC_uX57Y6Fwnc0mOtCNPbbEXzMc2xuolGUMbkb5WFmXKGI_zYu4Gka5gt-zLwvpToN) about dangerous networks coming across the border—one with ISIS ties.

Keep in mind that these are just the people we know of. Amid the downright chaos of [millions](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=de33f9eb31c048b098f8452a7f01acf0&_e=SBSezHeIKJd0G7_NbbiN_X2co-Gh77O5xeKUyRQyzCWqIpzg-C9qFsPAKdnG-7X3rH85_z0Fzl9WAgpqYE9L6-L2boVgSglBP2sIaV1iDPCACuJpuYR8KMfIi9X2elLH3CXzA6_UK3efhOlgzzVG4BEY9CZLdDUdPm11d3wVfwYV0L1V0vveRDsJubXOf_u57xmGJyP2Xxa1EmknlW0K5XnILoZT8VDudZtHZp9PnjCVpM4lp4TZGFQvoMGOy4cdsLcp3IWWMI4h79jHvfUvny58__u55AmxANM59V_7TKE%3D) of migrants pouring in since President Biden took office, there’s a good chance these numbers could be a whole lot scarier. But I'd also like to remind you that countries a stone’s throw away from Gaza have their borders sealed shut right now. In fact, recent satellite photos show bulldozers clearing land near Egypt’s border with Gaza. Anonymous officials say they’re preparing a [cement wall](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=de33f9eb31c048b098f8452a7f01acf0&_e=SBSezHeIKJd0G7_NbbiN_fF1Ots4ULLUCHzUsIGwn91EqQYxChfjtTNH5OWxI-tcDA9Swr9KF_dyLg39b9QCFHJfTNcMKxcFB8qepIH16-nojYSbtdS1qqvkzNvy96jsllVvb6kEmjmp8gA75fGvlXXADnKCjCzxBJ4zgslkC872AI8aL4MjsH2LsvLWhp8nQFuDX5bszl98Cnm431aGtm3z1w5zzuYxkFvCPB2mB54%3D) that could keep 150,000 people at bay in case of a breach. Let’s face the facts here, folks: Leaders in Egypt, Jordan, and other Arab countries know that a mass exodus from Gaza will bring Hamas militants into their countries, opening them up to a whole host of security problems. How is this simple fact lost on President Biden and his cronies? And let's talk dollars and cents. Every refugee comes with a hefty price tag, from housing aid to other benefits. It seems like this administration's just itching to pile on more costs, consequences be damned. All things considered, it’s insanity to entertain the idea of rolling out the welcome mat for another group we can’t properly vet or pay for. The risks are too great, and in a worst-case scenario, they could prove [catastrophic](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=de33f9eb31c048b098f8452a7f01acf0&_e=SBSezHeIKJd0G7_NbbiN_SgreSJRMM2kiBWfaniLWdBN626uaqvdX6qIq8jE2ywT6OhJmTB7xkUsF12WCrdkS6IuDgW4MKpIt_HkRe-j_cqnzt_Xg417jOlq5YoEpf-379R-Vb15i6lnujg7wqxsEbh52slAr6Hov9O48s6S_FzCkOlGcqCG8keaKtAvr9HYsBnG_cBEADDsyxRLZnMZr3O6K2bZmXP2j9nfFGctZk_BNIOmLcTurIqKJl0b34DPdcP3A7EG8Vj4qMMoR0iuzMMtfJnmmw-VzC_-5OlN_kF4QavMsMpJuo9KT_QaMYzN). We don’t need to import another national security risk—and we sure as heck don’t need to add to our mountain of debt. The U.S. ought to take a play out of Egypt’s book and think about the safety and well-being of our own dadgum country for once. It’s time for the White House to secure our borders, stop the migrant madness, and put America first.

| | I’m picking up speed on the campaign trail, and there’s nothing like face-to-face conversations—especially when it comes to the issues that matter. From the staggering $34 trillion in debt looming over us to the gaping hole in our southern border, East Tennesseans are speaking up about where our nation's headed. At a packed town hall in [Bean Station](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=de33f9eb31c048b098f8452a7f01acf0&_e=SBSezHeIKJd0G7_NbbiN_ZRmBecrJjLUT4rUajBwp9OCtRuMELrvM0BHTFyExHUPZL2dnG_Myo9HPAJ7vj_qWqexJ7mVAazHlpgSC1JLAnybezU2EhoY5qNH-SZV3ep-OfR0Z2EuuUFWug8ssv36P85yPv9OLzDmAx4dbLvMpIBwAAkpEd7vHyrKs3V9Dcegckd3nGAMWfrRswXm4jLt4Wc7prhloFMeMqnUTOgHSB_fzponLYKUNoCJAOWCbDvt), folks aired these concerns loud and clear, and I’m bringing all of those worries back to Washington. I’m committed to holding our leaders accountable, and I’m dedicated to fighting for the values that will get America back on track. I’d be remiss if I didn’t mention that I also proudly sponsored a Veterans Breakfast at the [VFW Post 5](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=de33f9eb31c048b098f8452a7f01acf0&_e=SBSezHeIKJd0G7_NbbiN_ZRmBecrJjLUT4rUajBwp9OmQt7S3iVuGd2RC49uxZ6zxPkAahFvlqIZwlBHnczeXNBSpWTU6styeyDDKqsSEkgwHqoKqWPAnj1tOKVNPAj6I3z24kP3BaolfhfDITzzFa8SYAUPdqs9d91O92SsiH3SbRKvQ7U7QFnncavhTddJMH5gyXkMzkCFfaJSKnsEhb2NtbVrANlqDULysoznOm2OD1aAexBRynpr7vPX0yML) during this last trip. These groups always blow me away with their heart for America, and I am forever grateful for their service and sacrifice. Any day spent in the company of our nation’s heroes is a great one!

clean_body: TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | | | **Biden’s Risky Gaza Game 🚨 | | The Biden administration’s reckless approach to national security is nothing new, but we may have hit rock bottom as senior officials explore options to from Gaza right here in America. What could possibly go wrong? For starters, we don’t have a spotless track record when it comes to thoroughly vetting the folks we so freely let into our country. Let’s do a quick review of the facts: In 2023 alone, Border Patrol agents encountered people from the terror watch list at our southern border. Dozens of illegal immigrants with are attempting to cross into the U.S. each day. FBI Director Christopher Wray recently about dangerous networks coming across the border—one with ISIS ties. Keep in mind that these are just the people we know of. Amid the downright chaos of of migrants pouring in since President Biden took office, there’s a good chance these numbers could be a whole lot scarier. But I'd also like to remind you that countries a stone’s throw away from Gaza have their borders sealed shut right now. In fact, recent satellite photos show bulldozers clearing land near Egypt’s border with Gaza. Anonymous officials say they’re preparing a that could keep 150,000 people at bay in case of a breach. Let’s face the facts here, folks: Leaders in Egypt, Jordan, and other Arab countries know that a mass exodus from Gaza will bring Hamas militants into their countries, opening them up to a whole host of security problems. How is this simple fact lost on President Biden and his cronies? And let's talk dollars and cents. Every refugee comes with a hefty price tag, from housing aid to other benefits. It seems like this administration's just itching to pile on more costs, consequences be damned. All things considered, it’s insanity to entertain the idea of rolling out the welcome mat for another group we can’t properly vet or pay for. The risks are too great, and in a worst-case scenario, they could prove . We don’t need to import another national security risk—and we sure as heck don’t need to add to our mountain of debt. The U.S. ought to take a play out of Egypt’s book and think about the safety and well-being of our own dadgum country for once. It’s time for the White House to secure our borders, stop the migrant madness, and put America first. | | | | | On The Tennessee Trail 🧡 | | | | | | | I’m picking up speed on the campaign trail, and there’s nothing like face-to-face conversations—especially when it comes to the issues that matter. From the staggering $34 trillion in debt looming over us to the gaping hole in our southern border, East Tennesseans are speaking up about where our nation's headed. At a packed town hall in , folks aired these concerns loud and clear, and I’m bringing all of those worries back to Washington. I’m committed to holding our leaders accountable, and I’m dedicated to fighting for the values that will get America back on track. I’d be remiss if I didn’t mention that I also proudly sponsored a Veterans Breakfast at the during this last trip. These groups always blow me away with their heart for America, and I am forever grateful for their service and sacrifice. Any day spent in the company of our nation’s heroes is a great one! | | | | | Just For Fun 🎉 | | → An unlikely bond 🫶 () → Rescued for life 🐶 ()→ Birds of a feather flock together 🪶 () | | | | | Product Of The Month 🛍 | | | | | | | Please chip in today to help us oust radical Democrats and put a check on the Biden-Harris agenda. | | Stay in Touch 👇 | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Burchett for Congress

Hi there, I grew up right here in our corner of Northern Ohio, and the people in our community work harder than just about anyone else. I think you deserve a Congresswoman who works just as hard as you do, which is why I've made it my mission to never stop fighting for the people who call our district home. Last month was no exception, friend. We got some major things done in April, and I want to share these victories with you! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84275112/471003340/1037629634?refcode=240503_mk_apr_recap_img&ms=240503_mk_apr_recap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2Y1ODRlZi04NTA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vcQqt5szS_ZlSx9Zr6DTOVK8DjEhAdCLPnVkPhBXoOs=) We couldn't have accomplished all of this without your support, friend. name: Colin Allred
subject: A lot can happen in a year
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Hey everybody, it’s Mark Kelly. My friend Colin Allred is running for election to the Senate in 2024, and we’re working to support him. I hope you’ll read the message below from him, and [**consider splitting a donation between Colin's campaign and mine.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-allred.-4YRZz&refcode=em240503-1-30&t=1&akid=5758%2E6688874%2Eg2qGis)
---

[](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-allred.-4YRZz&refcode=em240503-1-30&refcode2=5758.6688874.g2qGis&t=2&akid=5758%2E6688874%2Eg2qGis)
---
WOW, team!
Today marks exactly one year since we launched this campaign to defeat Ted Cruz, and I couldn't be more thrilled with how far we've come.
**How it started:** Immediately after we launched this campaign, election experts from _FiveThirtyEight_ to _Roll Call_ UPGRADED our chances of beating Ted Cruz and officially ranked Texas a "battleground."
**How it's going:** After early polls showed us 5 points down, hundreds of thousands of grassroots supporters like you chipped in to help me travel all over Texas to meet voters and spread our message. **Thanks to you, we have officially pulled EVEN with Ted Cruz in the polls.**
**What's next?** Ted Cruz is terrified of our grassroots movement because we're closer than ever to defeating him. But this race is a long way from over, and he's calling all his millionaire mega donors and special interest allies to try and squash our momentum. We can't let up for even a second.
**That's why, to celebrate the one year anniversary of our campaign, my team and I set an ambitious goal to raise $300,000 by midnight.[Can I count on your split donation between my campaign and Ruben Gallego's to help us get there? Every dollar helps power our grassroots movement and gets us closer to beating Ted Cruz on Election Day.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-allred.-4YRZz&refcode=em240503-1-30&t=3&akid=5758%2E6688874%2Eg2qGis)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1396?c0=mek-em-allred.wOtQ4a&refcode=em240503-1-30&t=22&akid=5758%2E6688874%2Eg2qGis)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1397?c0=mek-em-allred.a9pObk&refcode=em240503-1-30&t=23&akid=5758%2E6688874%2Eg2qGis)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1390?c0=mek-em-allred.KWNcrZ&refcode=em240503-1-30&t=24&akid=5758%2E6688874%2Eg2qGis)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1391?c0=mek-em-allred.qo-rPa&refcode=em240503-1-30&t=25&akid=5758%2E6688874%2Eg2qGis)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1392?c0=mek-em-allred.f5EhlP&refcode=em240503-1-30&t=26&akid=5758%2E6688874%2Eg2qGis)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1395?c0=mek-em-allred.RcnZO0&refcode=em240503-1-30&t=27&akid=5758%2E6688874%2Eg2qGis)**
---
****
I never could've made it this far without you. Thanks for being on my team.
Colin

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=28&akid=5758%2E6688874%2Eg2qGis).

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Double Good Trouble in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
They’re afraid of having one Jayapal in Congress, much less two, because they know we’ll always be Double Good Trouble.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20240503-3835-footer&t=1&akid=3835%2E420207%2Eo0bCcy)
Peter, Super PACs are spending millions to keep my sister and me out of Congress.
**You heard right.** My sister, Susheela, is running for Congress in Oregon’s 3rd Congressional District. She is a bold and effective progressive who has called for a ceasefire and supports Medicare for All. She has been endorsed by Bernie Sanders, labor unions, a diverse coalition of community leaders and, of course, me!
**But big Republican-backed super PACs want to take her down.**
**Why? Maybe it’s because she boldly stands up for peace. Or maybe it’s because she is my sister, and they know**[**I’ve never backed away from a righteous fight no matter how many powerful special interests stand in the way.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240503.qq3dV-&refcode=em20240503-3835&t=2&akid=3835%2E420207%2Eo0bCcy)
**[Donate ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240503.qq3dV-&refcode=em20240503-3835&t=3&akid=3835%2E420207%2Eo0bCcy)**
**So far, dark money Super PACs have poured almost THREE MILLION DOLLARS into this single Congressional race because my sister is ready to stand for what is right.** Reports are showing that some of the GOP megadonors in AIPAC are funding these new Super PACs.
We already knew these GOP megadonors were coming after me, actively recruiting in my district and even launching a poll testing nasty messages against me — but now they’re going after my sister, too?
They’re afraid of having one Jayapal in Congress, much less two, because they know we’ll always be _Double Good Trouble_. We will always stand up for our values and we’ll always stand up for the people.
Let’s show these far-right billionaires that they can’t buy an election. They can’t buy this seat. [**Can you chip in $25 right now to help Susheela and me stand up to Big Money?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240503.qq3dV-&refcode=em20240503-3835&t=4&akid=3835%2E420207%2Eo0bCcy)
**[Donate ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240503.qq3dV-&refcode=em20240503-3835&t=23&akid=3835%2E420207%2Eo0bCcy)**
Whatever you can do is so important to winning Susheela’s race and keeping me in Congress.
Together,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20240503-3835-footer&t=24&refcode2=3835_420207_o0bCcy&akid=3835%2E420207%2Eo0bCcy)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: David Hogg, Leaders We Deserve
subject: Trump vs. a 22 year old teacher
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Hey.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20240503-1&t=1&akid=643%2E587540%2EYS_bZr)
Peter, it's David.
I was recently on the ground in Atlanta to build support for our endorsed candidate Bryce Berry, candidate for State House District 56. **The same district where this happened 🙄:**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240503?refcode=em20240503-1&amount=5&refcode2=643_587540_YS_bZr&akid=643%2E587540%2EYS_bZr)
While Trump was pandering to voters to build up GOP support in this swing district, Leaders We Deserve has been doing everything we can to support Bryce — a middle school algebra teacher in the Atlanta public school system. He’s running to unseat a Republican incumbent who switched parties because she wants to defund public education. **If Bryce wins in November, he’ll be the first-ever public school teacher in the state house and the youngest in the State legislature.**
**This is the most flippable district in Georgia, Peter.** That’s why Trump was there in the first place. Democrats have a real opportunity to elect a leader we deserve here — but Trump and the MAGA Republicans will be doing everything they can to stop us.
**I know we can win in November, but Bryce needs to get through his primary election this month first.** People in Bryce’s district are already voting early, and we need your help to reach as many as possible, tell them about Bryce, and get them out to vote for him.
**[Can you pitch in $5 to support our GOTV efforts and help Bryce win?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20240503?refcode=em20240503-1&amount=5&refcode2=643_587540_YS_bZr&akid=643%2E587540%2EYS_bZr)**

Let's show up big for Bryce today!!
— David

clean_body: Hey. Peter, it's David. I was recently on the ground in Atlanta to build support for our endorsed candidate Bryce Berry, candidate for State House District 56. The same district where this happened 🙄: While Trump was pandering to voters to build up GOP support in this swing district, Leaders We Deserve has been doing everything we can to support Bryce — a middle school algebra teacher in the Atlanta public school system. He’s running to unseat a Republican incumbent who switched parties because she wants to defund public education. If Bryce wins in November, he’ll be the first-ever public school teacher in the state house and the youngest in the State legislature. This is the most flippable district in Georgia, Peter. That’s why Trump was there in the first place. Democrats have a real opportunity to elect a leader we deserve here — but Trump and the MAGA Republicans will be doing everything they can to stop us. I know we can win in November, but Bryce needs to get through his primary election this month first. People in Bryce’s district are already voting early, and we need your help to reach as many as possible, tell them about Bryce, and get them out to vote for him. Let's show up big for Bryce today!! — David

Peter, **You can always count on me to fight for our veterans. ** I am proud to have served my country in the Army Reserve for 27 years. The values I gained in the Army taught me to serve the greater good, and I took these values with me to my public service and Congress. We have come a long way in supporting our veterans, **_but there is still so much more to do. _**
---

name: Bryan
subject: Kenosha Police Association Endorsed My Campaign
body:
I will always stand with the men and women of law enforcement. | | | | |
---
**I was honored to receive the endorsement of the Kenosha Professional Police Association.**
I will never waver in my support for the men and women of law enforcement. I believe that supporting law enforcement is critical to the safety of our communities.
I consider supporting policies that ensure the safety and security of our community a key responsibility for any member of Congress.
Unfortunately, this is not a priority for the dark money groups that are spending millions of dollars to defeat me.
They’ve already spent **$2.3 million** attacking me this cycle.
The issues that are important to left-wing dark money donors are not the issues that are important to me and the rest of the hard-working people in Wisconsin’s First Congressional District.
**I need your help to fight back.**
If you’re willing and able, donating to my campaign will help me fight back against the attack ads they’re running against me.

Look, Folks, the state of our nation is dark as coffin air, right now.

Disruptors halt traffic across the country, woke mobs rule our college campuses, and antisemitism is running rampant across our beautiful nation.

**It should not go unnoticed that President Biden can stop all of these riots on a dime–** _simply withholding federal funding for radical, Hamas-sympathizing institutions would give them a desperately needed reality check._

The truth is that Biden is seeking political gain over protecting the rights of our Jewish brothers and sisters. He is terrified to lose more of his voter base, which even CNN just reported is shrinking faster than ever.

**The majority of Americans would vote for the guy who salts their fries at McDonald's before they would vote for President Biden._And the White House knows this..._**

There is a substantial Hamas wing of the Democratic Party that believes in **_Diversity, Equity, and the Right to Kill Jews._** Joe Biden can't afford to upset these folks and lose their votes. In fact, he's making sure the college rioters get plenty of food and water to continue! The moral of the story? **You're _never_ too old to suck, Joe Biden.**

We can't allow these jackwagons to continue their charades on college campuses. Joe has weak policies and even weaker morals. In the America where I grew up, you never turned your back on an ally.

Stand up and tell Joe Biden to get control of the madness taking place on college campuses.

clean_body: Folks, our country was founded by geniuses, but it's being run by idiots. | Look, Folks, the state of our nation is dark as coffin air, right now. Disruptors halt traffic across the country, woke mobs rule our college campuses, and antisemitism is running rampant across our beautiful nation. It should not go unnoticed that President Biden can stop all of these riots on a dime– simply withholding federal funding for radical, Hamas-sympathizing institutions would give them a desperately needed reality check. | The truth is that Biden is seeking political gain over protecting the rights of our Jewish brothers and sisters. He is terrified to lose more of his voter base, which even CNN just reported is shrinking faster than ever. The majority of Americans would vote for the guy who salts their fries at McDonald's before they would vote for President Biden.And the White House knows this... There is a substantial Hamas wing of the Democratic Party that believes in Diversity, Equity, and the Right to Kill Jews. Joe Biden can't afford to upset these folks and lose their votes. In fact, he's making sure the college rioters get plenty of food and water to continue! The moral of the story? You're never too old to suck, Joe Biden. We can't allow these jackwagons to continue their charades on college campuses. Joe has weak policies and even weaker morals. In the America where I grew up, you never turned your back on an ally. Stand up and tell Joe Biden to get control of the madness taking place on college campuses. The United States Constitution protects ALL people, whether Joe Biden likes it or not. Someone's got to hold him to it– protect Jewish citizens and stop enabling pro-Hamas institutions. But I can't do it by myself. I completely rely on support from rational thinkers like you, my friend. God Bless, Senator Kennedy Folks, our country was founded by geniuses but it's being run by idiots. And if you trust the government, well then you obviously failed history class. Paid for by John Kennedy for Us John Kennedy for Us P.O. subject: Abortion ban REPEALED →

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84276253/471007229/-1414337131?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmM5ZTQzYjYtODgwOS1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hBXWeHYig660O1KROvLe6w2rqHMDSiyghTdG_WC-L0g=)
Team,

**The 1864 near-total abortion ban here in Arizona has officially been repealed.**

Arizona lawmakers voted to undo the Supreme Court’s decision, and Democratic Gov. Katie Hobbs signed the repeal yesterday. This is a huge step forward in our mission to protect reproductive health care in Arizona and across the country.

There are still a lot of questions though – like when will the repeal take place. And let’s not forget the cruelty of this ban: There were zero exceptions for rape or incest, and the ban even went so far as to prosecute and jail anyone who aids with abortions – from your doctor to your loved one.

**Make no mistake: the fight is far from over.** Extremists like David Schweikert will stop at nothing to take away reproductive rights. He voted for a national abortion ban and even cosponsored anti-choice legislation with no carve outs for IVF.

We have work to do.

This November, Arizonans will have the opportunity to enshrine abortion access in the state constitution. And in our race in AZ-01, we can unseat one of the worst anti-abortion extremists in Congress.

We can’t take our foot off the gas. We must continue to reach voters so everyone, regardless of zip code, has access to abortion and reproductive care.

**[If you’re with me, will you chip in $3 right now? Every dollar helps us in our battle to defeat MAGA Republican Schweikert, flip the House blue, and protect abortion rights for all.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84276254/471007230/-1414337131?refcode=em-5.3.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYwODgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmM5ZTQzYjYtODgwOS1lZjExLTk2ZjMtN2MxZTUyMWIwN2Y5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hBXWeHYig660O1KROvLe6w2rqHMDSiyghTdG_WC-L0g=)**

clean_body: | = Team, The 1864 near-total abortion ban here in Arizona has officially been repealed. Arizona lawmakers voted to undo the Supreme Court’s decision, and Democratic Gov. Katie Hobbs signed the repeal yesterday. This is a huge step forward in our mission to protect reproductive health care in Arizona and across the country. There are still a lot of questions though – like when will the repeal take place. And let’s not forget the cruelty of this ban: There were zero exceptions for rape or incest, and the ban even went so far as to prosecute and jail anyone who aids with abortions – from your doctor to your loved one. Make no mistake: the fight is far from over. Extremists like David Schweikert will stop at nothing to take away reproductive rights. He voted for a national abortion ban and even cosponsored anti-choice legislation with no carve outs for IVF. We have work to do. This November, Arizonans will have the opportunity to enshrine abortion access in the state constitution. And in our race in AZ-01, we can unseat one of the worst anti-abortion extremists in Congress. We can’t take our foot off the gas. We must continue to reach voters so everyone, regardless of zip code, has access to abortion and reproductive care. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Marlene P.S. https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5]
Democrats,
We hate to reach out with bad news, but this is serious: an extreme, near-total abortion ban has just gone into effect in Florida.
Thanks to Donald Trump's efforts to overturn Roe v. Wade , there are no longer protections in place for states like Florida. In too many states, extreme bans are now the law of the land.
STOP EXTREME BANS [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-may24-fldems?&refcode=&amount=]Make no mistake, team – Republicans have created a healthcare crisis for women across the country. This is the most egregious infringement of reproductive rights in over 50 years .
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-may24-fldems?&refcode=20240503_FR_45DO_FLDem [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-may24-fldems?&refcode=20240503_FR_45DO_FLDem]Here in California, we know what it's like to fight for reproductive rights and win. We knocked on doors, we called voters, we talked to our neighbors, and we scattered yard signs across the state. Now, our friends in Florida are working hard to do the same, and they need OUR help. That's why we're standing with Florida Democrats to help them fight for reproductive rights. This isn't just a Florida issue; it's a freedom issue.
We need to do everything we can to fight back against extreme abortion bans. With 1 in 3 American women of reproductive age now living under an abortion ban, they're at risk of being:
🏥 Turned away from emergency rooms and life-saving medical treatment.
⚖️ Forced to go to court to seek permission for necessary medical attention.
🚙 Required to travel hundreds of miles to receive health care, if they make it that far.
In 2024, we’re in the fight for women’s lives.
Team, we're urgently asking: Will you split a donation between us and the Florida Democrats to defend reproductive rights, protect women's lives, and fight back against anti-abortion extremism plaguing our nation? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-may24-fldems?&refcode=&amount=]

body:
What happens when the left takes over | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us1.campaign-archive.com/?e=c50c08d277&u=bfee6d8faa8bd945842640631&id=bad529caf9)

|
# When the Left Takes Over
---
| |
---
|
---
|
The radical left’s grip on our nation’s universities reached a deeply troubling peak at Columbia University, where pro-Hamas mobs seized control of the campus. They illegally occupied university buildings, smashed windows, and harassed Jewish students with reprehensible anti-Semitic rhetoric and threats. Instead of standing firm against these lawbreakers, Columbia’s weak-willed administrators allowed the chaos to escalate unchecked. It took hundreds of NYPD officers in riot gear to finally restore order and reclaim the university for peaceful and lawful purposes.

This event serves as a stark warning of the left’s dangerous agenda seeping into our institutions. Universities should be bastions of free speech and learning, not breeding grounds for extremism and hate. By allowing this lawlessness, Columbia sets a dangerous precedent for other campuses across the country, where similar radical groups could embolden themselves to challenge authority and disrupt academic environments.

We must protect our universities and our country from this insidious threat. This is a pivotal moment in our ongoing fight against the leftist agenda. Let’s take a stand, speak out, and **Save America Now**.

---

clean_body: What happens when the left takes over | | | | | | When the Left Takes Over | | | | The radical left’s grip on our nation’s universities reached a deeply troubling peak at Columbia University, where pro-Hamas mobs seized control of the campus. They illegally occupied university buildings, smashed windows, and harassed Jewish students with reprehensible anti-Semitic rhetoric and threats. Instead of standing firm against these lawbreakers, Columbia’s weak-willed administrators allowed the chaos to escalate unchecked. It took hundreds of NYPD officers in riot gear to finally restore order and reclaim the university for peaceful and lawful purposes. This event serves as a stark warning of the left’s dangerous agenda seeping into our institutions. Universities should be bastions of free speech and learning, not breeding grounds for extremism and hate. By allowing this lawlessness, Columbia sets a dangerous precedent for other campuses across the country, where similar radical groups could embolden themselves to challenge authority and disrupt academic environments. We must protect our universities and our country from this insidious threat. This is a pivotal moment in our ongoing fight against the leftist agenda. Let’s take a stand, speak out, and Save America Now. | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2024 Save America Now PAC, All rights reserved. You opted-in to receive updates from Save America Now PAC. name: Lizzie Pannill Fletcher
subject: What we’re hearing from #TeamLizzie
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie-reelect-logo-outlined.png]
Last month, I asked you to share the issues and concerns on your mind as well your hopes as we get closer to Election Day. We received many thoughtful responses and I want to share some highlights with you.
Several people mentioned concerns over abortion rights, access to health care, education, and common-sense gun safety measures. When sharing hopes for the future, many people said they hope to see President Biden win re-election and Colin Allred win Texas’ Senate seat. Several also shared deep concerns about the future of our democracy and voting rights, stressing the importance of doing everything we can to protect them for the future.
I share many of these hopes and concerns, too. If we’re going to address them—in Congress and elsewhere—we have to win elections. And that’s what we are working on here—winning our race in #TX07 and helping Democrats win back the House, sending Colin Allred to the Senate, and re-electing President Biden.
The November election is now just six months away. Our team is working hard to prepare for our race and to support these other important races up and down the ballot happening across our state and country.
Thanks to you, we are doing great work, and I am optimistic about what we can accomplish. We will have lots of things to do in the next few months, and I look forward to keeping you posted on all that we are doing and how we can do those things together.
Together, we can do anything,
Lizzie Signature [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie_signature-1.png]

name: Derek Marshall
subject: Courage is contagious
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
| | |
Peter, more than 200 days have passed since the war began in Gaza, and more than 34,000 people (mostly women and children) have been killed in the most densely populated territory on Earth. There are 2.3 million people trapped in Gaza. They have nowhere to go. They have no homes. They have no schools. Hospitals have been reduced to rubble. They have been ordered to evacuate one area only to be bombed, starved, and forced to flee once again. They are on the brink of famine. My heart is with suffering Gazans, the Israeli hostages, and all of the people who have been traumatized by this war. It is also with the students across the country who are sounding the alarm of our collective conscience. If we listen, we have an opportunity to change course and avoid compounding catastrophes. It is incumbent upon us to join their calls for peace and also stand up to antisemitism, Islamophobia, and white supremacy. After all, peace can only be achieved by recognizing the humanity and equality _in all of us._ I stand with the peaceful protestors and call on authorities to respect their rights to peaceful assembly and free speech. Like mass student protests of the past, they are demanding a better world, and with that, I stand in solidarity. Courage is contagious.

name: Team ECU/LAV Action
subject: Abortion rights are on the ballot!
body:
Almost 2 years after the overturning of Roe v. Wade, we are still grappling with the consequences. Women are fleeing their states to receive healthcare and courts nationwide continue to uphold incredibly restrictive abortion bans.| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84277658/471012154/444630146?refcode=5-3-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU3NDYzMTNjLThjMDktZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MlFNVsuy9H70SqwY-X_g_SodS8FCyvdWqQmzgMUsNDE=)
---
| | Friend, Almost 2 years after the overturning of _Roe v. Wade_ , we are still grappling with the consequences. Women are fleeing their states to receive healthcare and courts nationwide continue to uphold incredibly restrictive abortion bans. And on top of all of this, Florida’s six-week abortion ban goes into effect this week, leaving vulnerable people in the South with even less options to receive care. Experts warned that state courts would continue limiting abortion access in the aftermath of the _Dobbs_ decision in 2022, and that is exactly what is happening in Florida right now. People who are in desperate need of reproductive care will have nowhere to turn, and this is due to the dark money conservative capture of our judicial system. **[The Florida abortion ban and those in other states across the country are examples of how conservative billionaires have captured courts across the country and paved the way for the erosion of our fundamental rights and freedoms. It’s up to all of us to keep fighting for a judicial system that represents the will of the people and not just conservative billionaires. Stand with us in this fight and chip in $10 right now to help us bring sanity and balance back to our courts.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84277659/471012157/444630146?refcode=5-3-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU3NDYzMTNjLThjMDktZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MlFNVsuy9H70SqwY-X_g_SodS8FCyvdWqQmzgMUsNDE=)** The corruption of the Supreme Court led to the overturn of _Roe v. Wade_. After crippling our campaign finance system and steadily eroding voting rights, extremists and mega-donors like Leonard Leo and the Koch Network finally chipped away at one of our most fundamental rights: the right to choose. Restricting abortion access puts people in dangerous situations and if Florida voters do not vote to protect abortion in November, even more people will be put in harm's way. **[So as conservatives continue to have significant sway over the court system’s decisions, it’s more important than ever to protect reproductive care throughout the country. Americans deserve better than a supreme court that doesn’t care about their healthcare. Please contribute $10 now and we can work together to fight for an unbiased, independent judiciary.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84277660/471012158/444630146?refcode=5-3-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU3NDYzMTNjLThjMDktZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MlFNVsuy9H70SqwY-X_g_SodS8FCyvdWqQmzgMUsNDE=)** Thank you,— Team ECU/LAV Action

clean_body: Almost 2 years after the overturning of Roe v. Wade, we are still grappling with the consequences. Women are fleeing their states to receive healthcare and courts nationwide continue to uphold incredibly restrictive abortion bans.| | | = | | Friend, Almost 2 years after the overturning of Roe v. Wade , we are still grappling with the consequences. Women are fleeing their states to receive healthcare and courts nationwide continue to uphold incredibly restrictive abortion bans. And on top of all of this, Florida’s six-week abortion ban goes into effect this week, leaving vulnerable people in the South with even less options to receive care. Experts warned that state courts would continue limiting abortion access in the aftermath of the Dobbs decision in 2022, and that is exactly what is happening in Florida right now. People who are in desperate need of reproductive care will have nowhere to turn, and this is due to the dark money conservative capture of our judicial system. = The corruption of the Supreme Court led to the overturn of Roe v. Wade. After crippling our campaign finance system and steadily eroding voting rights, extremists and mega-donors like Leonard Leo and the Koch Network finally chipped away at one of our most fundamental rights: the right to choose. Restricting abortion access puts people in dangerous situations and if Florida voters do not vote to protect abortion in November, even more people will be put in harm's way. = Thank you,— Team ECU/LAV Action | | United States Postal Service is not associated or affiliated with End Citizens United Action Fund and has not sponsored or approved of this communication. | | Contributions to End Citizens United//Let America Vote Action Fund are not tax deductible. Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. _[If you were forwarded this newsletter, you can sign up to receive the Kernel every week by clicking here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84277848/471012811/1416943042?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmExNjMxMi04ZDA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W1Uzm0dqRErlBHsFtO9aO3u7A7WX0g9HkZ5M81Fcg00=&emci=ff208fb4-8109-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=82a16312-8d09-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=4925535)_ **** _Primary Election Day This Coming Tuesday_ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84277849/471012812/912310190?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmExNjMxMi04ZDA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W1Uzm0dqRErlBHsFtO9aO3u7A7WX0g9HkZ5M81Fcg00=&emci=ff208fb4-8109-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=82a16312-8d09-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=4925535)**[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84277850/471012813/912310190?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmExNjMxMi04ZDA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W1Uzm0dqRErlBHsFtO9aO3u7A7WX0g9HkZ5M81Fcg00=&emci=ff208fb4-8109-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=82a16312-8d09-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=4925535) We are just a handful of days out from the May Primary Election, and your last chances to early vote are tomorrow and Monday. County offices and certain satellite locations will be open across the state on Saturday, and until Noon on Monday. [Go to indianavoters.com to find out more information about your county's early voting opportunities.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84277852/471012815/2120319247?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmExNjMxMi04ZDA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W1Uzm0dqRErlBHsFtO9aO3u7A7WX0g9HkZ5M81Fcg00=&emci=ff208fb4-8109-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=82a16312-8d09-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=4925535) If you plan to vote on Tuesday, your regular polling site will be open from 6 a.m - 6 p.m. local time. Make sure to bring your photo ID when going to vote. **** _Republican Supermajority Putting Local School Districts At-Risk_ Four more local school districts across Indiana will be asking for referendum dollars from local taxpayers at the ballot box this primary. It is unsustainable that the Republican supermajority is forcing schools to ask taxpayers to choose between closing schools and raising local taxes when we have billions in state surplus. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84277853/471012816/-1601722138?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmExNjMxMi04ZDA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W1Uzm0dqRErlBHsFtO9aO3u7A7WX0g9HkZ5M81Fcg00=&emci=ff208fb4-8109-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=82a16312-8d09-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=4925535)**[ Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84277855/471012817/-1601722138?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmExNjMxMi04ZDA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W1Uzm0dqRErlBHsFtO9aO3u7A7WX0g9HkZ5M81Fcg00=&emci=ff208fb4-8109-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=82a16312-8d09-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=4925535) This November, we can break their supermajority, and replace it with a legislature that will support our schools, and local taxpayers. Our school districts souldn't have to ask for essential funds when Indiana has billions in surplus. ****_Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks._ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84277856/471012818/-1168428164?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmExNjMxMi04ZDA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W1Uzm0dqRErlBHsFtO9aO3u7A7WX0g9HkZ5M81Fcg00=&emci=ff208fb4-8109-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=82a16312-8d09-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=4925535)**[ Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84277857/471012820/-1168428164?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmExNjMxMi04ZDA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W1Uzm0dqRErlBHsFtO9aO3u7A7WX0g9HkZ5M81Fcg00=&emci=ff208fb4-8109-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=82a16312-8d09-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=4925535) News broke this week that the Biden administration plans on reclassifying cannabis as a schedule III drug from a schedule I drug. This is a common sense move supported by the vast the majority of Hoosiers and Americans, and changes the calculus for potential cannabis legalization in Indiana in the future. Here's what State Rep. Kyle Miller (Fort Wayne) [had to say](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84277858/471012821/-1252564789?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmExNjMxMi04ZDA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W1Uzm0dqRErlBHsFtO9aO3u7A7WX0g9HkZ5M81Fcg00=&emci=ff208fb4-8109-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=82a16312-8d09-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=4925535): “I think it’s a big first step. Down in the statehouse, quite possibly the biggest excuse we hear for not legalizing it is they have to make some moves at the federal level. And until they do that, we can’t do anything, which has always been just an excuse.” ****
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84277860/471012823/-1242448755?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmExNjMxMi04ZDA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W1Uzm0dqRErlBHsFtO9aO3u7A7WX0g9HkZ5M81Fcg00=&emci=ff208fb4-8109-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=82a16312-8d09-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=4925535)**[Share Rep. Frank J. Victoria Garcia Wilburn](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84277869/471012832/-1582305634?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmExNjMxMi04ZDA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W1Uzm0dqRErlBHsFtO9aO3u7A7WX0g9HkZ5M81Fcg00=&emci=ff208fb4-8109-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=82a16312-8d09-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=4925535) **_Become a Delegate to the 2024 State and National Conventions_** [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84277871/471012833/100484837?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmExNjMxMi04ZDA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W1Uzm0dqRErlBHsFtO9aO3u7A7WX0g9HkZ5M81Fcg00=&emci=ff208fb4-8109-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=82a16312-8d09-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=4925535) Stay up-to-date with the latest news and updates on the 2024 Delegate Selection process. Head to [our website](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84277872/471012835/100484837?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmExNjMxMi04ZDA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W1Uzm0dqRErlBHsFtO9aO3u7A7WX0g9HkZ5M81Fcg00=&emci=ff208fb4-8109-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=82a16312-8d09-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=4925535) for more information about how to be a part of history next year in Chicago. _**Sign Up to be a Rust Belt Rising Spring 2024 Leader**_ ****

RBR's sessions allow you to learn from some of the best practitioners in our region to gain strategies to draw on in your campaign.

Being part of this Rising cohort means receiving free individual support for developing your authentic message and effective tactics to win as well as connecting with other leaders in the Great Lakes states. Rising works with candidates for any level of office (local, state, or federal) in Wisconsin, Pennsylvania, Michigan, Ohio, Indiana, and Illinois as well as staffers and volunteer activists who are helping their local campaigns. clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. ** Primary Election Day This Coming Tuesday We are just a handful of days out from the May Primary Election, and your last chances to early vote are tomorrow and Monday. County offices and certain satellite locations will be open across the state on Saturday, and until Noon on Monday. If you plan to vote on Tuesday, your regular polling site will be open from 6 a.m - 6 p.m. local time. Make sure to bring your photo ID when going to vote. Republican Supermajority Putting Local School Districts At-Risk Four more local school districts across Indiana will be asking for referendum dollars from local taxpayers at the ballot box this primary. It is unsustainable that the Republican supermajority is forcing schools to ask taxpayers to choose between closing schools and raising local taxes when we have billions in state surplus. This November, we can break their supermajority, and replace it with a legislature that will support our schools, and local taxpayers. Our school districts souldn't have to ask for essential funds when Indiana has billions in surplus. Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. News broke this week that the Biden administration plans on reclassifying cannabis as a schedule III drug from a schedule I drug. This is a common sense move supported by the vast the majority of Hoosiers and Americans, and changes the calculus for potential cannabis legalization in Indiana in the future. Here's what State Rep. Kyle Miller (Fort Wayne) : “I think it’s a big first step. Down in the statehouse, quite possibly the biggest excuse we hear for not legalizing it is they have to make some moves at the federal level. And until they do that, we can’t do anything, which has always been just an excuse.” Become a Delegate to the 2024 State and National Conventions Stay up-to-date with the latest news and updates on the 2024 Delegate Selection process. Head to for more information about how to be a part of history next year in Chicago. Sign Up to be a Rust Belt Rising Spring 2024 Leader RBR's sessions allow you to learn from some of the best practitioners in our region to gain strategies to draw on in your campaign. Being part of this Rising cohort means receiving free individual support for developing your authentic message and effective tactics to win as well as connecting with other leaders in the Great Lakes states. Rising works with candidates for any level of office (local, state, or federal) in Wisconsin, Pennsylvania, Michigan, Ohio, Indiana, and Illinois as well as staffers and volunteer activists who are helping their local campaigns. Get Involved! Opportunities to Volunteer Near You! The 2024 campaign season is getting started, and campaigns around the state are needing help! Find an event near you and get involved to help First Draft of 2024 Party Platform Open for Comments The first draft of the Indiana Democratic Party's 2024 Platform -- The Crossroads Committment -- is available for comment We invite Hoosiers to read the first draft of our platform, which champions women's rights, healthcare access, local schools, environmental protections, veterans programs, and more. Comments will be open until May 29. Upcoming Candidate Trainings Monday, May 6: Join the National Democratic Training Committee on Monday, May 6th from 1-2 pm ET for a free virtual live training on Developing Your Campaign's Core Message , designed to help build your core message for your campaign. body:

| Peter,

**I wanted to take a moment to say thank you for all your support this past month!!**

April was a big month for our campaign – we officially have our Republican opponent for November, and this grassroots campaign stepped up big time to ensure we hit our monthly fundraising goal.

**As we move forward, the stakes are higher than ever. Ryan Mackenzie, backed by National Republicans, has wasted no time launching attacks against our campaign. They're prepared to spend big to defeat us, but we won't back down.**

Your support is crucial now more than ever. With your help, we can fight back against special interests, counter the onslaught of negative advertising, and ensure our message reaches every voter across the Lehigh Valley.

clean_body: April was a big month for our campaign – we officially have our Republican opponent for November, and this grassroots campaign stepped up big time to ensure we hit our monthly fundraising goal. | = | Peter, I wanted to take a moment to say thank you for all your support this past month!! April was a big month for our campaign – we officially have our Republican opponent for November, and this grassroots campaign stepped up big time to ensure we hit our monthly fundraising goal. As we move forward, the stakes are higher than ever. Ryan Mackenzie, backed by National Republicans, has wasted no time launching attacks against our campaign. They're prepared to spend big to defeat us, but we won't back down. Your support is crucial now more than ever. With your help, we can fight back against special interests, counter the onslaught of negative advertising, and ensure our message reaches every voter across the Lehigh Valley. = | = | = | = | = | = With gratitude, Susan | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. clean_body: Here’s why your support for our race to flip Wisconsin’s Senate seat RED is so important: | Fellow Conservative, Wisconsin will determine who controls the Senate Majority AND Presidency. Polling shows this race is tied at 50-50! Chuck Schumer has made defending Tammy Baldwin his TOP priority. Every voter we reach could determine the outcome of the election and the Democrats are already heavily invested in stopping us. Sincerely, Eric Hovde Republican for U.S. Senate | | MEET ERIC Eric's a fourth-generation Wisconsinite, born and raised in the Madison area. He's a serial entrepreneur. He founded and managed his first business in his twenties and then went on to start and build many others. When he is not running his businesses, he is focused on his family and his philanthropic endeavors. He and his brother Steve operate 10 Hovde Homes around the world that provide shelter, supportive services and love to vulnerable children. Join the Conversation:** | Paid for by Hovde for Wisconsin

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84278186/471013759/1596212816?refcode=2024-05-03-icymi&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=74b9ab30-8e09-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGI5YWIzMC04ZTA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UjCvICw6S1WzszQV-BqiYaJ2GMcdLCIIQVC8lRitA9o=) **Thanks to redistricting, Edmonds was recently added to Washington's second district.** By communicating with and relying on the expertise and knowledge of local officials and the people of Edmonds, I can use my position in Congress to better support the region.**Thus far, I have enjoyed working with constituents in Edmonds to tackle issues of transportation, education, and opioid addiction.** Beyond just being a representative in Congress, I am a born and raised Washingtonian, so this community is incredibly important to me, and being an active community member is integral to the success of my work. **My efforts on the Transportation and Infrastructure Committee have helped deliver for Edmonds and Washington more broadly.** I helped secure a $4.8 million grant from the Federal Transit Administration to help retrofit six ferries. In 2022, the Edmonds-Kingston ferry route had a 15% increase in ridership largely attributed to service restoration. I will continue working to bring investments in infrastructure that benefit all Washingtonians. **The opioid crisis is another important issue to tackle in Edmonds and the region more broadly.** I believe in four main frameworks to tackle the opioid crisis: prevention, interdiction, treatment, and sustained recovery. We have already seen progress using this approach, utilizing community strength, and supporting community-level recovery programs. **Addiction is not a moral failing, but a disease that requires treatment and support for recovery.** Edmonds is an important part of our district, and I am eager to strengthen my relationships in Edmonds and across Northwest Washington so that I am always working for you. _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

name: Justice Democrats
subject: BREAKING: Moderate Rep. Henry Cuellar indicted
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Breaking news, Peter: Moderate
U.S. Rep. Henry Cuellar was just indicted on more than a DOZEN federal
charges.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240503-2.q8jlii&refcode=em20240503-34622&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1001&akid=34622%2E1203867%2ENSXlip ]CBS News: Democratic Rep. Henry Cuellar and wife indicted on federal
bribery charges

The charges allege Cuellar and his wife “took hundreds of thousands of
dollars in bribes from an oil company owned by the government of
Azerbaijan and a Mexican bank,” according to CBS News.

Justice Democrats has been calling out Cuellar’s corruption since 2020,
but special interests like AIPAC flooded in to buy this seat for an
anti-abortion, corrupt moderate.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240503-2.q8jlii&refcode=em20240503-34622&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1002&akid=34622%2E1203867%2ENSXlip ]Can you chip in right now to help us recruit more progressives to
primary bad Democrats like Cuellar and build our bloc of members who fight
for everyday people?

In 2020, Justice Democrats endorsed progressive candidate Jessica Cisneros
in her primary challenge against Cuellar, the last anti-abortion Democrat
in Congress. In addition to the outside spending, Cuellar was boosted by
the Democratic establishment, which chose to prioritize an anti-choice
incumbent over a progressive challenger who believes in the party’s core
principles.

Jessica lost by only 281 votes against a corrupt politician because
special interests flooded to support him and the establishment sided with
the status quo. Now in 2024, special interests like AIPAC are flocking to
spend $100 million in GOP megadonor money to beat our progressive
incumbents like Jamaal Bowman and Cori Bush.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240503-2.q8jlii&refcode=em20240503-34622&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1003&akid=34622%2E1203867%2ENSXlip ]Pitch in $5 or whatever you can afford to fuel our work
to protect Jamaal, Cori, and the rest of the Squad this year while
building the resources to send more progressives to Congress →

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240503-2.q8jlii&refcode=em20240503-34622&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1022&akid=34622%2E1203867%2ENSXlip ]Contribute $5

— Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240503-34622-footer&t=1023&refcode2=34622_1203867_NSXlip&akid=34622%2E1203867%2ENSXlip

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. name: Sheldon Whitehouse
subject: Help me protect American democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
It’s been clear for a long time that the Supreme Court has a corruption problem

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84279471/471017814/-1205234676?refcode=mw_em_240503_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzM0YWI4ZS05MDA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c-VRSAHfmG2x2jWWbwpRHCDgg3pSXWtyE5HmhscPU0o=) Derek,

**I’m running for re-election in Rhode Island for the United States Senate.**_**[I’m hoping you’ll split a $5 donation between my campaign and Mark Warner’s](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84279472/471017815/-1205234676?refcode=mw_em_240503_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzM0YWI4ZS05MDA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c-VRSAHfmG2x2jWWbwpRHCDgg3pSXWtyE5HmhscPU0o=)**_**– and here’s why.**

_It’s been clear for a long time that the Supreme Court has a corruption problem._ I recently published a law review article highlighting how this captured Supreme Court often simply makes up false facts to arrive at decisions that ultimately benefit partisan Republican special interests.

Take _Citizens United v. FEC_ as an example. Remember when the Federalist Society justices said that all the unlimited political spending they were unleashing would be “transparent”? Well, we’ve seen dark money in politics prove them wrong several billion times over.

Our system is designed to leave fact-finding to the lower courts that hear testimony, make credibility determinations, and review evidence. The Supreme Court is then supposed to defer to – and not alter – factual records in its decisions. Think about it: if the Highest Court in the Land makes up phony facts, there is nowhere else the parties can appeal to.

The captured Roberts Court has done a lot of this phony fact-finding in big decisions that have fundamentally changed life in America. The Dobbs decision that ended a fundamental freedom for women is another one that was built on made-up history. How are the American people supposed to trust a Court that makes up its own rules to concoct decisions that suit right-wing special interests?

_**[I won’t give up my fight to improve transparency and accountability at the Supreme Court, but I need your help. Split a contribution today to send me back to the Senate so I can protect American democracy and make sure our Court is giving Americans the fair shake they deserve.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84279473/471017816/-1205234676?refcode=mw_em_240503_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzM0YWI4ZS05MDA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c-VRSAHfmG2x2jWWbwpRHCDgg3pSXWtyE5HmhscPU0o=)**_

Americans deserve a Court that plays by the rules.

\- Sheldon Whitehouse ****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84279474/471017817/-1205234676?refcode=mw_em_240503_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMzM0YWI4ZS05MDA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c-VRSAHfmG2x2jWWbwpRHCDgg3pSXWtyE5HmhscPU0o=)****

* * *

Williamsburg, VA 23185

body:
Please don’t delete.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84279531/471018098/1328794144?refcode=ea.6a359eaa-9009-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ms=ea.6a359eaa-9009-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZhMzU5ZWFhLTkwMDktZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UyHlHzGaj75x-D_Tp5AS4vldCY8--Wd4LorIXYVLrRM=&emci=560db42b-6b09-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=6a359eaa-9009-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=4823105)
---
Tomorrow, the Port of Brownsville Navigation District Commission — situated on the southernmost tip of Texas, directly across the border from Mexico — faces a monumental election. This port is one of the largest shipping ports in the United States and plays a crucial role in our fight against the climate crisis. **[This is a long and important email, but the bottom line is this: Jane PAC is at the forefront of critical local elections — like the one happening in South Texas tomorrow — and we need your help to elect climate advocates who will put the health and safety of their community ahead of the profits of the greedy fossil fuel industry. Donate now to join the fight >>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84279538/471018106/2105508926?refcode=ea.6a359eaa-9009-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ms=ea.6a359eaa-9009-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZhMzU5ZWFhLTkwMDktZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UyHlHzGaj75x-D_Tp5AS4vldCY8--Wd4LorIXYVLrRM=)** As a key conduit for large-scale industrial and LNG (liquefied natural gas) projects, the decisions made here have far-reaching implications for regional and global environmental health. For example, the Rio Grande liquefied natural gas project, one of the largest proposed LNG export facilities worldwide, hinges on this election. Its approval could severely impact local ecosystems and escalate global emissions. Electing commissioners who prioritize sustainable practices could impose necessary restrictions or conditions on this and similar projects — and ensure that development does not come at the expense of the environment or public health. **The Jane Fonda Climate PAC is proud to support the 'Port For All' slate — three candidates committed to turning the tide against fossil fuel dominance. If they win, they could gain a majority on the Port board (which has a total of 5 seats!) and put the community on a path to a clean energy future:**
* 🌍 **Patrick Everitt (Place 1):** With his expertise as an investigator for the Texas Commission on Environmental Quality, Patrick is dedicated to shielding our community from pollution and spearheading the transition to renewable energy sources at the port.

* 🌍 **Andres Rios (Place 3):** As a CFO with an extensive business background, Andres brings a wealth of experience in fostering clean economic development and will advocate for a just transition to a sustainable economy.

* 🌍 **Josette Cruz Hinojosa (Place 5):** An activist and community organizer, Josette's leadership promises to break the cycle of fracking and advocate for healthier energy alternatives.

These climate champions will reject and impose strict conditions on projects like the Rio Grande LNG that compromise our environment and health. They will advocate for the rights of landowners against the injustices of eminent domain for pipeline construction, and they will champion clean, sustainable jobs and energy solutions for Texas. Our team has invested significant resources in this race because we know how often races like this fly under the radar. From phone banking to help get out the vote to directly contributing thousands of dollars to each candidate’s campaign, to supporting partner organizations working in the region to providing essential guidance on things like press outreach and social media support, we’re pulling out all the stops. We’re doing everything we can to ensure the Port of Brownsville is a Port for All, not just another hub for enriching corporate polluters. **This election is a pivotal point in our larger battle against the climate crisis. Your support right now could not be more crucial.[Every dollar you donate today will empower our mission to mobilize voters, back our endorsed candidates, and ensure that our voices are heard loud and clear against the greedy fossil fuel industry in 2024 and beyond >>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84279539/471018111/2105508926?refcode=ea.6a359eaa-9009-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ms=ea.6a359eaa-9009-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZhMzU5ZWFhLTkwMDktZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UyHlHzGaj75x-D_Tp5AS4vldCY8--Wd4LorIXYVLrRM=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $5**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84279541/471018112/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.6a359eaa-9009-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ms=ea.6a359eaa-9009-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZhMzU5ZWFhLTkwMDktZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UyHlHzGaj75x-D_Tp5AS4vldCY8--Wd4LorIXYVLrRM=) | [**DONATE $10**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84279543/471018120/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=ea.6a359eaa-9009-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ms=ea.6a359eaa-9009-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZhMzU5ZWFhLTkwMDktZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UyHlHzGaj75x-D_Tp5AS4vldCY8--Wd4LorIXYVLrRM=)

clean_body: Please don’t delete. | Tomorrow, the Port of Brownsville Navigation District Commission — situated on the southernmost tip of Texas, directly across the border from Mexico — faces a monumental election. This port is one of the largest shipping ports in the United States and plays a crucial role in our fight against the climate crisis. = As a key conduit for large-scale industrial and LNG (liquefied natural gas) projects, the decisions made here have far-reaching implications for regional and global environmental health. For example, the Rio Grande liquefied natural gas project, one of the largest proposed LNG export facilities worldwide, hinges on this election. Its approval could severely impact local ecosystems and escalate global emissions. Electing commissioners who prioritize sustainable practices could impose necessary restrictions or conditions on this and similar projects — and ensure that development does not come at the expense of the environment or public health. The Jane Fonda Climate PAC is proud to support the 'Port For All' slate — three candidates committed to turning the tide against fossil fuel dominance. If they win, they could gain a majority on the Port board (which has a total of 5 seats!) and put the community on a path to a clean energy future: 🌍 Patrick Everitt (Place 1): With his expertise as an investigator for the Texas Commission on Environmental Quality, Patrick is dedicated to shielding our community from pollution and spearheading the transition to renewable energy sources at the port. 🌍 Andres Rios (Place 3): As a CFO with an extensive business background, Andres brings a wealth of experience in fostering clean economic development and will advocate for a just transition to a sustainable economy. 🌍 Josette Cruz Hinojosa (Place 5): An activist and community organizer, Josette's leadership promises to break the cycle of fracking and advocate for healthier energy alternatives. These climate champions will reject and impose strict conditions on projects like the Rio Grande LNG that compromise our environment and health. They will advocate for the rights of landowners against the injustices of eminent domain for pipeline construction, and they will champion clean, sustainable jobs and energy solutions for Texas. Our team has invested significant resources in this race because we know how often races like this fly under the radar. From phone banking to help get out the vote to directly contributing thousands of dollars to each candidate’s campaign, to supporting partner organizations working in the region to providing essential guidance on things like press outreach and social media support, we’re pulling out all the stops. We’re doing everything we can to ensure the Port of Brownsville is a Port for All, not just another hub for enriching corporate polluters. This election is a pivotal point in our larger battle against the climate crisis. Your support right now could not be more crucial.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Let’s do this! The Jane Fonda Climate PAC | = | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez
subject: AIPAC is toxic
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
This is the cycle we stand up and say, “Enough.”
#
This is the cycle where we are seeing a confrontation with AIPAC – the American Israel Public Affairs Committee — happen head on for the first time.
**This is a bare knuckle fight.** From Day 1 we have called for a ceasefire in the region. **And from Day 1, they have put a target on our back.**
Jamaal Bowman has a very serious primary challenge that is largely financed by AIPAC. They’re raising significant resources from, and are financed by, Republicans. **They endorse Republicans who supported the January 6th attacks.**
It’s so important to understand that the threat to democracy — both that Netanyahu represents in Israel and that Trump represents in the United States — are being supported by many of the individuals that support AIPAC as well.
**Today, it was announced that AIPAC will spend $25 million in attack ads against Jamaal Bowman until his primary election in June. 1** [The New York primary election is in less than 8 weeks. Will you split a $2 contribution today between our campaigns — $1 for each team? 6 swing seats run through NY, and we need to preserve each one — starting with Jamaal’s.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240503-bowman.mAWv6T&refcode=em20240503-6329-P_FND_RES_OPP&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=6329%2E2526796%2EYyaWDU)
---
If, and when, we win big, what we tell the rest of the Congress is that AIPAC is nothing to be afraid of.
For the first time in modern American politics, conditioning aid to Israel is becoming a mainstream conversation in D.C. That has never happened before.
**And it’s happening because of the support, activism, and organizing of people like you.**
Thank you,
Alexandria

1: [theintercept.com/2024/05/03/aipac-jamaal-bowman-primary-israel](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/26004?t=2&akid=6329%2E2526796%2EYyaWDU)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20240503-bowman?refcode=em20240503-6329-P_FND_RES_OPP&t=3&refcode2=6329_2526796_YyaWDU&akid=6329%2E2526796%2EYyaWDU)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20240503-6329-P_FND_RES_OPP&t=4&akid=6329%2E2526796%2EYyaWDU)**
