name: Jill Stein 2024
subject: NEW: Wisconsin poll shows Jill gaining major ground
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jill Stein for President 2024
body:
| | | [ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=breaking_through&n=1)
---
Peter,

A few days ago we got exciting news out of Wisconsin. A recent poll from CBS News & YouGov, conducted April 19-25, found that in a three-way match-up against Biden and Trump, **Jill is polling at 22% among voters under 30** , and 16% among voters 30-44. The same poll shows us gaining ground with both independents AND moderate voters.
---
[ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donation_ny?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=breaking_through&n=2)
---
It’s worth noting that this poll was conducted _before_ last weekend’s events in St. Louis. Since then, we’ve had a flood of interest in the campaign with **over 20 interview requests in the last week** – and more than 100 press hits. **We are**** _finally_****breaking through** , and it’s happening at a critical time for our campaign.

The funds we raise in the next few days will determine whether or not we get on the ballot in New York – a state with 28 electoral college votes (the 4th highest in the country).

**[To get on the ballot in New York we need to raise at least $125,000 in the next week. If you’ve been on the fence about contributing, or if you have donated and you can afford to give a bit more, can you make a contribution today?](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donation_ny?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=breaking_through&n=3)**
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donation_ny?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=breaking_through&n=4 "DONATE NOW") [DONATE NOW](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donation_ny?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=breaking_through&n=4)
---
Thousands of you have already stepped up to contribute, particularly in the last few days, and we are all so thankful. The surge of donations we received in the last week following Jill and the team being arrested in St. Louis brought us MUCH closer to our goal. If you’re not in a position to donate today, here’s a few more ways you can help:
* [**Join our virtual rally with Prof. Jeffrey Sachs TONIGHT**](https://www.jillstein2024.com/rally?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=breaking_through&n=5) at 8pm ET, and invite your friends.

* Forward this email to 3 friends, tell them why you support Jill and **[ask them to contribute](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donation_ny?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=breaking_through&n=6)**.

* [**Sign up to volunteer**](https://www.jillstein2024.com/volunteer?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=breaking_through&n=7). We have a number of volunteer roles available, some of which you can do from the comfort of your own home!

If you can contribute, this is one of the moments you can make a major impact on this campaign – and the future of our nation.
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donation_ny?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=breaking_through&n=8 "DONATE NOW") [DONATE NOW](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donation_ny?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=breaking_through&n=8)
---
The American people are tired of choosing between lesser evils. This year, let’s choose to fight for the greater good.
---
[ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donation_ny?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=breaking_through&n=9)
---
In solidarity,

Team Jill Stein
---
| [](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donation_ny?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=breaking_through&n=10 "Support Jill Today!") [Support Jill Today!](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donation_ny?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=breaking_through&n=10)

name: Team Gillen
subject: all eyes on our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY
body:
This is the one of the most important races in the country to win back the House and all eyes will be on our campaign.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84279980/471019427/545181079?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2024-05-03_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmU0MDVhNC05MjA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZRSK2WqaQCz37YV-TaIany2nsemIjCCW6Y_lLr8b0eo=)
---
| Peter,

We need significant grassroots support to defeat D’Esposito and flip this seat from Red to Blue. _Here’s why:_

**✅ **The National Journal’s _Hotline_ power rankings said that the race to retake the House Majority runs through New York!

**✅ **The DCCC named our race one of the most competitive Red to Blue campaigns, which means this remains one of the _most flippable_ in the country.

# Will Trump Attend $400K Frat House Bash?
The Thursday panel is always a fun one, but this one was fun for another reason. There is a fundraiser that’s reached over $400k to throw a party for the fraternity that protected the American flag amid protests on the campus of University of North Carolina. So will President Trump make an appearance? Watch the show and see what the panel thinks.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kristen for Michigan
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84280251/471020390/1433120897?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NDdkMGRhMi05MzA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LGvSkb-Wy0se1diW7-0D4gDHnJU4d3txW9YgH4IJf_Y=) I’ll never forget how I felt around 8:30pm on May 2, 2024. That’s the moment the news leaked that the Supreme Court was going to overturn _Roe v. Wade._ I was filled with rage – and afraid of what was to come in a country where the right to get an abortion was no longer protected. **Two years later, we’ve seen the consequences: abortion rights have been nearly wiped out in too many states across the country, and the calls for a national abortion ban are louder than ever.** This year’s election will determine whether or not Republicans finally get their way and pass a national abortion ban. My Republican opponent in our tossup race for Congress is already on the record supporting a national abortion ban – even in cases of rape and incest – so we can’t afford to lose. Look, taking back the House, stopping a national abortion ban and codifying _Roe v. Wade_ all start with winning this race in Michigan’s 8th District. It’s one of the only tossup races in the country, and a top elections forecaster says this is the majority-making race. name: Mazie Hirono
subject: Two years ago
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, Two years ago, we learned through a leak reported in _POLITICO_ that the ultra right-wing, ideologically-motivated majority Supreme Court had decided to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ in its disastrous _Dobbs_ decision. _Two years later, abortion is completely banned in over a dozen states across the country — and extremist Republicans are working to enact an abortion ban nationwide._ **I knew that this would only be the beginning of the GOP’s attack on our freedoms and bodily autonomy. I am still fighting every day for reproductive justice — and I will not stop. But I can’t do it alone.** [**Peter, will you please add your name alongside mine and stand up for reproductive justice?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84280406/471021036/-2082852052?refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240503_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGUyZTY1NS05NDA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_2YSqxUmusB9H2t6nFf5IDfWmkXoI6s9L2PvijGbglo=&emci=e1e048b9-8b09-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=3de2e655-9409-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=23190490) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84280407/471021037/-2082852052?refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240503_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGUyZTY1NS05NDA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_2YSqxUmusB9H2t6nFf5IDfWmkXoI6s9L2PvijGbglo=&emci=e1e048b9-8b09-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=3de2e655-9409-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=23190490)
---
The _Dobbs_ decision instantly stripped millions of Americans of their right to make their own reproductive health care choices. And it has emboldened GOP-led states across the country to go even further by passing laws that criminalize doctors for providing essential, life-saving care — without exceptions for cases of rape or incest.
It’s why I’m a co-sponsor of the _Women’s Health Protection Act_ this year alongside my Democratic colleagues — legislation that would make the Constitutional right to an abortion, which was protected for five decades under _Roe v. Wade_ , the law of the land across the country. It protects the bodily autonomy of millions across the country to seek care without fear of prosecution or unjust restrictions.
[**So Peter, please commit to fighting for reproductive justice alongside me by endorsing the _Women’s Health Protection Act_ today >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84280408/471021039/-2082852052?refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240503_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGUyZTY1NS05NDA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_2YSqxUmusB9H2t6nFf5IDfWmkXoI6s9L2PvijGbglo=&emci=e1e048b9-8b09-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=3de2e655-9409-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=23190490)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84280409/471021040/-2082852052?refcode=AU_MKH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240503_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGUyZTY1NS05NDA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_2YSqxUmusB9H2t6nFf5IDfWmkXoI6s9L2PvijGbglo=&emci=e1e048b9-8b09-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&emdi=3de2e655-9409-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&ceid=23190490)
---
I won’t stop fighting to protect the fundamental right of every individual to make decisions about their bodies, or our futures.
Thank you for standing with me time and again in defense of our dignity and our freedom to choose.
Mazie
Friends of Mazie Hirono
335 Merchant Street
#677
Honolulu, HI 96809
United States **[info@mazieforhawaii.com](mailto:info@mazieforhawaii.com)** | **Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**

name: Bernie Moreno
subject: Shameless Sherrod’s flip-flop
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie Moreno for Senate
body:
We are not fooled by Sherrod Brown's empty words and spineless pandering. | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9d735c397bd044019a32e3ea26c78f9a&_e=lRYX2EAYhv-Sqj6wBUZYN2u8wtuxLuB_HByL_qnq8oLcQ9lZNMsfu3fzFIByEs68gdSLk4y6gF1vF4uHK46yaaHp4Kflad3yh_rImA1zzdednkQ793i-9XZQ5p6c_BPIUohURv6qrdZIWlWW2pMRnsiCRsX-IDT8xxI01GwNHuU7-gpFRMzYxbpuTRToUo69wj7ACP4ARgCW6QIonm4IUUxX462DeyHnbEz_64RZ830wmjgUNs3PBGUfmzZoAjQP3Ju4qbZ3jjcYNSYp6lzXWxsgDOHFwRt4hHEG4nMEhysj-YJuz66vMn1TOFsLo9vcJ9g9eqAPO4Q06vZpqVTCPY-nEVrKotp2USO7DXrtI0QEezy331deD9x6lq449ZVZGx4UF0SkpJ44Chq2FDUHsViBhY17zmy5Sqiw5JMeXa4%3D)
---
Peter,

My far-left opponent, Sherrod Brown has shown his true colors – and they’re not red, white, and blue. _**They’re stained with hypocrisy and weakness.**_

**First ➜** Brown sank to a new low by endorsing the despicable antisemitic, pro-Hamas protests and encampments spreading like wildfire across our college campuses.

**Then ➜** He refused to call these pro-Hamas terrorist sympathizers what they are: _They’re vile, violent, antisemitic radicals who spread chaos and division._

**Now ➜** Brown shamelessly flip-flopped his stance after facing a mountain of backlash from Patriots like you and me, conveniently forgetting his initial nod of approval of these despicable acts.

[ **FIRE HYPOCRITE SHERROD BROWN** ](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9d735c397bd044019a32e3ea26c78f9a&_e=lRYX2EAYhv-Sqj6wBUZYN2u8wtuxLuB_HByL_qnq8oLcQ9lZNMsfu3fzFIByEs68gdSLk4y6gF1vF4uHK46yaaHp4Kflad3yh_rImA1zzdednkQ793i-9XZQ5p6c_BPIUohURv6qrdZIWlWW2pMRnsiCRsX-IDT8xxI01GwNHuU7-gpFRMzYxbpuTRToUo69wj7ACP4ARgCW6QIonm4IUUxX462DeyHnbEz_64RZ830wmjgUNs3PBGUfmzZoAjQP3Ju4qbZ3jjcYNSYp6lzXWw8FQnZmzQf9d2GmZr0pezkNSm5tEQzqG5JWmYR7n5BOjLdCYMsq4A5VKACuzDorvO9USkKf_ecGjLnWAxI9lwHC8f-QCn_qaV4e6Tb99zNE3xJ5NqW7igEihgU9io_wFrXYVaPzBArQbOR6L76vfXQ%3D)
_**We are not fooled by Sherrod Brown's empty words and spineless pandering.**_

_Let’s be crystal clear_ : he’s shown that he’s willing to sacrifice principles for political gain, abandoning the rule of law in favor of appeasing the radical left. [**We can no longer allow anti-American politicians like this to represent us.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9d735c397bd044019a32e3ea26c78f9a&_e=lRYX2EAYhv-Sqj6wBUZYN2u8wtuxLuB_HByL_qnq8oLcQ9lZNMsfu3fzFIByEs68gdSLk4y6gF1vF4uHK46yaaHp4Kflad3yh_rImA1zzdednkQ793i-9XZQ5p6c_BPIUohURv6qrdZIWlWW2pMRnsiCRsX-IDT8xxI01GwNHuU7-gpFRMzYxbpuTRToUo69wj7ACP4ARgCW6QIonm4IUUxX462DeyHnbEz_64RZ830wmjgUNs3PBGUfmzZoAjQP3Ju4qbZ3jjcYNSYp6lzXW0gHe7NRtROHaj-JOvtIa98S6RRlhoDcWOOX2BZw2F5yKtqzPZPeywugVX5EKkvz5lbkdVjihRMN7SAKXgHgqW8OeCYe4JT_8ww-Fa5RCaAnAMi0dIBeP6tvFzataxA1e6LGRrCvAxTdukVkvf6Qxwo%3D) Ohio deserves better. America deserves better.

We deserve a Senator who will unwaveringly stand for law and order, who will never waver in the face of leftist pressure, and who will _**ALWAYS**_ support American interests; not those of terrorist organizations keen on destroying our country.

clean_body: A seven-figure ad campaign. | = | BREAKING: The Koch Brothers just announced a seven-figure ad campaign targeting Latino voters in Josh’s district. = Peter, Very scary news - the New York Times scooped that the right-wing Koch Brothers have decided to invest millions of dollars to convince latino voters to vote Republican this year. They are calling it the “Libre Initiative” and they told the New York Times their top target is JOSH HARDER! This is exactly what we’ve been scared of. National GOP dark money swooping in to flip our seat - by targeting our latino community no less. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- This news comes after Speaker Mike Johnson flew to our district to hold a fundraiser for our extreme MAGA opponent. Now the Koch Brothers are investing millions of their dark-money dollars to flip this seat red. While we’re doing the hard work of connecting and listening to our Latino communities, the GOP is doing just the opposite by carrying out their targeted Spanish-language misinformation campaign. That’s why it’s especially important right now to make sure we’re well-funded to reach out to families in all corners of our district. = Thank you, Team Harder *

body:
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/21598?t=1010&amount=25&akid=1547%2E52803%2ESuYdZq ][IMG]

Hey Peter, guess who just voted early?

It really is inspiring to see so many people that are amped up about this
race and getting out to vote early, but it also means we’ve got work to
do!

Now that early voting has started, we’re officially on the clock, because
it’s a race to reach as many people as we can before they go to the polls
to cast their ballots.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/21598?t=1011&amount=25&akid=1547%2E52803%2ESuYdZq ]Can I count on your support,
Peter? If so, please chip in $25
toward our $50,000 Early Vote Goal to help us reach the voters we need to
win this neck-and-neck race!

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/21598?t=1012&amount=25&akid=1547%2E52803%2ESuYdZq ]Donate $25

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/21598?t=1013&amount=35&akid=1547%2E52803%2ESuYdZq ]Other Amount

the state hear from us, and we need to do it BEFORE they cast their votes.

My multi-millionaire primary opponent has spent almost $50 million on ads,

already.

That means that it’s up to us to do whatever we can to get our campaign in
front of voters and make the case to them that I’m the best-equipped
candidate to take on Larry Hogan in November.

for your help today,

name: Colin Allred
subject: How it started vs. how it's going
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-allred-split.ZUVW7D&refcode=em240503-2-160&t=1&akid=2291%2E734936%2E1mn5Tk)
WOW, Peter!
Today marks exactly one year since we launched this campaign to defeat Ted Cruz, and I couldn't be more thrilled with how far we've come.
**How it started:** Immediately after we launched this campaign, election experts from _FiveThirtyEight_ to _Roll Call_ UPGRADED our chances of beating Ted Cruz and officially ranked Texas a "battleground."
**How it's going:** After early polls showed us 5 points down, hundreds of thousands of grassroots supporters like you chipped in to help me travel all over Texas to meet voters and spread our message. **Thanks to you, we have officially pulled EVEN with Ted Cruz in the polls.**
**What's next?** Ted Cruz is terrified of our grassroots movement because we're closer than ever to defeating him. But this race is a long way from over, and he's calling all his millionaire mega donors and special interest allies to try and squash our momentum. We can't let up for even a second.
**That's why, to celebrate the one year anniversary of our campaign, my team and I set an ambitious goal to raise $300,000 by midnight.[Can I count on your split donation between my campaign and Ruben Gallego's to help us get there, Peter? Every dollar helps power our grassroots movement and gets us closer to beating Ted Cruz on Election Day.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-allred-split.ZUVW7D&refcode=em240503-2-160&t=2&akid=2291%2E734936%2E1mn5Tk)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

He also attacked union workers, railed against his political opponents, and continued his lies about the 2020 election.
And this visit — his fifth in just ten months — comes on the heels of a staggering interview where he laid out, plain and clear, his plans for a second term, including allowing states to monitor womens’ pregnancies and criminally prosecute women who violate abortion bans.
We know Trump’s playbook, friend.
And every time Trump returns, it is a likely boon for our potential opponent – in fundraising, in media coverage, and in volunteer activity.
We need to not only match that energy, but exceed it.
No matter what anyone may tell you, Michigan is a swing state – full stop. And just as we have swung toward Democrats, Michigan is known for swinging right on back.

It is an incredible honor to be endorsed by the Liberty Champion of the Senate, Rand Paul.

|
---
[](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=7d6920525d894a84969994ece9bf7b93&_e=lQQtwWKhwc0Q6SEEhnyh7rV9AhHZ7los8tfR57_ZTFVKeoI_NafpF-WGc1uAwF1LE55BshBdifBBNifEv2Hlj1y-HHwhbISOWYu8Qk9bDne6bVOa023l4htkxtdRLx0AXoRVIfpZfKxV-pJ5NkoJqAEoQMJ-c1IYcPVo2R_ujRncmTjA7tuWE9AoEIBmwiyTtHHB6EKca_H_tMHRX7lBUzqanLAOV0BM9BDTG-EoaV_SJo3v1HV6jzSsaP-KasKvVWHTtPVzA3qh4Pvi5ENllWirqhUIBQFk-FrEZsbkkl4Y1HwJYm-y6HsY0IbbZL7X_0EQRtw1Yy9zOsOQb9hGEo3SJtLKczLkLYgjZrkbIy35QGjPJCyoousmM8F8SQ2D)
Friend,

I'm proud of the work I've been able to accomplish in Congress, fighting D.C. corruption and protecting our liberties and freedoms!

And it is an incredible honor to have the Liberty Champion of the Senate, Rand Paul, endorse my re-election campaign.

**_"Matt Gaetz works tirelessly against the corrupt D.C. swamp and has my full endorsement in his re-election campaign."
\- Senate Rand Paul_**
Rand knows there are no days off in the Freedom Fight. The Uniparty wants total control and to destroy our conservative values.

It's an honor to have Rand's endorsement, [**but now I need to hear from you.**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=7d6920525d894a84969994ece9bf7b93&_e=lQQtwWKhwc0Q6SEEhnyh7rV9AhHZ7los8tfR57_ZTFVKeoI_NafpF-WGc1uAwF1LE55BshBdifBBNifEv2Hlj1y-HHwhbISOWYu8Qk9bDne6bVOa023l4htkxtdRLx0AXoRVIfpZfKxV-pJ5NkoJqAEoQMJ-c1IYcPVo2R_ujRncmTjA7tuWE9AoEIBmwiyTtHHB6EKca_H_tMHRX7lBUzqanLAOV0BM9BDTG-EoaV9U1vcmY-JVf9c6v0gYbGTSCNOEoGpqtoKmYwzpDQzW3Xf-mRMmYu7f4KTeFXM5zrweofiyzM55tpQUvjLY8p8A8pW55uKirb__j2BZpRoAxKv5hriqCJda4GedQAU7hdsbure3-tVcMYUrkT14l6iW)

[**Will you be one of the 1,000 conservatives who join Rand and endorse my re-election campaign?**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=7d6920525d894a84969994ece9bf7b93&_e=lQQtwWKhwc0Q6SEEhnyh7rV9AhHZ7los8tfR57_ZTFVKeoI_NafpF-WGc1uAwF1LE55BshBdifBBNifEv2Hlj1y-HHwhbISOWYu8Qk9bDne6bVOa023l4htkxtdRLx0AXoRVIfpZfKxV-pJ5NkoJqAEoQMJ-c1IYcPVo2R_ujRncmTjA7tuWE9AoEIBmwiyTtHHB6EKca_H_tMHRX7lBUzqanLAOV0BM9BDTG-EoaV-SUB9AwDiSVB9R6YX7ZjxNeUh8vAGCWw-DXQXCVhlCJoIF2I1W01osz8CYC1ZRvOFTQ6xkugMgX4ib8S_GGIU-5L6sWnCbpcT4PyggdH__ut0f3O1SDznvrvY1QiRzExMBOqvzj_BQwaNhz_wG99qX)
| [ **ENDORSE MATT GAETZ →** ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=7d6920525d894a84969994ece9bf7b93&_e=lQQtwWKhwc0Q6SEEhnyh7rV9AhHZ7los8tfR57_ZTFVKeoI_NafpF-WGc1uAwF1LE55BshBdifBBNifEv2Hlj1y-HHwhbISOWYu8Qk9bDne6bVOa023l4htkxtdRLx0AXoRVIfpZfKxV-pJ5NkoJqAEoQMJ-c1IYcPVo2R_ujRncmTjA7tuWE9AoEIBmwiyTtHHB6EKca_H_tMHRX7lBUzqanLAOV0BM9BDTG-EoaV-i4eIXv7kLd820FR-Ct89x7Z0zehGJ28ccgjwMFEfAGEox1IXwBuEjDSNAanm9o_7wWa3Zx3ajjSNe4vk3qMxPS-mUEzYbCAy9lWGqSZmoMgTDRNmfPVAy-F_uT-3VPd8ja4dzZQJd__W5FKVd8T37)
---

My work in D.C. has made me the #1 target of Democrats and Republicans alike.

I EXPELLED Kevin McCarthy as Speaker, and now HE'S BACK. He's planning a $700,000 attack campaign against me, and his right-hand man just announced his campaign against me in the Republican Primary.

It's an honor to have Rand in my corner – but now we need to build the conservative coalition I need to WIN re-election. [**Will you endorse my campaign ASAP?**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=7d6920525d894a84969994ece9bf7b93&_e=lQQtwWKhwc0Q6SEEhnyh7rV9AhHZ7los8tfR57_ZTFVKeoI_NafpF-WGc1uAwF1LE55BshBdifBBNifEv2Hlj1y-HHwhbISOWYu8Qk9bDne6bVOa023l4htkxtdRLx0AXoRVIfpZfKxV-pJ5NkoJqAEoQMJ-c1IYcPVo2R_ujRncmTjA7tuWE9AoEIBmwiyTtHHB6EKca_H_tMHRX7lBUzqanLAOV0BM9BDTG-EoaV_A-XL1e3lmbUrXIw5-hJssqfvTSkGLPxb1rxP1ctoZSr8DbEdPsVsPkjzhChgnwqKybb3e1sIKDE02DZ1R3XLqq6EATDUc0nIn_8Z2wTUDPBdXMtNugYxby1ZcgcbuSZPjnfP9kbwVg5UXsXHaUWIP)
[ **ENDORSE MATT GAETZ →** ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=7d6920525d894a84969994ece9bf7b93&_e=lQQtwWKhwc0Q6SEEhnyh7rV9AhHZ7los8tfR57_ZTFVKeoI_NafpF-WGc1uAwF1LE55BshBdifBBNifEv2Hlj1y-HHwhbISOWYu8Qk9bDne6bVOa023l4htkxtdRLx0AXoRVIfpZfKxV-pJ5NkoJqAEoQMJ-c1IYcPVo2R_ujRncmTjA7tuWE9AoEIBmwiyTtHHB6EKca_H_tMHRX7lBUzqanLAOV0BM9BDTG-EoaV9iwTC1Kq864IZhub4FKxx1mHBWJIQVlZRUIlggztLlKhPHzDNMsoZcoHRmGr3C632pBwVnyGan6aK23g6V74GOQ3ODIdUo73dC5waNgGXwkC_IF8ES6jtTxZuNLflC_IyP_jr0XOAkLtj-z9MHFpHa)
---

We should be proud of the work we've done, but the JOB ISN'T OVER.

[**Join Rand and support my efforts to continue the fight!**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=7d6920525d894a84969994ece9bf7b93&_e=lQQtwWKhwc0Q6SEEhnyh7rV9AhHZ7los8tfR57_ZTFVKeoI_NafpF-WGc1uAwF1LE55BshBdifBBNifEv2Hlj1y-HHwhbISOWYu8Qk9bDne6bVOa023l4htkxtdRLx0AXoRVIfpZfKxV-pJ5NkoJqAEoQMJ-c1IYcPVo2R_ujRncmTjA7tuWE9AoEIBmwiyTtHHB6EKca_H_tMHRX7lBUzqanLAOV0BM9BDTG-EoaV9jvfMVx02sC1a1mZhdQcDH8MwseIXDZ78mWkBxRdo2TXoYHiMA75mr79-5h8JIFfK5Qqln7AmVXBTCheXBikf3YBoVx_F8siByfo6IACTgFtMprZeqZQxJeAw2GUsNIpo0hwrwutScMy9YCU0ttiBu)

Thanks,

Matt Gaetz

Friend, in a moment we’re going to ask you to make a [**$3 donation**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84281306/471023954/-209663063?refcode=em-5.3.24-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzZkZmQ4Ni05ODA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Utp8vDWw400joqivGm3ScaPMh3KHmpr5evT7Lk2HGgc=) to elect Democratic Secretaries of State across the country, but first let us share some key breaking news:

Republican National Committee (RNC) Chair Lara Trump just announced that they are aiming to recruit **100,000** volunteers to “observe the voting process and report irregularities.”

In other words, the RNC is getting ready to wreak havoc on the upcoming November elections.

**FLASHBACK:** as the 2020 election results were being tabulated, MAGA Republicans stormed ballot counting centers demanding election officials “STOP THE COUNT” and “STOP THE STEAL.”
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84281307/471023955/-209663063?refcode=em-5.3.24-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzZkZmQ4Ni05ODA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Utp8vDWw400joqivGm3ScaPMh3KHmpr5evT7Lk2HGgc=)
_Frontline News: Aspiring poll watchers banged on the glass outside the room where absentee ballots were being counted at TCF Center on November 4, 2020, in Detroit, Michigan._
The RNC is laying the groundwork for similar attacks on our democracy this November. And the fact is, they’ve already started:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84281308/471023956/-209663063?refcode=em-5.3.24-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzZkZmQ4Ni05ODA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Utp8vDWw400joqivGm3ScaPMh3KHmpr5evT7Lk2HGgc=)
Strong, Democratic Secretaries of State are our best line of defense against attempts to undermine democracy. We need to be prepared, which is why we’re laying the groundwork now.

[**Can we count on you to make a small donation of $3 to elect Democratic Secretaries of State who will defend our democracy from election-denying Republicans?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84281309/471023957/-209663063?refcode=em-5.3.24-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzZkZmQ4Ni05ODA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Utp8vDWw400joqivGm3ScaPMh3KHmpr5evT7Lk2HGgc=)

name: #6 Steve Garvey
subject: Are you tired?
body:
It doesn’t have to be this way
Dear Fellow American,

Are you tired of being told that everything is going fine in America today?

It's a big lie. It's a lie being told by Adam Schiff and Joe Biden (one of many) to stay in power. And it's a lie that good people like you are ALWAYS forced to pay the price for.

But it doesn't have to be that way.

Opening our borders is a **CHOICE**.

Siding with violent criminals over our brave police is a **CHOICE**.

Spending our country into an oblivion of debt and inflation is a **CHOICE**.

Allowing homelessness and addiction to render our streets and neighborhoods unsafe is a **CHOICE**.

Accepting failed public schools is a **CHOICE**.

And the ones making these "choices" for a combined 79 years in office?

_**That would be Adam Schiff and Joe Biden.**_

**Eight decades is enough.**

Heck, in my baseball days, you wouldn't be given eight innings with such pathetic performance before you'd be sent packing to the minor leagues.

Well, that's what you and I need to do to Schiff + Biden on November 5th.

They've got all the money in the world to use against us, so if you'd kindly consider making a one-time contribution of any amount to join my Garvey for Senate campaign team, it'd mean the world to me.

**[Please follow this link to make your generous contribution today.](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=116e93bb4ad24cf9bdd02fdc614c6ad3&_e=WS47XDFpzSXyE-Euj6uvahMkQ1vz_XizJKz4xj05HjGZr_iVhiiCP81frLTkPPI5ReEP1A03-ED03i79VZsPK1N59L_tlG3rXo1QFVzYZ-gTe5GOziXmvTm2m5x_zgbEWn50wPqqacuDRlXHZsWJEwux3NiyfDdiwmP_8r2hcCwn5lQB3PP-9PhPNU-B4xcLuzeMmr_tNZ99CPuj4q-wUyTCB-GUI3J0LlxiHnzy8pkFqQ_7BH5b0ZTWc6F7y-dxtNtuo1vaIwIRAL-FK106sMxzDdxYbQ-I22O2yBLe2oqBnZ2hpAjDkIbkTDEdnLNRKzJj8M5ZOcIRAi8cTJdfbvN0GrvPE3WXruqaRI3E1Lcpn4SGfFZSaNN9IeQOro748VvKk9y1Da__eNR49Q2QWg%3D%3D)**

Let's go win this thing!

\- #6 Steve Garvey

name: Dan Pfeiffer
subject: We need to talk about Bob.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=2881%2E552475%2E6WtF9q)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240503-2?refcode=em20240503-2&recurring=1&refcode2=2881_552475_6WtF9q&akid=2881%2E552475%2E6WtF9q)
Peter, we need to talk about Bob Casey — the guy who took over the internet with his Map in 2020 and kept political junkies like me updated on Pennsylvania’s election results.
Well, Bob is up for re-election this year, and he needs our help. Because time is a flat circle, America is once again staring down the barrel of another Biden v. Trump match-up... and PA is at the center.
I can tell you from my experience working for President Obama in ‘08 and ‘12 that if we’re going to hold the White House and our Democratic Senate majority, Pennsylvania is a must-win.
I also know how important it is to raise massive resources early on. The more resources Bob has now, the more staff he’ll be able to hire, the more ads his team can put on the air, and the more voters his campaign can reach. Money donated today is exponentially more impactful than money donated in the final weeks of the campaign.
**[Will you join me in supporting Bob’s campaign by chipping in $5 today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240503-2?refcode=em20240503-2&recurring=1&refcode2=2881_552475_6WtF9q&akid=2881%2E552475%2E6WtF9q)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240503-2?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20240503-2-el&refcode2=2881_552475_6WtF9q&akid=2881%2E552475%2E6WtF9q) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240503-2?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20240503-2-el&refcode2=2881_552475_6WtF9q&akid=2881%2E552475%2E6WtF9q) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240503-2?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20240503-2-el&refcode2=2881_552475_6WtF9q&akid=2881%2E552475%2E6WtF9q) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240503-2?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20240503-2-el&refcode2=2881_552475_6WtF9q&akid=2881%2E552475%2E6WtF9q) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240503-2?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20240503-2-el&refcode2=2881_552475_6WtF9q&akid=2881%2E552475%2E6WtF9q) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240503-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240503-2&refcode2=2881_552475_6WtF9q&akid=2881%2E552475%2E6WtF9q)
---
This Senate race is gearing up to be one of the most competitive and expensive of 2024. Bob is up against anti-choice extremist David McCormick, who supports a national abortion ban with no exceptions for rape or incest. To add insult to injury, he’s a Connecticut (not a typo — he really lives in CT, not PA) finance bro that has a record of selling out workers to get rich.
If McCormick wins and the GOP regains control, they could gut Social Security and Medicare, raise taxes on the middle class while giving large corporations tax breaks, roll back LBGTQ+ rights, and pass a Federal abortion ban.
**That means that Bob and his team have zero room for error, because there is no Democratic Senate majority without winning in Pennsylvania.**
**[Will you contribute $5 to Bob Casey’s campaign? We need to keep Bob in the Senate.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240503-2?refcode=em20240503-2&recurring=1&refcode2=2881_552475_6WtF9q&akid=2881%2E552475%2E6WtF9q)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240503-2?refcode=em20240503-2&recurring=1&refcode2=2881_552475_6WtF9q&akid=2881%2E552475%2E6WtF9q)**
Thanks for supporting Bob!
Dan
Co-host of Pod Save America
Former Senior Advisor to President Obama

name: Congressman Jim Banks
subject: I’m going to see Trump at Mar-a-Lago
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Banks for Senate

Hey, it's Trump-endorsed Senate candidate Jim Banks and I am about to head to Florida to meet with President Trump at Mar-A-Lago.

We are meeting to discuss our chances of winning a MAGA Majority in the US Senate in 2024 so that President Trump has reinforcements to advance his agenda when he takes back the Oval Office.

Trump will surely ask about our grassroots fundraising and our chances of winning in 2024 by defeating the Radical Left. **To make sure we have the resources we need to win this race and flip the Senate, I 'm setting a goal of 500 online donations by midnight tonight.**

**[Since you are a TOP America First Patriot, I wanted to reach out to you first. Will you take 5 seconds to help meet this goal before I report our final numbers to DJT?](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=7482701b1b8043a4b7f275fdff3fed1f&_e=BHHCnQ6WAhvFcmM0vQjejRzmms1RFr5nGpB1Nn6sEF_qxmNrJM924Uq7ukn_3jL2f7mhQF6-Lwrgy3Vym_z2gDGASfxdr4yWRBLEz-xF2Wd-X0Is9SW6lfNyPcKXu9UAuDJ-4fa19NXCPl_jJT1MoNXRif7eejyX8MY_LqPnC0GmU6UZLC0LKCRPY_RrTIUx2Lvfd5G5mA4htLJasiYWMboBOgVbw7MLSTFwxsk8UKB7Z-VSYhJcGK2NV5KOkuPHo-ZgwJ8B6EKUP3S16mkpbOIcOkbbuBZB-yNQ4n8evOJkXFudiolQSnb-_hTtycQq4k6CDdNWPd_1KNhyVXkk1Q%3D%3D)**

name: Brandon Herrera
subject: Winners Announced!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Brandon Herrera Victory Committee
body:
Dear Friend,
I am thrilled to share that we recently congratulated the winners of our two contests:
* Austin from Oklahoma, who won a trip to the Creators Range Day.
* Che from Oregon, who secured a 21st Tec .300 Norma Mag bolt-action rifle.

Thanks to supporters like you, we have made significant progress towards our fundraising goals necessary to win this election. However, we still have a bit more to go.
To give our campaign a final push, I'm excited to announce another giveaway. For every $5 you donate, you earn a chance to win an RPK that I personally built. Participate now by visiting [Brandon Herrera for Congress](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/je5OWs5qedvZWtfa61PrRg/tX7636eV7mUmrX4WvmbiLX4A).
We have a solid opportunity to defeat one of the most anti-gun and least transparent members of Congress. Every contribution, no matter the size, makes a difference.
Thank you for your continued support.
Respectfully,
Brandon
PS: Every $5 you donate gives you a chance to win my RPK. Make your contribution and, if you're lucky, I'll be calling you real soon - [https://brandonherreraforcongress.com/Donate?r=e20240503](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/je5OWs5qedvZWtfa61PrRg/tX7636eV7mUmrX4WvmbiLX4A).

name: Steve Williams
subject: Stand with Steve Williams Against Hate: Sign His Petition Today!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/protect-reproductive-freedom?source=wvdp [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/protect-reproductive-freedom?source=wvdp]
Dear Friend,
For half a century, women had the freedom to decide what was best for themselves and their families when it came to reproductive health care.
Then, in June of 2022, a divided Supreme Court took those basic freedoms away and left reproductive freedom up to the states.
I believe West Virginians should have the basic and fundamental freedom to make decisions about their health and bodies free of interference from the government.
And I believe West Virginia doctors should be able to provide medical care for their patients without fear of prosecution.
[https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/protect-reproductive-freedom?source=wvdp] That’s why I am respectfully calling on Governor Justice to include reproductive freedom on the agenda for the upcoming special session of the legislature. [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/protect-reproductive-freedom?source=wvdp]
ADD YOUR NAME [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/protect-reproductive-freedom?source=wvdp]
Will you join me by adding your name to my petition calling for a constitutional amendment to restore reproductive freedom in West Virginia?
This approach ensures that any legislative changes regarding reproductive freedom reflect the will of the people.
I call on my fellow candidates for Governor to put freedom on the ballot and let this question be decided by the hearts and minds of our citizens at the ballot box.
Let's take this critical, and very personal issue out of the hands of politicians and let the people of West Virginia decide.
Join me,
Steve
Sign the petition. [https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/protect-reproductive-freedom?source=wvdp]
https://www.facebook.com/wvdemocrats/ [https://www.facebook.com/wvdemocrats/] https://twitter.com/WVDemocrats [https://twitter.com/WVDemocrats] https://www.instagram.com/WVDemocrats/ [https://www.instagram.com/WVDemocrats/]

body:
Please share this with as many people as you can. Share with 5-10 people. | | | [](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=66359e4deaf18324fa5aa520&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.alaskansforhonestelections.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D66359cf4162230481da0e231%26ss_email_id%3D66359e4deaf18324fa5aa520%26ss_campaign_name%3DWe%2Bare%2Bdoing%2BRCV%2BWorkshops%2Bat%2Bthe%2BIdaho%2Band%2BOregon%2BGOP%2BConventions%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2024-05-04T02%253A33%253A01Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_66359cf4162230481da0e231&l=en-US&s=OuvWVPWnFHj9px76-DBxDd0D9-U%3D)
---
|
#### [**Click Here To Donate**](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=66359e4deaf18324fa5aa520&u=https%3A%2F%2Fcheckout.square.site%2Fmerchant%2FMLJ1ATMTHHHX9%2Fcheckout%2FL7ULAYFLVT5CMJ4QXUDZREOQ&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_66359cf4162230481da0e231&l=en-US&s=7vQ8YM5NXa0IdlVGVBBbjvB1T3E%3D)
---
#### **Just finished booking two trips to Idaho and Oregon.**
#### **I’ll be doing RCV workshops and presentations at the Oregon GOP Convention in Keizer, OR on May 24th and 25th**
#### **I’ll be in Coeur d’ Alene, ID on June 13-14th doing Rank Choice Voting workshops and presentations at the Idaho GOP Convention**
---
---
| [](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=66359e4deaf18324fa5aa520&u=https%3A%2F%2Falaskawatchman.com%2F2024%2F04%2F28%2Falaska-ballot-petitions-in-the-works-to-mandate-hand-counting-in-person-voting%2FThank&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_66359cf4162230481da0e231&l=en-US&s=eYA0fqXzabMlykZavtJwEbY7SIc%3D)
---
#### [Read The Article](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=66359e4deaf18324fa5aa520&u=https%3A%2F%2Falaskawatchman.com%2F2024%2F04%2F28%2Falaska-ballot-petitions-in-the-works-to-mandate-hand-counting-in-person-voting%2FThank&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_66359cf4162230481da0e231&l=en-US&s=eYA0fqXzabMlykZavtJwEbY7SIc%3D)
---
### [**Over 140 People Have Signed Up**](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=66359e4deaf18324fa5aa520&u=https%3A%2F%2Fcheckout.square.site%2Fmerchant%2FMLJ1ATMTHHHX9%2Fcheckout%2FL7ULAYFLVT5CMJ4QXUDZREOQ&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_66359cf4162230481da0e231&l=en-US&s=7vQ8YM5NXa0IdlVGVBBbjvB1T3E%3D)
---
#### We have already made the news for our new petitions...
"One of the architects behind the ongoing effort to do away with Alaska’s controversial ranked-choice voting system is already working on two more ballot petitions in a multi-pronged effort to cut down on voter fraud.Phil Izon, who spearheaded a grassroots effort of volunteers in successfully gathering enough signatures to ensure that Alaskans have an opportunity to repeal ranked choice voting this coming November, has written two other petitions that would drastically limit absentee and mail-in voting, while requiring hand-counting of ballots." Step 1: we will need to get our proposed legislation signed and sponsored by 100+ registered voters in Alaska. We already have 125 people signed up to this list, last petition we submitted 180+ signatures. We will provide the document, you need to sign it and then mail it back to us so we can submit them by June 1st. Once we have the 100+ Sponsors we will then submit our two petitions to the Lt. Governor for approval, that process takes 60 days, so by Mid-August we should be collecting signatures. https://www.alaskansforhonestelections.com/future-volunteers-list
---
#### [**We have started the work on another petition**](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=66359e4deaf18324fa5aa520&u=https%3A%2F%2F907honest.com%2Ffuture-volunteers-list%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D66359cf4162230481da0e231%26ss_email_id%3D66359e4deaf18324fa5aa520%26ss_campaign_name%3DWe%2Bare%2Bdoing%2BRCV%2BWorkshops%2Bat%2Bthe%2BIdaho%2Band%2BOregon%2BGOP%2BConventions%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2024-05-04T02%253A33%253A01Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_66359cf4162230481da0e231&l=en-US&s=xByd_WGJS5h6L8JK2d4s2Quag6U%3D)
#### [**Join Us, By Adding Your Name To The List, Help Us Today!!!**](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=66359e4deaf18324fa5aa520&u=https%3A%2F%2F907honest.com%2Ffuture-volunteers-list%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D66359cf4162230481da0e231%26ss_email_id%3D66359e4deaf18324fa5aa520%26ss_campaign_name%3DWe%2Bare%2Bdoing%2BRCV%2BWorkshops%2Bat%2Bthe%2BIdaho%2Band%2BOregon%2BGOP%2BConventions%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2024-05-04T02%253A33%253A01Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_66359cf4162230481da0e231&l=en-US&s=xByd_WGJS5h6L8JK2d4s2Quag6U%3D)
---
I’ve finished writing two more petitions. Both election related, 1: Require precinct level counting with hand counting, also requires to have tabulation done asap, so we can get election results day of or next day. No more machines. 2\. We are going to modify existing absentee laws so they are only available to a limited population. The new law stipulates that all eligible voters must cast their ballots in person unless they meet certain exceptions such as being 65 years of age or older, disabled, out of the county during the elections, about to give birth, or confined in jail. Many I’ve talk to say my three pieces of Legislation below led by citizen initiative will cut down on 90% of voter fraud. Our elections will be far more Free, Fair, and Honest 1\. Repeal Jungle Primary and RCV 2\. Require Hand Counting at Precinct Level 3\. New law stipulates that all eligible voters must cast their ballots in person unless they meet certain exceptions such as being 65 years of age or older, disabled, out of the county during the elections, about to give birth, or confined in jail. Join me today and help us, we need 1\. Volunteers to help with signature gathering 2\. Advisory board members to help keep us on track 3\. People sharing our messages and get out the vote this November 5th and tell everyone you know hundreds of times to Vote Yes to Repeal. Big money millionaires and billionaires have a big target on Alaska. Our future is not for them to decide regardless of their money. Read Below
---
#### [**CLICK HERE TO ADD YOUR INFORMATION TO OUR PRIVATE INVITE LINK**](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=66359e4deaf18324fa5aa520&u=https%3A%2F%2F907honest.com%2Ffuture-volunteers-list%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D66359cf4162230481da0e231%26ss_email_id%3D66359e4deaf18324fa5aa520%26ss_campaign_name%3DWe%2Bare%2Bdoing%2BRCV%2BWorkshops%2Bat%2Bthe%2BIdaho%2Band%2BOregon%2BGOP%2BConventions%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2024-05-04T02%253A33%253A01Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_66359cf4162230481da0e231&l=en-US&s=xByd_WGJS5h6L8JK2d4s2Quag6U%3D)
---
#### **Let's do some digging on the Pro-RCV group here in Alaska. Disclaimer from their most recent newsletter.**
#### **The Pro-RCV group appears to be the “Dark Money” they were so worried about, Arabella Advisors and 1630 Fund are about as “Dark Money” as “Dark Money” gets.**
#### _**Their new Incorporation is their top donor.**_
#### _**Then "Article Four from Virginia"**_
#### _**Then "1630 Fund in Washington D.C."**_
---
This is who is funding the [#RankedChoiceVoting](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=66359e4deaf18324fa5aa520&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Fhashtag%2FRankedChoiceVoting%3Fsrc%3Dhashtag_click&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_66359cf4162230481da0e231&l=en-US&s=L26EvlHrBTZHV2Uh_Yo1ag0ccjs%3D) group in Alaska 1630 Fund Swiss billionaire whose personal goal is to “(re)interpret the American Constitution in the light of progressive politics” has donated hundreds of millions of dollars to a left-wing group that is dumping millions into state ballot initiatives, a new report from Americans for Public Trust (APT) revealed. Hansjörg Wyss, through his Berger Action Fund, has donated $243 million to the Sixteen Thirty Fund, which “uses its war chest ... to support massive get-out-the-vote drives, issue advocacy campaigns bolstering President Biden’s agenda, liberal pet projects from abortion to immigration, and attack ads against Republican lawmakers,”
---
---
|
---
Swiss billionaire Hansjörg Wyss has been channeling substantial funds into American state ballot initiatives through the 1630 Fund aka Sixteen Thirty Fund, a progressive advocacy group.As reported by Americans for Public Trust, Wyss’s donations, which total around $243 million to the group, have been instrumental in influencing policies across various states, with a significant focus on Michigan. Since 2017, nearly $34 million has been funneled into Michigan to, among other goals, "rewrite the state’s election laws." This massive infusion of cash aims at bolstering liberal causes from immigration to abortion and enhancing Democratic voter turnout. Such activities have sparked controversy and legislative responses aimed at curbing foreign influence in American electoral processes.https://thefederalist.com/2024/04/18/dark-money-group-backed-by-foreign-billionaire-has-dumped-100-million-into-state-ballot-initiatives/1630 Fund is currently funding multiple ballot initiatives in Alaska, including Alaskans For Better Elections AKBE who brought Ranked Choice Voting to Alaska. Also including the recent push for a higher minimum wage. At some point, one must question when the regulators and government officials, elected to safeguard citizens, become tools manipulated by these malicious actors to act against the citizens they are meant to protect.(e.g. we have been attacked 4 times so far 3 times using state offices, we have been spied on, harassed, and our reputations damaged nationwide all because we were trying to address an election system we didn't feel was a good fit for Alaska)I hope you take this threat to your State Seriously, they are incredibly well funded and they are hell bent on making changes to the State of Alaska. This is one of those cases of too big to fail, where you will attack Alaskans and regular people, but applying these rules to a Swiss Billionaire is outside your job and expectations. clean_body: Please share this with as many people as you can. Share with 5-10 people. | | | | Just finished booking two trips to Idaho and Oregon. I’ll be doing RCV workshops and presentations at the Oregon GOP Convention in Keizer, OR on May 24th and 25th I’ll be in Coeur d’ Alene, ID on June 13-14th doing Rank Choice Voting workshops and presentations at the Idaho GOP Convention | We have already made the news for our new petitions... "One of the architects behind the ongoing effort to do away with Alaska’s controversial ranked-choice voting system is already working on two more ballot petitions in a multi-pronged effort to cut down on voter fraud.Phil Izon, who spearheaded a grassroots effort of volunteers in successfully gathering enough signatures to ensure that Alaskans have an opportunity to repeal ranked choice voting this coming November, has written two other petitions that would drastically limit absentee and mail-in voting, while requiring hand-counting of ballots." Step 1: we will need to get our proposed legislation signed and sponsored by 100+ registered voters in Alaska. We already have 125 people signed up to this list, last petition we submitted 180+ signatures. We will provide the document, you need to sign it and then mail it back to us so we can submit them by June 1st. Once we have the 100+ Sponsors we will then submit our two petitions to the Lt. Governor for approval, that process takes 60 days, so by Mid-August we should be collecting signatures. I’ve finished writing two more petitions. Both election related, 1: Require precinct level counting with hand counting, also requires to have tabulation done asap, so we can get election results day of or next day. No more machines. 2\. We are going to modify existing absentee laws so they are only available to a limited population. The new law stipulates that all eligible voters must cast their ballots in person unless they meet certain exceptions such as being 65 years of age or older, disabled, out of the county during the elections, about to give birth, or confined in jail. Many I’ve talk to say my three pieces of Legislation below led by citizen initiative will cut down on 90% of voter fraud. Our elections will be far more Free, Fair, and Honest 1\. Repeal Jungle Primary and RCV 2\. Require Hand Counting at Precinct Level 3\. New law stipulates that all eligible voters must cast their ballots in person unless they meet certain exceptions such as being 65 years of age or older, disabled, out of the county during the elections, about to give birth, or confined in jail. Join me today and help us, we need 1\. Volunteers to help with signature gathering 2\. Advisory board members to help keep us on track 3\. People sharing our messages and get out the vote this November 5th and tell everyone you know hundreds of times to Vote Yes to Repeal. Big money millionaires and billionaires have a big target on Alaska. Our future is not for them to decide regardless of their money. name: JoeBiden.com
subject: Do you remember...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
The work we need to do is only possible because of people like you making the decision that we can’t go back...we can only go forward. | | |
---
Peter -- With our weekly fundraising deadline coming up, we want you to remember something. _Really remember._ Remember how you felt the day Donald Trump was sworn into office. Remember listening to him speak of American carnage and being afraid of what was to come. And remember time and time again how those fears were realized over the next four years. Now remember how you felt after Joe Biden was sworn in. Remember that relief you felt that we didn’t have to deal with Trump in office any longer, and the hope you felt that we could get America back on track. **We can’t go back.** We can’t go back to the way we all felt when Trump was elected. Peter, it might be wild to think, but you have a central role in making sure we win. The work we need to do is only possible because of people like you making the decision that we can’t go back..._we can only go forward._ Now, we don’t expect you to donate every day, _but with President Biden facing millions of dollars in attack ads, he needs you to make today the day._ So, please: **Millions of supporters from across the country have stepped up to support President Biden, and he has told us how grateful he is for that.** [**Can he count on you to contribute $5, $10, or whatever you can afford today? Every donation helps make sure we reelect Joe and Kamala and keep Trump out of the White House.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt0n_-PX9mL8yHKUav8QI_tF02SEYb775JbaVddBglvb5bATKUlRslVui8wRTD29VzSSEVoOk0Ql00OeYQPkL9qNdtXutgfMu8sCaN9OHpvQIuxrf7tlkAkLtzm6KY8Aujgp_tjoxgHsyyNBS8wmm4CRmT9M2BELHVy6UTzbGDqEyA5X0UhEHbWxo29SmB5O-IoHcEnyTAe8A5ovNG5TzjcomJBUM9z188kLFXAESzf3WvlseYGt89v1gtBgnT6onFviu8gO-oUwgMIYvsG16gXHDSW4SZ6777ckIY8GTX90txIjqair28JkFwC3HJjpXGZhMxsNNyhr0ju11h5cq7Gq83f0eVkdRKXldWzsjCefQ/461/pJLHI5B_TvOfV0c6PtKXGQ/h0/h001.yoHXXypeYn2ImbSmR4GqvSOtpW0N5cwDFv26vSokYEk) | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Really remember. Remember how you felt the day Donald Trump was sworn into office. Remember listening to him speak of American carnage and being afraid of what was to come. And remember time and time again how those fears were realized over the next four years. Now remember how you felt after Joe Biden was sworn in. Remember that relief you felt that we didn’t have to deal with Trump in office any longer, and the hope you felt that we could get America back on track. We can’t go back. We can’t go back to the way we all felt when Trump was elected. Peter, it might be wild to think, but you have a central role in making sure we win. Hi, friend. Chuck Schumer here, and there's something I need you to understand: **This November, not only is our one-seat Senate majority at stake — so is the future of reproductive rights nationwide.**

I know Florida's already facing the sobering reality of extreme limits on abortion, and it'll only get worse now that DeSantis' six-week ban officially took effect yesterday.

That's why I'm thrilled that Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is running to defeat Rick Scott and his massive personal fortune. **But I just heard from DMP HQ, and they’re $12,443 behind on their $100,000 emergency goal.**
**With so much on the line, I can't sit and watch as Scott's expensive ads threaten Debbie Mucarsel-Powell’s chances. Between Senate Democrats defending what experts call the "Senate map from hell," and Floridians bracing for a heartless crackdown on personal freedoms leveled by some of the most extreme far-right leaders in the nation, I understand if it seems like all hope is lost.

**But believe me, friend — that couldn't be further from the truth.**
See, this November, Florida has an incredible opportunity to turn the tides: **Both an initiative to enshrine the right to abortion in the state constitution and a competitor to retire Rick Scott will be on the ballot.**

If enough Floridians come out to demand the GOP stands down, not only would it reinstate reproductive health care access across the Sunshine State ... **_it could also be what ends Rick Scott's Senate career._**

**And if that happens, we might just be able to keep the Senate blue ... and _finally_ get federal protections for abortion across the finish line. **
But the only way we do that is if Debbie Mucarsel-Powell has your support ahead of major deadlines like this one — [**so please friend, will you split a $5 gift to Kirsten and Debbie to help her reach her $100,000 goal, beat her anti-choice opponent, and save our Senate majority and reproductive rights along with it?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84282525/471028141/-1736033032?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk5009-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGY3ODI2YS05ZDA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=92j8hkt0HtH8TOfUfZaDthBSRjcAlLAnKTpripNcPbE=)

clean_body: I understand if it seems like all hope is lost — but that couldn't be further from the truth. | | | = Hi, friend. Chuck Schumer here, and there's something I need you to understand: This November, not only is our one-seat Senate majority at stake — so is the future of reproductive rights nationwide. I know Florida's already facing the sobering reality of extreme limits on abortion, and it'll only get worse now that DeSantis' six-week ban officially took effect yesterday. That's why I'm thrilled that Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is running to defeat Rick Scott and his massive personal fortune. But I just heard from DMP HQ, and they’re $12,443 behind on their $100,000 emergency goal. With so much on the line, I can't sit and watch as Scott's expensive ads threaten Debbie Mucarsel-Powell’s chances. So I've got to ask:= | | = Between Senate Democrats defending what experts call the "Senate map from hell," and Floridians bracing for a heartless crackdown on personal freedoms leveled by some of the most extreme far-right leaders in the nation, I understand if it seems like all hope is lost. But believe me, friend — that couldn't be further from the truth. See, this November, Florida has an incredible opportunity to turn the tides: Both an initiative to enshrine the right to abortion in the state constitution and a competitor to retire Rick Scott will be on the ballot. If enough Floridians come out to demand the GOP stands down, not only would it reinstate reproductive health care access across the Sunshine State ... it could also be what ends Rick Scott's Senate career. And if that happens, we might just be able to keep the Senate blue ... and finally get federal protections for abortion across the finish line. But the only way we do that is if Debbie Mucarsel-Powell has your support ahead of major deadlines like this one — = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Debbie Mucarsel-Powell and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you for reading, Chuck Schumer Senate Majority Leader_ | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

name: Rep. Andy Kim
subject: The story of January 6 isn’t just about violence, insurrection, and trauma
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www
body:
|
---
Peter,

Believe it or not, I found this suit on the sale rack at J. Crew, not long after the 2020 election. I liked the bold blue color and thought I might wear it to the inauguration a few weeks later.

When I donated it to the Smithsonian, the knees were dusted with dirt from the night I spent cleaning trash off of the Capitol’s rotunda floor on January 6.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84282556/471028290/-285836992?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240503_2_3&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM5NTA0NjhlLTlkMDktZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=G0YJDpzYIHqIvFbIlhyPGN2135ukvzhFRoMpWkhQKsk=)
_Holding my bright blue suit, perhaps for the last time, before I donated it to the Smithsonian._
Honestly, I had seriously considered throwing the suit away until the Smithsonian called. That day still brings such terrible memories for me; I knew I‘d never wear it again.

**But the story of January 6 isn’t just about violence, insurrection, and trauma.** Like our country’s story, that day ended full of hope, resilience, civility, and service. Even the simple step I took to help clean up that trash the insurrectionists left behind sparked something much more significant. In the weeks that followed, I received thousands of cards and letters from folks across the country who were inspired or comforted by what they saw.

I still cherish every single one.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84282558/471028291/-285836992?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240503_2_3&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM5NTA0NjhlLTlkMDktZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=G0YJDpzYIHqIvFbIlhyPGN2135ukvzhFRoMpWkhQKsk=)
_I never imagined that something as simple and reflexive as cleaning up a mess I saw could become inspirational to those like the artist who sent me this wonderful illustration._
Those cards remind me how strong this country is, and how strong we can be when we come together.

Right now, our partisan divide can seem so deep that it threatens to tear us apart. We saw it on full display on January 6, and we must ensure nothing like that ever happens again. That means working with Congress to protect our Capitol, but it also means all of us working together to find common ground.

**That common ground is closer than you might realize, Peter.**

I can clearly see the disconnect between the partisan wars being waged in DC, the in-fighting within the GOP’s own party, and the priorities of my friends and neighbors in New Jersey. We are honestly all just exhausted by the endless cycles of misinformation and outrage. It’s a mess, for sure -- and it’s all of ours to clean up together.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84282560/471028293/-285836992?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240503_2_3&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM5NTA0NjhlLTlkMDktZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=G0YJDpzYIHqIvFbIlhyPGN2135ukvzhFRoMpWkhQKsk=)
I’m raising my two Jersey boys in the same community that welcomed my parents from South Korea. Everything I have done in Congress is to keep the promise I made to help build them a better world than the one we inherited —**and now, I am running for U.S. Senate to bring that same integrity and an emphasis on putting people first.**

That’s why the movement we’re building is focused on civility and service, starting in the same New Jersey community that raised me and stretching out to every corner of our country.

[I’m ready to help bring our country together and fix what’s broken. That’s why I’m running for Senate to restore integrity and honor to our government and I’m humbly asking you to join me in this cause. Can I count on you to split a donation between my campaign and Defeat Republicans?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84282562/471028295/-285836992?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240503_2_3&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM5NTA0NjhlLTlkMDktZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=G0YJDpzYIHqIvFbIlhyPGN2135ukvzhFRoMpWkhQKsk=)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below._ | [DONATE $5 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84282564/471028297/-285836992?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240503_2_3&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM5NTA0NjhlLTlkMDktZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=G0YJDpzYIHqIvFbIlhyPGN2135ukvzhFRoMpWkhQKsk=) [DONATE $15 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84282566/471028299/-285836992?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240503_2_3&express_lane=true&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM5NTA0NjhlLTlkMDktZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=G0YJDpzYIHqIvFbIlhyPGN2135ukvzhFRoMpWkhQKsk=) [DONATE $25 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84282568/471028301/-285836992?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240503_2_3&express_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM5NTA0NjhlLTlkMDktZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=G0YJDpzYIHqIvFbIlhyPGN2135ukvzhFRoMpWkhQKsk=) [OTHER AMOUNT »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84282570/471028303/-285836992?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240503_2_3&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM5NTA0NjhlLTlkMDktZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=G0YJDpzYIHqIvFbIlhyPGN2135ukvzhFRoMpWkhQKsk=)
---

More soon,

Andy

name: Jon Tester
subject: Politics isn’t a game
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84282576/471028340/1231903508?amount=3&refcode=UTS_FR_90DC_240503_2_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJlODgyYWM4LTlkMDktZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rkDw3nhTfNiQ_wdvqw_CZgbqW_0DOz6Ho47qLctD7dA=)
Peter, it's Jon Tester.
Did you know that not a single state bordering Montana has a Democratic Senator? In fact, I’m the only statewide-elected Democrat in Montana.
That’s why I spend every single day fighting so hard, not just for my own constituents, but for everyone who lives in a farm town like me — especially folks without any Democratic senators looking out for them.
Because while Washington Republicans might choose wealthy corporations over dirt farmers, side with Big Pharma instead of teachers, or listen to their big donors and ignore the rest of us, **I will always work for you.**
When you make a donation to my campaign, you’re not just supporting me. You’re giving me the resources to fight back against Mitch McConnell’s disastrous policies and work to protect our progress — for all of us.
[_**So, if you can, I’m personally asking you to split a $3 or more donation between Upset the Setup and my campaign to help us reach our critical fundraising goal. We’re slightly behind right now and anything you can give keeps me fighting for you in the Senate.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/84282577/471028341/1231903508?amount=3&refcode=UTS_FR_90DC_240503_2_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJlODgyYWM4LTlkMDktZWYxMS05NmYzLTdjMWU1MjFiMDdmOSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rkDw3nhTfNiQ_wdvqw_CZgbqW_0DOz6Ho47qLctD7dA=)

clean_body: = Peter, it's Jon Tester. Did you know that not a single state bordering Montana has a Democratic Senator? In fact, I’m the only statewide-elected Democrat in Montana. That’s why I spend every single day fighting so hard, not just for my own constituents, but for everyone who lives in a farm town like me — especially folks without any Democratic senators looking out for them. Because while Washington Republicans might choose wealthy corporations over dirt farmers, side with Big Pharma instead of teachers, or listen to their big donors and ignore the rest of us, I will always work for you. When you make a donation to my campaign, you’re not just supporting me. You’re giving me the resources to fight back against Mitch McConnell’s disastrous policies and work to protect our progress — for all of us. = If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = = = = Politics isn’t a game. In 2022, Central Florida put its trust in me – a Gen Z, working class, Afro-Latino organizer – and I became the first of my generation to ever be elected to Congress.

This win didn’t come easy, Peter. _A lot_ of people counted me out. They said that I was too young. That I didn’t have the “right” experience. That my generation didn’t deserve a seat at the decision-making table. They didn’t think I stood a _chance._

But people like you ignored all of that noise, and I was able to defy the odds. _We did that._

**Now, our youth-powered movement has become a powerful force for change – and a direct threat to the status quo. That’s why fascist leaders in Florida, the gun lobby, and countless special interests are all plotting to replace me in this election.**

I’m ready to fight back, but I’m going to need YOU to join my team to win on Election Day, Peter.
[**_Please, can you donate $20.24 to become a Founding Donor to my reelection campaign and help me reach every voter across Central Florida? clean_body: | ~ Peter, it’s go time: I just launched my reelection campaign to keep representing FL-10 in Congress! ~ | ~ In 2022, Central Florida put its trust in me – a Gen Z, working class, Afro-Latino organizer – and I became the first of my generation to ever be elected to Congress. This win didn’t come easy, Peter. A lot of people counted me out. They said that I was too young. That I didn’t have the “right” experience. That my generation didn’t deserve a seat at the decision-making table. They didn’t think I stood a chance. But people like you ignored all of that noise, and I was able to defy the odds. We did that. Now, our youth-powered movement has become a powerful force for change – and a direct threat to the status quo. That’s why fascist leaders in Florida, the gun lobby, and countless special interests are all plotting to replace me in this election. I’m ready to fight back, but I’m going to need YOU to join my team to win on Election Day, Peter. ~ | | ~ ~ | ~ | ** Let’s make history again, Maxwell Frost ~~ ~ | PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS Maxwell Frost for Congress PO Box 772671 Orlando, FL 32877-2671 United States | Maxwell is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District in Congress. Derek,
Corporate PACs—including the PACs of Lockheed Martin and Koch Industries—have continued to prop up candidates who attack our democracy.

Katie Porter has never taken a dime of corporate PAC money, modeling how elected officials can earn voters’ trust and increase faith in our democracy.
Since 2020, Truth to Power has been able to spend over $500,000 directly supporting Democrats and has raised more than $125,000 directly into candidates’ campaigns. We’ve endorsed Democrats who reject corporate PAC money and are running to protect the environment, restore the nationwide right to an abortion, and create an economy that works for working people.
Truth to Power is dedicated to supporting and electing leaders who reject corporate PAC contributions, refuse to be bought, and strengthen our democracy. This is only possible because of contributions from supporters like you.

Lord have mercy...

I just got some shocking news from my old friend, Majority Leader Steve Scalise. I wouldn't normally bug you with this but frankly, I'm worried. And there's something you can help with that would be a SAVING GRACE at an important time.

I drafted up a summary using this secure link - I'll explain everything here:

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: I'm Getting Death Threats Over A Tweet From Those Screaming Against Death... The Irony
body:
In the last hour, I have received numerous death threats over a Tweet that I made earlier today (none are viable) because leftist influencer/reproter
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10046220.4547.1.d5aa7b41335b30951fc9071bf04a6d32) |
---
In the last hour, I have received numerous death threats over a **Tweet** that I made earlier today (**none are viable**) because _leftist influencer/reproter_ **Ron Filipkowski** stirred up **Twitter**. The **irony** is that the death threats are coming from the same people "protesting" the deaths in Gaza. _You can't make this stuff up._ **Our nation is living upside down.** Now in regards to my [Tweet](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10046220.4548.1.324cb57577efd67ec32a29c5fe0d27bc)... I totally stand by it. The image is **Gen Z** taking up the battle their generation faces on college campuses and in the current culture. **Gen Z** is not fighting a battle on the island of Iwo Gima. **Gen Z** is fighting a battle on college campuses in America. **Gen Z must WIN this culture war.** Let's pray for this next generation that they will have the courage of the **Greatest Generation** during WWII and that **Gen Z** will be as successful to truly **MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN**.
---
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10046220.4549.1.6d2d4e088f6c6998eec412dec9db7569)
---
I am super excited to share with you the release of a _new project_ I have been working on. 2 years ago, I did a _32 part series_ over the **Book of Revelation**. Since then, the Lord has shown me so much about **Revelation** that I did not know when I first taught the series and a TON has changed in our world since then. _Therefore_ , I sensed led to redo the series over the **Book of Revelation** with the new insights. This new teaching series will take each chapter of **Revelation** and break it down _verse-by-verse_. _"Blessed is the one who reads aloud the words of this prophecy, and blessed are those who hear it and take to heart what is written in it, because the time is near"_ **\- Revelation1:3** I know this teaching will bless you. I have also included the teaching notes for you to follow along. Watch Revelation 1 here: [https://youtu.be/VfS_4Aii2hE](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10046220.4550.1.8c25448272427147781004b51a2c09da) **Upcoming Events At Sheridan:** -Mon, May 20 @6:30pm - **General Michael Flynn**

-Fri, June 28 @6:30pm - **Tim Tebow**

-Fri, July 26 @6:30pm - **Riley Gaines**

-Thur, Oct 24 @6:30pm - **Pete Hegseth** RSVP at:[ https://www.sheridan.church/events](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10046220.4551.1.06270d0be79a3b72695855b52423a157) Thank you,
Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer

I am excited to announce that [Riley Gaines](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10046220.4561.1.768936d1788db15a299376b44adb20bb) will be joining us on Friday, July 26 to address one of the most crucial battles we have right now that centers upon _gender_. ## General Flynn Wants To Meet YOU!
---
America's General, [Michael Flynn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10046220.4572.1.5c1f18401f8c6bfb21a5df4c5ea84162), is doing a **Nation-Wide Tour** for his new movie! [General Flynn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10046220.4573.1.d245c7798ca6bcf3fd1d7e682f2ecc79) wants to invite you to join him in a city that is close to you. At the end of each showing, there will be a live Q&A w/[General Flynn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10046220.4574.1.8f3ad2b8457079f59718e1260b7ccb9a). View the locations of the [Flynn Tour](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10046220.4575.1.feada3125b0841b3166b7e766e943d06): [www.flynnmovie.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10046220.4576.1.a3e97573dce19e587946e698ff7bd77d) General Flynn will be coming to [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10046220.4577.1.27680379bf3e34a9f300b1b0a6351884) Tulsa for the premier of the [NEW Flynn Movie](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10046220.4578.1.823cff00e952756e4fd79766734fb281)! **Date** : Monday, May 20, 2024
**Meet & Greet**: 5:00pm
**Show Time** : 6:30pm
**Location** : 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK **Ticket Link** : [https://www.flynnmovie.com/ref/Tulsa/](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10046220.4579.1.00c62ac1eb7d9a7e9baa8b9aa7f04815) Follow the [Link](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10046220.4580.1.c0cd60c88928228bcd344aaeaa54daba) above, click "Get Tickets" and select the Tulsa Show Time. There will be a **LIVE Q &A** with [General Flynn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10046220.4581.1.8c09bbaaf77ce9e57074f3886d090ed8) after the movie. If you live outside the Tulsa area, there are many other cities that [General Flynn](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10046220.4582.1.8327b1e44bafd0ba6a7724d936706e0a) is visiting that you can view here: [www.flynnmovie.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=10046220.4583.1.94d2c971b0f91afd87059742071cc7dd)

If you live outside the Tulsa area, there are many other cities that is visiting that you can view here: | | Tim Tebow Is Coming To Sheridan.Church | Tim Tebow is coming to in Tulsa, OK to share his heart and the love of Christ! This event with Tim Tebow will not be live-streamed so the question is... HAVE YOU RSVP'd yet? Seating is limited and thanks to the leftists media the tickets are going fast. Date : Friday, June 28 Time : 6:30pm Location : 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK Tickets : Ticket Types: -General Admission -VIP (Includes Picture w/Tim Tebow & VIP Seating) -Business Sponsor (Includes Autographed Football, Picture w/Tebow, Business Booth in Lobby, Business Promotion from Stage & 4 VIP Tickets) Also, view upcoming events at Sheridan w/General Michael Flynn , Mayor Rudy Giuliani , Darryl Strawberry , Perry Stone and others: | | ©2024 Jackson Lahmeyer | Tulsa, OK 74145 | == "Web Version" == "Preferences" == "Forward" "Unsubscribe" |
