name: John Carney
subject: Have you seen the news?
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/kkOjmezKC0GLwuFJ5Y8blQ2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/kkOjmezKC0GLwuFJ5Y8blQ2]

Dear Friend,

As you may have already seen, on Monday I announced my candidacy for Mayor of Wilmington. Throughout this week, the outpouring of support and encouragement has been incredibly moving. But I know that this race will not be easy and the work is just beginning.
image of ... [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/105967/images/IMG_8137.JPG]

Together we will work with state officials, school districts, and community leaders to improve public education in city schools; prioritize expanding affordable housing in Wilmington; invest in small and minority-owned businesses across the city; protect taxpayer dollars and make sure the city has a strong, sustainable financial position.

You can learn more about my vision for the City at johncarney.org. [https://johncarney.org/]

A campaign is about a community coming together and this race is no different. I hope each of you will join me on the campaign trail and get involved. I cannot do this without your support.

Sincerely,

John

Volunteer [https://secure.ngpvan.com/_SkzaL8p_Ei7NqAUfOl2gw2] Contribute [https://secure.ngpvan.com/kkOjmezKC0GLwuFJ5Y8blQ2]

Carney for Wilmington
P.O. Box 2162
Wilmington, DE 19899
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/Bocc_U1b_0qglk2TKfy3-Q2?unsubscribedata=jDgUc0fx4N77CVnG62YfjQNlRturmgvYqGDhF5QRYRFr1x4niJcqE3r9oyQOT%2BSDngqxa4xpnP5vx91e4prr6wMw1GjqvrzFG94b3ZuFhgCIvPohWVu0WvKyUNYQyn%2BYwEGz8IG0seRGj7FeIrL8rrIpSCHtfdkXxYyxIMxmTRCwkBvZpF3Jq3wVQKsq2uRe10rMazKYuAGT6T9Iqrrymzu4qgA9Tbrt48WqCHgxcL8mjjFIUS5bgNLMvCOM5xfufNlwOzkuvQUF%2BWBnH67dkwXzB7w9WMTFoKHSRTb1ztMJPb2HsGN7nE7ypJzLF%2B0AYG%2B0r2yXp6%2BDfFxe4TWXOXXJx0qni%2FT8CyYbDyagE8MR9KPODNrgEEJHxiYeAE860FqxhhdyqWJbfP%2Bk4DzwqH0hcvWQJ%2BimQvMxsjHIZUw%3D .

name: Dom Jones for Assembly 2024
subject: 🧹🚮🌊Surf's Up for a Cause: Dive into Our Spring Beach Clean-Up Party! 🏄‍♂️🌊
body:
Get ready to ride the waves of change! Join us and the surf community for a sun-soaked day of environmental action. Let's keep our coastal paradise pristine together. Mark your calendars and grab your SPF – it's time to make a splash for a cleaner ocean! 🌞🌴
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.domjones.org/so/6cOz0UZ9e/c?w=P-tDJfpBCBg0r0pdus4E110xFOb-9H_W6wPAWsgpOZA.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZG9tam9uZXMub3JnL3NvLzZjT3owVVo5ZT9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjUxYmIxNzQ0LTJhOTMtNDMwYy04YzQ3LTA4MDY4MDZkZDFjMiJ9)_**

| | |
---
| [](https://www.domjones.org/so/6cOz0UZ9e/c?w=Wn7aXHpbdcOZmiW5vRPvyHwaetkeWahV5gq4Zj9MQFQ.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZG9tam9uZXMub3JnIiwiciI6ImZiYjU5ZjcxLWI1MDMtNDU0My1jNzg0LTY4YWQ0ZDUxMzE3YyIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjUxYmIxNzQ0LTJhOTMtNDMwYy04YzQ3LTA4MDY4MDZkZDFjMiJ9)

| |
---
| | |
---
| | COMMUNITY EVENT ALERT!!
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Join us for one of our exciting events of the season - the Spring Beach Cleanup Party! We're taking action to keep our beaches safe, clean, and enjoyable for all. Gather your friends and family for a wonderful day of community service and environmental awareness.
---
| [**RSVP Today!**](https://www.domjones.org/so/6cOz0UZ9e/c?w=wkv6yvMfGytVrStj92zcEdJsVmAEdxcfXwPfHFFx7bI.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9mb3Jtcy53aXguY29tL2MyMTY2NmY3LWQ2ZTEtNGM4Yi1iMmU4LTg3ZGIzMjdiNmEzYTpjM2E3YzI5My1iZWI4LTRlYmQtOTc4Zi0wNjE5NDdiODI3MWIiLCJyIjoiNDAxMDQ1MWItYTQ4ZS00MjU4LWFkNGMtYjFhYTE1MjNlOTYxIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiNTFiYjE3NDQtMmE5My00MzBjLThjNDctMDgwNjgwNmRkMWMyIn0)
---
| | |
---
| | Imagine the joy of a pristine beach - the sound of waves crashing, the feel of warm sand between your toes, and the scent of salty air. By coming together on May 19th at 1pm, we can make sure this experience is available to everyone.
---
| [**Learn About Huntington State Beach**](https://www.domjones.org/so/6cOz0UZ9e/c?w=69HhgjACYQ6kZdqjH86gGTDoiqROdOkQqXIrVem0b0I.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucGFya3MuY2EuZ292Lz9wYWdlX2lkPTY0MyIsInIiOiI1YjkyYmU0MS0wOTg1LTRjNWQtOWU4NC0zMmIxNGEzNjlhNDMiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI1MWJiMTc0NC0yYTkzLTQzMGMtOGM0Ny0wODA2ODA2ZGQxYzIifQ)
---
|
---
| | But that's not all! We're excited to announce that our event is supporting the [Bonzai Surf School](https://www.domjones.org/so/6cOz0UZ9e/c?w=dOVKxQGpJt8zW2lf8MnSV9nc6zx6zNl3vQYmsbM62yo.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iYW56YWlzdXJmc2Nob29sLmNvbS9jb250YWN0LyIsInIiOiIzOWJlNDhmMC05MWZhLTRmYWItOGRjYS02MDBmYzdkYzc5NDIiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI1MWJiMTc0NC0yYTkzLTQzMGMtOGM0Ny0wODA2ODA2ZGQxYzIifQ). This partnership is part of our commitment to uplifting small businesses in our community. Be prepared for a thrilling day of fun, friends, and surf!
---
| | | [**CHECK OUT BANZAI!**](https://www.domjones.org/so/6cOz0UZ9e/c?w=EUDe_2-TU3hZM46W2cV_IKxnJNExHOuj6bYnZYgyVKI.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iYW56YWlzdXJmc2Nob29sLmNvbS9jb250YWN0LyIsInIiOiJjNTFkMWM3MS03NzQ4LTQ1YjItYjY5YS0zMGNhMjJhNWEzYWIiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiI1MWJiMTc0NC0yYTkzLTQzMGMtOGM0Ny0wODA2ODA2ZGQxYzIifQ)

clean_body: Get ready to ride the waves of change! Join us and the surf community for a sun-soaked day of environmental action. Let's keep our coastal paradise pristine together. Mark your calendars and grab your SPF – it's time to make a splash for a cleaner ocean! 🌞🌴 | | Can't see this message? | | | | | | | | | | | COMMUNITY EVENT ALERT!! | | | | | Join us for one of our exciting events of the season - the Spring Beach Cleanup Party! We're taking action to keep our beaches safe, clean, and enjoyable for all. Gather your friends and family for a wonderful day of community service and environmental awareness. | | | | | | Imagine the joy of a pristine beach - the sound of waves crashing, the feel of warm sand between your toes, and the scent of salty air. By coming together on May 19th at 1pm, we can make sure this experience is available to everyone. | | | | But that's not all! We're excited to announce that our event is supporting the . This partnership is part of our commitment to uplifting small businesses in our community. Be prepared for a thrilling day of fun, friends, and surf! | | | | | | | | | Event Details | | | | | Date: Sunday, May 19th, 2024Time: 1PMLocation: Huntington State Beach on Brookhurst and PCHGrab your gloves, sunscreen, bags, and join us as we make a positive impact on our environment. Don't miss this chance to support our surfer community and inspire environmental justice! name: Josh Hawley
subject: Peter, I need your feedback on this.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Peter, when I was growing up, where you got in life depended on how hard you worked.

The color of your skin, where you came from, or whether you were a man or a woman, didn’t matter. All that mattered was grit, dedication, and faith.

But now, Democrat’s DEI is changing the playing field, prioritizing equity over results.

It’s no wonder our country is falling apart - the government is hiring whoever is the most diverse instead of whoever is the most qualified.

name: Barbara Grassley
subject: My husband
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc
body:
Please read

|
---
Dear Friend,

I'm sorry to bother you with this email, but sometimes I feel like I have to vent a little bit. After all the years my husband, Chuck, has been in the Senate, he never lets anything get under his skin.

As a lifelong farmer, he's weathered the storms of Mother Nature and cyclical markets. Thank goodness he's got nerves of steel. The Biden administration's reckless spending has fueled the fires of inflation, and its radical open border agenda makes every state a border state.

I just wish there was something I could do to make his day...

That's why I asked one of my husband's fundraising managers, Kurt, if there was anything I could do to help. He asked me to write this email, and here we are.

I just _KNOW_ that Chuck would love to help his conservative allies in the Senate and see Republicans win across the board. **I know times are tough, and the Biden economy is pinching your wallet at the grocery store from one week to the next. It would make a huge difference if you can spare $5, $10, or even just $1.**

clean_body: Please read | Dear Friend, I'm sorry to bother you with this email, but sometimes I feel like I have to vent a little bit. After all the years my husband, Chuck, has been in the Senate, he never lets anything get under his skin. As a lifelong farmer, he's weathered the storms of Mother Nature and cyclical markets. Thank goodness he's got nerves of steel. The Biden administration's reckless spending has fueled the fires of inflation, and its radical open border agenda makes every state a border state. I just wish there was something I could do to make his day... That's why I asked one of my husband's fundraising managers, Kurt, if there was anything I could do to help. He asked me to write this email, and here we are. I just KNOW that Chuck would love to help his conservative allies in the Senate and see Republicans win across the board. I know times are tough, and the Biden economy is pinching your wallet at the grocery store from one week to the next. It would make a huge difference if you can spare $5, $10, or even just $1. Chuck's team set up some buttons below to help you make a contribution. | Sincerely, Barbara Grassley Paid for by The Grassley Committee, Inc. Copyright (C) 2024 The Grassley Committee, All rights reserved.

I just found out this morning: The Koch brothers’ group Americans for Prosperity just sent out mailers against me across the entire district to try to stop us from winning this critical House seat.

Hello,
I just found out this morning: **The Koch brothers’ group Americans for Prosperity just sent out mailers against me _across the entire district_ to try to stop us from winning this critical House seat.**
In 2022, I lost to Lauren Boebert by just 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country.
The only reason Boebert is still a congresswoman is because we got out-spent – plain and simple. And the Kochs aren’t going to be the only ones dumping money against me.
This will be one of the most important – and most expensive – races in the country. **If we’re going to win this House seat, we cannot let these mailers go unanswered.**
We’ve set a rapid-response goal of raising another $12,500 in order to fight back against the dark money flooding our district, but I’m not taking money from corporate PACs. **The only way we’ll be able to hit our goal and win this House seat is if grassroots donors like you give right now:**
**[Please, will you rush $5 or more right now to my campaign – no amount is too small to make a difference – to help us fight back against the Koch brothers’ money and win this critical House seat?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/84283673/471032223/1610638071?refcode=em20240503pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=a526c714-a509-ef11-96f3-7c1e521b07f9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTI2YzcxNC1hNTA5LWVmMTEtOTZmMy03YzFlNTIxYjA3ZjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S4t0rDew2HrsY2Uc4pmlJhby8cjj4HOSg64yxoByJu4=)**

name: Rural Organizers
subject: Rallying Rural Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC
body:
Your $1 can make a difference...
---
| | | |
---
| | | |
---
| | | |
# Rallying Rural Democrats
# Your $1 Can Make a Difference!
---
| [ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/341?refcode=341)
---
Dear friend, In the heart of every rural community lies the spirit of resilience, unity, and hope. As Democrats committed to empowering every voice, we understand the importance of amplifying the concerns and aspirations of rural America. Today, we invite you to be a part of a movement that embodies these values and drives real change for all Americans. If every person on our list pitches in $1, we’ll soar **three months ahead** of our fundraising goals. That means more resources to **support Democratic candidates who champion rural interests** , more capacity to engage in **vital grassroots organizing** , and more impact in **amplifying the voices of our communities**. Your dollar isn’t just a drop in the bucket; it’s a ripple that can turn into a wave of change. It symbolizes your commitment to building a future where every rural American has access to quality healthcare, education, and economic opportunity. We understand times are tough, but your small investment today can yield immense returns tomorrow. Together, we can build a stronger, more resilient future for rural America. **We need the House, Senate, and Presidency** to accomplish change in 2024. It's possible, and it's vital if we want our democracy to withstand the attacks on our civil infrastructure waged by MAGA Republicans. **We need to pass legisaltion for reproductive rights**. Republicans may hold the Supreme Court, but we can pass federal abortion legislation if we have the House, Senate and Presidency in 2024. **We need smart green policy to avoid future catastrophe**. These next years a crucial tipping point as we get closer and closer to 1.5 degrees celsius of global warming. We already spent last summer under a haze of wildfire smoke. Even $1 helps us uplift progressive voices pushing for climate-friendly policy. [**Will you stand with us? Click here to donate $1 and be a part of shaping a brighter tomorrow.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/341?refcode=341&amount=1&express_lane=true)

name: Pennsylvania For Cornel West 2024
subject: Organize PA For Dr. West this Saturday!
body:
Join other Pennsylvanians to discuss getting Dr. West on the ballot!

| | | [ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240503pa_mtg2&n=1)
---
Dear Peter, We wanted to invite you to our weekly zoom call this Saturday, May 4th at 1:45 pm. The first 15 minutes will be for new volunteer onboarding. Here is the [Zoom Link](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=8OiSU-45XX7daqrXIuaEL5fUoNZiU8-MFZYBZMdCOsW8OEit4ay6MEMUMTYh6vYL&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240503pa_mtg2&n=2) for those who would like to attend. If you cannot attend, please let us know when is a better date/time for you to chat and get caught up/plugged in. Here is the rolling [sign-in sheet](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=V9GgiCHyRlcKopaFZlYpJ7yZdWakI41WOFq4RnBu99GGVu2SDF-pQ_emv7AOpbKNqfhrDhXiVejlDXblVjnfyJpt1ul6Fu-2VjTYYBhU6eNteP9_FrT1dnDm7Ea-ADuu&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240503pa_mtg2&n=3) we will use prior to meetings. On this form you can also add agenda items. This campaign is grassroots driven, and your input is valuable! This is our working [agenda](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=V9GgiCHyRlcKopaFZlYpJ7yZdWakI41WOFq4RnBu99FAOrd8YantibFZ8nd--t_aZR-jMp3-N2gIfv-nIHoz0CueaqzMaQqFGyysvA24-lIec6EEr28mlm9fDFqge5j1r8UZJb01nSBLmrnxECDijQ&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240503pa_mtg2&n=4) where you can see a brief outline of what we will be discussing. We encourage volunteers to not be limited to Zoom calls and share digital workspaces with the campaign. To facilitate this, we have an official slack channel. If you'd like to join, please complete[ this form](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=V9GgiCHyRlcKopaFZlYpJ9ZpzeM5nn_wNI5AUzmqUot6J_fCFzJh-MCHn1MURhu2ZkzY52bvK5xka0NkxPAdP1pVOUBLjWLpGaXJU1yAyKTeA7tA2PKP2h8-ffcx-SKmn72jtbJ3HQJdgoKyQIXeKQ&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240503pa_mtg2&n=5). Directly following our regularly scheduled meeting we will have a brief petition training event from 3pm-4pm. This training is heavily suggested if you'd like to help collect signatures! This will be done via Google Meet - Here is the link: [meet.google.com/cre-qwrm-too](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=UTiB5x-uDEzajIKyypHMelIzYS2PRm-_YAWdzo85ZAcpI9xp1D2FdE8wd4o4na_2&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240503pa_mtg2&n=6)
---
| [](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=8OiSU-45XX7daqrXIuaEL5fUoNZiU8-MFZYBZMdCOsW8OEit4ay6MEMUMTYh6vYL&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240503pa_mtg2&n=7 "Click here to join the Weekly PA call on 5/4 1:45PM") [Click here to join the Weekly PA call on 5/4 1:45PM](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=8OiSU-45XX7daqrXIuaEL5fUoNZiU8-MFZYBZMdCOsW8OEit4ay6MEMUMTYh6vYL&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240503pa_mtg2&n=7)
---
Peace and Love, Christian PA State Election Committee

---
Cornel West for President · 8253A Backlick Rd., PO Box #1577, Newington, VA 22122, United States
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com · [Unsubscribe](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/unsubscribe?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20240503pa_mtg2&n=8)

name: Donald Trump Jr
subject: ELECT KARI LAKE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kari Lake for Senate
body:
TAKE BACK THE SENATETAKE BACK THE SENATE

| [ ](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=51495fa23f84416aad422f3001d4dee1&_e=X1HuIKXyeAm-JRkZRzv3EnjwxcQfZhjlpktFMdaNqS_O_8ro9XmtIPIC6UPGDX0-SMOZi1m2FrcUBd9cWvFUm5ru6VA7lCDTsKyzkBoYSHHXhzK-wACS5lx2oJ-eBlrsuQWc1DvtxMBuXL5Y-7gZAOPnn65Xh3IjlJ_exH2B-cB9Pldys0p_M63zGfx7Gafz8NDh3m0P3lgqzufeHCGfLfSXqcuZd68UGxYs0XleRdjkPMrRW5aE6R3ug6EyD1vVN_imMsosOZlgvdlSGbnwMncAOnpuHJVi3cnNdQKx9u3uwBBPy1JUFojUE9GVd98ZVMezXPtXFvPfc9BIMq0co7f6feDwD3wwjC852eZQMPKXSa7LdsTHt52hEZP24n4xGUrJuLjVeE6QfkD-LK7ZmNZ8-IWBnX8BvO1zNAGu3vQ%3D)
---
Patriot,

I know you've been one of my father's biggest supporters since before he entered the White House.

You've stood by him as he's been attacked by the media, spied on by the Deep State, and dragged through the courts. All because he will never stop fighting for the American people.

One patriot has stood with him through this entire witch hunt. She's been on the front lines fighting against these corrupt indictments and lawfare thrown his way. That patriot is Kari Lake, and I'm proud to announce I'm endorsing her for the United States Senate in Arizona.

Kari is the ultimate MAGA patriot, and she would be the perfect candidate to stand up to the Democrat Party and pass my father's agenda in Washington. name: Scott Baugh
subject: The top target in the country!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Baugh for Congress
body:
Our golden opportunity |
---
| | [ ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=cb7fccf907&e=8a657725d1)
---
| Peter, This is Scott Baugh here – in case we haven’t met yet, I’m the Republican who came within 3 percentage points of dethroning left-wing Progressive Caucus Leader Katie Porter last cycle... even in spite of her raising more than $29 million for her campaign warchest.

Now, _Porter is officially out of California politics with her unsuccessful run for U.S. Senate._

**That’s right – Republicans have a golden opportunity before us to FLIP CA-47 and finally restore thoughtful conservative representation to the O.C. Get this – _the Chair of the NRCC is even calling this district the TOP TARGET for Republicans in the entire country!_**
---
| [ ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=0c243f260f&e=8a657725d1)
---
| Make no mistake, though – this is also going to be one of the most expensive and competitive Congressional elections in the country, too. Democrat Party leaders aren’t going to let us gain ground in California without putting up a fight!

**But I’m ready for the challenge, Peter, and I’ll tell you why, right before asking you to join me in this critical mission (don’t worry – no donation required).**

First, though, let me quickly introduce myself:

I grew up on a farm and learned from an early age the value of hard work and the importance of Faith, Family, and Freedom.

Now, I’m a local business owner with a passion for serving my community.

I served Orange County in the State Assembly, standing up for conservative values in the face of California’s far-left politicians. I’ve chaired both the Orange County Republican Party and Orange County’s Gang Reduction Program, where we provide kids a chance to succeed in life while preventing violent crime on our streets.

This has been my home for over 33 years – I love the O.C., I love my neighbors, and I love the life we are able to live in this special place. That’s why I do my best to give back everywhere I can.

**But here’s the truth – under far-left leadership from the likes of Katie Porter, our representatives have been taking us in the wrong direction.**

Their “solution” to every problem is more taxes and more spending even when Americans struggle to afford gas, food, and basic necessities.

They’ve gone along with the far-left immigration policies of the Biden Administration that have left our Southern Border exposed.

And they’ve refused to take action on the rising crime in California that’s leaving our neighborhoods unsafe.

**This election is our chance to finally get things turned around. We must restore thoughtful conservative leadership to CA-47, make O.C. Red Again, and deliver policies that serve the interests of folks in Orange County... NOT some left-wing Democrat agenda.**

I’m ready for the mission ahead, Peter – we have the momentum and already proved we can compete with the powerful California Democrat Machine.

The only thing we need now is a strong sign that folks like you are with me...

**So will you help me make that loud and clear by joining my fight to flip CA-47? No donation required – just a quick click to join our team and help us lay the groundwork for this must-win election!**
---
| | [JOIN THE FIGHT HERE - FLIP CA-47!](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=4b02d5e621&e=8a657725d1 "JOIN THE FIGHT HERE - FLIP CA-47!")
---
| For Orange County,
_Scott Baugh_
---
